authors_text: Chao Wang,Licheng Jiao,Jiaxuan Zhao,Lingling Li,Xu Liu,Fang Liu,Shuyuan Yang
title: Bi-level Multi-objective Evolutionary Learning: A Case Study on Multi-task Graph Neural Topology Search
title_zh: 双层多目标进化学习：多任务图神经拓扑搜索案例研究
abstract: The construction of machine learning models involves many bi-level multi-objective optimization problems (BL-MOPs), where upper level (UL) candidate solutions must be evaluated via training weights of a model in the lower level (LL). Due to the Pareto optimality of sub-problems and the complex dependency across UL solutions and LL weights, an UL solution is feasible if and only if the LL weight is Pareto optimal. It is computationally expensive to determine which LL Pareto weight in the LL Pareto weight set is the most appropriate for each UL solution. This paper proposes a bi-level multi-objective learning framework (BLMOL), coupling the above decision-making process with the optimization process of the UL-MOP by introducing LL preference $r$. Specifically, the UL variable and $r$ are simultaneously searched to minimize multiple UL objectives by evolutionary multi-objective algorithms. The LL weight with respect to $r$ is trained to minimize multiple LL objectives via gradient-based preference multi-objective algorithms. In addition, the preference surrogate model is constructed to replace the expensive evaluation process of the UL-MOP. We consider a novel case study on multi-task graph neural topology search. It aims to find a set of Pareto topologies and their Pareto weights, representing different trade-offs across tasks at UL and LL, respectively. The found graph neural network is employed to solve multiple tasks simultaneously, including graph classification, node classification, and link prediction. Experimental results demonstrate that BLMOL can outperform some state-of-the-art algorithms and generate well-representative UL solutions and LL weights.
summary: The construction of machine learning models involves many bi-level multi-objective optimization problems (BL-MOPs), where upper level (UL) candidate solutions must be evaluated via training weights of a model in the lower level (LL). Due to the Pareto optimality of sub-problems and the complex dependency across UL solutions and LL weights, an UL solution is feasible if and only if the LL weight is Pareto optimal. It is computationally expensive to determine which LL Pareto weight in the LL Pareto weight set is the most appropriate for each UL solution. This paper proposes a bi-level multi-objective learning framework (BLMOL), coupling the above decision-making process with the optimization process of the UL-MOP by introducing LL preference $r$. Specifically, the UL variable and $r$ are simultaneously searched to minimize multiple UL objectives by evolutionary multi-objective algorithms. The LL weight with respect to $r$ is trained to minimize multiple LL objectives via gradient-based preference multi-objective algorithms. In addition, the preference surrogate model is constructed to replace the expensive evaluation process of the UL-MOP. We consider a novel case study on multi-task graph neural topology search. It aims to find a set of Pareto topologies and their Pareto weights, representing different trade-offs across tasks at UL and LL, respectively. The found graph neural network is employed to solve multiple tasks simultaneously, including graph classification, node classification, and link prediction. Experimental results demonstrate that BLMOL can outperform some state-of-the-art algorithms and generate well-representative UL solutions and LL weights.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型的构建涉及许多双层多目标优化问题（BL-MOP），其中上层（UL）候选解决方案必须通过下层（LL）模型的训练权重进行评估。由于子问题的 Pareto 最优性以及 UL 解和 LL 权重之间的复杂依赖性，当且仅当 LL 权重是 Pareto 最优时，UL 解才是可行的。确定 LL Pareto 权重集中的哪个 LL Pareto 权重最适合每个 UL 解决方案的计算成本很高。本文提出了一种双层多目标学习框架（BLMOL），通过引入 LL 偏好 $r$ 将上述决策过程与 UL-MOP 的优化过程耦合起来。具体来说，通过进化多目标算法同时搜索 UL 变量和 $r$ 以最小化多个 UL 目标。相对于 $r$ 的 LL 权重经过训练，通过基于梯度的偏好多目标算法来最小化多个 LL 目标。此外，还构建了偏好代理模型来取代 UL-MOP 昂贵的评估过程。我们考虑一个关于多任务图神经拓扑搜索的新颖案例研究。它的目标是找到一组 Pareto 拓扑及其 Pareto 权重，分别代表 UL 和 LL 任务之间的不同权衡。所发现的图神经网络用于同时解决多个任务，包括图分类、节点分类和链接预测。实验结果表明，BLMOL 可以超越一些最先进的算法，并生成具有良好代表性的 UL 解决方案和 LL 权重。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双层多目标进化学习框架BLMOL，用于解决多任务图神经网络拓扑搜索中的双层多目标优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理双层多目标优化问题时，需为每个上层解单独评估下层帕累托最优解，计算成本高昂且难以平衡上下层目标。
AI.method: 通过引入下层偏好参数r，将决策过程与上层优化结合，利用进化算法同时搜索上层变量和r，并采用梯度基算法训练下层权重。构建偏好代理模型替代耗时评估过程。
AI.result: 在图分类、节点分类和链接预测等任务中，BLMOL生成的帕累托解集优于现有算法，能有效表征上下层任务的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: BLMOL通过整合偏好信息和代理模型，显著提升了双层多目标优化的效率，为多任务图神经网络设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zihao Xu,Guang-Yuan Hao,Hao He,Hao Wang
title: Domain-Indexing Variational Bayes: Interpretable Domain Index for Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 域索引变分贝叶斯：用于域适应的可解释域索引
abstract: Previous studies have shown that leveraging domain index can significantly boost domain adaptation performance (arXiv:2007.01807, arXiv:2202.03628). However, such domain indices are not always available. To address this challenge, we first provide a formal definition of domain index from the probabilistic perspective, and then propose an adversarial variational Bayesian framework that infers domain indices from multi-domain data, thereby providing additional insight on domain relations and improving domain adaptation performance. Our theoretical analysis shows that our adversarial variational Bayesian framework finds the optimal domain index at equilibrium. Empirical results on both synthetic and real data verify that our model can produce interpretable domain indices which enable us to achieve superior performance compared to state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods. Code is available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/VDI.
summary: Previous studies have shown that leveraging domain index can significantly boost domain adaptation performance (arXiv:2007.01807, arXiv:2202.03628). However, such domain indices are not always available. To address this challenge, we first provide a formal definition of domain index from the probabilistic perspective, and then propose an adversarial variational Bayesian framework that infers domain indices from multi-domain data, thereby providing additional insight on domain relations and improving domain adaptation performance. Our theoretical analysis shows that our adversarial variational Bayesian framework finds the optimal domain index at equilibrium. Empirical results on both synthetic and real data verify that our model can produce interpretable domain indices which enable us to achieve superior performance compared to state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods. Code is available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/VDI.
abstract_zh: 先前的研究表明，利用域索引可以显着提高域适应性能（arXiv：2007.01807，arXiv：2202.03628）。然而，这样的域索引并不总是可用的。为了应对这一挑战，我们首先从概率角度提供域索引的正式定义，然后提出一种对抗性变分贝叶斯框架，该框架从多域数据推断域索引，从而提供对域关系的额外见解并提高域适应性能。我们的理论分析表明，我们的对抗性变分贝叶斯框架找到了平衡时的最佳域索引。合成数据和真实数据的实证结果验证了我们的模型可以产生可解释的域索引，这使我们能够实现比最先进的域适应方法更优越的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/VDI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分贝叶斯框架的领域索引学习方法，用于提升领域自适应性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法依赖预定义的领域索引，但实际中此类信息常不可用，且缺乏理论指导。
AI.method: 从概率角度形式化定义领域索引，构建对抗变分贝叶斯框架，通过多领域数据推断领域索引并建立领域间关系。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上验证了方法有效性，生成的可解释领域索引优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了领域索引的自动生成与优化，在理论分析和实验结果上均验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Yanling Qiu,Qianxue Feng,Boqin Cai,Hongan Wei,Weiling Chen
title: A Correction-Based Dynamic Enhancement Framework towards Underwater Detection
title_zh: 基于校正的水下检测动态增强框架
abstract: To assist underwater object detection for better performance, image enhancement technology is often used as a pre-processing step. However, most of the existing enhancement methods tend to pursue the visual quality of an image, instead of providing effective help for detection tasks. In fact, image enhancement algorithms should be optimized with the goal of utility improvement. In this paper, to adapt to the underwater detection tasks, we proposed a lightweight dynamic enhancement algorithm using a contribution dictionary to guide low-level corrections. Dynamic solutions are designed to capture differences in detection preferences. In addition, it can also balance the inconsistency between the contribution of correction operations and their time complexity. Experimental results in real underwater object detection tasks show the superiority of our proposed method in both generalization and real-time performance.
summary: To assist underwater object detection for better performance, image enhancement technology is often used as a pre-processing step. However, most of the existing enhancement methods tend to pursue the visual quality of an image, instead of providing effective help for detection tasks. In fact, image enhancement algorithms should be optimized with the goal of utility improvement. In this paper, to adapt to the underwater detection tasks, we proposed a lightweight dynamic enhancement algorithm using a contribution dictionary to guide low-level corrections. Dynamic solutions are designed to capture differences in detection preferences. In addition, it can also balance the inconsistency between the contribution of correction operations and their time complexity. Experimental results in real underwater object detection tasks show the superiority of our proposed method in both generalization and real-time performance.
abstract_zh: 为了帮助水下物体检测获得更好的性能，图像增强技术通常被用作预处理步骤。然而，现有的增强方法大多倾向于追求图像的视觉质量，而不是为检测任务提供有效的帮助。事实上，图像增强算法应该以提高效用为目标进行优化。在本文中，为了适应水下检测任务，我们提出了一种使用贡献字典来指导低级校正的轻量级动态增强算法。动态解决方案旨在捕捉检测偏好的差异。此外，它还可以平衡校正操作的贡献与其时间复杂度之间的不一致。真实水下目标检测任务的实验结果表明了我们提出的方法在泛化和实时性能方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于校正的动态增强框架，旨在提升水下目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像增强方法过度追求视觉质量，未能有效优化检测任务的实用性，需针对性改进增强算法以提升检测效果。
AI.method: 设计轻量级动态增强算法，利用贡献字典指导低级校正，动态适应检测偏好差异并平衡校正效果与计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在真实水下检测任务中展现出优越的泛化能力和实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的动态增强框架有效提升了水下检测性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

ai_content.motivation: 现有图像增强方法过度追求视觉质量，未能有效优化检测任务的实用性，需针对性改进增强算法以提升检测效果。
ai_content.method: 设计轻量级动态增强算法，利用贡献字典指导低级校正，动态适应检测偏好差异并平衡校正效果与计算复杂度。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在真实水下检测任务中展现出优越的泛化能力和实时性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的动态增强框架有效提升了水下检测性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: A Correction-Based Dynamic Enhancement Framework towards Underwater Detection 基于校正的水下检测动态增强框架 To assist underwater object detection for better performance, image enhancement technology is often used as a pre-processing step. However, most of the existing enhancement methods tend to pursue the visual quality of an image, instead of providing effective help for detection tasks. In fact, image enhancement algorithms should be optimized with the goal of utility improvement. In this paper, to adapt to the underwater detection tasks, we proposed a lightweight dynamic enhancement algorithm using a contribution dictionary to guide low-level corrections. Dynamic solutions are designed to capture differences in detection preferences. In addition, it can also balance the inconsistency between the contribution of correction operations and their time complexity. Experimental results in real underwater object detection tasks show the superiority of our proposed method in both generalization and real-time performance. 为了帮助水下物体检测获得更好的性能，图像增强技术通常被用作预处理步骤。然而，现有的增强方法大多倾向于追求图像的视觉质量，而不是为检测任务提供有效的帮助。事实上，图像增强算法应该以提高效用为目标进行优化。在本文中，为了适应水下检测任务，我们提出了一种使用贡献字典来指导低级校正的轻量级动态增强算法。动态解决方案旨在捕捉检测偏好的差异。此外，它还可以平衡校正操作的贡献与其时间复杂度之间的不一致。真实水下目标检测任务的实验结果表明了我们提出的方法在泛化和实时性能方面的优越性。 本文提出一种基于校正的动态增强框架，旨在提升水下目标检测的性能。 Yanling Qiu,Qianxue Feng,Boqin Cai,Hongan Wei,Weiling Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Zachary Novack,Julian McAuley,Zachary C. Lipton,Saurabh Garg
title: CHiLS: Zero-Shot Image Classification with Hierarchical Label Sets
title_zh: CHiLS：具有分层标签集的零样本图像分类
abstract: Open vocabulary models (e.g. CLIP) have shown strong performance on zero-shot classification through their ability generate embeddings for each class based on their (natural language) names. Prior work has focused on improving the accuracy of these models through prompt engineering or by incorporating a small amount of labeled downstream data (via finetuning). However, there has been little focus on improving the richness of the class names themselves, which can pose issues when class labels are coarsely-defined and are uninformative. We propose Classification with Hierarchical Label Sets (or CHiLS), an alternative strategy for zero-shot classification specifically designed for datasets with implicit semantic hierarchies. CHiLS proceeds in three steps: (i) for each class, produce a set of subclasses, using either existing label hierarchies or by querying GPT-3; (ii) perform the standard zero-shot CLIP procedure as though these subclasses were the labels of interest; (iii) map the predicted subclass back to its parent to produce the final prediction. Across numerous datasets with underlying hierarchical structure, CHiLS leads to improved accuracy in situations both with and without ground-truth hierarchical information. CHiLS is simple to implement within existing zero-shot pipelines and requires no additional training cost. Code is available at: https://github.com/acmi-lab/CHILS.
summary: Open vocabulary models (e.g. CLIP) have shown strong performance on zero-shot classification through their ability generate embeddings for each class based on their (natural language) names. Prior work has focused on improving the accuracy of these models through prompt engineering or by incorporating a small amount of labeled downstream data (via finetuning). However, there has been little focus on improving the richness of the class names themselves, which can pose issues when class labels are coarsely-defined and are uninformative. We propose Classification with Hierarchical Label Sets (or CHiLS), an alternative strategy for zero-shot classification specifically designed for datasets with implicit semantic hierarchies. CHiLS proceeds in three steps: (i) for each class, produce a set of subclasses, using either existing label hierarchies or by querying GPT-3; (ii) perform the standard zero-shot CLIP procedure as though these subclasses were the labels of interest; (iii) map the predicted subclass back to its parent to produce the final prediction. Across numerous datasets with underlying hierarchical structure, CHiLS leads to improved accuracy in situations both with and without ground-truth hierarchical information. CHiLS is simple to implement within existing zero-shot pipelines and requires no additional training cost. Code is available at: https://github.com/acmi-lab/CHILS.
abstract_zh: 开放词汇模型（例如 CLIP）能够根据（自然语言）名称为每个类生成嵌入，从而在零样本分类方面表现出强大的性能。之前的工作重点是通过快速工程或合并少量标记的下游数据（通过微调）来提高这些模型的准确性。然而，人们很少关注提高类名称本身的丰富性，当类标签定义粗略且信息不丰富时，这可能会带来问题。我们提出了分层标签集分类（或 CHiLS），这是一种零样本分类的替代策略，专门为具有隐式语义层次结构的数据集设计。 CHiLS 分三个步骤进行：(i) 对于每个类，使用现有标签层次结构或通过查询 GPT-3 生成一组子类； (ii) 执行标准零样本 CLIP 程序，就好像这些子类是感兴趣的标签一样； (iii) 将预测的子类映射回其父类以产生最终的预测。在具有底层分层结构的众多数据集中，CHiLS 在有或没有真实分层信息的情况下都能提高准确性。 CHiLS 在现有的零样本管道中实现起来很简单，并且不需要额外的培训成本。代码位于：https://github.com/acmi-lab/CHILS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHiLS方法，通过利用层次化标签集提升零样本图像分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本分类模型（如CLIP）依赖类名生成嵌入，但未充分优化类名本身的丰富性，导致粗粒度或不具信息量的标签影响性能。
AI.method: CHiLS分三步：1）为每个类生成子类标签（基于现有层次或GPT-3）；2）以子类为标签执行标准零样本CLIP流程；3）将预测的子类映射回父类得到最终结果。
AI.result: 在多个具有隐含语义层次的数据集上，CHiLS在有无真实层次信息的情况下均取得更高准确率，且无需额外训练成本。
AI.conclusion: CHiLS通过层次化标签增强分类表现，方法简单易集成于现有零样本流程，代码已开源。

authors_text: Yi Wu,Ziqiang Li,Chaoyue Wang,Heliang Zheng,Shanshan Zhao,Bin Li,Dacheng Tao
title: Domain Re-Modulation for Few-Shot Generative Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于少样本生成域适应的域重新调制
abstract: In this study, we delve into the task of few-shot Generative Domain Adaptation (GDA), which involves transferring a pre-trained generator from one domain to a new domain using only a few reference images. Inspired by the way human brains acquire knowledge in new domains, we present an innovative generator structure called Domain Re-Modulation (DoRM). DoRM not only meets the criteria of high quality, large synthesis diversity, and cross-domain consistency, which were achieved by previous research in GDA, but also incorporates memory and domain association, akin to how human brains operate. Specifically, DoRM freezes the source generator and introduces new mapping and affine modules (M&A modules) to capture the attributes of the target domain during GDA. This process resembles the formation of new synapses in human brains. Consequently, a linearly combinable domain shift occurs in the style space. By incorporating multiple new M&A modules, the generator gains the capability to perform high-fidelity multi-domain and hybrid-domain generation. Moreover, to maintain cross-domain consistency more effectively, we introduce a similarity-based structure loss. This loss aligns the auto-correlation map of the target image with its corresponding auto-correlation map of the source image during training. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the superior performance of our DoRM and similarity-based structure loss in few-shot GDA, both quantitatively and qualitatively. The code will be available at https://github.com/wuyi2020/DoRM.
summary: In this study, we delve into the task of few-shot Generative Domain Adaptation (GDA), which involves transferring a pre-trained generator from one domain to a new domain using only a few reference images. Inspired by the way human brains acquire knowledge in new domains, we present an innovative generator structure called Domain Re-Modulation (DoRM). DoRM not only meets the criteria of high quality, large synthesis diversity, and cross-domain consistency, which were achieved by previous research in GDA, but also incorporates memory and domain association, akin to how human brains operate. Specifically, DoRM freezes the source generator and introduces new mapping and affine modules (M&A modules) to capture the attributes of the target domain during GDA. This process resembles the formation of new synapses in human brains. Consequently, a linearly combinable domain shift occurs in the style space. By incorporating multiple new M&A modules, the generator gains the capability to perform high-fidelity multi-domain and hybrid-domain generation. Moreover, to maintain cross-domain consistency more effectively, we introduce a similarity-based structure loss. This loss aligns the auto-correlation map of the target image with its corresponding auto-correlation map of the source image during training. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the superior performance of our DoRM and similarity-based structure loss in few-shot GDA, both quantitatively and qualitatively. The code will be available at https://github.com/wuyi2020/DoRM.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们深入研究了少镜头生成域适应（GDA）的任务，其中涉及仅使用少量参考图像将预训练的生成器从一个域转移到新域。受到人类大脑获取新领域知识的方式的启发，我们提出了一种称为领域重新调制（DoRM）的创新生成器结构。 DoRM不仅满足GDA先前研究实现的高质量、大合成多样性和跨领域一致性的标准，而且还融合了记忆和领域关联，类似于人脑的运作方式。具体来说，DoRM 冻结源生成器并引入新的映射和仿射模块（M&A 模块）以在 GDA 期间捕获目标域的属性。这个过程类似于人脑中新突触的形成。因此，风格空间中会发生线性可组合域转移。通过整合多个新的并购模块，生成器获得了执行高保真多域和混合域生成的能力。此外，为了更有效地保持跨域一致性，我们引入了基于相似性的结构损失。该损失在训练期间将目标图像的自相关图与其对应的源图像的自相关图对齐。通过大量的实验，我们在定量和定性方面证明了 DoRM 和少样本 GDA 中基于相似性的结构损失的优越性能。该代码将在 https://github.com/wuyi2020/DoRM 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在仅有少量参考图像的情况下，如何将预训练生成器从源域迁移至新域的少样本生成域适应（GDA）任务。
AI.motivation: 受人类大脑在新领域获取知识方式的启发，旨在解决传统GDA方法在生成质量、多样性及跨域一致性上的不足，并引入记忆与领域关联机制以提升适应能力。
AI.method: 提出Domain Re-Modulation（DoRM）结构，冻结源生成器并引入映射与仿射模块（M&A模块）捕捉目标域属性，通过线性组合实现风格空间域偏移，并设计基于相似性的结构损失以保持跨域一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，DoRM及结构损失在少样本GDA任务中表现出色，生成质量与多样性均优于现有方法，且支持多域与混合域生成。
AI.conclusion: DoRM通过模拟人脑机制有效解决了少样本GDA问题，为跨域生成提供了高保真且一致的解决方案。

DoRM not only meets the criteria of high quality, large synthesis diversity, and cross-domain consistency, which were achieved by previous research in GDA, but also incorporates memory and domain association, akin to how human brains operate. This process resembles the formation of new synapses in human brains. Consequently, a linearly combinable domain shift occurs in the style space. By incorporating multiple new M&A modules, the generator gains the capability to perform high-fidelity multi-domain and hybrid-domain generation. Moreover, to maintain cross-domain consistency more effectively, we introduce a similarity-based structure loss. This loss aligns the auto-correlation map of the target image with its corresponding auto-correlation map of the source image during training. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the superior performance of our DoRM and similarity-based structure loss in few-shot GDA, both quantitatively and qualitatively. The code will be available at https://github.com/wuyi2020/DoRM. 在这项研究中，我们深入研究了少镜头生成域适应（GDA）的任务，其中涉及仅使用少量参考图像将预训练的生成器从一个域转移到新域。受到人类大脑获取新领域知识的方式的启发，我们提出了一种称为领域重新调制（DoRM）的创新生成器结构。 DoRM不仅满足GDA先前研究实现的高质量、大合成多样性和跨领域一致性的标准，而且还融合了记忆和领域关联，类似于人脑的运作方式。具体来说，DoRM 冻结源生成器并引入新的映射和仿射模块（M&A 模块）以在 GDA 期间捕获目标域的属性。这个过程类似于人脑中新突触的形成。因此，风格空间中会发生线性可组合域转移。通过整合多个新的并购模块，生成器获得了执行高保真多域和混合域生成的能力。此外，为了更有效地保持跨域一致性，我们引入了基于相似性的结构损失。该损失在训练期间将目标图像的自相关图与其对应的源图像的自相关图对齐。通过大量的实验，我们在定量和定性方面证明了 DoRM 和少样本 GDA 中基于相似性的结构损失的优越性能。该代码将在 https://github.com/wuyi2020/DoRM 上提供。 本文研究了在仅有少量参考图像的情况下，如何将预训练生成器从源域迁移至新域的少样本生成域适应（GDA）任务。 Yi Wu,Ziqiang Li,Chaoyue Wang,Heliang Zheng,Shanshan Zhao,Bin Li,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Dingxin Zhang,Jianhui Yu,Chaoyi Zhang,Weidong Cai
title: PaRot: Patch-Wise Rotation-Invariant Network via Feature Disentanglement and Pose Restoration
title_zh: PaRot：通过特征解缠和姿势恢复的分片旋转不变网络
abstract: Recent interest in point cloud analysis has led rapid progress in designing deep learning methods for 3D models. However, state-of-the-art models are not robust to rotations, which remains an unknown prior to real applications and harms the model performance. In this work, we introduce a novel Patch-wise Rotation-invariant network (PaRot), which achieves rotation invariance via feature disentanglement and produces consistent predictions for samples with arbitrary rotations. Specifically, we design a siamese training module which disentangles rotation invariance and equivariance from patches defined over different scales, e.g., the local geometry and global shape, via a pair of rotations. However, our disentangled invariant feature loses the intrinsic pose information of each patch. To solve this problem, we propose a rotation-invariant geometric relation to restore the relative pose with equivariant information for patches defined over different scales. Utilising the pose information, we propose a hierarchical module which implements intra-scale and inter-scale feature aggregation for 3D shape learning. Moreover, we introduce a pose-aware feature propagation process with the rotation-invariant relative pose information embedded. Experiments show that our disentanglement module extracts high-quality rotation-robust features and the proposed lightweight model achieves competitive results in rotated 3D object classification and part segmentation tasks. Our project page is released at: https://patchrot.github.io/.
summary: Recent interest in point cloud analysis has led rapid progress in designing deep learning methods for 3D models. However, state-of-the-art models are not robust to rotations, which remains an unknown prior to real applications and harms the model performance. In this work, we introduce a novel Patch-wise Rotation-invariant network (PaRot), which achieves rotation invariance via feature disentanglement and produces consistent predictions for samples with arbitrary rotations. Specifically, we design a siamese training module which disentangles rotation invariance and equivariance from patches defined over different scales, e.g., the local geometry and global shape, via a pair of rotations. However, our disentangled invariant feature loses the intrinsic pose information of each patch. To solve this problem, we propose a rotation-invariant geometric relation to restore the relative pose with equivariant information for patches defined over different scales. Utilising the pose information, we propose a hierarchical module which implements intra-scale and inter-scale feature aggregation for 3D shape learning. Moreover, we introduce a pose-aware feature propagation process with the rotation-invariant relative pose information embedded. Experiments show that our disentanglement module extracts high-quality rotation-robust features and the proposed lightweight model achieves competitive results in rotated 3D object classification and part segmentation tasks. Our project page is released at: https://patchrot.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 最近对点云分析的兴趣带动了 3D 模型深度学习方法设计的快速进展。然而，最先进的模型对于旋转并不鲁棒，这在实际应用之前仍然是未知的，并且会损害模型性能。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的分片旋转不变网络（PaRot），它通过特征解缠实现旋转不变性，并对任意旋转的样本产生一致的预测。具体来说，我们设计了一个孪生训练模块，它通过一对旋转将旋转不变性和等变性与在不同尺度（例如局部几何形状和全局形状）上定义的补丁分开。然而，我们解开的不变特征丢失了每个补丁的内在姿态信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种旋转不变的几何关系，用不同尺度定义的补丁的等变信息来恢复相对姿态。利用姿势信息，我们提出了一个分层模块，它实现了 3D 形状学习的尺度内和尺度间特征聚合。此外，我们引入了嵌入旋转不变相对姿态信息的姿态感知特征传播过程。实验表明，我们的解缠结模块提取了高质量的旋转鲁棒特征，并且所提出的轻量级模型在旋转 3D 对象分类和零件分割任务中取得了有竞争力的结果。我们的项目页面发布于：https://patchrot.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PaRot的网络，通过特征解耦和姿态恢复实现点云数据的旋转不变性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D模型分析方法对旋转敏感，影响实际应用效果，需提升模型在旋转场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计双胞胎训练模块解耦局部几何与全局形状的旋转不变性与等变性，并通过旋转不变几何关系恢复姿态信息，结合分层模块实现多尺度特征聚合。
AI.result: 实验表明该轻量模型在旋转3D物体分类和部件分割任务中取得竞争力结果，特征解耦模块提取出高质量旋转鲁棒特征。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征解耦与姿态恢复机制，PaRot有效解决了3D点云分析中的旋转不变性问题，为实际应用提供可靠方案。

authors_text: Zhaoshan Liu,Lei Shen
title: CECT: Controllable Ensemble CNN and Transformer for COVID-19 Image Classification
title_zh: CECT：用于 COVID-19 图像分类的可控集成 CNN 和 Transformer
comment: Computers in Biology and Medicine Accepted
comments: Computers in Biology and Medicine Accepted
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has resulted in hundreds of million cases and numerous deaths worldwide. Here, we develop a novel classification network CECT by controllable ensemble convolutional neural network and transformer to provide a timely and accurate COVID-19 diagnosis. The CECT is composed of a parallel convolutional encoder block, an aggregate transposed-convolutional decoder block, and a windowed attention classification block. Each block captures features at different scales from 28 $\times$ 28 to 224 $\times$ 224 from the input, composing enriched and comprehensive information. Different from existing methods, our CECT can capture features at both multi-local and global scales without any sophisticated module design. Moreover, the contribution of local features at different scales can be controlled with the proposed ensemble coefficients. We evaluate CECT on two public COVID-19 datasets and it reaches the highest accuracy of 98.1% in the intra-dataset evaluation, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the developed CECT achieves an accuracy of 90.9% on the unseen dataset in the inter-dataset evaluation, showing extraordinary generalization ability. With remarkable feature capture ability and generalization ability, we believe CECT can be extended to other medical scenarios as a powerful diagnosis tool. Code is available at https://github.com/NUS-Tim/CECT.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has resulted in hundreds of million cases and numerous deaths worldwide. Here, we develop a novel classification network CECT by controllable ensemble convolutional neural network and transformer to provide a timely and accurate COVID-19 diagnosis. The CECT is composed of a parallel convolutional encoder block, an aggregate transposed-convolutional decoder block, and a windowed attention classification block. Each block captures features at different scales from 28 $\times$ 28 to 224 $\times$ 224 from the input, composing enriched and comprehensive information. Different from existing methods, our CECT can capture features at both multi-local and global scales without any sophisticated module design. Moreover, the contribution of local features at different scales can be controlled with the proposed ensemble coefficients. We evaluate CECT on two public COVID-19 datasets and it reaches the highest accuracy of 98.1% in the intra-dataset evaluation, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the developed CECT achieves an accuracy of 90.9% on the unseen dataset in the inter-dataset evaluation, showing extraordinary generalization ability. With remarkable feature capture ability and generalization ability, we believe CECT can be extended to other medical scenarios as a powerful diagnosis tool. Code is available at https://github.com/NUS-Tim/CECT.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行已在全球范围内造成数亿病例和多人死亡。在这里，我们通过可控集成卷积神经网络和变压器开发了一种新型分类网络 CECT，以提供及时、准确的 COVID-19 诊断。 CECT 由并行卷积编码器块、聚合转置卷积解码器块和窗口注意力分类块组成。每个块从输入中捕获从 28 $\times$ 28 到 224 $\times$ 224 不同尺度的特征，组成丰富且全面的信息。与现有方法不同，我们的 CECT 可以捕获多局部和全局尺度的特征，而无需任何复杂的模块设计。此外，可以使用所提出的集成系数来控制不同尺度的局部特征的贡献。我们在两个公共 COVID-19 数据集上评估 CECT，它在数据集内评估中达到了 98.1% 的最高准确率，优于现有的最先进方法。此外，所开发的CECT在数据集间评估中对未见过的数据集的准确率达到90.9%，表现出非凡的泛化能力。凭借卓越的特征捕获能力和泛化能力，我们相信CECT可以作为强大的诊断工具扩展到其他医疗场景。代码可在 https://github.com/NUS-Tim/CECT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可控集成CNN与Transformer的CECT模型，用于提升新冠影像分类的准确性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有新冠诊断方法在特征提取尺度性和模型泛化能力上存在不足，需设计无需复杂模块且可控制多尺度特征贡献的模型。
AI.method: 构建包含并行卷积编码器、转置卷积解码器和窗口注意力分类器的CECT框架，通过可控集成系数调节不同尺度局部特征贡献。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集内测准确率达98.1%，跨数据集测试准确率90.9%，均优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: CECT凭借多尺度特征捕捉与泛化能力，可作为通用医疗诊断工具扩展至其他场景。

authors_text: Sina Shaham,Gabriel Ghinita,Cyrus Shahabi
title: Fair Spatial Indexing: A paradigm for Group Spatial Fairness
title_zh: 公平空间索引：群体空间公平的范例
abstract: Machine learning (ML) is playing an increasing role in decision-making tasks that directly affect individuals, e.g., loan approvals, or job applicant screening. Significant concerns arise that, without special provisions, individuals from under-privileged backgrounds may not get equitable access to services and opportunities. Existing research studies fairness with respect to protected attributes such as gender, race or income, but the impact of location data on fairness has been largely overlooked. With the widespread adoption of mobile apps, geospatial attributes are increasingly used in ML, and their potential to introduce unfair bias is significant, given their high correlation with protected attributes. We propose techniques to mitigate location bias in machine learning. Specifically, we consider the issue of miscalibration when dealing with geospatial attributes. We focus on spatial group fairness and we propose a spatial indexing algorithm that accounts for fairness. Our KD-tree inspired approach significantly improves fairness while maintaining high learning accuracy, as shown by extensive experimental results on real data.
summary: Machine learning (ML) is playing an increasing role in decision-making tasks that directly affect individuals, e.g., loan approvals, or job applicant screening. Significant concerns arise that, without special provisions, individuals from under-privileged backgrounds may not get equitable access to services and opportunities. Existing research studies fairness with respect to protected attributes such as gender, race or income, but the impact of location data on fairness has been largely overlooked. With the widespread adoption of mobile apps, geospatial attributes are increasingly used in ML, and their potential to introduce unfair bias is significant, given their high correlation with protected attributes. We propose techniques to mitigate location bias in machine learning. Specifically, we consider the issue of miscalibration when dealing with geospatial attributes. We focus on spatial group fairness and we propose a spatial indexing algorithm that accounts for fairness. Our KD-tree inspired approach significantly improves fairness while maintaining high learning accuracy, as shown by extensive experimental results on real data.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 在直接影响个人的决策任务中发挥着越来越重要的作用，例如贷款审批或求职者筛选。人们非常担心，如果没有特殊规定，来自贫困背景的个人可能无法公平地获得服务和机会。现有研究研究性别、种族或收入等受保护属性的公平性，但位置数据对公平性的影响在很大程度上被忽视。随着移动应用程序的广泛采用，地理空间属性越来越多地在机器学习中使用，鉴于它们与受保护属性的高度相关性，它们引入不公平偏见的可能性很大。我们提出了减轻机器学习中位置偏差的技术。具体来说，我们在处理地理空间属性时考虑错误校准的问题。我们关注空间组公平性，并提出了一种考虑公平性的空间索引算法。正如真实数据上的大量实验结果所表明的那样，我们受 KD 树启发的方法显着提高了公平性，同时保持了较高的学习准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种空间索引算法，通过缓解地理位置数据在机器学习中的偏差，实现空间群体公平性。
AI.motivation: 地理位置数据与受保护属性（如收入）高度相关，但其对公平性的影响被长期忽视，可能导致机器学习决策中的隐性歧视。
AI.method: 基于KD树设计空间索引算法，通过校准地理位置属性的分布，减少因空间划分导致的群体公平性偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在真实数据集上显著提升公平性指标，同时保持高模型预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 空间索引算法为解决地理数据驱动的机器学习公平性问题提供了有效技术路径。

authors_text: Sheng Luo,Yihan He,Baofang Cai,Xiao Gong,Gengchiau Liang
title: Probabilistic-Bits based on Ferroelectric Field-Effect Transistors for Stochastic Computing
title_zh: 用于随机计算的基于铁电场效应晶体管的概率位
comment: 23 pages, 7 figures and supplementary materials with 3 notes
comments: 23 pages, 7 figures and supplementary materials with 3 notes
abstract: A probabilistic-bit (p-bit) is the fundamental building block in the circuit network of a stochastic computing, and it could produce a continuous random bit-stream with tunable probability. Utilizing the stochasticity in few-domain ferroelectric material(FE), we propose for the first time, the p-bits based on ferroelectric FET. The stochasticity of the FE p-bits stems from the thermal noise-induced lattice vibration, which renders dipole fluctuations and is tunable by an external electric field. The impact of several key FE parameters on p-bits' stochasticity is evaluated, where the domain properties are revealed to play crucial roles. Furthermore, the integer factorization based on FE p-bits circuit network is performed to verify its functionality, and the accuracy is found to depend on FE p-bits' stochasticity. The proposed FE p-bits possess the advantages of both extremely low hardware coast and the compatibility with CMOS-technology, rendering it a promising candidate for stochastic computing applications.
summary: A probabilistic-bit (p-bit) is the fundamental building block in the circuit network of a stochastic computing, and it could produce a continuous random bit-stream with tunable probability. Utilizing the stochasticity in few-domain ferroelectric material(FE), we propose for the first time, the p-bits based on ferroelectric FET. The stochasticity of the FE p-bits stems from the thermal noise-induced lattice vibration, which renders dipole fluctuations and is tunable by an external electric field. The impact of several key FE parameters on p-bits' stochasticity is evaluated, where the domain properties are revealed to play crucial roles. Furthermore, the integer factorization based on FE p-bits circuit network is performed to verify its functionality, and the accuracy is found to depend on FE p-bits' stochasticity. The proposed FE p-bits possess the advantages of both extremely low hardware coast and the compatibility with CMOS-technology, rendering it a promising candidate for stochastic computing applications.
abstract_zh: 概率位（p位）是随机计算电路网络中的基本构建块，它可以产生具有可调概率的连续随机位流。利用少域铁电材料（FE）的随机性，我们首次提出基于铁电 FET 的 p 位。 FE p 位的随机性源于热噪声引起的晶格振动，它会导致偶极子涨落，并且可以通过外部电场进行调节。评估了几个关键有限元参数对 p 位随机性的影响，其中域属性发挥了至关重要的作用。此外，基于FE p位电路网络进行整数分解以验证其功能，发现精度取决于FE p位的随机性。所提出的 FE p 位具有极低硬件性能和与 CMOS 技术兼容的优点，使其成为随机计算应用的有希望的候选者。

AI.tldr: 提出基于铁电场效应晶体管（FE FET）的概率位（p-bit）用于随机计算，利用铁电材料的热噪声实现可调概率的随机位流。
AI.motivation: 传统p-bit存在高硬件成本和与CMOS工艺不兼容的问题，铁电材料具备低功耗和与CMOS兼容的潜力，需探索其在随机计算中的应用。
AI.method: 基于铁电FET的热噪声诱导晶格振动产生随机性，通过外部电场调节概率，评估铁电参数对随机性的影响，并构建电路网络验证功能。
AI.result: 整数分解实验验证了FE p-bit的功能，准确性依赖于其随机性，同时展示了低硬件成本和CMOS兼容性优势。
AI.conclusion: 铁电p-bit因其低硬件成本、CMOS兼容性及可调随机性，成为随机计算的有前途候选方案，未来可进一步优化参数以提高计算精度。

authors_text: Dianxin Luan,John Thompson
title: Achieving Robust Generalization for Wireless Channel Estimation Neural Networks by Designed Training Data
title_zh: 通过设计的训练数据实现无线信道估计神经网络的鲁棒泛化
abstract: In this paper, we propose a method to design the training data that can support robust generalization of trained neural networks to unseen channels. The proposed design that improves the generalization is described and analysed. It avoids the requirement of online training for previously unseen channels, as this is a memory and processing intensive solution, especially for battery powered mobile terminals. To prove the validity of the proposed method, we use the channels modelled by different standards and fading modelling for simulation. We also use an attention-based structure and a convolutional neural network to evaluate the generalization results achieved. Simulation results show that the trained neural networks maintain almost identical performance on the unseen channels.
summary: In this paper, we propose a method to design the training data that can support robust generalization of trained neural networks to unseen channels. The proposed design that improves the generalization is described and analysed. It avoids the requirement of online training for previously unseen channels, as this is a memory and processing intensive solution, especially for battery powered mobile terminals. To prove the validity of the proposed method, we use the channels modelled by different standards and fading modelling for simulation. We also use an attention-based structure and a convolutional neural network to evaluate the generalization results achieved. Simulation results show that the trained neural networks maintain almost identical performance on the unseen channels.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种设计训练数据的方法，该方法可以支持训练后的神经网络对未见过的通道的鲁棒泛化。描述和分析了所提出的提高泛化性的设计。它避免了对以前未见过的通道进行在线培训的要求，因为这是一种内存和处理密集型解决方案，特别是对于电池供电的移动终端。为了证明该方法的有效性，我们使用不同标准建模的信道和衰落建模进行仿真。我们还使用基于注意力的结构和卷积神经网络来评估所实现的泛化结果。仿真结果表明，经过训练的神经网络在看不见的通道上保持几乎相同的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种设计训练数据的方法，以提升无线信道估计神经网络在未见过的信道上的鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统在线训练方法对电池供电的移动终端存在内存和计算资源消耗过大的问题，需离线设计训练数据以实现高效泛化。
AI.method: 通过设计特定训练数据并结合注意力机制与卷积神经网络，验证神经网络在不同标准和衰落模型下的泛化性能。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，训练后的神经网络在未见过的信道上保持了与训练信道几乎一致的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法无需在线训练即可实现无线信道估计的鲁棒泛化，有效降低了移动终端的资源消耗。

method: 通过设计特定训练数据并结合注意力机制与卷积神经网络，验证神经网络在不同标准和衰落模型下的泛化性能。
result: 仿真结果表明，训练后的神经网络在未见过的信道上保持了与训练信道几乎一致的性能表现。
conclusion: 所提方法无需在线训练即可实现无线信道估计的鲁棒泛化，有效降低了移动终端的资源消耗。
search_text: Achieving Robust Generalization for Wireless Channel Estimation Neural Networks by Designed Training Data 通过设计的训练数据实现无线信道估计神经网络的鲁棒泛化 In this paper, we propose a method to design the training data that can support robust generalization of trained neural networks to unseen channels. The proposed design that improves the generalization is described and analysed. It avoids the requirement of online training for previously unseen channels, as this is a memory and processing intensive solution, especially for battery powered mobile terminals. To prove the validity of the proposed method, we use the channels modelled by different standards and fading modelling for simulation. We also use an attention-based structure and a convolutional neural network to evaluate the generalization results achieved. Simulation results show that the trained neural networks maintain almost identical performance on the unseen channels. 在本文中，我们提出了一种设计训练数据的方法，该方法可以支持训练后的神经网络对未见过的通道的鲁棒泛化。描述和分析了所提出的提高泛化性的设计。它避免了对以前未见过的通道进行在线培训的要求，因为这是一种内存和处理密集型解决方案，特别是对于电池供电的移动终端。为了证明该方法的有效性，我们使用不同标准建模的信道和衰落建模进行仿真。我们还使用基于注意力的结构和卷积神经网络来评估所实现的泛化结果。仿真结果表明，经过训练的神经网络在看不见的通道上保持几乎相同的性能。 本文提出一种设计训练数据的方法，以提升无线信道估计神经网络在未见过的信道上的鲁棒泛化能力。 Dianxin Luan,John Thompson eess.SP,cs.AI

authors_text: Zichuan Lin,Xiapeng Wu,Mingfei Sun,Deheng Ye,Qiang Fu,Wei Yang,Wei Liu
title: Sample Dropout: A Simple yet Effective Variance Reduction Technique in Deep Policy Optimization
title_zh: 样本 Dropout：深度策略优化中简单而有效的方差减少技术
abstract: Recent success in Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) methods has shown that policy optimization with respect to an off-policy distribution via importance sampling is effective for sample reuse. In this paper, we show that the use of importance sampling could introduce high variance in the objective estimate. Specifically, we show in a principled way that the variance of importance sampling estimate grows quadratically with importance ratios and the large ratios could consequently jeopardize the effectiveness of surrogate objective optimization. We then propose a technique called sample dropout to bound the estimation variance by dropping out samples when their ratio deviation is too high. We instantiate this sample dropout technique on representative policy optimization algorithms, including TRPO, PPO, and ESPO, and demonstrate that it consistently boosts the performance of those DRL algorithms on both continuous and discrete action controls, including MuJoCo, DMControl and Atari video games. Our code is open-sourced at \url{https://github.com/LinZichuan/sdpo.git}.
summary: Recent success in Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) methods has shown that policy optimization with respect to an off-policy distribution via importance sampling is effective for sample reuse. In this paper, we show that the use of importance sampling could introduce high variance in the objective estimate. Specifically, we show in a principled way that the variance of importance sampling estimate grows quadratically with importance ratios and the large ratios could consequently jeopardize the effectiveness of surrogate objective optimization. We then propose a technique called sample dropout to bound the estimation variance by dropping out samples when their ratio deviation is too high. We instantiate this sample dropout technique on representative policy optimization algorithms, including TRPO, PPO, and ESPO, and demonstrate that it consistently boosts the performance of those DRL algorithms on both continuous and discrete action controls, including MuJoCo, DMControl and Atari video games. Our code is open-sourced at \url{https://github.com/LinZichuan/sdpo.git}.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）方法最近的成功表明，通过重要性采样对离策略分布进行策略优化对于样本重用是有效的。在本文中，我们表明使用重要性抽样可能会在客观估计中引入高方差。具体来说，我们以一种原则性的方式表明，重要性抽样估计的方差随着重要性比率呈二次方增长，并且大比率可能因此危及替代目标优化的有效性。然后，我们提出了一种称为样本丢弃的技术，通过在比率偏差过高时丢弃样本来限制估计方差。我们在代表性策略优化算法（包括 TRPO、PPO 和 ESPO）上实例化了这种示例 dropout 技术，并证明它能够持续提高这些 DRL 算法在连续和离散动作控制（包括 MuJoCo、DMControl 和 Atari 视频游戏）上的性能。我们的代码在 \url{https://github.com/LinZichuan/sdpo.git} 上开源。

AI.tldr: 提出样本丢弃技术来减少深度策略优化中的方差
AI.motivation: 重要性采样导致高方差，影响优化效果
AI.method: 样本丢弃，当比率偏差过高时丢弃样本
AI.result: 在多个环境中提升算法性能
AI.conclusion: 该技术简单有效，提升DRL算法效果

authors_text: Zixin Yang,Richard Simon,Cristian A. Linte
title: A Disparity Refinement Framework for Learning-based Stereo Matching Methods in Cross-domain Setting for Laparoscopic Images
title_zh: 腹腔镜图像跨域设置中基于学习的立体匹配方法的视差细化框架
abstract: Purpose: Stereo matching methods that enable depth estimation are crucial for visualization enhancement applications in computer-assisted surgery (CAS). Learning-based stereo matching methods are promising to predict accurate results on laparoscopic images. However, they require a large amount of training data, and their performance may be degraded due to domain shifts. Methods: Maintaining robustness and improving the accuracy of learning-based methods are still open problems. To overcome the limitations of learning-based methods, we propose a disparity refinement framework consisting of a local disparity refinement method and a global disparity refinement method to improve the results of learning-based stereo matching methods in a cross-domain setting. Those learning-based stereo matching methods are pre-trained on a large public dataset of natural images and are tested on two datasets of laparoscopic images. Results: Qualitative and quantitative results suggest that our proposed disparity framework can effectively refine disparity maps when they are noise-corrupted on an unseen dataset, without compromising prediction accuracy when the network can generalize well on an unseen dataset. Conclusion: Our proposed disparity refinement framework could work with learning-based methods to achieve robust and accurate disparity prediction. Yet, as a large laparoscopic dataset for training learning-based methods does not exist and the generalization ability of networks remains to be improved, the incorporation of the proposed disparity refinement framework into existing networks will contribute to improving their overall accuracy and robustness associated with depth estimation.
summary: Purpose: Stereo matching methods that enable depth estimation are crucial for visualization enhancement applications in computer-assisted surgery (CAS). Learning-based stereo matching methods are promising to predict accurate results on laparoscopic images. However, they require a large amount of training data, and their performance may be degraded due to domain shifts. Methods: Maintaining robustness and improving the accuracy of learning-based methods are still open problems. To overcome the limitations of learning-based methods, we propose a disparity refinement framework consisting of a local disparity refinement method and a global disparity refinement method to improve the results of learning-based stereo matching methods in a cross-domain setting. Those learning-based stereo matching methods are pre-trained on a large public dataset of natural images and are tested on two datasets of laparoscopic images. Results: Qualitative and quantitative results suggest that our proposed disparity framework can effectively refine disparity maps when they are noise-corrupted on an unseen dataset, without compromising prediction accuracy when the network can generalize well on an unseen dataset. Conclusion: Our proposed disparity refinement framework could work with learning-based methods to achieve robust and accurate disparity prediction. Yet, as a large laparoscopic dataset for training learning-based methods does not exist and the generalization ability of networks remains to be improved, the incorporation of the proposed disparity refinement framework into existing networks will contribute to improving their overall accuracy and robustness associated with depth estimation.
abstract_zh: 目的：能够进行深度估计的立体匹配方法对于计算机辅助手术（CAS）中的可视化增强应用至关重要。基于学习的立体匹配方法有望预测腹腔镜图像的准确结果。然而，它们需要大量的训练数据，并且它们的性能可能会由于域转移而降低。方法：保持基于学习的方法的稳健性和提高准确性仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了克服基于学习的方法的局限性，我们提出了一种由局部视差细化方法和全局视差细化方法组成的视差细化框架，以改进跨域设置中基于学习的立体匹配方法的结果。这些基于学习的立体匹配方法在大型公共自然图像数据集上进行了预训练，并在两个腹腔镜图像数据集上进行了测试。结果：定性和定量结果表明，当网络在未见过的数据集上很好地泛化时，我们提出的视差框架可以有效地细化视差图，当视差图在未见过的数据集上受到噪声损坏时，不会影响预测准确性。结论：我们提出的视差细化框架可以与基于学习的方法配合使用，以实现稳健且准确的视差预测。然而，由于不存在用于训练基于学习的方法的大型腹腔镜数据集，并且网络的泛化能力仍有待提高，因此将所提出的视差细化框架纳入现有网络将有助于提高其与深度估计相关的整体准确性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于跨域设置下腹腔镜图像学习型立体匹配方法的视差优化框架，旨在提升深度估计的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有学习型立体匹配方法在腹腔镜图像中因领域差异和数据不足导致性能下降，需开发无需大量标注数据且能适应跨域场景的优化方案。
AI.method: 设计包含局部视差优化和全局视差优化的双阶段框架，结合预训练于自然图像数据集的模型，在腹腔镜图像数据集上进行跨域测试以提升视差图质量。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能有效修复噪声干扰下的视差图，且在模型泛化能力良好的情况下保持预测精度，定性和定量结果均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架可增强现有学习型方法的深度估计能力，但受限于腹腔镜领域缺乏大规模训练数据，未来需进一步提升模型跨域泛化能力。

authors_text: Yinghao Zhao,Li Yan,Hong Xie,Jicheng Dai,Pengcheng Wei
title: Autonomous Exploration Method for Fast Unknown Environment Mapping by Using UAV Equipped with Limited FOV Sensor
title_zh: 有限视场传感器无人机快速未知环境测绘自主探索方法
comment: 10 pages,10 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.12507
comments: 10 pages,10 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.12507
abstract: Autonomous exploration is one of the important parts to achieve the fast autonomous mapping and target search. However, most of the existing methods are facing low-efficiency problems caused by low-quality trajectory or back-and-forth maneuvers. To improve the exploration efficiency in unknown environments, a fast autonomous exploration planner (FAEP) is proposed in this paper. Different from existing methods, we firstly design a novel frontiers exploration sequence generation method to obtain a more reasonable exploration path, which considers not only the flight-level but frontier-level factors in the asymmetric traveling salesman problem (ATSP). Then, according to the exploration sequence and the distribution of frontiers, an adaptive yaw planning method is proposed to cover more frontiers by yaw change during an exploration journey. In addition, to increase the speed and fluency of flight, a dynamic replanning strategy is also adopted. We present sufficient comparison and evaluation experiments in simulation environments. Experimental results show the proposed exploration planner has better performance in terms of flight time and flight distance compared to typical and state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the effectiveness of the proposed method is further evaluated in real-world environments.
summary: Autonomous exploration is one of the important parts to achieve the fast autonomous mapping and target search. However, most of the existing methods are facing low-efficiency problems caused by low-quality trajectory or back-and-forth maneuvers. To improve the exploration efficiency in unknown environments, a fast autonomous exploration planner (FAEP) is proposed in this paper. Different from existing methods, we firstly design a novel frontiers exploration sequence generation method to obtain a more reasonable exploration path, which considers not only the flight-level but frontier-level factors in the asymmetric traveling salesman problem (ATSP). Then, according to the exploration sequence and the distribution of frontiers, an adaptive yaw planning method is proposed to cover more frontiers by yaw change during an exploration journey. In addition, to increase the speed and fluency of flight, a dynamic replanning strategy is also adopted. We present sufficient comparison and evaluation experiments in simulation environments. Experimental results show the proposed exploration planner has better performance in terms of flight time and flight distance compared to typical and state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the effectiveness of the proposed method is further evaluated in real-world environments.
abstract_zh: 自主探索是实现快速自主建图和目标搜索的重要部分之一。然而，大多数现有方法都面临着低质量轨迹或来回机动引起的低效率问题。为了提高未知环境中的探索效率，本文提出了一种快速自主探索规划器（FAEP）。与现有方法不同，我们首先设计了一种新颖的前沿探索序列生成方法，以获得更合理的探索路径，该方法在非对称旅行商问题（ATSP）中不仅考虑了航班级别的因素，还考虑了前沿级别的因素。然后，根据探索顺序和前沿分布，提出一种自适应偏航规划方法，以在探索过程中通过偏航变化覆盖更多前沿。此外，为了提高飞行的速度和流畅性，还采用了动态重新规划策略。我们在模拟环境中进行了充分的比较和评估实验。实验结果表明，与典型和最先进的方法相比，所提出的勘探规划器在飞行时间和飞行距离方面具有更好的性能。此外，在现实环境中进一步评估了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于无人机在未知环境中快速建图的自主探索方法，通过改进路径规划和航向调整提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因轨迹质量低或反复移动导致探索效率低下，需设计更高效的自主探索策略。
AI.method: 设计新型前沿探索序列生成方法（结合ATSP问题），提出自适应航向规划及动态重规划策略。
AI.result: 仿真与真实环境实验表明，该方法在飞行时间和距离上优于传统及先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提FAEP方法有效提升了无人机在未知环境中的探索效率与建图性能。

search_text: Autonomous Exploration Method for Fast Unknown Environment Mapping by Using UAV Equipped with Limited FOV Sensor 有限视场传感器无人机快速未知环境测绘自主探索方法 Autonomous exploration is one of the important parts to achieve the fast autonomous mapping and target search. However, most of the existing methods are facing low-efficiency problems caused by low-quality trajectory or back-and-forth maneuvers. To improve the exploration efficiency in unknown environments, a fast autonomous exploration planner (FAEP) is proposed in this paper. Different from existing methods, we firstly design a novel frontiers exploration sequence generation method to obtain a more reasonable exploration path, which considers not only the flight-level but frontier-level factors in the asymmetric traveling salesman problem (ATSP). Then, according to the exploration sequence and the distribution of frontiers, an adaptive yaw planning method is proposed to cover more frontiers by yaw change during an exploration journey. In addition, to increase the speed and fluency of flight, a dynamic replanning strategy is also adopted. We present sufficient comparison and evaluation experiments in simulation environments. Experimental results show the proposed exploration planner has better performance in terms of flight time and flight distance compared to typical and state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the effectiveness of the proposed method is further evaluated in real-world environments. 自主探索是实现快速自主建图和目标搜索的重要部分之一。然而，大多数现有方法都面临着低质量轨迹或来回机动引起的低效率问题。为了提高未知环境中的探索效率，本文提出了一种快速自主探索规划器（FAEP）。与现有方法不同，我们首先设计了一种新颖的前沿探索序列生成方法，以获得更合理的探索路径，该方法在非对称旅行商问题（ATSP）中不仅考虑了航班级别的因素，还考虑了前沿级别的因素。然后，根据探索顺序和前沿分布，提出一种自适应偏航规划方法，以在探索过程中通过偏航变化覆盖更多前沿。此外，为了提高飞行的速度和流畅性，还采用了动态重新规划策略。我们在模拟环境中进行了充分的比较和评估实验。实验结果表明，与典型和最先进的方法相比，所提出的勘探规划器在飞行时间和飞行距离方面具有更好的性能。此外，在现实环境中进一步评估了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出一种用于无人机在未知环境中快速建图的自主探索方法，通过改进路径规划和航向调整提升效率。 Yinghao Zhao,Li Yan,Hong Xie,Jicheng Dai,Pengcheng Wei cs.RO

authors_text: Izunna Okpala,Guillermo Romera Rodriguez,Andrea Tapia,Shane Halse,Jess Kropczynski
title: A Semantic Approach to Negation Detection and Word Disambiguation with Natural Language Processing
title_zh: 使用自然语言处理进行否定检测和单词消歧的语义方法
abstract: This study aims to demonstrate the methods for detecting negations in a sentence by uniquely evaluating the lexical structure of the text via word-sense disambiguation. The proposed framework examines all the unique features in the various expressions within a text to resolve the contextual usage of all tokens and decipher the effect of negation on sentiment analysis. The application of popular expression detectors skips this important step, thereby neglecting the root words caught in the web of negation and making text classification difficult for machine learning and sentiment analysis. This study adopts the Natural Language Processing (NLP) approach to discover and antonimize words that were negated for better accuracy in text classification using a knowledge base provided by an NLP library called WordHoard. Early results show that our initial analysis improved on traditional sentiment analysis, which sometimes neglects negations or assigns an inverse polarity score. The SentiWordNet analyzer was improved by 35%, the Vader analyzer by 20% and the TextBlob by 6%.
summary: This study aims to demonstrate the methods for detecting negations in a sentence by uniquely evaluating the lexical structure of the text via word-sense disambiguation. The proposed framework examines all the unique features in the various expressions within a text to resolve the contextual usage of all tokens and decipher the effect of negation on sentiment analysis. The application of popular expression detectors skips this important step, thereby neglecting the root words caught in the web of negation and making text classification difficult for machine learning and sentiment analysis. This study adopts the Natural Language Processing (NLP) approach to discover and antonimize words that were negated for better accuracy in text classification using a knowledge base provided by an NLP library called WordHoard. Early results show that our initial analysis improved on traditional sentiment analysis, which sometimes neglects negations or assigns an inverse polarity score. The SentiWordNet analyzer was improved by 35%, the Vader analyzer by 20% and the TextBlob by 6%.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在通过词义消歧独特地评估文本的词汇结构来展示检测句子中否定的方法。所提出的框架检查文本中各种表达的所有独特特征，以解决所有标记的上下文用法并破译否定对情感分析的影响。流行的表达检测器的应用跳过了这一重要步骤，从而忽略了陷入否定网络的词根，并使机器学习和情感分析的文本分类变得困难。本研究采用自然语言处理 (NLP) 方法，使用名为 WordHoard 的 NLP 库提供的知识库来发现和反驳那些为了提高文本分类准确性而被否定的单词。早期结果表明，我们的初步分析改进了传统的情感分析，传统的情感分析有时会忽略否定或分配反极性分数。 SentiWordNet 分析器改进了 35%，Vader 分析器改进了 20%，TextBlob 分析器改进了 6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然语言处理的语义方法，通过词义消歧检测否定并提升情感分析准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有情感分析工具常忽略否定或错误分配极性分数，导致文本分类效果不佳。
AI.method: 采用NLP技术结合WordHoard知识库，通过分析词汇结构与上下文关系实现否定检测与词义消歧。
AI.result: 改进后SentiWordNet、Vader、TextBlob准确率分别提升35%、20%和6%。
AI.conclusion: 否定检测与词义消歧的结合显著提升情感分析效果，为文本分类提供新思路。

authors_text: Chaitanya Nalam,Thatchaphol Saranurak
title: Maximal $k$-Edge-Connected Subgraphs in Weighted Graphs via Local Random Contraction
title_zh: 通过局部随机收缩实现加权图中的最大$k$边连接子图
abstract: The \emph{maximal $k$-edge-connected subgraphs} problem is a classical graph clustering problem studied since the 70's. Surprisingly, no non-trivial technique for this problem in weighted graphs is known: a very straightforward recursive-mincut algorithm with $Ω(mn)$ time has remained the fastest algorithm until now. All previous progress gives a speed-up only when the graph is unweighted, and $k$ is small enough (e.g.~Henzinger~et~al.~(ICALP'15), Chechik~et~al.~(SODA'17), and Forster~et~al.~(SODA'20)). We give the first algorithm that breaks through the long-standing $\tilde{O}(mn)$-time barrier in \emph{weighted undirected} graphs. More specifically, we show a maximal $k$-edge-connected subgraphs algorithm that takes only $\tilde{O}(m\cdot\min\{m^{3/4},n^{4/5}\})$ time. As an immediate application, we can $(1+ε)$-approximate the \emph{strength} of all edges in undirected graphs in the same running time. Our key technique is the first local cut algorithm with \emph{exact} cut-value guarantees whose running time depends only on the output size. All previous local cut algorithms either have running time depending on the cut value of the output, which can be arbitrarily slow in weighted graphs or have approximate cut guarantees.
summary: The \emph{maximal $k$-edge-connected subgraphs} problem is a classical graph clustering problem studied since the 70's. Surprisingly, no non-trivial technique for this problem in weighted graphs is known: a very straightforward recursive-mincut algorithm with $Ω(mn)$ time has remained the fastest algorithm until now. All previous progress gives a speed-up only when the graph is unweighted, and $k$ is small enough (e.g.~Henzinger~et~al.~(ICALP'15), Chechik~et~al.~(SODA'17), and Forster~et~al.~(SODA'20)). We give the first algorithm that breaks through the long-standing $\tilde{O}(mn)$-time barrier in \emph{weighted undirected} graphs. More specifically, we show a maximal $k$-edge-connected subgraphs algorithm that takes only $\tilde{O}(m\cdot\min\{m^{3/4},n^{4/5}\})$ time. As an immediate application, we can $(1+ε)$-approximate the \emph{strength} of all edges in undirected graphs in the same running time. Our key technique is the first local cut algorithm with \emph{exact} cut-value guarantees whose running time depends only on the output size. All previous local cut algorithms either have running time depending on the cut value of the output, which can be arbitrarily slow in weighted graphs or have approximate cut guarantees.
abstract_zh: \emph{最大$k$边连通子图}问题是自 70 年代以来研究的经典图聚类问题。令人惊讶的是，对于加权图中的这个问题，还没有已知的重要技术：一种非常简单的递归最小割算法，其时间为 $Ω(mn)$ ，迄今为止仍然是最快的算法。仅当图未加权且 $k$ 足够小时（例如~Henzinger~et~al.~(ICALP'15)、Chechik~et~al.~(SODA'17) 和 Forster~et~al.~(SODA'20)），所有先前的进展才会加速。我们给出了第一个突破\emph{加权无向}图中长期存在的$\tilde{O}(mn)$时间障碍的算法。更具体地说，我们展示了一种最大 $k$ 边连接的子图算法，该算法仅花费 $\tilde{O}(m\cdot\min\{m^{3/4},n^{4/5}\})$ 时间。作为一个直接的应用，我们可以在相同的运行时间内 $(1+ε)$ 近似无向图中所有边的 \emph{strength} 。我们的关键技术是第一个具有 \emph{exact} 割值保证的局部割算法，其运行时间仅取决于输出大小。以前的所有局部切割算法要么具有取决于输出切割值的运行时间，这在加权图中可能任意慢，要么具有近似切割保证。

AI.tldr: 在加权无向图中寻找最大k边连通子图的问题。
AI.motivation: 长期以来，加权图中的最大k边连通子图问题仅有一个非常直接的递归最小割算法，时间复杂度为Ω(mn)，没有非平凡的技术突破。所有先前的进展仅适用于无权图或k较小的情况。本文旨在打破这一长期存在的Õ(mn)时间瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于局部随机收缩的新技术，设计了首个输出大小决定运行时间且具有精确割值保证的局部割算法，并以此为基础构建了最大k边连通子图算法。
AI.result: 算法时间复杂度为Õ(m·min{m^{3/4}, n^{4/5}})，显著优于传统的Ω(mn)时间。作为直接应用，可在相同时间内(1+ε)-近似所有边的strength。
AI.conclusion: 首次在加权无向图中突破了Õ(mn)时间障碍，为加权图上的图聚类问题提供了更高效的解决方案。

motivation: 长期以来，加权图中的最大k边连通子图问题仅有一个非常直接的递归最小割算法，时间复杂度为Ω(mn)，没有非平凡的技术突破。所有先前的进展仅适用于无权图或k较小的情况。本文旨在打破这一长期存在的Õ(mn)时间瓶颈。
method: 提出了一种基于局部随机收缩的新技术，设计了首个输出大小决定运行时间且具有精确割值保证的局部割算法，并以此为基础构建了最大k边连通子图算法。
result: 算法时间复杂度为Õ(m·min{m^{3/4}, n^{4/5}})，显著优于传统的Ω(mn)时间。作为直接应用，可在相同时间内(1+ε)-近似所有边的strength。
conclusion: 首次在加权无向图中突破了Õ(mn)时间障碍，为加权图上的图聚类问题提供了更高效的解决方案。
search_text: Maximal $k$-Edge-Connected Subgraphs in Weighted Graphs via Local Random Contraction 通过局部随机收缩实现加权图中的最大$k$边连接子图 The \emph{maximal $k$-edge-connected subgraphs} problem is a classical graph clustering problem studied since the 70's. Surprisingly, no non-trivial technique for this problem in weighted graphs is known: a very straightforward recursive-mincut algorithm with $Ω(mn)$ time has remained the fastest algorithm until now. All previous progress gives a speed-up only when the graph is unweighted, and $k$ is small enough (e.g.~Henzinger~et~al.~(ICALP'15), Chechik~et~al.~(SODA'17), and Forster~et~al.~(SODA'20)). We give the first algorithm that breaks through the long-standing $\tilde{O}(mn)$-time barrier in \emph{weighted undirected} graphs. More specifically, we show a maximal $k$-edge-connected subgraphs algorithm that takes only $\tilde{O}(m\cdot\min\{m^{3/4},n^{4/5}\})$ time. As an immediate application, we can $(1+ε)$-approximate the \emph{strength} of all edges in undirected graphs in the same running time. Our key technique is the first local cut algorithm with \emph{exact} cut-value guarantees whose running time depends only on the output size. All previous local cut algorithms either have running time depending on the cut value of the output, which can be arbitrarily slow in weighted graphs or have approximate cut guarantees. \emph{最大$k$边连通子图}问题是自 70 年代以来研究的经典图聚类问题。令人惊讶的是，对于加权图中的这个问题，还没有已知的重要技术：一种非常简单的递归最小割算法，其时间为 $Ω(mn)$ ，迄今为止仍然是最快的算法。仅当图未加权且 $k$ 足够小时（例如~Henzinger~et~al.~(ICALP'15)、Chechik~et~al.~(SODA'17) 和 Forster~et~al.~(SODA'20)），所有先前的进展才会加速。我们给出了第一个突破\emph{加权无向}图中长期存在的$\tilde{O}(mn)$时间障碍的算法。更具体地说，我们展示了一种最大 $k$ 边连接的子图算法，该算法仅花费 $\tilde{O}(m\cdot\min\{m^{3/4},n^{4/5}\})$ 时间。作为一个直接的应用，我们可以在相同的运行时间内 $(1+ε)$ 近似无向图中所有边的 \emph{strength} 。我们的关键技术是第一个具有 \emph{exact} 割值保证的局部割算法，其运行时间仅取决于输出大小。以前的所有局部切割算法要么具有取决于输出切割值的运行时间，这在加权图中可能任意慢，要么具有近似切割保证。 在加权无向图中寻找最大k边连通子图的问题。 Chaitanya Nalam,Thatchaphol Saranurak cs.DS

authors_text: Aliasghar Mortazi,Vedat Cicek,Elif Keles,Ulas Bagci
title: Selecting the Best Optimizers for Deep Learning based Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 选择基于深度学习的医学图像分割的最佳优化器
abstract: The goal of this work is to identify the best optimizers for deep learning in the context of cardiac image segmentation and to provide guidance on how to design segmentation networks with effective optimization strategies. Adaptive learning helps with fast convergence by starting with a larger learning rate (LR) and gradually decreasing it. Momentum optimizers are particularly effective at quickly optimizing neural networks within the accelerated schemes category. By revealing the potential interplay between these two types of algorithms (LR and momentum optimizers or momentum rate (MR) in short), in this article, we explore the two variants of SGD algorithms in a single setting. We suggest using cyclic learning as the base optimizer and integrating optimal values of learning rate and momentum rate. We investigated the relationship of LR and MR under an important problem of medical image segmentation of cardiac structures from MRI and CT scans. We conducted experiments using the cardiac imaging dataset from the ACDC challenge of MICCAI 2017, and four different architectures shown to be successful for cardiac image segmentation problems. Our comprehensive evaluations demonstrated that the proposed optimizer achieved better results (over a 2\% improvement in the dice metric) than other optimizers in deep learning literature with similar or lower computational cost in both single and multi-object segmentation settings. We hypothesized that combination of accelerated and adaptive optimization methods can have a drastic effect in medical image segmentation performances. To this end, we proposed a new cyclic optimization method (\textit{CLMR}) to address the efficiency and accuracy problems in deep learning based medical image segmentation. The proposed strategy yielded better generalization in comparison to adaptive optimizers.
summary: The goal of this work is to identify the best optimizers for deep learning in the context of cardiac image segmentation and to provide guidance on how to design segmentation networks with effective optimization strategies. Adaptive learning helps with fast convergence by starting with a larger learning rate (LR) and gradually decreasing it. Momentum optimizers are particularly effective at quickly optimizing neural networks within the accelerated schemes category. By revealing the potential interplay between these two types of algorithms (LR and momentum optimizers or momentum rate (MR) in short), in this article, we explore the two variants of SGD algorithms in a single setting. We suggest using cyclic learning as the base optimizer and integrating optimal values of learning rate and momentum rate. We investigated the relationship of LR and MR under an important problem of medical image segmentation of cardiac structures from MRI and CT scans. We conducted experiments using the cardiac imaging dataset from the ACDC challenge of MICCAI 2017, and four different architectures shown to be successful for cardiac image segmentation problems. Our comprehensive evaluations demonstrated that the proposed optimizer achieved better results (over a 2\% improvement in the dice metric) than other optimizers in deep learning literature with similar or lower computational cost in both single and multi-object segmentation settings. We hypothesized that combination of accelerated and adaptive optimization methods can have a drastic effect in medical image segmentation performances. To this end, we proposed a new cyclic optimization method (\textit{CLMR}) to address the efficiency and accuracy problems in deep learning based medical image segmentation. The proposed strategy yielded better generalization in comparison to adaptive optimizers.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是确定心脏图像分割背景下深度学习的最佳优化器，并为如何使用有效的优化策略设计分割网络提供指导。自适应学习通过从较大的学习率 (LR) 开始并逐渐减小来帮助快速收敛。动量优化器对于快速优化加速方案类别中的神经网络特别有效。通过揭示这两类算法（LR 和动量优化器或简称动量率 (MR)）之间的潜在相互作用，在本文中，我们在单一设置中探索了 SGD 算法的两种变体。我们建议使用循环学习作为基础优化器，并整合学习率和动量率的最佳值。我们研究了 MRI 和 CT 扫描心脏结构医学图像分割这一重要问题下 LR 和 MR 的关系。我们使用 MICCAI 2017 的 ACDC 挑战赛中的心脏成像数据集进行了实验，四种不同的架构被证明可以成功解决心脏图像分割问题。我们的综合评估表明，与深度学习文献中的其他优化器相比，所提出的优化器在单对象分割设置和多对象分割设置中具有相似或更低的计算成本，取得了更好的结果（骰子指标提高了 2% 以上）。我们假设加速和自适应优化方法的结合可以对医学图像分割性能产生巨大影响。为此，我们提出了一种新的循环优化方法（\textit{CLMR}）来解决基于深度学习的医学图像分割的效率和准确性问题。与自适应优化器相比，所提出的策略产生了更好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为深度学习在心脏图像分割中的优化器选择提供指导，并提出一种结合自适应和加速优化方法的循环优化策略CLMR。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分割对优化策略敏感，传统优化器存在收敛速度和精度的局限性，需探索更高效的优化方法。
AI.method: 通过分析学习率（LR）与动量率（MR）的相互作用，提出结合循环学习率与自适应动量的CLMR方法，并在ACDC数据集上验证。
AI.result: CLMR在单目标和多目标分割任务中Dice指标提升超2%，且计算成本更低，泛化能力优于自适应优化器。
AI.conclusion: 融合加速与自适应优化方法可显著提升医疗图像分割性能，CLMR为深度学习优化提供了有效策略。

authors_text: Kexun Zhang,Xianjun Yang,William Yang Wang,Lei Li
title: ReDi: Efficient Learning-Free Diffusion Inference via Trajectory Retrieval
title_zh: ReDi：通过轨迹检索进行高效的无学习扩散推理
abstract: Diffusion models show promising generation capability for a variety of data. Despite their high generation quality, the inference for diffusion models is still time-consuming due to the numerous sampling iterations required. To accelerate the inference, we propose ReDi, a simple yet learning-free Retrieval-based Diffusion sampling framework. From a precomputed knowledge base, ReDi retrieves a trajectory similar to the partially generated trajectory at an early stage of generation, skips a large portion of intermediate steps, and continues sampling from a later step in the retrieved trajectory. We theoretically prove that the generation performance of ReDi is guaranteed. Our experiments demonstrate that ReDi improves the model inference efficiency by 2x speedup. Furthermore, ReDi is able to generalize well in zero-shot cross-domain image generation such as image stylization.
summary: Diffusion models show promising generation capability for a variety of data. Despite their high generation quality, the inference for diffusion models is still time-consuming due to the numerous sampling iterations required. To accelerate the inference, we propose ReDi, a simple yet learning-free Retrieval-based Diffusion sampling framework. From a precomputed knowledge base, ReDi retrieves a trajectory similar to the partially generated trajectory at an early stage of generation, skips a large portion of intermediate steps, and continues sampling from a later step in the retrieved trajectory. We theoretically prove that the generation performance of ReDi is guaranteed. Our experiments demonstrate that ReDi improves the model inference efficiency by 2x speedup. Furthermore, ReDi is able to generalize well in zero-shot cross-domain image generation such as image stylization.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型显示出有希望的各种数据生成能力。尽管生成质量很高，但由于需要大量采样迭代，扩散模型的推理仍然非常耗时。为了加速推理，我们提出了 ReDi，一个简单但无需学习的基于检索的扩散采样框架。 ReDi 从预先计算的知识库中检索与生成早期部分生成的轨迹相似的轨迹，跳过大部分中间步骤，并从检索到的轨迹中的后续步骤继续采样。我们从理论上证明了ReDi的生成性能是有保证的。我们的实验表明，ReDi 将模型推理效率提高了 2 倍。此外，ReDi 能够在零样本跨域图像生成（例如图像风格化）中很好地泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReDi框架，通过轨迹检索实现无需学习的扩散模型推理加速。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型生成质量高但推理速度慢，现有加速方法存在学习成本或结构复杂问题，需开发高效无学习方案。
AI.method: 从预计算知识库检索与早期生成轨迹相似的完整轨迹，跳过中间步骤直接延续检索轨迹后期采样。
AI.result: 推理效率提升2倍，在零样本跨域图像生成任务中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: ReDi通过轨迹检索有效提升扩散模型推理效率，且具备跨领域生成的泛化能力。

authors_text: Shiqi Sun,Shancheng Fang,Qian He,Wei Liu
title: Design Booster: A Text-Guided Diffusion Model for Image Translation with Spatial Layout Preservation
title_zh: 设计助推器：用于具有空间布局保留的图像翻译的文本引导扩散模型
abstract: Diffusion models are able to generate photorealistic images in arbitrary scenes. However, when applying diffusion models to image translation, there exists a trade-off between maintaining spatial structure and high-quality content. Besides, existing methods are mainly based on test-time optimization or fine-tuning model for each input image, which are extremely time-consuming for practical applications. To address these issues, we propose a new approach for flexible image translation by learning a layout-aware image condition together with a text condition. Specifically, our method co-encodes images and text into a new domain during the training phase. In the inference stage, we can choose images/text or both as the conditions for each time step, which gives users more flexible control over layout and content. Experimental comparisons of our method with state-of-the-art methods demonstrate our model performs best in both style image translation and semantic image translation and took the shortest time.
summary: Diffusion models are able to generate photorealistic images in arbitrary scenes. However, when applying diffusion models to image translation, there exists a trade-off between maintaining spatial structure and high-quality content. Besides, existing methods are mainly based on test-time optimization or fine-tuning model for each input image, which are extremely time-consuming for practical applications. To address these issues, we propose a new approach for flexible image translation by learning a layout-aware image condition together with a text condition. Specifically, our method co-encodes images and text into a new domain during the training phase. In the inference stage, we can choose images/text or both as the conditions for each time step, which gives users more flexible control over layout and content. Experimental comparisons of our method with state-of-the-art methods demonstrate our model performs best in both style image translation and semantic image translation and took the shortest time.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型能够在任意场景中生成逼真的图像。然而，当将扩散模型应用于图像翻译时，在保持空间结构和高质量内容之间存在权衡。此外，现有的方法主要基于每个输入图像的测试时优化或微调模型，这对于实际应用来说非常耗时。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种通过学习布局感知图像条件和文本条件来实现灵活图像翻译的新方法。具体来说，我们的方法在训练阶段将图像和文本共同编码到新的域中。在推理阶段，我们可以选择图像/文本或两者作为每个时间步的条件，这使用户可以更灵活地控制布局和内容。我们的方法与最先进的方法的实验比较表明，我们的模型在风格图像翻译和语义图像翻译方面都表现最好，并且花费的时间最短。

AI.method: 训练阶段联合编码图像与文本至新领域，推理时支持图像/文本或两者作为条件输入，实现灵活控制。
AI.result: 在风格与语义图像翻译任务中均取得最优性能，且推理速度最快。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了空间布局保持与内容质量的矛盾，同时显著提升翻译效率。

authors_text: Vignesh Sivan,Teodora Vujovic,Raj Ranabhat,Alexander Wong,Stewart Mclachlin,Michael Hardisty
title: Recurrence With Correlation Network for Medical Image Registration
title_zh: 医学图像配准相关网络的递归
abstract: We present Recurrence with Correlation Network (RWCNet), a medical image registration network with multi-scale features and a cost volume layer. We demonstrate that these architectural features improve medical image registration accuracy in two image registration datasets prepared for the MICCAI 2022 Learn2Reg Workshop Challenge. On the large-displacement National Lung Screening Test (NLST) dataset, RWCNet is able to achieve a total registration error (TRE) of 2.11mm between corresponding keypoints without instance fine-tuning. On the OASIS brain MRI dataset, RWCNet is able to achieve an average dice overlap of 81.7% for 35 different anatomical labels. It outperforms another multi-scale network, the Laplacian Image Registration Network (LapIRN), on both datasets. Ablation experiments are performed to highlight the contribution of the various architectural features. While multi-scale features improved validation accuracy for both datasets, the cost volume layer and number of recurrent steps only improved performance on the large-displacement NLST dataset. This result suggests that cost volume layer and iterative refinement using RNN provide good support for optimization and generalization in large-displacement medical image registration. The code for RWCNet is available at https://github.com/vigsivan/optimization-based-registration.
summary: We present Recurrence with Correlation Network (RWCNet), a medical image registration network with multi-scale features and a cost volume layer. We demonstrate that these architectural features improve medical image registration accuracy in two image registration datasets prepared for the MICCAI 2022 Learn2Reg Workshop Challenge. On the large-displacement National Lung Screening Test (NLST) dataset, RWCNet is able to achieve a total registration error (TRE) of 2.11mm between corresponding keypoints without instance fine-tuning. On the OASIS brain MRI dataset, RWCNet is able to achieve an average dice overlap of 81.7% for 35 different anatomical labels. It outperforms another multi-scale network, the Laplacian Image Registration Network (LapIRN), on both datasets. Ablation experiments are performed to highlight the contribution of the various architectural features. While multi-scale features improved validation accuracy for both datasets, the cost volume layer and number of recurrent steps only improved performance on the large-displacement NLST dataset. This result suggests that cost volume layer and iterative refinement using RNN provide good support for optimization and generalization in large-displacement medical image registration. The code for RWCNet is available at https://github.com/vigsivan/optimization-based-registration.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了关联网络递归（RWCNet），这是一种具有多尺度特征和成本卷层的医学图像配准网络。我们证明这些架构特征可以提高为 MICCAI 2022 Learn2Reg Workshop Challenge 准备的两个图像配准数据集的医学图像配准准确性。在大位移国家肺筛查测试（NLST）数据集上，RWCNet 无需实例微调即可实现相应关键点之间 2.11mm 的总配准误差（TRE）。在 OASIS 大脑 MRI 数据集上，RWCNet 对于 35 个不同的解剖标签能够实现 81.7% 的平均骰子重叠。它在两个数据集上都优于另一个多尺度网络，拉普拉斯图像配准网络（LapIRN）。进行消融实验是为了突出各种建筑特征的贡献。虽然多尺度特征提高了两个数据集的验证准确性，但成本体积层和循环步骤数量仅提高了大位移 NLST 数据集的性能。这一结果表明，成本体积层和使用 RNN 的迭代细化为大位移医学图像配准的优化和泛化提供了良好的支持。 RWCNet 的代码可在 https://github.com/vigsivan/optimization-based-registration 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RWCNet的医学图像配准网络，利用多尺度特征和成本体积层来提高配准精度。
AI.motivation: 医学图像配准在临床诊断和治疗计划中至关重要，但现有方法在处理大位移和复杂解剖结构时存在局限性，因此需要更精确和鲁棒的配准方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为RWCNet的网络结构，结合多尺度特征提取和成本体积层，并使用递归神经网络（RNN）进行迭代优化。
AI.result: RWCNet在NLST数据集上实现了2.11mm的总配准误差，在OASIS数据集上达到了81.7%的平均Dice重叠率，优于LapIRN等其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征和成本体积层结合RNN迭代优化，能有效提升大位移医学图像配准的精度和泛化能力。

authors_text: Qiyun Liu,Zhiguang Yang,Hanzhou Wu
title: JPEG Steganalysis Based on Steganographic Feature Enhancement and Graph Attention Learning
title_zh: 基于隐写特征增强和图注意力学习的JPEG隐写分析
abstract: The purpose of image steganalysis is to determine whether the carrier image contains hidden information or not. Since JEPG is the most commonly used image format over social networks, steganalysis in JPEG images is also the most urgently needed to be explored. However, in order to detect whether secret information is hidden within JEPG images, the majority of existing algorithms are designed in conjunction with the popular computer vision related networks, without considering the key characteristics appeared in image steganalysis. It is crucial that the steganographic signal, as an extremely weak signal, can be enhanced during its representation learning process. Motivated by this insight, in this paper, we introduce a novel representation learning algorithm for JPEG steganalysis that is mainly consisting of a graph attention learning module and a feature enhancement module. The graph attention learning module is designed to avoid global feature loss caused by the local feature learning of convolutional neural network and reliance on depth stacking to extend the perceptual domain. The feature enhancement module is applied to prevent the stacking of convolutional layers from weakening the steganographic information. In addition, pretraining as a way to initialize the network weights with a large-scale dataset is utilized to enhance the ability of the network to extract discriminative features. We advocate pretraining with ALASKA2 for the model trained with BOSSBase+BOWS2. The experimental results indicate that the proposed algorithm outperforms previous arts in terms of detection accuracy, which has verified the superiority and applicability of the proposed work.
summary: The purpose of image steganalysis is to determine whether the carrier image contains hidden information or not. Since JEPG is the most commonly used image format over social networks, steganalysis in JPEG images is also the most urgently needed to be explored. However, in order to detect whether secret information is hidden within JEPG images, the majority of existing algorithms are designed in conjunction with the popular computer vision related networks, without considering the key characteristics appeared in image steganalysis. It is crucial that the steganographic signal, as an extremely weak signal, can be enhanced during its representation learning process. Motivated by this insight, in this paper, we introduce a novel representation learning algorithm for JPEG steganalysis that is mainly consisting of a graph attention learning module and a feature enhancement module. The graph attention learning module is designed to avoid global feature loss caused by the local feature learning of convolutional neural network and reliance on depth stacking to extend the perceptual domain. The feature enhancement module is applied to prevent the stacking of convolutional layers from weakening the steganographic information. In addition, pretraining as a way to initialize the network weights with a large-scale dataset is utilized to enhance the ability of the network to extract discriminative features. We advocate pretraining with ALASKA2 for the model trained with BOSSBase+BOWS2. The experimental results indicate that the proposed algorithm outperforms previous arts in terms of detection accuracy, which has verified the superiority and applicability of the proposed work.
abstract_zh: 图像隐写分析的目的是判断载体图像是否包含隐藏信息。由于 JEPG 是社交网络上最常用的图像格式，因此 JPEG 图像的隐写分析也是最迫切需要探索的。然而，为了检测JEPG图像中是否隐藏秘密信息，现有算法大多数是结合流行的计算机视觉相关网络来设计的，而没有考虑图像隐写分析中出现的关键特征。隐写信号作为一种极其微弱的信号，在其表示学习过程中得到增强是至关重要的。受此启发，在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于 JPEG 隐写分析的新型表示学习算法，该算法主要由图注意学习模块和特征增强模块组成。图注意力学习模块旨在避免卷积神经网络的局部特征学习和依赖深度堆叠来扩展感知域而导致的全局特征丢失。应用特征增强模块来防止卷积层的堆叠削弱隐写信息。此外，预训练作为使用大规​​模数据集初始化网络权重的一种方法，可增强网络提取判别性特征的能力。我们提倡对使用 BOSSBase+BOWS2 训练的模型使用 ALASKA2 进行预训练。实验结果表明，该算法在检测精度方面优于现有技术，验证了该工作的优越性和适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图注意力学习和隐写特征增强的JPEG图像隐写分析算法，旨在提升检测准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有JPEG隐写分析算法依赖传统卷积网络，忽视隐写信号的弱特性，导致特征丢失和检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计图注意力学习模块避免全局特征损失，引入特征增强模块抑制卷积堆叠对隐写信息的削弱，并采用ALASKA2预训练策略优化特征提取。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在BOSSBase+BOWS2数据集上的检测准确率优于现有方法，验证了其优越性和适用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合图注意力机制与特征增强策略，本文有效提升了JPEG隐写分析的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明该算法在BOSSBase+BOWS2数据集上的检测准确率优于现有方法，验证了其优越性和适用性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过结合图注意力机制与特征增强策略，本文有效提升了JPEG隐写分析的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。
