search_text: JPEG Steganalysis Based on Steganographic Feature Enhancement and Graph Attention Learning 基于隐写特征增强和图注意力学习的JPEG隐写分析 The purpose of image steganalysis is to determine whether the carrier image contains hidden information or not. Since JEPG is the most commonly used image format over social networks, steganalysis in JPEG images is also the most urgently needed to be explored. However, in order to detect whether secret information is hidden within JEPG images, the majority of existing algorithms are designed in conjunction with the popular computer vision related networks, without considering the key characteristics appeared in image steganalysis. It is crucial that the steganographic signal, as an extremely weak signal, can be enhanced during its representation learning process. Motivated by this insight, in this paper, we introduce a novel representation learning algorithm for JPEG steganalysis that is mainly consisting of a graph attention learning module and a feature enhancement module. The graph attention learning module is designed to avoid global feature loss caused by the local feature learning of convolutional neural network and reliance on depth stacking to extend the perceptual domain. The feature enhancement module is applied to prevent the stacking of convolutional layers from weakening the steganographic information. In addition, pretraining as a way to initialize the network weights with a large-scale dataset is utilized to enhance the ability of the network to extract discriminative features. We advocate pretraining with ALASKA2 for the model trained with BOSSBase+BOWS2. The experimental results indicate that the proposed algorithm outperforms previous arts in terms of detection accuracy, which has verified the superiority and applicability of the proposed work. 图像隐写分析的目的是判断载体图像是否包含隐藏信息。由于 JEPG 是社交网络上最常用的图像格式，因此 JPEG 图像的隐写分析也是最迫切需要探索的。然而，为了检测JEPG图像中是否隐藏秘密信息，现有算法大多数是结合流行的计算机视觉相关网络来设计的，而没有考虑图像隐写分析中出现的关键特征。隐写信号作为一种极其微弱的信号，在其表示学习过程中得到增强是至关重要的。受此启发，在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于 JPEG 隐写分析的新型表示学习算法，该算法主要由图注意学习模块和特征增强模块组成。图注意力学习模块旨在避免卷积神经网络的局部特征学习和依赖深度堆叠来扩展感知域而导致的全局特征丢失。应用特征增强模块来防止卷积层的堆叠削弱隐写信息。此外，预训练作为使用大规​​模数据集初始化网络权重的一种方法，可增强网络提取判别性特征的能力。我们提倡对使用 BOSSBase+BOWS2 训练的模型使用 ALASKA2 进行预训练。实验结果表明，该算法在检测精度方面优于现有技术，验证了该工作的优越性和适用性。 本文提出一种基于图注意力学习和隐写特征增强的JPEG图像隐写分析算法，旨在提升检测准确率。 Qiyun Liu,Zhiguang Yang,Hanzhou Wu cs.MM,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Sandesh Ghimire,Armand Comas,Davin Hill,Aria Masoomi,Octavia Camps,Jennifer Dy
title: Divide and Compose with Score Based Generative Models
title_zh: 使用基于分数的生成模型进行划分和组合
abstract: While score based generative models, or diffusion models, have found success in image synthesis, they are often coupled with text data or image label to be able to manipulate and conditionally generate images. Even though manipulation of images by changing the text prompt is possible, our understanding of the text embedding and our ability to modify it to edit images is quite limited. Towards the direction of having more control over image manipulation and conditional generation, we propose to learn image components in an unsupervised manner so that we can compose those components to generate and manipulate images in informed manner. Taking inspiration from energy based models, we interpret different score components as the gradient of different energy functions. We show how score based learning allows us to learn interesting components and we can visualize them through generation. We also show how this novel decomposition allows us to compose, generate and modify images in interesting ways akin to dreaming. We make our code available at https://github.com/sandeshgh/Score-based-disentanglement
summary: While score based generative models, or diffusion models, have found success in image synthesis, they are often coupled with text data or image label to be able to manipulate and conditionally generate images. Even though manipulation of images by changing the text prompt is possible, our understanding of the text embedding and our ability to modify it to edit images is quite limited. Towards the direction of having more control over image manipulation and conditional generation, we propose to learn image components in an unsupervised manner so that we can compose those components to generate and manipulate images in informed manner. Taking inspiration from energy based models, we interpret different score components as the gradient of different energy functions. We show how score based learning allows us to learn interesting components and we can visualize them through generation. We also show how this novel decomposition allows us to compose, generate and modify images in interesting ways akin to dreaming. We make our code available at https://github.com/sandeshgh/Score-based-disentanglement
abstract_zh: 虽然基于分数的生成模型或扩散模型在图像合成中取得了成功，但它们通常与文本数据或图像标签结合在一起，以便能够操纵和有条件地生成图像。尽管可以通过更改文本提示来操作图像，但我们对文本嵌入的理解以及修改它以编辑图像的能力非常有限。为了更好地控制图像操作和条件生成，我们建议以无监督的方式学习图像组件，以便我们可以组合这些组件来以知情的方式生成和操作图像。受到基于能量的模型的启发，我们将不同的分数分量解释为不同能量函数的梯度。我们展示了基于分数的学习如何让我们学习有趣的组件，并且我们可以通过生成将它们可视化。我们还展示了这种新颖的分解如何使我们能够以类似于做梦的有趣方式组合、生成和修改图像。我们在 https://github.com/sandeshgh/Score-based-disentanglement 提供代码

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分数生成模型的图像分解与合成方法，通过无监督学习图像组件以实现更灵活的图像生成与编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有分数生成模型（扩散模型）在图像合成中依赖文本或标签进行条件生成，但对文本嵌入的修改能力有限，缺乏对图像组件的直接控制。
AI.method: 受能量模型启发，将不同分数组件解释为不同能量函数的梯度，通过分数模型学习图像组件并实现分解与合成。
AI.result: 成功学习到可可视化的图像组件，并展示了通过组件组合生成和修改图像的能力，效果类似‘梦境’般的创意生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为图像生成与编辑提供了更精细的控制手段，通过组件分解与合成实现了灵活的条件生成。

authors_text: Izunna Okpala,Shane Halse,Jess Kropczynski
title: Machine Learning Methods for Evaluating Public Crisis: Meta-Analysis
title_zh: 评估公共危机的机器学习方法：荟萃分析
comment: ef:9th IEEE International Conference on Computational Science and Computational Intelligence (CSCI'2022)
comments: ef:9th IEEE International Conference on Computational Science and Computational Intelligence (CSCI'2022)
abstract: This study examines machine learning methods used in crisis management. Analyzing detected patterns from a crisis involves the collection and evaluation of historical or near-real-time datasets through automated means. This paper utilized the meta-review method to analyze scientific literature that utilized machine learning techniques to evaluate human actions during crises. Selected studies were condensed into themes and emerging trends using a systematic literature evaluation of published works accessed from three scholarly databases. Results show that data from social media was prominent in the evaluated articles with 27% usage, followed by disaster management, health (COVID) and crisis informatics, amongst many other themes. Additionally, the supervised machine learning method, with an application of 69% across the board, was predominant. The classification technique stood out among other machine learning tasks with 41% usage. The algorithms that played major roles were the Support Vector Machine, Neural Networks, Naive Bayes, and Random Forest, with 23%, 16%, 15%, and 12% contributions, respectively.
summary: This study examines machine learning methods used in crisis management. Analyzing detected patterns from a crisis involves the collection and evaluation of historical or near-real-time datasets through automated means. This paper utilized the meta-review method to analyze scientific literature that utilized machine learning techniques to evaluate human actions during crises. Selected studies were condensed into themes and emerging trends using a systematic literature evaluation of published works accessed from three scholarly databases. Results show that data from social media was prominent in the evaluated articles with 27% usage, followed by disaster management, health (COVID) and crisis informatics, amongst many other themes. Additionally, the supervised machine learning method, with an application of 69% across the board, was predominant. The classification technique stood out among other machine learning tasks with 41% usage. The algorithms that played major roles were the Support Vector Machine, Neural Networks, Naive Bayes, and Random Forest, with 23%, 16%, 15%, and 12% contributions, respectively.
abstract_zh: 这项研究探讨了危机管理中使用的机器学习方法。分析危机中检测到的模式涉及通过自动化方式收集和评估历史或近实时数据集。本文利用元审查方法分析了利用机器学习技术评估危机期间人类行为的科学文献。通过对三个学术数据库中已发表作品的系统文献评估，选定的研究被浓缩为主题和新兴趋势。结果显示，来自社交媒体的数据在评估的文章中占据主导地位，使用率为 27%，其次是灾害管理、健康 (COVID) 和危机信息学以及许多其他主题。此外，有监督的机器学习方法占据主导地位，总体应用率为 69%。分类技术在其他机器学习任务中脱颖而出，使用率为 41%。发挥主要作用的算法是支持向量机、神经网络、朴素贝叶斯和随机森林，分别贡献了 23%、16%、15% 和 12%。

AI.tldr: 本文通过元分析方法研究机器学习在危机管理中的应用，总结相关文献中的主题和趋势。
AI.motivation: 探讨机器学习技术在评估公共危机中的有效性，识别关键数据来源和算法应用趋势，为未来研究提供方向。
AI.method: 采用元分析法，系统检索三个学术数据库中的文献，提取主题并分析机器学习方法的应用比例及趋势。
AI.result: 社交媒体数据占比27%，监督学习应用达69%，分类任务占41%；支持向量机（23%）、神经网络（16%）、朴素贝叶斯（15%）和随机森林（12%）为常用算法。
AI.conclusion: 监督学习尤其是分类技术在危机评估中占主导地位，社交媒体数据是重要信息源，研究为危机管理中的算法选择提供了实证依据。

authors_text: Anirudh Chari,Rui Chen,Changliu Liu
title: Space-Time Conflict Spheres for Constrained Multi-Agent Motion Planning
title_zh: 约束多智能体运动规划的时空冲突域
abstract: Multi-agent motion planning (MAMP) is a critical challenge in applications such as connected autonomous vehicles and multi-robot systems. In this paper, we propose a space-time conflict resolution approach for MAMP. We formulate the problem using a novel, flexible sphere-based discretization for trajectories. Our approach leverages a depth-first conflict search strategy to provide the scalability of decoupled approaches while maintaining the computational guarantees of coupled approaches. We compose procedures for evading discretization error and adhering to kinematic constraints in generated solutions. Theoretically, we prove the continuous-time feasibility and formulation-space completeness of our algorithm. Experimentally, we demonstrate that our algorithm matches the performance of the current state of the art with respect to both runtime and solution quality, while expanding upon the abilities of current work through accommodation for both static and dynamic obstacles. We evaluate our algorithm in various unsignalized traffic intersection scenarios using CARLA, an open-source vehicle simulator. Results show significant success rate improvement in spatially constrained settings, involving both connected and non-connected vehicles. Furthermore, we maintain a reasonable suboptimality ratio that scales well among increasingly complex scenarios.
summary: Multi-agent motion planning (MAMP) is a critical challenge in applications such as connected autonomous vehicles and multi-robot systems. In this paper, we propose a space-time conflict resolution approach for MAMP. We formulate the problem using a novel, flexible sphere-based discretization for trajectories. Our approach leverages a depth-first conflict search strategy to provide the scalability of decoupled approaches while maintaining the computational guarantees of coupled approaches. We compose procedures for evading discretization error and adhering to kinematic constraints in generated solutions. Theoretically, we prove the continuous-time feasibility and formulation-space completeness of our algorithm. Experimentally, we demonstrate that our algorithm matches the performance of the current state of the art with respect to both runtime and solution quality, while expanding upon the abilities of current work through accommodation for both static and dynamic obstacles. We evaluate our algorithm in various unsignalized traffic intersection scenarios using CARLA, an open-source vehicle simulator. Results show significant success rate improvement in spatially constrained settings, involving both connected and non-connected vehicles. Furthermore, we maintain a reasonable suboptimality ratio that scales well among increasingly complex scenarios.
abstract_zh: 多智能体运动规划 (MAMP) 是联网自动驾驶车辆和多机器人系统等应用中的一项关键挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种 MAMP 时空冲突解决方法。我们使用一种新颖的、灵活的基于球体的轨迹离散化来制定问题。我们的方法利用深度优先冲突搜索策略来提供解耦方法的可扩展性，同时保持耦合方法的计算保证。我们编写程序来避免离散化误差并在生成的解决方案中遵守运动学约束。理论上，我们证明了我们的算法的连续时间可行性和公式空间完整性。通过实验，我们证明我们的算法在运行时间和解决方案质量方面与当前最先进的性能相匹配，同时通过适应静态和动态障碍来扩展当前工作的能力。我们使用开源车辆模拟器 CARLA 在各种无信号交通交叉口场景中评估我们的算法。结果显示，在空间受限的环境中，包括联网车辆和非联网车辆，成功率显着提高。此外，我们保持了合理的次优比率，可以在日益复杂的场景中很好地扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空冲突球体的约束多智能体运动规划方法，通过离散化轨迹并结合深度优先冲突搜索策略，解决多智能体路径规划中的动态和静态障碍物问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多智能体运动规划时，难以同时满足计算效率、轨迹连续性及对动态/静态障碍物的适应性，亟需一种兼顾可扩展性与计算保证的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出基于球体的时空离散化轨迹表示，结合深度优先冲突搜索策略，融合解耦方法的可扩展性与耦合方法的计算保证，并通过算法设计规避离散化误差与运动学约束冲突。
AI.result: 在CARLA仿真中，算法在复杂交通场景（含连接与非连接车辆）中成功率显著提升，同时保持合理次优比，性能与当前最优方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论证明连续时间可行性与完备性，在多智能体运动规划中实现了对动态/静态障碍物的有效处理，为复杂场景提供了高效且可靠的解决方案。

We evaluate our algorithm in various unsignalized traffic intersection scenarios using CARLA, an open-source vehicle simulator. Results show significant success rate improvement in spatially constrained settings, involving both connected and non-connected vehicles. authors_text: David Paz,Srinidhi Kalgundi Srinivas,Yunchao Yao,Henrik I. Christensen
title: CLiNet: Joint Detection of Road Network Centerlines in 2D and 3D
title_zh: CLiNet：2D 和 3D 路网中心线联合检测
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Under review at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2023
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Under review at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2023
abstract: This work introduces a new approach for joint detection of centerlines based on image data by localizing the features jointly in 2D and 3D. In contrast to existing work that focuses on detection of visual cues, we explore feature extraction methods that are directly amenable to the urban driving task. To develop and evaluate our approach, a large urban driving dataset dubbed AV Breadcrumbs is automatically labeled by leveraging vector map representations and projective geometry to annotate over 900,000 images. Our results demonstrate potential for dynamic scene modeling across various urban driving scenarios. Our model achieves an F1 score of 0.684 and an average normalized depth error of 2.083. The code and data annotations are publicly available.
summary: This work introduces a new approach for joint detection of centerlines based on image data by localizing the features jointly in 2D and 3D. In contrast to existing work that focuses on detection of visual cues, we explore feature extraction methods that are directly amenable to the urban driving task. To develop and evaluate our approach, a large urban driving dataset dubbed AV Breadcrumbs is automatically labeled by leveraging vector map representations and projective geometry to annotate over 900,000 images. Our results demonstrate potential for dynamic scene modeling across various urban driving scenarios. Our model achieves an F1 score of 0.684 and an average normalized depth error of 2.083. The code and data annotations are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了一种通过在 2D 和 3D 中联合定位特征来基于图像数据联合检测中心线的新方法。与专注于视觉线索检测的现有工作相比，我们探索直接适用于城市驾驶任务的特征提取方法。为了开发和评估我们的方法，一个被称为 AV Breadcrumbs 的大型城市驾驶数据集通过利用矢量图表示和投影几何来自动标记超过 900,000 张图像。我们的结果证明了跨各种城市驾驶场景的动态场景建模的潜力。我们的模型的 F1 分数为 0.684，平均归一化深度误差为 2.083。代码和数据注释是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像数据的联合检测方法，用于在2D和3D空间中定位道路网络中心线。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重于视觉线索检测，而本文旨在探索直接适用于城市驾驶任务的特征提取方法，以提升动态场景建模能力。
AI.method: 通过联合定位2D和3D特征，并利用向量地图与投影几何技术构建大规模城市驾驶数据集AV Breadcrumbs进行模型训练与评估。
AI.result: 模型在测试中取得F1分数0.684、平均归一化深度误差2.083，验证了其在多场景动态建模中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为城市驾驶场景下的道路中心线检测提供了新思路，公开的数据集和代码有助于推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Giorgio Mariani,Irene Tallini,Emilian Postolache,Michele Mancusi,Luca Cosmo,Emanuele Rodolà
title: Multi-Source Diffusion Models for Simultaneous Music Generation and Separation
title_zh: 用于同时生成和分离音乐的多源扩散模型
abstract: In this work, we define a diffusion-based generative model capable of both music synthesis and source separation by learning the score of the joint probability density of sources sharing a context. Alongside the classic total inference tasks (i.e., generating a mixture, separating the sources), we also introduce and experiment on the partial generation task of source imputation, where we generate a subset of the sources given the others (e.g., play a piano track that goes well with the drums). Additionally, we introduce a novel inference method for the separation task based on Dirac likelihood functions. We train our model on Slakh2100, a standard dataset for musical source separation, provide qualitative results in the generation settings, and showcase competitive quantitative results in the source separation setting. Our method is the first example of a single model that can handle both generation and separation tasks, thus representing a step toward general audio models.
summary: In this work, we define a diffusion-based generative model capable of both music synthesis and source separation by learning the score of the joint probability density of sources sharing a context. Alongside the classic total inference tasks (i.e., generating a mixture, separating the sources), we also introduce and experiment on the partial generation task of source imputation, where we generate a subset of the sources given the others (e.g., play a piano track that goes well with the drums). Additionally, we introduce a novel inference method for the separation task based on Dirac likelihood functions. We train our model on Slakh2100, a standard dataset for musical source separation, provide qualitative results in the generation settings, and showcase competitive quantitative results in the source separation setting. Our method is the first example of a single model that can handle both generation and separation tasks, thus representing a step toward general audio models.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们通过学习共享上下文的源的联合概率密度的分数，定义了一种基于扩散的生成模型，该模型能够进行音乐合成和源分离。除了经典的总推理任务（即生成混合物、分离源）之外，我们还介绍并实验了源插补的部分生成任务，其中我们根据其他源生成源的子集（例如，弹奏与鼓配合良好的钢琴曲目）。此外，我们还引入了一种基于狄拉克似然函数的分离任务的新颖推理方法。我们在 Slakh2100（音乐源分离的标准数据集）上训练我们的模型，在生成设置中提供定性结果，并在源分离设置中展示有竞争力的定量结果。我们的方法是可以处理生成和分离任务的单个模型的第一个示例，从而代表了向通用音频模型迈出的一步。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多源扩散模型，实现音乐的同时生成与分离
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理生成与分离，缺乏统一模型，本文旨在开发单一模型以提升效率与一致性
AI.method: 基于扩散模型，学习共享上下文的源联合概率密度分数，并采用Dirac似然函数进行分离任务推理
AI.result: 模型在Slakh2100数据集上训练，生成任务呈现定性结果，分离任务达到竞争力的定量结果，首次实现单一模型处理两者
AI.conclusion: 该方法是通用音频模型发展的一步，展示了单一模型处理多任务的潜力

search_text: Multi-Source Diffusion Models for Simultaneous Music Generation and Separation 用于同时生成和分离音乐的多源扩散模型 In this work, we define a diffusion-based generative model capable of both music synthesis and source separation by learning the score of the joint probability density of sources sharing a context. Alongside the classic total inference tasks (i.e., generating a mixture, separating the sources), we also introduce and experiment on the partial generation task of source imputation, where we generate a subset of the sources given the others (e.g., play a piano track that goes well with the drums). Additionally, we introduce a novel inference method for the separation task based on Dirac likelihood functions. We train our model on Slakh2100, a standard dataset for musical source separation, provide qualitative results in the generation settings, and showcase competitive quantitative results in the source separation setting. Our method is the first example of a single model that can handle both generation and separation tasks, thus representing a step toward general audio models. 在这项工作中，我们通过学习共享上下文的源的联合概率密度的分数，定义了一种基于扩散的生成模型，该模型能够进行音乐合成和源分离。除了经典的总推理任务（即生成混合物、分离源）之外，我们还介绍并实验了源插补的部分生成任务，其中我们根据其他源生成源的子集（例如，弹奏与鼓配合良好的钢琴曲目）。此外，我们还引入了一种基于狄拉克似然函数的分离任务的新颖推理方法。我们在 Slakh2100（音乐源分离的标准数据集）上训练我们的模型，在生成设置中提供定性结果，并在源分离设置中展示有竞争力的定量结果。我们的方法是可以处理生成和分离任务的单个模型的第一个示例，从而代表了向通用音频模型迈出的一步。 提出一种多源扩散模型，实现音乐的同时生成与分离 Giorgio Mariani,Irene Tallini,Emilian Postolache,Michele Mancusi,Luca Cosmo,Emanuele Rodolà cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Thuong Nguyen Canh,Trung Thanh Ngo,Hajime Nagahara
title: Human-Imperceptible Identification with Learnable Lensless Imaging
title_zh: 通过可学习的无透镜成像进行人类难以察觉的识别
abstract: Lensless imaging protects visual privacy by capturing heavily blurred images that are imperceptible for humans to recognize the subject but contain enough information for machines to infer information. Unfortunately, protecting visual privacy comes with a reduction in recognition accuracy and vice versa. We propose a learnable lensless imaging framework that protects visual privacy while maintaining recognition accuracy. To make captured images imperceptible to humans, we designed several loss functions based on total variation, invertibility, and the restricted isometry property. We studied the effect of privacy protection with blurriness on the identification of personal identity via a quantitative method based on a subjective evaluation. Moreover, we validate our simulation by implementing a hardware realization of lensless imaging with photo-lithographically printed masks.
summary: Lensless imaging protects visual privacy by capturing heavily blurred images that are imperceptible for humans to recognize the subject but contain enough information for machines to infer information. Unfortunately, protecting visual privacy comes with a reduction in recognition accuracy and vice versa. We propose a learnable lensless imaging framework that protects visual privacy while maintaining recognition accuracy. To make captured images imperceptible to humans, we designed several loss functions based on total variation, invertibility, and the restricted isometry property. We studied the effect of privacy protection with blurriness on the identification of personal identity via a quantitative method based on a subjective evaluation. Moreover, we validate our simulation by implementing a hardware realization of lensless imaging with photo-lithographically printed masks.
abstract_zh: 无镜头成像通过捕获严重模糊的图像来保护视觉隐私，这些图像对于人类来说难以察觉以识别主体，但包含足够的信息供机器推断信息。不幸的是，保护视觉隐私会降低识别准确性，反之亦然。我们提出了一种可学习的无透镜成像框架，可以保护视觉隐私，同时保持识别准确性。为了使捕获的图像对人类来说难以察觉，我们设计了几种基于全变分、可逆性和受限等距属性的损失函数。我们通过基于主观评价的定量方法研究了模糊隐私保护对个人身份识别的影响。此外，我们通过使用光刻印刷掩模实现无透镜成像的硬件实现来验证我们的模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的无透镜成像框架，在保护视觉隐私的同时保持身份识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统无透镜成像在保护隐私时会导致识别准确率下降，而提升清晰度又会削弱隐私保护效果，需解决二者矛盾。
AI.method: 设计基于总变异、可逆性和限制等距性质的损失函数，并通过硬件实现验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在保持图像不可感知性的同时实现了高识别准确率，硬件测试验证了方案可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了隐私保护与识别性能，为隐私安全计算提供了新思路。

authors_text: Audrey Huang,Jinglin Chen,Nan Jiang
title: Reinforcement Learning in Low-Rank MDPs with Density Features
title_zh: 具有密度特征的低秩 MDP 中的强化学习
abstract: MDPs with low-rank transitions -- that is, the transition matrix can be factored into the product of two matrices, left and right -- is a highly representative structure that enables tractable learning. The left matrix enables expressive function approximation for value-based learning and has been studied extensively. In this work, we instead investigate sample-efficient learning with density features, i.e., the right matrix, which induce powerful models for state-occupancy distributions. This setting not only sheds light on leveraging unsupervised learning in RL, but also enables plug-in solutions for convex RL. In the offline setting, we propose an algorithm for off-policy estimation of occupancies that can handle non-exploratory data. Using this as a subroutine, we further devise an online algorithm that constructs exploratory data distributions in a level-by-level manner. As a central technical challenge, the additive error of occupancy estimation is incompatible with the multiplicative definition of data coverage. In the absence of strong assumptions like reachability, this incompatibility easily leads to exponential error blow-up, which we overcome via novel technical tools. Our results also readily extend to the representation learning setting, when the density features are unknown and must be learned from an exponentially large candidate set.
summary: MDPs with low-rank transitions -- that is, the transition matrix can be factored into the product of two matrices, left and right -- is a highly representative structure that enables tractable learning. The left matrix enables expressive function approximation for value-based learning and has been studied extensively. In this work, we instead investigate sample-efficient learning with density features, i.e., the right matrix, which induce powerful models for state-occupancy distributions. This setting not only sheds light on leveraging unsupervised learning in RL, but also enables plug-in solutions for convex RL. In the offline setting, we propose an algorithm for off-policy estimation of occupancies that can handle non-exploratory data. Using this as a subroutine, we further devise an online algorithm that constructs exploratory data distributions in a level-by-level manner. As a central technical challenge, the additive error of occupancy estimation is incompatible with the multiplicative definition of data coverage. In the absence of strong assumptions like reachability, this incompatibility easily leads to exponential error blow-up, which we overcome via novel technical tools. Our results also readily extend to the representation learning setting, when the density features are unknown and must be learned from an exponentially large candidate set.
abstract_zh: 具有低秩转换的 MDP（即转换矩阵可以分解为左右两个矩阵的乘积）是一种高度具有代表性的结构，可以实现易于处理的学习。左矩阵可以实现基于价值的学习的表达函数逼近，并且已经得到了广泛的研究。在这项工作中，我们转而研究具有密度特征（即正确的矩阵）的样本有效学习，这会产生强大的状态占用分布模型。此设置不仅有助于在强化学习中利用无监督学习，而且还支持凸强化学习的插件解决方案。在离线设置中，我们提出了一种用于非策略占用率估计的算法，可以处理非探索性数据。以此作为子程序，我们进一步设计了一种在线算法，以逐级的方式构建探索性数据分布。作为一个核心技术挑战，占用率估计的加性误差与数据覆盖范围的乘法定义不兼容。在缺乏诸如可达性之类的强假设的情况下，这种不兼容性很容易导致指数错误激增，我们通过新颖的技术工具克服了这一点。当密度特征未知并且必须从指数级大的候选集中学习时，我们的结果也很容易扩展到表示学习设置。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在低秩马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）中利用密度特征进行高效强化学习的方法，提出了一种结合离线和在线算法的框架，以解决状态占用分布估计中的误差问题。
AI.motivation: 低秩MDPs的转移矩阵可分解为左右矩阵，其中右矩阵（密度特征）能有效建模状态占用分布。现有研究多关注左矩阵的功能逼近，而本文旨在探索如何通过密度特征实现样本高效的强化学习，并解决无监督学习与凸优化RL的兼容性问题。
AI.method: 提出离线算法用于非探索性数据下的占用分布估计，并基于此设计在线算法逐步构建探索性数据分布。通过引入新型技术工具，解决占用估计的加性误差与数据覆盖的乘性定义之间的不兼容性问题。
AI.result: 在无需强假设（如可达性）的前提下，算法实现了对低秩MDPs的高效学习，且结果可扩展至密度特征未知需从指数级候选集中学习的表征学习场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过结合密度特征与占用分布估计，克服了传统RL中的误差放大问题，为低秩MDPs提供了可扩展的样本高效解决方案，并促进了无监督学习在强化学习中的应用。

Our results also readily extend to the representation learning setting, when the density features are unknown and must be learned from an exponentially large candidate set. 具有低秩转换的 MDP（即转换矩阵可以分解为左右两个矩阵的乘积）是一种高度具有代表性的结构，可以实现易于处理的学习。左矩阵可以实现基于价值的学习的表达函数逼近，并且已经得到了广泛的研究。在这项工作中，我们转而研究具有密度特征（即正确的矩阵）的样本有效学习，这会产生强大的状态占用分布模型。此设置不仅有助于在强化学习中利用无监督学习，而且还支持凸强化学习的插件解决方案。在离线设置中，我们提出了一种用于非策略占用率估计的算法，可以处理非探索性数据。以此作为子程序，我们进一步设计了一种在线算法，以逐级的方式构建探索性数据分布。作为一个核心技术挑战，占用率估计的加性误差与数据覆盖范围的乘法定义不兼容。在缺乏诸如可达性之类的强假设的情况下，这种不兼容性很容易导致指数错误激增，我们通过新颖的技术工具克服了这一点。当密度特征未知并且必须从指数级大的候选集中学习时，我们的结果也很容易扩展到表示学习设置。 本文研究了在低秩马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）中利用密度特征进行高效强化学习的方法，提出了一种结合离线和在线算法的框架，以解决状态占用分布估计中的误差问题。 Audrey Huang,Jinglin Chen,Nan Jiang cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Nihal Jain,Praneetha Vaddamanu,Paridhi Maheshwari,Vishwa Vinay,Kuldeep Kulkarni
title: Self-supervised Multi-view Disentanglement for Expansion of Visual Collections
title_zh: 用于扩展视觉集合的自监督多视图解开
comment: A version of this paper has been accepted at WSDM 2023
comments: A version of this paper has been accepted at WSDM 2023
abstract: Image search engines enable the retrieval of images relevant to a query image. In this work, we consider the setting where a query for similar images is derived from a collection of images. For visual search, the similarity measurements may be made along multiple axes, or views, such as style and color. We assume access to a set of feature extractors, each of which computes representations for a specific view. Our objective is to design a retrieval algorithm that effectively combines similarities computed over representations from multiple views. To this end, we propose a self-supervised learning method for extracting disentangled view-specific representations for images such that the inter-view overlap is minimized. We show how this allows us to compute the intent of a collection as a distribution over views. We show how effective retrieval can be performed by prioritizing candidate expansion images that match the intent of a query collection. Finally, we present a new querying mechanism for image search enabled by composing multiple collections and perform retrieval under this setting using the techniques presented in this paper.
summary: Image search engines enable the retrieval of images relevant to a query image. In this work, we consider the setting where a query for similar images is derived from a collection of images. For visual search, the similarity measurements may be made along multiple axes, or views, such as style and color. We assume access to a set of feature extractors, each of which computes representations for a specific view. Our objective is to design a retrieval algorithm that effectively combines similarities computed over representations from multiple views. To this end, we propose a self-supervised learning method for extracting disentangled view-specific representations for images such that the inter-view overlap is minimized. We show how this allows us to compute the intent of a collection as a distribution over views. We show how effective retrieval can be performed by prioritizing candidate expansion images that match the intent of a query collection. Finally, we present a new querying mechanism for image search enabled by composing multiple collections and perform retrieval under this setting using the techniques presented in this paper.
abstract_zh: 图像搜索引擎能够检索与查询图像相关的图像。在这项工作中，我们考虑从图像集合中派生出对相似图像的查询的设置。对于视觉搜索，可以沿着多个轴或视图（例如样式和颜色）进行相似性测量。我们假设可以访问一组特征提取器，每个特征提取器都计算特定视图的表示。我们的目标是设计一种检索算法，该算法可以有效地结合对多个视图的表示计算出的相似性。为此，我们提出了一种自监督学习方法，用于提取图像的解纠缠视图特定表示，从而最小化视图间重叠。我们展示了这如何允许我们将集合的意图计算为视图的分布。我们展示了如何通过优先考虑与查询集合的意图相匹配的候选扩展图像来执行有效的检索。最后，我们提出了一种新的图像搜索查询机制，通过组合多个集合来实现，并使用本文提出的技术在此设置下执行检索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督多视角解耦方法，用于扩展视觉集合中的图像检索，通过分离不同视角（如风格、颜色）的特征表示以提高检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像检索方法在处理多视角相似性时存在视角间信息重叠问题，导致难以准确捕捉查询集合的意图分布，需设计更有效的多视角特征融合策略。
AI.method: 提出自监督学习框架提取解耦的视角特定表示，通过最小化视角间重叠来分离不同特征维度，并基于集合意图分布优先扩展匹配候选图像，结合多集合查询机制进行检索。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效计算集合意图，通过视角解耦特征提升检索精度，并在组合多集合查询场景下验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多视角解耦表示有助于精准捕捉视觉集合意图，所提方法及查询机制可提升图像检索性能，为复杂场景下的视觉搜索提供新思路。

authors_text: Lingyan Ruan,Mojtaba Bemana,Hans-peter Seidel,Karol Myszkowski,Bin Chen
title: Revisiting Image Deblurring with an Efficient ConvNet
title_zh: 使用高效的卷积网络重新审视图像去模糊
comment: 30 pages (12 pages for the main manuscript and 18 for the supplementary materials)
comments: 30 pages (12 pages for the main manuscript and 18 for the supplementary materials)
abstract: Image deblurring aims to recover the latent sharp image from its blurry counterpart and has a wide range of applications in computer vision. The Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs) have performed well in this domain for many years, and until recently an alternative network architecture, namely Transformer, has demonstrated even stronger performance. One can attribute its superiority to the multi-head self-attention (MHSA) mechanism, which offers a larger receptive field and better input content adaptability than CNNs. However, as MHSA demands high computational costs that grow quadratically with respect to the input resolution, it becomes impractical for high-resolution image deblurring tasks. In this work, we propose a unified lightweight CNN network that features a large effective receptive field (ERF) and demonstrates comparable or even better performance than Transformers while bearing less computational costs. Our key design is an efficient CNN block dubbed LaKD, equipped with a large kernel depth-wise convolution and spatial-channel mixing structure, attaining comparable or larger ERF than Transformers but with a smaller parameter scale. Specifically, we achieve +0.17dB / +0.43dB PSNR over the state-of-the-art Restormer on defocus / motion deblurring benchmark datasets with 32% fewer parameters and 39% fewer MACs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of our network and the effectiveness of each module. Furthermore, we propose a compact and intuitive ERFMeter metric that quantitatively characterizes ERF, and shows a high correlation to the network performance. We hope this work can inspire the research community to further explore the pros and cons of CNN and Transformer architectures beyond image deblurring tasks.

The Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs) have performed well in this domain for many years, and until recently an alternative network architecture, namely Transformer, has demonstrated even stronger performance. One can attribute its superiority to the multi-head self-attention (MHSA) mechanism, which offers a larger receptive field and better input content adaptability than CNNs. However, as MHSA demands high computational costs that grow quadratically with respect to the input resolution, it becomes impractical for high-resolution image deblurring tasks. In this work, we propose a unified lightweight CNN network that features a large effective receptive field (ERF) and demonstrates comparable or even better performance than Transformers while bearing less computational costs. Our key design is an efficient CNN block dubbed LaKD, equipped with a large kernel depth-wise convolution and spatial-channel mixing structure, attaining comparable or larger ERF than Transformers but with a smaller parameter scale. Specifically, we achieve +0.17dB / +0.43dB PSNR over the state-of-the-art Restormer on defocus / motion deblurring benchmark datasets with 32% fewer parameters and 39% fewer MACs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of our network and the effectiveness of each module. Furthermore, we propose a compact and intuitive ERFMeter metric that quantitatively characterizes ERF, and shows a high correlation to the network performance. We hope this work can inspire the research community to further explore the pros and cons of CNN and Transformer architectures beyond image deblurring tasks.
abstract_zh: 图像去模糊旨在从模糊图像中恢复潜在的清晰图像，在计算机视觉中具有广泛的应用。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 多年来在该领域表现良好，直到最近，另一种网络架构（即 Transformer）也表现出了更强的性能。人们可以将其优越性归因于多头自注意力（MHSA）机制，它比 CNN 提供更大的感受野和更好的输入内容适应性。然而，由于 MHSA 需要高计算成本，且计算成本与输入分辨率呈二次方增长，因此对于高分辨率图像去模糊任务来说变得不切实际。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种统一的轻量级 CNN 网络，该网络具有较大的有效感受野（ERF），并且表现出与 Transformer 相当甚至更好的性能，同时承担更少的计算成本。我们的关键设计是一个被称为 LaKD 的高效 CNN 模块，配备了大内核深度卷积和空间通道混合结构，获得了与 Transformer 相当或更大的 ERF，但参数规模更小。具体来说，我们在散焦/运动去模糊基准数据集上比最先进的 Restormer 实现了 +0.17dB / +0.43dB PSNR，参数减少了 32%，MAC 减少了 39%。大量的实验证明了我们网络的优越性能和每个模块的有效性。此外，我们提出了一种紧凑且直观的 ERFMeter 指标，可以定量表征 ERF，并显示与网络性能的高度相关性。我们希望这项工作能够激励研究社区进一步探索 CNN 和 Transformer 架构在图像去模糊任务之外的优缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的卷积神经网络（LaKD），用于图像去模糊任务，在保持高性能的同时降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: Transformer虽在图像去模糊中表现优异，但其计算复杂度随分辨率呈二次增长，难以处理高分辨率任务。传统CNN因感受野限制性能不足，需寻找兼顾效率与性能的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级CNN模块LaKD，结合大核深度卷积与空间-通道混合结构，扩大有效感受野（ERF）。提出ERFMeter指标量化评估网络感受野与性能关联性。
AI.result: 在去模糊基准测试中，LaKD较Restormer模型参数减少32%、MACs减少39%，PSNR提升0.17dB（defocus）/0.43dB（motion），验证模块有效性及ERFMeter指标可靠性。
AI.conclusion: LaKD证明CNN可通过结构优化实现媲美Transformer的性能，同时降低计算成本，为后续探索CNN与Transformer架构优劣提供新思路。

Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of our network and the effectiveness of each module. Furthermore, we propose a compact and intuitive ERFMeter metric that quantitatively characterizes ERF, and shows a high correlation to the network performance. We hope this work can inspire the research community to further explore the pros and cons of CNN and Transformer architectures beyond image deblurring tasks. 图像去模糊旨在从模糊图像中恢复潜在的清晰图像，在计算机视觉中具有广泛的应用。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 多年来在该领域表现良好，直到最近，另一种网络架构（即 Transformer）也表现出了更强的性能。人们可以将其优越性归因于多头自注意力（MHSA）机制，它比 CNN 提供更大的感受野和更好的输入内容适应性。然而，由于 MHSA 需要高计算成本，且计算成本与输入分辨率呈二次方增长，因此对于高分辨率图像去模糊任务来说变得不切实际。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种统一的轻量级 CNN 网络，该网络具有较大的有效感受野（ERF），并且表现出与 Transformer 相当甚至更好的性能，同时承担更少的计算成本。我们的关键设计是一个被称为 LaKD 的高效 CNN 模块，配备了大内核深度卷积和空间通道混合结构，获得了与 Transformer 相当或更大的 ERF，但参数规模更小。具体来说，我们在散焦/运动去模糊基准数据集上比最先进的 Restormer 实现了 +0.17dB / +0.43dB PSNR，参数减少了 32%，MAC 减少了 39%。大量的实验证明了我们网络的优越性能和每个模块的有效性。此外，我们提出了一种紧凑且直观的 ERFMeter 指标，可以定量表征 ERF，并显示与网络性能的高度相关性。我们希望这项工作能够激励研究社区进一步探索 CNN 和 Transformer 架构在图像去模糊任务之外的优缺点。 本文提出一种高效的卷积神经网络（LaKD），用于图像去模糊任务，在保持高性能的同时降低计算成本。 Lingyan Ruan,Mojtaba Bemana,Hans-peter Seidel,Karol Myszkowski,Bin Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Chaofan Wang,Weiwei Jiang,Kangning Yang,Zhanna Sarsenbayeva,Benjamin Tag,Tilman Dingler,Jorge Goncalves,Vassilis Kostakos
title: Using Thermal Imaging to Measure Hand Hygiene Quality
title_zh: 使用热成像测量手部卫生质量
abstract: Hand hygiene has long been promoted as the most effective way to prevent the transmission of infection. However, due to the low compliance and quality of hand hygiene reported in previous studies, constant monitoring of healthcare workers' hand hygiene compliance and quality is crucial. In this study, we investigate the feasibility of using a thermal camera together with an RGB camera to detect hand coverage of alcohol-based formulation, thereby monitoring handrub quality. The system yields promising results in terms of accuracy (93.5%) and Dice coefficient (87.1%) when observations take place 10 seconds after performing handrub. In addition, we also examine the system performance change over a 60-second observation period, and the accuracy and Dice coefficient still remain at about 92.4% and 85.7% when observation happens at the 60-second time point. Given these encouraging results, thermal imaging shows its potential feasibility in providing accurate, constant, and systematic hand hygiene quality monitoring.
summary: Hand hygiene has long been promoted as the most effective way to prevent the transmission of infection. However, due to the low compliance and quality of hand hygiene reported in previous studies, constant monitoring of healthcare workers' hand hygiene compliance and quality is crucial. In this study, we investigate the feasibility of using a thermal camera together with an RGB camera to detect hand coverage of alcohol-based formulation, thereby monitoring handrub quality. The system yields promising results in terms of accuracy (93.5%) and Dice coefficient (87.1%) when observations take place 10 seconds after performing handrub. In addition, we also examine the system performance change over a 60-second observation period, and the accuracy and Dice coefficient still remain at about 92.4% and 85.7% when observation happens at the 60-second time point. Given these encouraging results, thermal imaging shows its potential feasibility in providing accurate, constant, and systematic hand hygiene quality monitoring.
abstract_zh: 手卫生长期以来一直被认为是预防感染传播的最有效方法。然而，由于先前研究报告的手卫生依从性和质量较低，因此持续监测医护人员的手卫生依从性和质量至关重要。在本研究中，我们研究了使用热感相机和 RGB 相机来检测酒精制剂手部覆盖情况的可行性，从而监测洗手液质量。当进行洗手后 10 秒进行观察时，该系统在准确度 (93.5%) 和 Dice 系数 (87.1%) 方面产生了令人鼓舞的结果。此外，我们还检查了 60 秒观察期内系统性能的变化，当观察发生在 60 秒时间点时，准确率和 Dice 系数仍然保持在 92.4% 和 85.7% 左右。鉴于这些令人鼓舞的结果，热成像显示了其在提供准确、持续和系统的手部卫生质量监测方面的潜在可行性。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨使用热成像与RGB相机结合检测酒精制剂手部覆盖情况，以监测手部卫生质量。
AI.motivation: 由于既往研究显示医护人员手部卫生依从性及质量较低，需持续监测以防止感染传播。
AI.method: 通过热成像与RGB相机同步采集数据，分析手部酒精制剂覆盖情况，评估系统在不同时间点的准确性与Dice系数。
AI.result: 系统在10秒时准确率达93.5%，Dice系数87.1%；60秒时仍保持92.4%和85.7%的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 热成像技术展现出在提供准确、持续手部卫生质量监测方面的可行性与应用潜力。

authors_text: Kian Ahrabian,Xinwei Du,Richard Delwin Myloth,Arun Baalaaji Sankar Ananthan,Jay Pujara
title: PubGraph: A Large-Scale Scientific Knowledge Graph
title_zh: PubGraph：大规模科学知识图
abstract: Research publications are the primary vehicle for sharing scientific progress in the form of new discoveries, methods, techniques, and insights. Unfortunately, the lack of a large-scale, comprehensive, and easy-to-use resource capturing the myriad relationships between publications, their authors, and venues presents a barrier to applications for gaining a deeper understanding of science. In this paper, we present PubGraph, a new resource for studying scientific progress that takes the form of a large-scale knowledge graph (KG) with more than 385M entities, 13B main edges, and 1.5B qualifier edges. PubGraph is comprehensive and unifies data from various sources, including Wikidata, OpenAlex, and Semantic Scholar, using the Wikidata ontology. Beyond the metadata available from these sources, PubGraph includes outputs from auxiliary community detection algorithms and large language models. To further support studies on reasoning over scientific networks, we create several large-scale benchmarks extracted from PubGraph for the core task of knowledge graph completion (KGC). These benchmarks present many challenges for knowledge graph embedding models, including an adversarial community-based KGC evaluation setting, zero-shot inductive learning, and large-scale learning. All of the aforementioned resources are accessible at https://pubgraph.isi.edu/ and released under the CC-BY-SA license. We plan to update PubGraph quarterly to accommodate the release of new publications.
summary: Research publications are the primary vehicle for sharing scientific progress in the form of new discoveries, methods, techniques, and insights. Unfortunately, the lack of a large-scale, comprehensive, and easy-to-use resource capturing the myriad relationships between publications, their authors, and venues presents a barrier to applications for gaining a deeper understanding of science. In this paper, we present PubGraph, a new resource for studying scientific progress that takes the form of a large-scale knowledge graph (KG) with more than 385M entities, 13B main edges, and 1.5B qualifier edges. PubGraph is comprehensive and unifies data from various sources, including Wikidata, OpenAlex, and Semantic Scholar, using the Wikidata ontology. Beyond the metadata available from these sources, PubGraph includes outputs from auxiliary community detection algorithms and large language models. To further support studies on reasoning over scientific networks, we create several large-scale benchmarks extracted from PubGraph for the core task of knowledge graph completion (KGC). These benchmarks present many challenges for knowledge graph embedding models, including an adversarial community-based KGC evaluation setting, zero-shot inductive learning, and large-scale learning. All of the aforementioned resources are accessible at https://pubgraph.isi.edu/ and released under the CC-BY-SA license. We plan to update PubGraph quarterly to accommodate the release of new publications.
abstract_zh: 研究出版物是以新发现、方法、技术和见解的形式分享科学进步的主要工具。不幸的是，缺乏大规模、全面且易于使用的资源来捕获出版物、作者和场所之间的无数关系，这给加深对科学的理解的应用带来了障碍。在本文中，我们提出了 PubGraph，一种用于研究科学进步的新资源，它采用大规模知识图 (KG) 的形式，包含超过 3.85 亿个实体、13B 个主边和 1.5B 个限定边。 PubGraph 非常全面，使用 Wikidata 本体统一了来自各种来源的数据，包括 Wikidata、OpenAlex 和 Semantic Sc​​holar。除了这些来源提供的元数据之外，PubGraph 还包括辅助社区检测算法和大型语言模型的输出。为了进一步支持科学网络推理研究，我们为知识图补全（KGC）的核心任务创建了几个从 PubGraph 中提取的大规模基准。这些基准给知识图嵌入模型带来了许多挑战，包括基于对抗性社区的 KGC 评估设置、零样本归纳学习和大规模学习。所有上述资源均可通过 https://pubgraph.isi.edu/ 访问，并根据 CC-BY-SA 许可发布。我们计划每季度更新 PubGraph 以适应新出版物的发布。

AI.tldr: 构建一个大规模科学知识图谱PubGraph，整合多源数据并创建用于知识图谱补全的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有科学数据资源缺乏全面性和易用性，阻碍了科学网络分析和理解。
AI.method: 整合Wikidata、OpenAlex和Semantic Scholar等多源数据，采用Wikidata本体，并结合社区检测算法和大语言模型生成辅助信息。
AI.result: 构建了包含3.85亿实体、130亿主边和15亿限定边的PubGraph，并开发了多个大规模知识图谱补全基准测试。
AI.conclusion: PubGraph为科学网络研究提供了全面资源，并通过基准测试推动知识图谱补全技术发展，未来将定期更新。

authors_text: Shreya Bali,Pranav Khadpe,Geoff Kaufman,Chinmay Kulkarni
title: Nooks: Social Spaces to Lower Hesitations in Interacting with New People at Work
title_zh: 角落：减少与工作中的新人互动犹豫的社交空间
abstract: Initiating conversations with new people at work is often intimidating because of uncertainty about their interests. People worry others may reject their attempts to initiate conversation or that others may not enjoy the conversation. We introduce a new system, Nooks, built on Slack, that reduces fear of social evaluation by enabling individuals to initiate any conversation as a nook -- a conversation room that identifies its topic, but not its creator. Automatically convening others interested in the nook, Nooks further reduces fears of social evaluation by guaranteeing individuals in advance that others they are about to interact with are interested in the conversation. In a multi-month deployment with participants in a summer research program, Nooks provided participants with non-threatening and inclusive interaction opportunities, and ambient awareness, leading to new interactions online and offline. Our results demonstrate how intentionally designed social spaces can reduce fears of social evaluation and catalyze new workplace connections.
summary: Initiating conversations with new people at work is often intimidating because of uncertainty about their interests. People worry others may reject their attempts to initiate conversation or that others may not enjoy the conversation. We introduce a new system, Nooks, built on Slack, that reduces fear of social evaluation by enabling individuals to initiate any conversation as a nook -- a conversation room that identifies its topic, but not its creator. Automatically convening others interested in the nook, Nooks further reduces fears of social evaluation by guaranteeing individuals in advance that others they are about to interact with are interested in the conversation. In a multi-month deployment with participants in a summer research program, Nooks provided participants with non-threatening and inclusive interaction opportunities, and ambient awareness, leading to new interactions online and offline. Our results demonstrate how intentionally designed social spaces can reduce fears of social evaluation and catalyze new workplace connections.
abstract_zh: 由于不确定他们的兴趣，在工作中与新人展开对话通常会令人感到害怕。人们担心其他人可能会拒绝他们发起对话的尝试，或者其他人可能不喜欢这种对话。我们推出了一个基于 Slack 的新系统 Nooks，它使个人能够像角落一样发起任何对话，从而减少对社会评价的恐惧——一个可以识别主题但不识别其创建者的对话室。 Nooks 自动召集对这个角落感兴趣的其他人，通过提前向个人保证他们即将与之互动的其他人对对话感兴趣，进一步减少了对社会评估的恐惧。在与夏季研究项目的参与者进行的为期数月的部署中，Nooks 为参与者提供了非威胁性和包容性的互动机会以及环境意识，从而带来了线上和线下的新互动。我们的研究结果表明，有意设计的社交空间可以减少对社会评价的恐惧，并促进新的工作场所联系。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现Nooks系统，通过匿名话题房间减少职场新人互动的社交焦虑
AI.motivation: 人们在职场中因担心被拒绝或社交评价而不敢主动与新人交谈，导致社交机会减少
AI.method: 基于Slack开发Nooks系统，允许用户创建匿名话题房间（Nooks），并自动匹配对此话题感兴趣的用户进行对话
AI.result: 实验显示Nooks增加了用户线上线下互动，减少了社交焦虑，促进了新连接的形成
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的社交空间能有效降低社交评价恐惧，促进职场中新的人际关系建立

search_text: Nooks: Social Spaces to Lower Hesitations in Interacting with New People at Work 角落：减少与工作中的新人互动犹豫的社交空间 Initiating conversations with new people at work is often intimidating because of uncertainty about their interests. People worry others may reject their attempts to initiate conversation or that others may not enjoy the conversation. We introduce a new system, Nooks, built on Slack, that reduces fear of social evaluation by enabling individuals to initiate any conversation as a nook -- a conversation room that identifies its topic, but not its creator. Automatically convening others interested in the nook, Nooks further reduces fears of social evaluation by guaranteeing individuals in advance that others they are about to interact with are interested in the conversation. In a multi-month deployment with participants in a summer research program, Nooks provided participants with non-threatening and inclusive interaction opportunities, and ambient awareness, leading to new interactions online and offline. Our results demonstrate how intentionally designed social spaces can reduce fears of social evaluation and catalyze new workplace connections. 由于不确定他们的兴趣，在工作中与新人展开对话通常会令人感到害怕。人们担心其他人可能会拒绝他们发起对话的尝试，或者其他人可能不喜欢这种对话。我们推出了一个基于 Slack 的新系统 Nooks，它使个人能够像角落一样发起任何对话，从而减少对社会评价的恐惧——一个可以识别主题但不识别其创建者的对话室。 Nooks 自动召集对这个角落感兴趣的其他人，通过提前向个人保证他们即将与之互动的其他人对对话感兴趣，进一步减少了对社会评估的恐惧。在与夏季研究项目的参与者进行的为期数月的部署中，Nooks 为参与者提供了非威胁性和包容性的互动机会以及环境意识，从而带来了线上和线下的新互动。我们的研究结果表明，有意设计的社交空间可以减少对社会评价的恐惧，并促进新的工作场所联系。 设计并实现Nooks系统，通过匿名话题房间减少职场新人互动的社交焦虑 Shreya Bali,Pranav Khadpe,Geoff Kaufman,Chinmay Kulkarni cs.HC

authors_text: Federica Granese,Marco Romanelli,Siddharth Garg,Pablo Piantanida
title: A Minimax Approach Against Multi-Armed Adversarial Attacks Detection
title_zh: 针对多臂对抗攻击检测的极小极大方法
abstract: Multi-armed adversarial attacks, in which multiple algorithms and objective loss functions are simultaneously used at evaluation time, have been shown to be highly successful in fooling state-of-the-art adversarial examples detectors while requiring no specific side information about the detection mechanism. By formalizing the problem at hand, we can propose a solution that aggregates the soft-probability outputs of multiple pre-trained detectors according to a minimax approach. The proposed framework is mathematically sound, easy to implement, and modular, allowing for integrating existing or future detectors. Through extensive evaluation on popular datasets (e.g., CIFAR10 and SVHN), we show that our aggregation consistently outperforms individual state-of-the-art detectors against multi-armed adversarial attacks, making it an effective solution to improve the resilience of available methods.
summary: Multi-armed adversarial attacks, in which multiple algorithms and objective loss functions are simultaneously used at evaluation time, have been shown to be highly successful in fooling state-of-the-art adversarial examples detectors while requiring no specific side information about the detection mechanism. By formalizing the problem at hand, we can propose a solution that aggregates the soft-probability outputs of multiple pre-trained detectors according to a minimax approach. The proposed framework is mathematically sound, easy to implement, and modular, allowing for integrating existing or future detectors. Through extensive evaluation on popular datasets (e.g., CIFAR10 and SVHN), we show that our aggregation consistently outperforms individual state-of-the-art detectors against multi-armed adversarial attacks, making it an effective solution to improve the resilience of available methods.
abstract_zh: 多臂对抗性攻击（其中在评估时同时使用多种算法和目标损失函数）已被证明在欺骗最先进的对抗性示例检测器方面非常成功，同时不需要有关检测机制的特定辅助信息。通过形式化手头的问题，我们可以提出一种解决方案，根据极小极大方法聚合多个预训练检测器的软概率输出。所提出的框架在数学上合理、易于实现且模块化，允许集成现有或未来的探测器。通过对流行数据集（例如 CIFAR10 和 SVHN）的广泛评估，我们表明，我们的聚合在对抗多臂对抗攻击方面始终优于单个最先进的检测器，使其成为提高可用方法弹性的有效解决方案。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于最小最大化方法的多武装对抗攻击检测框架，通过聚合多个检测器的输出以提高检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法易被多武装对抗攻击欺骗，且需特定侧信息，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用最小最大化策略，聚合多个预训练检测器的软概率输出，形成模块化框架，便于集成新检测器。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个数据集上优于现有检测器，有效提升对抗攻击检测的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法数学严谨，易于实现，有效提升检测器对多武装对抗攻击的防御能力。

authors_text: Loukas Georgiadis,Dionysios Kefallinos,Evangelos Kosinas
title: On 2-strong connectivity orientations of mixed graphs and related problems
title_zh: 混合图的2-强连通方向及相关问题
abstract: A mixed graph $G$ is a graph that consists of both undirected and directed edges. An orientation of $G$ is formed by orienting all the undirected edges of $G$, i.e., converting each undirected edge $\{u,v\}$ into a directed edge that is either $(u,v)$ or $(v,u)$. The problem of finding an orientation of a mixed graph that makes it strongly connected is well understood and can be solved in linear time. Here we introduce the following orientation problem in mixed graphs. Given a mixed graph $G$, we wish to compute its maximal sets of vertices $C_1,C_2,\ldots,C_k$ with the property that by removing any edge $e$ from $G$ (directed or undirected), there is an orientation $R_i$ of $G\setminus{e}$ such that all vertices in $C_i$ are strongly connected in $R_i$. We discuss properties of those sets, and we show how to solve this problem in linear time by reducing it to the computation of the $2$-edge twinless strongly connected components of a directed graph. A directed graph $G=(V,E)$ is twinless strongly connected if it contains a strongly connected spanning subgraph without any pair of antiparallel (or twin) edges. The twinless strongly connected components (TSCCs) of a directed graph $G$ are its maximal twinless strongly connected subgraphs. A $2$-edge twinless strongly connected component (2eTSCC) of $G$ is a maximal subset of vertices $C$ such that any two vertices $u, v \in C$ are in the same twinless strongly connected component of $G \setminus e$, for any edge $e$. These concepts are motivated by several diverse applications, such as the design of road and telecommunication networks, and the structural stability of buildings.
summary: A mixed graph $G$ is a graph that consists of both undirected and directed edges. An orientation of $G$ is formed by orienting all the undirected edges of $G$, i.e., converting each undirected edge $\{u,v\}$ into a directed edge that is either $(u,v)$ or $(v,u)$. The problem of finding an orientation of a mixed graph that makes it strongly connected is well understood and can be solved in linear time. Here we introduce the following orientation problem in mixed graphs. Given a mixed graph $G$, we wish to compute its maximal sets of vertices $C_1,C_2,\ldots,C_k$ with the property that by removing any edge $e$ from $G$ (directed or undirected), there is an orientation $R_i$ of $G\setminus{e}$ such that all vertices in $C_i$ are strongly connected in $R_i$. We discuss properties of those sets, and we show how to solve this problem in linear time by reducing it to the computation of the $2$-edge twinless strongly connected components of a directed graph. A directed graph $G=(V,E)$ is twinless strongly connected if it contains a strongly connected spanning subgraph without any pair of antiparallel (or twin) edges. The twinless strongly connected components (TSCCs) of a directed graph $G$ are its maximal twinless strongly connected subgraphs. A $2$-edge twinless strongly connected component (2eTSCC) of $G$ is a maximal subset of vertices $C$ such that any two vertices $u, v \in C$ are in the same twinless strongly connected component of $G \setminus e$, for any edge $e$. These concepts are motivated by several diverse applications, such as the design of road and telecommunication networks, and the structural stability of buildings.
abstract_zh: 混合图 $G$ 是由无向边和有向边组成的图。 $G$ 的方向是通过对 $G$ 的所有无向边进行定向来形成的，即将每个无向边 $\{u,v\}$ 转换为 $(u,v)$ 或 $(v,u)$ 有向边。找到使其强连接的混合图的方向的问题很好理解，并且可以在线性时间内解决。这里我们介绍以下混合图中的方向问题。给定一个混合图$G$，我们希望计算其最大顶点集$C_1,C_2,\ldots,C_k$，其属性是通过从$G$（有向或无向）中删除任何边$e$，存在$G\setminus{e}$的方向$R_i$，使得$C_i$中的所有顶点在$R_i$中强连接。我们讨论了这些集合的属性，并展示了如何通过将其简化为有向图的 $2$ 边无孪生强连通分量的计算来在线性时间内解决这个问题。如果有向图 $G=(V,E)$ 包含强连通生成子图且没有任何一对反平行（或孪生）边，则该有向图 $G=(V,E)$ 是非孪生强连通的。有向图 $G$ 的无孪强连通分量 (TSCC) 是其最大无孪强连通子图。 $G$ 的 $2$ 边无孪生强连通分量 (2eTSCC) 是顶点 $C$ 的最大子集，使得对于任何边 $e$，C$ 中的任何两个顶点 $u, v \in C$ 位于 $G \setminus e$ 的同一个无孪生强连通分量中。这些概念源于多种不同的应用，例如道路和电信网络的设计以及建筑物的结构稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究混合图的2-强连通定向问题，旨在找到在删除任意边后仍能保持强连通性的顶点集合。
AI.motivation: 该问题在道路网络、通信网络及建筑结构稳定性设计中具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 通过将问题转化为计算有向图的2-边双连通无双边强连通分量（2eTSCC），并利用线性时间算法求解。
AI.result: 提出了一种线性时间算法，可有效计算满足条件的顶点集合及其相关性质。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为混合图的强连通定向问题提供了理论支持和高效解决方案，具有实际应用意义。

The twinless strongly connected components (TSCCs) of a directed graph $G$ are its maximal twinless strongly connected subgraphs. These concepts are motivated by several diverse applications, such as the design of road and telecommunication networks, and the structural stability of buildings. 混合图 $G$ 是由无向边和有向边组成的图。 $G$ 的方向是通过对 $G$ 的所有无向边进行定向来形成的，即将每个无向边 $\{u,v\}$ 转换为 $(u,v)$ 或 $(v,u)$ 有向边。找到使其强连接的混合图的方向的问题很好理解，并且可以在线性时间内解决。这里我们介绍以下混合图中的方向问题。给定一个混合图$G$，我们希望计算其最大顶点集$C_1,C_2,\ldots,C_k$，其属性是通过从$G$（有向或无向）中删除任何边$e$，存在$G\setminus{e}$的方向$R_i$，使得$C_i$中的所有顶点在$R_i$中强连接。我们讨论了这些集合的属性，并展示了如何通过将其简化为有向图的 $2$ 边无孪生强连通分量的计算来在线性时间内解决这个问题。如果有向图 $G=(V,E)$ 包含强连通生成子图且没有任何一对反平行（或孪生）边，则该有向图 $G=(V,E)$ 是非孪生强连通的。有向图 $G$ 的无孪强连通分量 (TSCC) 是其最大无孪强连通子图。 $G$ 的 $2$ 边无孪生强连通分量 (2eTSCC) 是顶点 $C$ 的最大子集，使得对于任何边 $e$，C$ 中的任何两个顶点 $u, v \in C$ 位于 $G \setminus e$ 的同一个无孪生强连通分量中。这些概念源于多种不同的应用，例如道路和电信网络的设计以及建筑物的结构稳定性。 本文研究混合图的2-强连通定向问题，旨在找到在删除任意边后仍能保持强连通性的顶点集合。 Loukas Georgiadis,Dionysios Kefallinos,Evangelos Kosinas cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Nadja Gruber,Johannes Schwab,Sebastien Court,Elke Gizewski,Markus Haltmeier
title: Variational multichannel multiclass segmentation using unsupervised lifting with CNNs
title_zh: 使用 CNN 无监督提升的变分多通道多类分割
comment: 20th INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE OF NUMERICAL ANALYSIS AND APPLIED MATHEMATICS
comments: 20th INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE OF NUMERICAL ANALYSIS AND APPLIED MATHEMATICS
abstract: We propose an unsupervised image segmentation approach, that combines a variational energy functional and deep convolutional neural networks. The variational part is based on a recent multichannel multiphase Chan-Vese model, which is capable to extract useful information from multiple input images simultaneously. We implement a flexible multiclass segmentation method that divides a given image into $K$ different regions. We use convolutional neural networks (CNNs) targeting a pre-decomposition of the image. By subsequently minimising the segmentation functional, the final segmentation is obtained in a fully unsupervised manner. Special emphasis is given to the extraction of informative feature maps serving as a starting point for the segmentation. The initial results indicate that the proposed method is able to decompose and segment the different regions of various types of images, such as texture and medical images and compare its performance with another multiphase segmentation method.
summary: We propose an unsupervised image segmentation approach, that combines a variational energy functional and deep convolutional neural networks. The variational part is based on a recent multichannel multiphase Chan-Vese model, which is capable to extract useful information from multiple input images simultaneously. We implement a flexible multiclass segmentation method that divides a given image into $K$ different regions. We use convolutional neural networks (CNNs) targeting a pre-decomposition of the image. By subsequently minimising the segmentation functional, the final segmentation is obtained in a fully unsupervised manner. Special emphasis is given to the extraction of informative feature maps serving as a starting point for the segmentation. The initial results indicate that the proposed method is able to decompose and segment the different regions of various types of images, such as texture and medical images and compare its performance with another multiphase segmentation method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种无监督图像分割方法，该方法结合了变分能量函数和深度卷积神经网络。变分部分基于最近的多通道多相 Chan-Vese 模型，该模型能够同时从多个输入图像中提取有用信息。我们实现了一种灵活的多类分割方法，将给定图像划分为 $K$ 个不同区域。我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来预分解图像。通过随后最小化分割函数，以完全无监督的方式获得最终分割。特别强调提取信息特征图作为分割的起点。初步结果表明，该方法能够分解和分割各种类型图像（例如纹理和医学图像）的不同区域，并将其性能与另一种多相分割方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合变分能量函数与深度卷积神经网络的无监督图像分割方法，实现多通道多类图像的自动分割。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分割方法依赖标注数据，而医学和纹理图像常面临多通道多类分割的挑战，需开发无需人工标注的自动化方法。
AI.method: 融合多通道多相Chan-Vese变分模型与CNN，通过CNN预提取特征图后，利用能量函数最小化实现无监督分割。
AI.result: 初步实验表明该方法可有效分割纹理和医学图像，性能优于其他多相分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在无监督场景下实现了多通道多类图像的高质量分割，为复杂图像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Shashank Agnihotri,Steffen Jung,Margret Keuper
title: CosPGD: an efficient white-box adversarial attack for pixel-wise prediction tasks
title_zh: CosPGD：针对像素预测任务的高效白盒对抗攻击
comment: Accepted at 41st International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2024
comments: Accepted at 41st International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2024
abstract: While neural networks allow highly accurate predictions in many tasks, their lack of robustness towards even slight input perturbations often hampers their deployment. Adversarial attacks such as the seminal projected gradient descent (PGD) offer an effective means to evaluate a model's robustness and dedicated solutions have been proposed for attacks on semantic segmentation or optical flow estimation. While they attempt to increase the attack's efficiency, a further objective is to balance its effect, so that it acts on the entire image domain instead of isolated point-wise predictions. This often comes at the cost of optimization stability and thus efficiency. Here, we propose CosPGD, an attack that encourages more balanced errors over the entire image domain while increasing the attack's overall efficiency. To this end, CosPGD leverages a simple alignment score computed from any pixel-wise prediction and its target to scale the loss in a smooth and fully differentiable way. It leads to efficient evaluations of a model's robustness for semantic segmentation as well as regression models (such as optical flow, disparity estimation, or image restoration), and it allows it to outperform the previous SotA attack on semantic segmentation. We provide code for the CosPGD algorithm and example usage at https://github.com/shashankskagnihotri/cospgd.
summary: While neural networks allow highly accurate predictions in many tasks, their lack of robustness towards even slight input perturbations often hampers their deployment. Adversarial attacks such as the seminal projected gradient descent (PGD) offer an effective means to evaluate a model's robustness and dedicated solutions have been proposed for attacks on semantic segmentation or optical flow estimation. While they attempt to increase the attack's efficiency, a further objective is to balance its effect, so that it acts on the entire image domain instead of isolated point-wise predictions. This often comes at the cost of optimization stability and thus efficiency. Here, we propose CosPGD, an attack that encourages more balanced errors over the entire image domain while increasing the attack's overall efficiency. To this end, CosPGD leverages a simple alignment score computed from any pixel-wise prediction and its target to scale the loss in a smooth and fully differentiable way. It leads to efficient evaluations of a model's robustness for semantic segmentation as well as regression models (such as optical flow, disparity estimation, or image restoration), and it allows it to outperform the previous SotA attack on semantic segmentation. We provide code for the CosPGD algorithm and example usage at https://github.com/shashankskagnihotri/cospgd.
abstract_zh: 虽然神经网络可以在许多任务中进行高度准确的预测，但它们对即使是轻微的输入扰动也缺乏鲁棒性，通常会阻碍它们的部署。诸如开创性的投影梯度下降（PGD）之类的对抗性攻击提供了一种评估模型鲁棒性的有效方法，并且已经针对语义分割或光流估计的攻击提出了专用解决方案。虽然他们试图提高攻击的效率，但进一步的目标是平衡其效果，以便它作用于整个图像域，而不是孤立的逐点预测。这通常是以优化稳定性和效率为代价的。在这里，我们提出了 CosPGD，这是一种在整个图像域上鼓励更多平衡错误的攻击，同时提高攻击的整体效率。为此，CosPGD 利用根据任何像素预测及其目标计算出的简单对齐分数，以平滑且完全可微分的方式缩放损失。它可以有效评估模型对语义分割和回归模型（例如光流、视差估计或图像恢复）的鲁棒性，并且使其优于之前对语义分割的 SotA 攻击。我们在 https://github.com/shashankskagnihotri/cospgd 提供 CosPGD 算法的代码和示例用法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CosPGD的高效白盒对抗攻击方法，用于像素级预测任务，如语义分割和光流估计。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法在优化稳定性与效率之间难以平衡，尤其在处理整个图像域时效果不佳，需设计更高效的攻击方法以全面评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: CosPGD通过计算像素级预测与目标之间的对齐分数，以平滑且全微分的方式缩放损失函数，从而在图像域内实现更均衡的错误分布并提升攻击效率。
AI.result: CosPGD在语义分割任务中超越了现有最先进攻击方法，并适用于光流、视差估计等回归模型，同时提供了开源代码实现。
AI.conclusion: CosPGD通过损失缩放机制有效平衡了图像域错误分布，显著提升了对抗攻击效率，为像素级预测任务的模型鲁棒性评估提供了新工具。

Adversarial attacks such as the seminal projected gradient descent (PGD) offer an effective means to evaluate a model's robustness and dedicated solutions have been proposed for attacks on semantic segmentation or optical flow estimation. While they attempt to increase the attack's efficiency, a further objective is to balance its effect, so that it acts on the entire image domain instead of isolated point-wise predictions. This often comes at the cost of optimization stability and thus efficiency. To this end, CosPGD leverages a simple alignment score computed from any pixel-wise prediction and its target to scale the loss in a smooth and fully differentiable way. It leads to efficient evaluations of a model's robustness for semantic segmentation as well as regression models (such as optical flow, disparity estimation, or image restoration), and it allows it to outperform the previous SotA attack on semantic segmentation. authors_text: Shih-Yang Liu,Zechun Liu,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: Oscillation-free Quantization for Low-bit Vision Transformers
title_zh: 低位视觉变压器的无振荡量化
comment: Proceedings of the 40 th International Conference on Machine Learning, Honolulu, Hawaii, USA. PMLR 202, 2023
comments: Proceedings of the 40 th International Conference on Machine Learning, Honolulu, Hawaii, USA. PMLR 202, 2023
abstract: Weight oscillation is an undesirable side effect of quantization-aware training, in which quantized weights frequently jump between two quantized levels, resulting in training instability and a sub-optimal final model. We discover that the learnable scaling factor, a widely-used $\textit{de facto}$ setting in quantization aggravates weight oscillation. In this study, we investigate the connection between the learnable scaling factor and quantized weight oscillation and use ViT as a case driver to illustrate the findings and remedies. In addition, we also found that the interdependence between quantized weights in $\textit{query}$ and $\textit{key}$ of a self-attention layer makes ViT vulnerable to oscillation. We, therefore, propose three techniques accordingly: statistical weight quantization ($\rm StatsQ$) to improve quantization robustness compared to the prevalent learnable-scale-based method; confidence-guided annealing ($\rm CGA$) that freezes the weights with $\textit{high confidence}$ and calms the oscillating weights; and $\textit{query}$-$\textit{key}$ reparameterization ($\rm QKR$) to resolve the query-key intertwined oscillation and mitigate the resulting gradient misestimation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that these proposed techniques successfully abate weight oscillation and consistently achieve substantial accuracy improvement on ImageNet. Specifically, our 2-bit DeiT-T/DeiT-S algorithms outperform the previous state-of-the-art by 9.8% and 7.7%, respectively. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/nbasyl/OFQ.
summary: Weight oscillation is an undesirable side effect of quantization-aware training, in which quantized weights frequently jump between two quantized levels, resulting in training instability and a sub-optimal final model. We discover that the learnable scaling factor, a widely-used $\textit{de facto}$ setting in quantization aggravates weight oscillation. In this study, we investigate the connection between the learnable scaling factor and quantized weight oscillation and use ViT as a case driver to illustrate the findings and remedies. In addition, we also found that the interdependence between quantized weights in $\textit{query}$ and $\textit{key}$ of a self-attention layer makes ViT vulnerable to oscillation. We, therefore, propose three techniques accordingly: statistical weight quantization ($\rm StatsQ$) to improve quantization robustness compared to the prevalent learnable-scale-based method; confidence-guided annealing ($\rm CGA$) that freezes the weights with $\textit{high confidence}$ and calms the oscillating weights; and $\textit{query}$-$\textit{key}$ reparameterization ($\rm QKR$) to resolve the query-key intertwined oscillation and mitigate the resulting gradient misestimation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that these proposed techniques successfully abate weight oscillation and consistently achieve substantial accuracy improvement on ImageNet. Specifically, our 2-bit DeiT-T/DeiT-S algorithms outperform the previous state-of-the-art by 9.8% and 7.7%, respectively. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/nbasyl/OFQ.
abstract_zh: 权重振荡是量化感知训练的一个不良副作用，其中量化权重经常在两个量化级别之间跳跃，导致训练不稳定和次优的最终模型。我们发现可学习的缩放因子（量化中广泛使用的$\textit{de facto}$设置）会加剧权重振荡。在本研究中，我们研究了可学习比例因子和量化权重振荡之间的联系，并使用 ViT 作为案例驱动程序来说明研究结果和补救措施。此外，我们还发现自注意力层的$\textit{query}$和$\textit{key}$中的量化权重之间的相互依赖使得ViT容易受到振荡的影响。因此，我们相应地提出了三种技术：与流行的基于可学习尺度的方法相比，统计权重量化（$\rm StatsQ$）可提高量化鲁棒性；置信度引导退火（$\rm CGA$），用 $\textit{highconfidence}$ 冻结权重并稳定振荡权重；和 $\textit{query}$-$\textit{key}$ 重新参数化（$\rm QKR$）来解决查询键交织振荡并减轻由此产生的梯度误估计。大量实验表明，这些提出的技术成功地减少了权重振荡，并持续在 ImageNet 上实现了显着的精度提高。具体来说，我们的 2 位 DeiT-T/DeiT-S 算法分别比之前最先进的算法高出 9.8% 和 7.7%。代码和模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/nbasyl/OFQ。

AI.motivation: 量化感知训练中可学习缩放因子导致权重在两个量化级别间频繁跳跃，引发训练不稳定与次优结果，需解决此问题以提升低比特ViT性能。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1) 统计权重量化（StatsQ）提升量化鲁棒性；2) 置信度引导退火（CGA）冻结高置信度权重；3) 查询-键重参数化（QKR）解决查询键耦合振荡问题。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上，2比特DeiT-T/S模型分别超越先前最优方法9.8%和7.7%，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提技术有效缓解权重振荡，显著提升低比特ViT精度，为高效视觉模型部署提供可行方案。

search_text: Oscillation-free Quantization for Low-bit Vision Transformers 低位视觉变压器的无振荡量化 Weight oscillation is an undesirable side effect of quantization-aware training, in which quantized weights frequently jump between two quantized levels, resulting in training instability and a sub-optimal final model. We discover that the learnable scaling factor, a widely-used $\textit{de facto}$ setting in quantization aggravates weight oscillation. In this study, we investigate the connection between the learnable scaling factor and quantized weight oscillation and use ViT as a case driver to illustrate the findings and remedies. In addition, we also found that the interdependence between quantized weights in $\textit{query}$ and $\textit{key}$ of a self-attention layer makes ViT vulnerable to oscillation. We, therefore, propose three techniques accordingly: statistical weight quantization ($\rm StatsQ$) to improve quantization robustness compared to the prevalent learnable-scale-based method; confidence-guided annealing ($\rm CGA$) that freezes the weights with $\textit{high confidence}$ and calms the oscillating weights; and $\textit{query}$-$\textit{key}$ reparameterization ($\rm QKR$) to resolve the query-key intertwined oscillation and mitigate the resulting gradient misestimation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that these proposed techniques successfully abate weight oscillation and consistently achieve substantial accuracy improvement on ImageNet. Specifically, our 2-bit DeiT-T/DeiT-S algorithms outperform the previous state-of-the-art by 9.8% and 7.7%, respectively. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/nbasyl/OFQ. 权重振荡是量化感知训练的一个不良副作用，其中量化权重经常在两个量化级别之间跳跃，导致训练不稳定和次优的最终模型。我们发现可学习的缩放因子（量化中广泛使用的$\textit{de facto}$设置）会加剧权重振荡。在本研究中，我们研究了可学习比例因子和量化权重振荡之间的联系，并使用 ViT 作为案例驱动程序来说明研究结果和补救措施。此外，我们还发现自注意力层的$\textit{query}$和$\textit{key}$中的量化权重之间的相互依赖使得ViT容易受到振荡的影响。因此，我们相应地提出了三种技术：与流行的基于可学习尺度的方法相比，统计权重量化（$\rm StatsQ$）可提高量化鲁棒性；置信度引导退火（$\rm CGA$），用 $\textit{highconfidence}$ 冻结权重并稳定振荡权重；和 $\textit{query}$-$\textit{key}$ 重新参数化（$\rm QKR$）来解决查询键交织振荡并减轻由此产生的梯度误估计。大量实验表明，这些提出的技术成功地减少了权重振荡，并持续在 ImageNet 上实现了显着的精度提高。具体来说，我们的 2 位 DeiT-T/DeiT-S 算法分别比之前最先进的算法高出 9.8% 和 7.7%。代码和模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/nbasyl/OFQ。 本文针对低比特视觉Transformer（ViT）量化过程中出现的权重振荡问题，提出三种技术以提升模型稳定性与精度。 Shih-Yang Liu,Zechun Liu,Kwang-Ting Cheng cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.AR,cs.LG

authors_text: Xingyue Huang,Miguel Romero Orth,İsmail İlkan Ceylan,Pablo Barceló
title: A Theory of Link Prediction via Relational Weisfeiler-Leman on Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 知识图谱上关系 Weisfeiler-Leman 的链接预测理论
comment: Proceedings of the Thirty-Seventh Annual Conference on Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2023). Code available at: https://github.com/HxyScotthuang/CMPNN
comments: Proceedings of the Thirty-Seventh Annual Conference on Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2023). Code available at: https://github.com/HxyScotthuang/CMPNN
abstract: Graph neural networks are prominent models for representation learning over graph-structured data. While the capabilities and limitations of these models are well-understood for simple graphs, our understanding remains incomplete in the context of knowledge graphs. Our goal is to provide a systematic understanding of the landscape of graph neural networks for knowledge graphs pertaining to the prominent task of link prediction. Our analysis entails a unifying perspective on seemingly unrelated models and unlocks a series of other models. The expressive power of various models is characterized via a corresponding relational Weisfeiler-Leman algorithm. This analysis is extended to provide a precise logical characterization of the class of functions captured by a class of graph neural networks. The theoretical findings presented in this paper explain the benefits of some widely employed practical design choices, which are validated empirically.
summary: Graph neural networks are prominent models for representation learning over graph-structured data. While the capabilities and limitations of these models are well-understood for simple graphs, our understanding remains incomplete in the context of knowledge graphs. Our goal is to provide a systematic understanding of the landscape of graph neural networks for knowledge graphs pertaining to the prominent task of link prediction. Our analysis entails a unifying perspective on seemingly unrelated models and unlocks a series of other models. The expressive power of various models is characterized via a corresponding relational Weisfeiler-Leman algorithm. This analysis is extended to provide a precise logical characterization of the class of functions captured by a class of graph neural networks. The theoretical findings presented in this paper explain the benefits of some widely employed practical design choices, which are validated empirically.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络是图结构数据表示学习的重要模型。虽然对于简单图来说，这些模型的功能和局限性是众所周知的，但在知识图的背景下，我们的理解仍然不完整。我们的目标是为与链接预测这一突出任务相关的知识图提供对图神经网络景观的系统理解。我们的分析需要对看似不相关的模型提供统一的视角，并解锁一系列其他模型。各种模型的表达能力通过相应的关系 Weisfeiler-Leman 算法来表征。这种分析被扩展为提供由一类图神经网络捕获的函数类的精确逻辑特征。本文提出的理论研究结果解释了一些广泛采用的实际设计选择的好处，并得到了实证验证。

AI.tldr: 本文通过关系化Weisfeiler-Leman算法，系统分析知识图谱中链接预测任务的图神经网络模型表达能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络在简单图上的能力已被广泛研究，但其在知识图谱中的表现和限制仍缺乏系统性理解，尤其是链接预测这一核心任务。
AI.method: 提出关系化Weisfeiler-Leman算法作为统一框架，通过逻辑特征刻画图神经网络模型的函数类，并结合理论分析与实验验证。
AI.result: 理论解释了多种实用设计选择的优势，如消息传递机制与聚合方式，并通过实验证实了分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为知识图谱中链接预测的模型设计提供了理论依据，揭示了图神经网络表达能力与算法设计之间的深层联系。

authors_text: Nick Pears,Hang Dai,Will Smith,Hao Sun
title: Laplacian ICP for Progressive Registration of 3D Human Head Meshes
title_zh: 用于 3D 人体头部网格渐进配准的拉普拉斯 ICP
abstract: We present a progressive 3D registration framework that is a highly-efficient variant of classical non-rigid Iterative Closest Points (N-ICP). Since it uses the Laplace-Beltrami operator for deformation regularisation, we view the overall process as Laplacian ICP (L-ICP). This exploits a `small deformation per iteration' assumption and is progressively coarse-to-fine, employing an increasingly flexible deformation model, an increasing number of correspondence sets, and increasingly sophisticated correspondence estimation. Correspondence matching is only permitted within predefined vertex subsets derived from domain-specific feature extractors. Additionally, we present a new benchmark and a pair of evaluation metrics for 3D non-rigid registration, based on annotation transfer. We use this to evaluate our framework on a publicly-available dataset of 3D human head scans (Headspace). The method is robust and only requires a small fraction of the computation time compared to the most popular classical approach, yet has comparable registration performance.
summary: We present a progressive 3D registration framework that is a highly-efficient variant of classical non-rigid Iterative Closest Points (N-ICP). Since it uses the Laplace-Beltrami operator for deformation regularisation, we view the overall process as Laplacian ICP (L-ICP). This exploits a `small deformation per iteration' assumption and is progressively coarse-to-fine, employing an increasingly flexible deformation model, an increasing number of correspondence sets, and increasingly sophisticated correspondence estimation. Correspondence matching is only permitted within predefined vertex subsets derived from domain-specific feature extractors. Additionally, we present a new benchmark and a pair of evaluation metrics for 3D non-rigid registration, based on annotation transfer. We use this to evaluate our framework on a publicly-available dataset of 3D human head scans (Headspace). The method is robust and only requires a small fraction of the computation time compared to the most popular classical approach, yet has comparable registration performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种渐进式 3D 配准框架，它是经典非刚性迭代最近点 (N-ICP) 的高效变体。由于它使用 Laplace-Beltrami 算子进行变形正则化，因此我们将整个过程视为拉普拉斯 ICP (L-ICP)。这利用了“每次迭代的小变形”假设，并且逐渐从粗到细，采用越来越灵活的变形模型、越来越多的对应集以及越来越复杂的对应估计。仅允许在从特定于域的特征提取器派生的预定义顶点子集中进行对应匹配。此外，我们还提出了一个新的基准和一对基于注释传输的 3D 非刚性配准评估指标。我们使用它来在公开的 3D 人体头部扫描 (Headspace) 数据集上评估我们的框架。该方法非常稳健，与最流行的经典方法相比，只需要一小部分计算时间，但具有相当的配准性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拉普拉斯算子的渐进式3D非刚性配准框架，用于人体头部网格的高效配准。
AI.motivation: 传统非刚性ICP算法计算效率低且配准精度不足，需改进方法以实现更高效且准确的3D人体头部配准。
AI.method: 采用拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子进行形变正则化，设计渐进式粗到细策略，逐步增加形变模型灵活性和对应点集数量，并引入领域特征提取的顶点子集约束对应关系。
AI.result: 方法在Headspace数据集上表现出鲁棒性，计算时间仅为经典方法的很小一部分，且配准性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的L-ICP框架通过渐进式优化和正则化约束，有效平衡了配准精度与计算效率，为3D人体头部配准提供了新方案。
