ai_content_json.method: 采用拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子进行形变正则化，设计渐进式粗到细策略，逐步增加形变模型灵活性和对应点集数量，并引入领域特征提取的顶点子集约束对应关系。
ai_content_json.result: 方法在Headspace数据集上表现出鲁棒性，计算时间仅为经典方法的很小一部分，且配准性能相当。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 提出的L-ICP框架通过渐进式优化和正则化约束，有效平衡了配准精度与计算效率，为3D人体头部配准提供了新方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拉普拉斯算子的渐进式3D非刚性配准框架，用于人体头部网格的高效配准。
motivation: 传统非刚性ICP算法计算效率低且配准精度不足，需改进方法以实现更高效且准确的3D人体头部配准。
method: 采用拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子进行形变正则化，设计渐进式粗到细策略，逐步增加形变模型灵活性和对应点集数量，并引入领域特征提取的顶点子集约束对应关系。
result: 方法在Headspace数据集上表现出鲁棒性，计算时间仅为经典方法的很小一部分，且配准性能相当。
conclusion: 提出的L-ICP框架通过渐进式优化和正则化约束，有效平衡了配准精度与计算效率，为3D人体头部配准提供了新方案。
search_text: Laplacian ICP for Progressive Registration of 3D Human Head Meshes 用于 3D 人体头部网格渐进配准的拉普拉斯 ICP We present a progressive 3D registration framework that is a highly-efficient variant of classical non-rigid Iterative Closest Points (N-ICP). Since it uses the Laplace-Beltrami operator for deformation regularisation, we view the overall process as Laplacian ICP (L-ICP). This exploits a `small deformation per iteration' assumption and is progressively coarse-to-fine, employing an increasingly flexible deformation model, an increasing number of correspondence sets, and increasingly sophisticated correspondence estimation. Correspondence matching is only permitted within predefined vertex subsets derived from domain-specific feature extractors. Additionally, we present a new benchmark and a pair of evaluation metrics for 3D non-rigid registration, based on annotation transfer. We use this to evaluate our framework on a publicly-available dataset of 3D human head scans (Headspace). The method is robust and only requires a small fraction of the computation time compared to the most popular classical approach, yet has comparable registration performance. 我们提出了一种渐进式 3D 配准框架，它是经典非刚性迭代最近点 (N-ICP) 的高效变体。由于它使用 Laplace-Beltrami 算子进行变形正则化，因此我们将整个过程视为拉普拉斯 ICP (L-ICP)。这利用了“每次迭代的小变形”假设，并且逐渐从粗到细，采用越来越灵活的变形模型、越来越多的对应集以及越来越复杂的对应估计。仅允许在从特定于域的特征提取器派生的预定义顶点子集中进行对应匹配。此外，我们还提出了一个新的基准和一对基于注释传输的 3D 非刚性配准评估指标。我们使用它来在公开的 3D 人体头部扫描 (Headspace) 数据集上评估我们的框架。该方法非常稳健，与最流行的经典方法相比，只需要一小部分计算时间，但具有相当的配准性能。 本文提出了一种基于拉普拉斯算子的渐进式3D非刚性配准框架，用于人体头部网格的高效配准。 Nick Pears,Hang Dai,Will Smith,Hao Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Max Schemmer,Niklas Kühl,Carina Benz,Andrea Bartos,Gerhard Satzger
title: Appropriate Reliance on AI Advice: Conceptualization and the Effect of Explanations
title_zh: 适当依赖人工智能建议：概念化和解释的效果
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.06916
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.06916
abstract: AI advice is becoming increasingly popular, e.g., in investment and medical treatment decisions. As this advice is typically imperfect, decision-makers have to exert discretion as to whether actually follow that advice: they have to "appropriately" rely on correct and turn down incorrect advice. However, current research on appropriate reliance still lacks a common definition as well as an operational measurement concept. Additionally, no in-depth behavioral experiments have been conducted that help understand the factors influencing this behavior. In this paper, we propose Appropriateness of Reliance (AoR) as an underlying, quantifiable two-dimensional measurement concept. We develop a research model that analyzes the effect of providing explanations for AI advice. In an experiment with 200 participants, we demonstrate how these explanations influence the AoR, and, thus, the effectiveness of AI advice. Our work contributes fundamental concepts for the analysis of reliance behavior and the purposeful design of AI advisors.
summary: AI advice is becoming increasingly popular, e.g., in investment and medical treatment decisions. As this advice is typically imperfect, decision-makers have to exert discretion as to whether actually follow that advice: they have to "appropriately" rely on correct and turn down incorrect advice. However, current research on appropriate reliance still lacks a common definition as well as an operational measurement concept. Additionally, no in-depth behavioral experiments have been conducted that help understand the factors influencing this behavior. In this paper, we propose Appropriateness of Reliance (AoR) as an underlying, quantifiable two-dimensional measurement concept. We develop a research model that analyzes the effect of providing explanations for AI advice. In an experiment with 200 participants, we demonstrate how these explanations influence the AoR, and, thus, the effectiveness of AI advice. Our work contributes fundamental concepts for the analysis of reliance behavior and the purposeful design of AI advisors.
abstract_zh: 人工智能建议越来越受欢迎，例如在投资和医疗决策中。由于这个建议通常是不完美的，决策者必须谨慎判断是否真正遵循该建议：他们必须“适当”依赖正确的建议并拒绝不正确的建议。然而，目前对适当依赖的研究仍然缺乏通用的定义和可操作的测量概念。此外，还没有进行深入的行为实验来帮助理解影响这种行为的因素。在本文中，我们提出适当的信赖度（AoR）作为一个潜在的、可量化的二维测量概念。我们开发了一个研究模型来分析为人工智能建议提供解释的效果。在一项有 200 名参与者参加的实验中，我们展示了这些解释如何影响 AoR，从而影响人工智能建议的有效性。我们的工作为信任行为分析和人工智能顾问的有目的设计提供了基本概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出'依赖适当性'（AoR）作为量化AI建议依赖行为的二维测量概念，并通过实验研究解释对依赖决策的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前AI建议研究缺乏统一的依赖行为定义和测量方法，且缺乏实证研究探讨影响因素。
AI.method: 构建AoR二维测量模型，设计包含200名参与者的实验，分析AI解释对依赖适当性的影响。
AI.result: 实验验证了AI解释显著影响AoR，进而提升AI建议的有效性，证实了概念模型的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 为AI依赖行为分析提供理论框架，为设计更有效的AI顾问系统提供指导依据。

authors_text: Yuxin Zhang,Mingbao Lin,Xunchao Li,Han Liu,Guozhi Wang,Fei Chao,Shuai Ren,Yafei Wen,Xiaoxin Chen,Rongrong Ji
title: Real-Time Image Demoireing on Mobile Devices
title_zh: 移动设备上的实时图像采集
comment: To appear in the eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2023)
comments: To appear in the eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2023)
abstract: Moire patterns appear frequently when taking photos of digital screens, drastically degrading the image quality. Despite the advance of CNNs in image demoireing, existing networks are with heavy design, causing redundant computation burden for mobile devices. In this paper, we launch the first study on accelerating demoireing networks and propose a dynamic demoireing acceleration method (DDA) towards a real-time deployment on mobile devices. Our stimulus stems from a simple-yet-universal fact that moire patterns often unbalancedly distribute across an image. Consequently, excessive computation is wasted upon non-moire areas. Therefore, we reallocate computation costs in proportion to the complexity of image patches. In order to achieve this aim, we measure the complexity of an image patch by designing a novel moire prior that considers both colorfulness and frequency information of moire patterns. Then, we restore image patches with higher-complexity using larger networks and the ones with lower-complexity are assigned with smaller networks to relieve the computation burden. At last, we train all networks in a parameter-shared supernet paradigm to avoid additional parameter burden. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed DDA. In addition, the acceleration evaluated on the VIVO X80 Pro smartphone equipped with a chip of Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 shows that our method can drastically reduce the inference time, leading to a real-time image demoireing on mobile devices. Source codes and models are released at https://github.com/zyxxmu/DDA
summary: Moire patterns appear frequently when taking photos of digital screens, drastically degrading the image quality. Despite the advance of CNNs in image demoireing, existing networks are with heavy design, causing redundant computation burden for mobile devices. In this paper, we launch the first study on accelerating demoireing networks and propose a dynamic demoireing acceleration method (DDA) towards a real-time deployment on mobile devices. Our stimulus stems from a simple-yet-universal fact that moire patterns often unbalancedly distribute across an image. Consequently, excessive computation is wasted upon non-moire areas. Therefore, we reallocate computation costs in proportion to the complexity of image patches. In order to achieve this aim, we measure the complexity of an image patch by designing a novel moire prior that considers both colorfulness and frequency information of moire patterns. Then, we restore image patches with higher-complexity using larger networks and the ones with lower-complexity are assigned with smaller networks to relieve the computation burden. At last, we train all networks in a parameter-shared supernet paradigm to avoid additional parameter burden. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed DDA. In addition, the acceleration evaluated on the VIVO X80 Pro smartphone equipped with a chip of Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 shows that our method can drastically reduce the inference time, leading to a real-time image demoireing on mobile devices. Source codes and models are released at https://github.com/zyxxmu/DDA
abstract_zh: 拍摄数码屏幕照片时经常出现摩尔纹，从而大大降低图像质量。尽管 CNN 在图像去噪方面取得了进步，但现有网络的设计繁重，给移动设备带来了冗余的计算负担。在本文中，我们启动了第一个关于加速去火网络的研究，并提出了一种动态去火加速方法（DDA），以实现在移动设备上的实时部署。我们的刺激源于一个简单但普遍的事实，即莫尔图案通常在图像中不平衡地分布。因此，过多的计算被浪费在非莫尔条纹区域上。因此，我们根据图像块的复杂性按比例重新分配计算成本。为了实现这一目标，我们通过设计一种新颖的莫尔先验来测量图像块的复杂性，该先验考虑了莫尔图案的色彩和频率信息。然后，我们使用较大的网络恢复复杂性较高的图像块，并使用较小的网络分配复杂性较低的图像块以减轻计算负担。最后，我们在参数共享的超网范式中训练所有网络，以避免额外的参数负担。对多个基准的大量实验证明了我们提出的 DDA 的有效性。此外，在配备Snapdragon 8 Gen 1芯片的VIVO X80 Pro智能手机上评估的加速表明，我们的方法可以大大减少推理时间，从而在移动设备上实现实时图像去黑化。源代码和模型发布于https://github.com/zyxxmu/DDA

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在移动设备上实时去摩尔纹的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的去摩尔纹网络设计复杂，计算负担重，难以在移动设备上实时运行。
AI.method: 设计了一种动态去摩尔纹加速方法（DDA），根据图像块的复杂度重新分配计算成本，并通过共享参数的超网络进行训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中验证了DDA的有效性，并在VIVO X80 Pro手机上实现了显著的推理时间减少，达到了实时去摩尔纹的效果。
AI.conclusion: DDA方法在保持去摩尔纹效果的同时，有效降低了计算负担，实现了移动设备上的实时应用。

In addition, the acceleration evaluated on the VIVO X80 Pro smartphone equipped with a chip of Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 shows that our method can drastically reduce the inference time, leading to a real-time image demoireing on mobile devices. Source codes and models are released at https://github.com/zyxxmu/DDA 拍摄数码屏幕照片时经常出现摩尔纹，从而大大降低图像质量。尽管 CNN 在图像去噪方面取得了进步，但现有网络的设计繁重，给移动设备带来了冗余的计算负担。在本文中，我们启动了第一个关于加速去火网络的研究，并提出了一种动态去火加速方法（DDA），以实现在移动设备上的实时部署。我们的刺激源于一个简单但普遍的事实，即莫尔图案通常在图像中不平衡地分布。因此，过多的计算被浪费在非莫尔条纹区域上。因此，我们根据图像块的复杂性按比例重新分配计算成本。为了实现这一目标，我们通过设计一种新颖的莫尔先验来测量图像块的复杂性，该先验考虑了莫尔图案的色彩和频率信息。然后，我们使用较大的网络恢复复杂性较高的图像块，并使用较小的网络分配复杂性较低的图像块以减轻计算负担。最后，我们在参数共享的超网范式中训练所有网络，以避免额外的参数负担。对多个基准的大量实验证明了我们提出的 DDA 的有效性。此外，在配备Snapdragon 8 Gen 1芯片的VIVO X80 Pro智能手机上评估的加速表明，我们的方法可以大大减少推理时间，从而在移动设备上实现实时图像去黑化。源代码和模型发布于https://github.com/zyxxmu/DDA 本文提出了一种在移动设备上实时去摩尔纹的方法。 Yuxin Zhang,Mingbao Lin,Xunchao Li,Han Liu,Guozhi Wang,Fei Chao,Shuai Ren,Yafei Wen,Xiaoxin Chen,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Pouya Hamadanian,Arash Nasr-Esfahany,Malte Schwarzkopf,Siddartha Sen,Mohammad Alizadeh
title: Online Reinforcement Learning in Non-Stationary Context-Driven Environments
title_zh: 非静态上下文驱动环境中的在线强化学习
abstract: We study online reinforcement learning (RL) in non-stationary environments, where a time-varying exogenous context process affects the environment dynamics. Online RL is challenging in such environments due to "catastrophic forgetting" (CF). The agent tends to forget prior knowledge as it trains on new experiences. Prior approaches to mitigate this issue assume task labels (which are often not available in practice), employ brittle regularization heuristics, or use off-policy methods that suffer from instability and poor performance. We present Locally Constrained Policy Optimization (LCPO), an online RL approach that combats CF by anchoring policy outputs on old experiences while optimizing the return on current experiences. To perform this anchoring, LCPO locally constrains policy optimization using samples from experiences that lie outside of the current context distribution. We evaluate LCPO in Mujoco, classic control and computer systems environments with a variety of synthetic and real context traces, and find that it outperforms a variety of baselines in the non-stationary setting, while achieving results on-par with a "prescient" agent trained offline across all context traces. LCPO's source code is available at https://github.com/pouyahmdn/LCPO.
summary: We study online reinforcement learning (RL) in non-stationary environments, where a time-varying exogenous context process affects the environment dynamics. Online RL is challenging in such environments due to "catastrophic forgetting" (CF). The agent tends to forget prior knowledge as it trains on new experiences. Prior approaches to mitigate this issue assume task labels (which are often not available in practice), employ brittle regularization heuristics, or use off-policy methods that suffer from instability and poor performance. We present Locally Constrained Policy Optimization (LCPO), an online RL approach that combats CF by anchoring policy outputs on old experiences while optimizing the return on current experiences. To perform this anchoring, LCPO locally constrains policy optimization using samples from experiences that lie outside of the current context distribution. We evaluate LCPO in Mujoco, classic control and computer systems environments with a variety of synthetic and real context traces, and find that it outperforms a variety of baselines in the non-stationary setting, while achieving results on-par with a "prescient" agent trained offline across all context traces. LCPO's source code is available at https://github.com/pouyahmdn/LCPO.
abstract_zh: 我们研究非平稳环境中的在线强化学习（RL），其中时变的外生上下文过程会影响环境动态。由于“灾难性遗忘”（CF），在线强化学习在这种环境中具有挑战性。智能体在训练新经验时往往会忘记先前的知识。先前缓解此问题的方法假设任务标签（在实践中通常不可用），采用脆弱的正则化启发式方法，或使用不稳定且性能不佳的离策略方法。我们提出了局部约束策略优化（LCPO），这是一种在线强化学习方法，通过将策略输出锚定在旧经验上，同时优化当前经验的回报来对抗 CF。为了执行这种锚定，LCPO 使用当前上下文分布之外的经验样本来局部约束策略优化。我们使用各种合成和真实上下文跟踪在 Mujoco、经典控制和计算机系统环境中评估 LCPO，发现它在非平稳设置中优于各种基线，同时获得与跨所有上下文跟踪离线训练的“有先见之明”代理相当的结果。 LCPO 的源代码可在 https://github.com/pouyahmdn/LCPO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非平稳上下文驱动环境中在线强化学习（RL）的挑战，并提出了一种名为LCPO的新方法以解决灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 在非平稳环境中，传统方法因依赖任务标签、使用脆弱的正则化启发式或遭受策略不稳定性而难以有效应对灾难性遗忘（CF）问题。
AI.method: 提出局部约束策略优化（LCPO），通过将策略输出锚定在旧经验上，同时优化当前经验的回报，利用当前上下文分布外的经验样本进行局部约束。
AI.result: 在Mujoco、经典控制及计算机系统环境中，LCPO在非平稳设置下优于多种基线方法，并在所有上下文轨迹上达到与离线训练的‘先知’代理相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: LCPO通过有效缓解灾难性遗忘，在非平稳环境中实现了优于现有方法的在线强化学习性能。

authors_text: Rudolf Herdt,Maximilian Schmidt,Daniel Otero Baguer,Jean Le'Clerc Arrastia,Peter Maass
title: Model Stitching and Visualization How GAN Generators can Invert Networks in Real-Time
title_zh: 模型拼接和可视化 GAN 生成器如何实时反转网络
abstract: In this work, we propose a fast and accurate method to reconstruct activations of classification and semantic segmentation networks by stitching them with a GAN generator utilizing a 1x1 convolution. We test our approach on images of animals from the AFHQ wild dataset, ImageNet1K, and real-world digital pathology scans of stained tissue samples. Our results show comparable performance to established gradient descent methods but with a processing time that is two orders of magnitude faster, making this approach promising for practical applications.
summary: In this work, we propose a fast and accurate method to reconstruct activations of classification and semantic segmentation networks by stitching them with a GAN generator utilizing a 1x1 convolution. We test our approach on images of animals from the AFHQ wild dataset, ImageNet1K, and real-world digital pathology scans of stained tissue samples. Our results show comparable performance to established gradient descent methods but with a processing time that is two orders of magnitude faster, making this approach promising for practical applications.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种快速准确的方法，通过利用 1x1 卷积将分类和语义分割网络与 GAN 生成器拼接来重建分类和语义分割网络的激活。我们使用来自 AFHQ 野生数据集、ImageNet1K 的动物图像以及染色组织样本的真实数字病理扫描来测试我们的方法。我们的结果显示出与已建立的梯度下降方法相当的性能，但处理时间快了两个数量级，使得这种方法有希望用于实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过拼接GAN生成器与1x1卷积实现快速网络激活重建的方法，用于实时反转分类和语义分割网络。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度下降方法重建网络激活耗时过长，需开发更高效的实时解决方案以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 利用GAN生成器与1x1卷积拼接目标网络，通过生成对抗训练实现激活重建，无需显式梯度计算。
AI.result: 在AFHQ、ImageNet1K和病理切片数据集上，重建精度与梯度下降法相当，但速度提升100倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实时网络逆向分析提供了高效可行的解决方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Zhiwei Xu,Bin Zhang,Dapeng Li,Guangchong Zhou,Zeren Zhang,Guoliang Fan
title: Dual Self-Awareness Value Decomposition Framework without Individual Global Max for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 无个体全局最大值的双重自我意识价值分解框架用于协作多智能体强化学习
abstract: Value decomposition methods have gained popularity in the field of cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning. However, almost all existing methods follow the principle of Individual Global Max (IGM) or its variants, which limits their problem-solving capabilities. To address this, we propose a dual self-awareness value decomposition framework, inspired by the notion of dual self-awareness in psychology, that entirely rejects the IGM premise. Each agent consists of an ego policy for action selection and an alter ego value function to solve the credit assignment problem. The value function factorization can ignore the IGM assumption by utilizing an explicit search procedure. On the basis of the above, we also suggest a novel anti-ego exploration mechanism to avoid the algorithm becoming stuck in a local optimum. As the first fully IGM-free value decomposition method, our proposed framework achieves desirable performance in various cooperative tasks.
summary: Value decomposition methods have gained popularity in the field of cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning. However, almost all existing methods follow the principle of Individual Global Max (IGM) or its variants, which limits their problem-solving capabilities. To address this, we propose a dual self-awareness value decomposition framework, inspired by the notion of dual self-awareness in psychology, that entirely rejects the IGM premise. Each agent consists of an ego policy for action selection and an alter ego value function to solve the credit assignment problem. The value function factorization can ignore the IGM assumption by utilizing an explicit search procedure. On the basis of the above, we also suggest a novel anti-ego exploration mechanism to avoid the algorithm becoming stuck in a local optimum. As the first fully IGM-free value decomposition method, our proposed framework achieves desirable performance in various cooperative tasks.
abstract_zh: 价值分解方法在协作多智能体强化学习领域越来越受欢迎。然而，几乎所有现有方法都遵循个体全局最大值（IGM）或其变体的原则，这限制了它们解决问题的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们受到心理学中双重自我意识概念的启发，提出了一个双重自我意识价值分解框架，该框架完全拒绝了 IGM 前提。每个智能体都包含一个用于动作选择的自我策略和一个解决信用分配问题的另一个自我价值函数。价值函数分解可以通过利用显式搜索过程来忽略 IGM 假设。在此基础上，我们还提出了一种新颖的反自我探索机制，以避免算法陷入局部最优。作为第一个完全无 IGM 的价值分解方法，我们提出的框架在各种协作任务中实现了理想的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需Individual Global Max（IGM）假设的双自我意识值分解框架，用于协作多智能体强化学习。
AI.motivation: 现有值分解方法依赖IGM假设，导致问题解决能力受限，需探索摆脱该假设的新方法。
AI.method: 构建包含自我策略与反自我价值函数的双模块架构，结合显式搜索过程和反自我探索机制实现信用分配。
AI.result: 在多种协作任务中取得优于现有方法的性能表现，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架作为首个完全脱离IGM的值分解方法，为多智能体协作学习提供了新思路与解决方案。

ai_content.motivation: 现有值分解方法依赖IGM假设，导致问题解决能力受限，需探索摆脱该假设的新方法。

search_text: Dual Self-Awareness Value Decomposition Framework without Individual Global Max for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 无个体全局最大值的双重自我意识价值分解框架用于协作多智能体强化学习 Value decomposition methods have gained popularity in the field of cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning. However, almost all existing methods follow the principle of Individual Global Max (IGM) or its variants, which limits their problem-solving capabilities. To address this, we propose a dual self-awareness value decomposition framework, inspired by the notion of dual self-awareness in psychology, that entirely rejects the IGM premise. Each agent consists of an ego policy for action selection and an alter ego value function to solve the credit assignment problem. The value function factorization can ignore the IGM assumption by utilizing an explicit search procedure. On the basis of the above, we also suggest a novel anti-ego exploration mechanism to avoid the algorithm becoming stuck in a local optimum. As the first fully IGM-free value decomposition method, our proposed framework achieves desirable performance in various cooperative tasks. 价值分解方法在协作多智能体强化学习领域越来越受欢迎。然而，几乎所有现有方法都遵循个体全局最大值（IGM）或其变体的原则，这限制了它们解决问题的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们受到心理学中双重自我意识概念的启发，提出了一个双重自我意识价值分解框架，该框架完全拒绝了 IGM 前提。每个智能体都包含一个用于动作选择的自我策略和一个解决信用分配问题的另一个自我价值函数。价值函数分解可以通过利用显式搜索过程来忽略 IGM 假设。在此基础上，我们还提出了一种新颖的反自我探索机制，以避免算法陷入局部最优。作为第一个完全无 IGM 的价值分解方法，我们提出的框架在各种协作任务中实现了理想的性能。 本文提出一种无需Individual Global Max（IGM）假设的双自我意识值分解框架，用于协作多智能体强化学习。 Zhiwei Xu,Bin Zhang,Dapeng Li,Guangchong Zhou,Zeren Zhang,Guoliang Fan cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yigit Gurses,Kaan Buyukdemirci,Yildiray Yildiz
title: Developing Driving Strategies Efficiently: A Skill-Based Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: 高效制定驾驶策略：基于技能的分层强化学习方法
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Driving in dense traffic with human and autonomous drivers is a challenging task that requires high-level planning and reasoning. Human drivers can achieve this task comfortably, and there has been many efforts to model human driver strategies. These strategies can be used as inspirations for developing autonomous driving algorithms or to create high-fidelity simulators. Reinforcement learning is a common tool to model driver policies, but conventional training of these models can be computationally expensive and time-consuming. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose ``skill-based" hierarchical driving strategies, where motion primitives, i.e. skills, are designed and used as high-level actions. This reduces the training time for applications that require multiple models with varying behavior. Simulation results in a merging scenario demonstrate that the proposed approach yields driver models that achieve higher performance with less training compared to baseline reinforcement learning methods.
summary: Driving in dense traffic with human and autonomous drivers is a challenging task that requires high-level planning and reasoning. Human drivers can achieve this task comfortably, and there has been many efforts to model human driver strategies. These strategies can be used as inspirations for developing autonomous driving algorithms or to create high-fidelity simulators. Reinforcement learning is a common tool to model driver policies, but conventional training of these models can be computationally expensive and time-consuming. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose ``skill-based" hierarchical driving strategies, where motion primitives, i.e. skills, are designed and used as high-level actions. This reduces the training time for applications that require multiple models with varying behavior. Simulation results in a merging scenario demonstrate that the proposed approach yields driver models that achieve higher performance with less training compared to baseline reinforcement learning methods.
abstract_zh: 在拥挤的交通中驾驶人类和自动驾驶是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要高层次的规划和推理。人类驾驶员可以轻松地完成这项任务，并且已经做出了许多努力来模拟人类驾驶员的策略。这些策略可以作为开发自动驾驶算法或创建高保真模拟器的灵感。强化学习是对驾驶员策略进行建模的常用工具，但这些模型的传统训练可能在计算上昂贵且耗时。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了“基于技能”的分层驾驶策略，其中运动原语（即技能）被设计并用作高级动作。这减少了需要具有不同行为的多个模型的应用程序的训练时间。合并场景中的模拟结果表明，与基线强化学习方法相比，所提出的方法产生的驾驶员模型可以通过更少的训练实现更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于技能的分层强化学习方法，用于高效开发驾驶策略，通过设计运动原语作为高层动作以减少训练时间。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习训练驾驶模型计算成本高且耗时，尤其在需要多种行为模型的应用场景中效率不足。
AI.method: 设计技能层级结构，将运动原语（skills）作为高层动作输入，构建分层强化学习框架以降低训练复杂度。
AI.result: 在合并场景模拟中，该方法相比基线强化学习模型实现了更高性能且训练时间显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 基于技能的分层方法能有效提升驾驶策略训练效率，适用于自动驾驶算法开发及高保真模拟器构建。

authors_text: Kun Yi,Qi Zhang,Wei Fan,Longbing Cao,Shoujin Wang,Guodong Long,Liang Hu,Hui He,Qingsong Wen,Hui Xiong
title: A Survey on Deep Learning based Time Series Analysis with Frequency Transformation
title_zh: 基于深度学习的频率变换时间序列分析综述
abstract: Recently, frequency transformation (FT) has been increasingly incorporated into deep learning models to significantly enhance state-of-the-art accuracy and efficiency in time series analysis. The advantages of FT, such as high efficiency and a global view, have been rapidly explored and exploited in various time series tasks and applications, demonstrating the promising potential of FT as a new deep learning paradigm for time series analysis. Despite the growing attention and the proliferation of research in this emerging field, there is currently a lack of a systematic review and in-depth analysis of deep learning-based time series models with FT. It is also unclear why FT can enhance time series analysis and what its limitations are in the field. To address these gaps, we present a comprehensive review that systematically investigates and summarizes the recent research advancements in deep learning-based time series analysis with FT. Specifically, we explore the primary approaches used in current models that incorporate FT, the types of neural networks that leverage FT, and the representative FT-equipped models in deep time series analysis. We propose a novel taxonomy to categorize the existing methods in this field, providing a structured overview of the diverse approaches employed in incorporating FT into deep learning models for time series analysis. Finally, we highlight the advantages and limitations of FT for time series modeling and identify potential future research directions that can further contribute to the community of time series analysis.
summary: Recently, frequency transformation (FT) has been increasingly incorporated into deep learning models to significantly enhance state-of-the-art accuracy and efficiency in time series analysis. The advantages of FT, such as high efficiency and a global view, have been rapidly explored and exploited in various time series tasks and applications, demonstrating the promising potential of FT as a new deep learning paradigm for time series analysis. Despite the growing attention and the proliferation of research in this emerging field, there is currently a lack of a systematic review and in-depth analysis of deep learning-based time series models with FT. It is also unclear why FT can enhance time series analysis and what its limitations are in the field. To address these gaps, we present a comprehensive review that systematically investigates and summarizes the recent research advancements in deep learning-based time series analysis with FT. Specifically, we explore the primary approaches used in current models that incorporate FT, the types of neural networks that leverage FT, and the representative FT-equipped models in deep time series analysis. We propose a novel taxonomy to categorize the existing methods in this field, providing a structured overview of the diverse approaches employed in incorporating FT into deep learning models for time series analysis. Finally, we highlight the advantages and limitations of FT for time series modeling and identify potential future research directions that can further contribute to the community of time series analysis.
abstract_zh: 最近，频率变换（FT）已越来越多地融入深度学习模型中，以显着提高时间序列分析的最先进的准确性和效率。 FT 的高效率和全局视角等优点已在各种时间序列任务和应用中得到了快速探索和利用，展示了 FT 作为时间序列分析的新深度学习范式的广阔潜力。尽管这一新兴领域的研究日益受到关注和激增，但目前缺乏对基于深度学习的 FT 时间序列模型的系统回顾和深入分析。目前还不清楚为什么 FT 可以增强时间序列分析以及它在该领域的局限性。为了解决这些差距，我们提出了一项全面的综述，系统地调查和总结了基于深度学习的时间序列分析与 FT 的最新研究进展。具体来说，我们探讨了当前包含 FT 的模型中使用的主要方法、利用 FT 的神经网络类型以及深度时间序列分析中配备 FT 的代表性模型。我们提出了一种新颖的分类法来对该领域的现有方法进行分类，提供了将 FT 纳入深度学习模型以进行时间序列分析时所采用的各种方法的结构化概述。最后，我们强调了 FT 用于时间序列建模的优点和局限性，并确定了可以进一步为时间序列分析社区做出贡献的潜在未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对结合频率变换（FT）的深度学习时间序列分析方法进行全面综述，系统总结近期研究进展。
AI.motivation: 尽管FT在时间序列分析中展现出高效性和全局视角的优势，但目前缺乏对其方法的系统性梳理及局限性分析。
AI.method: 通过分类现有方法提出新型taxonomy，总结主流模型架构、FT应用类型及典型应用场景，分析其优缺点。
AI.result: 构建了FT融合深度学习模型的分类体系，明确了FT提升性能的机制，并指出现有研究的不足与未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为时间序列分析领域提供了结构化参考，强调了FT方法的潜力与需进一步探索的研究方向。

title: Characterization of Constrained Continuous Multiobjective Optimization Problems: A Performance Space Perspective
title_zh: 约束连续多目标优化问题的表征：性能空间视角
comment: Submitted for consideration for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation

abstract: Constrained multiobjective optimization has gained much interest in the past few years. However, constrained multiobjective optimization problems (CMOPs) are still unsatisfactorily understood. Consequently, the choice of adequate CMOPs for benchmarking is difficult and lacks a formal background. This paper addresses this issue by exploring CMOPs from a performance space perspective. First, it presents a novel performance assessment approach designed explicitly for constrained multiobjective optimization. This methodology offers a first attempt to simultaneously measure the performance in approximating the Pareto front and constraint satisfaction. Secondly, it proposes an approach to measure the capability of the given optimization problem to differentiate among algorithm performances. Finally, this approach is used to contrast eight frequently used artificial test suites of CMOPs. The experimental results reveal which suites are more efficient in discerning between three well-known multiobjective optimization algorithms. Benchmark designers can use these results to select the most appropriate CMOPs for their needs.

However, constrained multiobjective optimization problems (CMOPs) are still unsatisfactorily understood. Consequently, the choice of adequate CMOPs for benchmarking is difficult and lacks a formal background. This paper addresses this issue by exploring CMOPs from a performance space perspective. First, it presents a novel performance assessment approach designed explicitly for constrained multiobjective optimization. This methodology offers a first attempt to simultaneously measure the performance in approximating the Pareto front and constraint satisfaction. Secondly, it proposes an approach to measure the capability of the given optimization problem to differentiate among algorithm performances. Finally, this approach is used to contrast eight frequently used artificial test suites of CMOPs. The experimental results reveal which suites are more efficient in discerning between three well-known multiobjective optimization algorithms. Benchmark designers can use these results to select the most appropriate CMOPs for their needs.
abstract_zh: 约束多目标优化在过去几年中引起了人们的广泛兴趣。然而，对约束多目标优化问题（CMOP）的理解仍然不能令人满意。因此，选择适当的 CMOP 进行基准测试很困难，并且缺乏正式的背景。本文通过从性能空间的角度探讨 CMOP 来解决这个问题。首先，它提出了一种专门为约束多目标优化而设计的新颖的性能评估方法。该方法首次尝试同时测量逼近帕累托前沿和约束满足的性能。其次，它提出了一种方法来衡量给定优化问题区分算法性能的能力。最后，该方法用于对比八种常用的 CMOP 人工测试套件。实验结果揭示了哪些套件在辨别三种著名的多目标优化算法方面更有效。基准设计人员可以使用这些结果来选择最适合其需求的 CMOP。

AI.tldr: 本文从性能空间视角出发，提出一种新的约束多目标优化问题（CMOPs）性能评估方法，并分析常用测试集的区分能力。
AI.motivation: 现有CMOPs基准测试缺乏系统性评估方法，难以选择适合的测试问题进行算法性能对比。
AI.method: 设计同时评估帕累托前沿逼近与约束满足的性能评估框架，并提出衡量问题区分算法性能能力的指标，对比八种常用测试集。
AI.result: 实验结果显示部分测试集在区分三种经典多目标算法性能方面表现更优，为基准设计提供参考依据。
AI.conclusion: 通过性能空间分析可有效评估CMOPs测试集质量，帮助研究者选择更合适的基准问题进行算法验证。

search_text: Characterization of Constrained Continuous Multiobjective Optimization Problems: A Performance Space Perspective 约束连续多目标优化问题的表征：性能空间视角 Constrained multiobjective optimization has gained much interest in the past few years. However, constrained multiobjective optimization problems (CMOPs) are still unsatisfactorily understood. Consequently, the choice of adequate CMOPs for benchmarking is difficult and lacks a formal background. This paper addresses this issue by exploring CMOPs from a performance space perspective. First, it presents a novel performance assessment approach designed explicitly for constrained multiobjective optimization. This methodology offers a first attempt to simultaneously measure the performance in approximating the Pareto front and constraint satisfaction. Secondly, it proposes an approach to measure the capability of the given optimization problem to differentiate among algorithm performances. Finally, this approach is used to contrast eight frequently used artificial test suites of CMOPs. The experimental results reveal which suites are more efficient in discerning between three well-known multiobjective optimization algorithms. authors_text: Jinghan Yang,Sarthak Jain,Byron C. Wallace
title: How Many and Which Training Points Would Need to be Removed to Flip this Prediction?
title_zh: 需要删除多少个训练点以及哪些训练点才能翻转此预测？
abstract: We consider the problem of identifying a minimal subset of training data $\mathcal{S}_t$ such that if the instances comprising $\mathcal{S}_t$ had been removed prior to training, the categorization of a given test point $x_t$ would have been different. Identifying such a set may be of interest for a few reasons. First, the cardinality of $\mathcal{S}_t$ provides a measure of robustness (if $|\mathcal{S}_t|$ is small for $x_t$, we might be less confident in the corresponding prediction), which we show is correlated with but complementary to predicted probabilities. Second, interrogation of $\mathcal{S}_t$ may provide a novel mechanism for contesting a particular model prediction: If one can make the case that the points in $\mathcal{S}_t$ are wrongly labeled or irrelevant, this may argue for overturning the associated prediction. Identifying $\mathcal{S}_t$ via brute-force is intractable. We propose comparatively fast approximation methods to find $\mathcal{S}_t$ based on influence functions, and find that -- for simple convex text classification models -- these approaches can often successfully identify relatively small sets of training examples which, if removed, would flip the prediction.
summary: We consider the problem of identifying a minimal subset of training data $\mathcal{S}_t$ such that if the instances comprising $\mathcal{S}_t$ had been removed prior to training, the categorization of a given test point $x_t$ would have been different. Identifying such a set may be of interest for a few reasons. First, the cardinality of $\mathcal{S}_t$ provides a measure of robustness (if $|\mathcal{S}_t|$ is small for $x_t$, we might be less confident in the corresponding prediction), which we show is correlated with but complementary to predicted probabilities. Second, interrogation of $\mathcal{S}_t$ may provide a novel mechanism for contesting a particular model prediction: If one can make the case that the points in $\mathcal{S}_t$ are wrongly labeled or irrelevant, this may argue for overturning the associated prediction. Identifying $\mathcal{S}_t$ via brute-force is intractable. We propose comparatively fast approximation methods to find $\mathcal{S}_t$ based on influence functions, and find that -- for simple convex text classification models -- these approaches can often successfully identify relatively small sets of training examples which, if removed, would flip the prediction.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑识别训练数据 $\mathcal{S}_t$ 的最小子集的问题，这样如果在训练之前删除了包含 $\mathcal{S}_t$ 的实例，则给定测试点 $x_t$ 的分类将会不同。出于几个原因，识别这样一个集合可能会引起人们的兴趣。首先，$\mathcal{S}_t$ 的基数提供了鲁棒性的度量（如果 $|\mathcal{S}_t|$ 对于 $x_t$ 来说很小，我们可能对相应的预测不太有信心），我们证明它与预测概率相关但又互补。其次，对 $\mathcal{S}_t$ 的询问可能会提供一种新颖的机制来质疑特定模型的预测：如果有人能够证明 $\mathcal{S}_t$ 中的点被错误标记或不相关，则可能会推翻相关预测。通过暴力识别 $\mathcal{S}_t$ 是很困难的。我们提出了相对快速的近似方法来根据影响函数找到 $\mathcal{S}_t$，并且发现 - 对于简单的凸文本分类模型 - 这些方法通常可以成功识别相对较小的训练示例集，如果将其删除，则会翻转预测。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在确定需要从训练数据中移除的最小实例子集，以改变特定测试点的预测结果。
AI.motivation: 识别此类子集可评估模型鲁棒性并提供质疑预测的依据，例如通过证明相关训练数据存在标签错误或无关性。
AI.method: 提出基于影响函数的快速近似方法，替代暴力搜索以识别关键训练实例。
AI.result: 对于简单凸文本分类模型，该方法能有效识别较小的训练子集，移除后可翻转预测。
AI.conclusion: 影响函数方法可高效定位关键训练数据，为模型可解释性及预测争议提供分析工具。

authors_text: Zhichao Chen,Zhiqiang Ge
title: Directed Acyclic Graphs With Tears
title_zh: 含泪的有向无环图
abstract: Bayesian network is a frequently-used method for fault detection and diagnosis in industrial processes. The basis of Bayesian network is structure learning which learns a directed acyclic graph (DAG) from data. However, the search space will scale super-exponentially with the increase of process variables, which makes the data-driven structure learning a challenging problem. To this end, the DAGs with NOTEARs methods are being well studied not only for their conversion of the discrete optimization into continuous optimization problem but also their compatibility with deep learning framework. Nevertheless, there still remain challenges for NOTEAR-based methods: 1) the infeasible solution results from the gradient descent-based optimization paradigm; 2) the truncation operation to promise the learned graph acyclic. In this work, the reason for challenge 1) is analyzed theoretically, and a novel method named DAGs with Tears method is proposed based on mix-integer programming to alleviate challenge 2). In addition, prior knowledge is able to incorporate into the new proposed method, making structure learning more practical and useful in industrial processes. Finally, a numerical example and an industrial example are adopted as case studies to demonstrate the superiority of the developed method.
summary: Bayesian network is a frequently-used method for fault detection and diagnosis in industrial processes. The basis of Bayesian network is structure learning which learns a directed acyclic graph (DAG) from data. However, the search space will scale super-exponentially with the increase of process variables, which makes the data-driven structure learning a challenging problem. To this end, the DAGs with NOTEARs methods are being well studied not only for their conversion of the discrete optimization into continuous optimization problem but also their compatibility with deep learning framework. Nevertheless, there still remain challenges for NOTEAR-based methods: 1) the infeasible solution results from the gradient descent-based optimization paradigm; 2) the truncation operation to promise the learned graph acyclic. In this work, the reason for challenge 1) is analyzed theoretically, and a novel method named DAGs with Tears method is proposed based on mix-integer programming to alleviate challenge 2). In addition, prior knowledge is able to incorporate into the new proposed method, making structure learning more practical and useful in industrial processes. Finally, a numerical example and an industrial example are adopted as case studies to demonstrate the superiority of the developed method.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯网络是工业过程中常用的故障检测和诊断方法。贝叶斯网络的基础是结构学习，它从数据中学习有向无环图（DAG）。然而，搜索空间将随着过程变量的增加而超指数扩展，这使得数据驱动的结构学习成为一个具有挑战性的问题。为此，采用NOTEAR方法的DAG正在得到深入研究，不仅因为它们将离散优化问题转换为连续优化问题，而且还因为它们与深度学习框架的兼容性。尽管如此，基于NOTEAR的方法仍然存在挑战：1）基于梯度下降的优化范式导致不可行的解决方案； 2）截断操作以保证学习到的图是无环的。在这项工作中，从理论上分析了挑战 1) 的原因，并提出了一种基于混合整数规划的新方法，称为 DAGs with Tears 方法来缓解挑战 2)。此外，先验知识能够融入新提出的方法中，使结构学习在工业过程中更加实用和有用。最后，通过数值例子和工业例子作为案例研究来证明所开发方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合整数规划的新型DAG结构学习方法（DAGs with Tears），以解决NOTEAR方法在工业过程故障诊断中的两个核心挑战。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯网络结构学习在工业故障诊断中至关重要，但现有NOTEAR方法存在梯度下降导致的不可行解和截断操作的局限性，需改进以提高实际应用效果。
AI.method: 理论分析梯度下降范式的缺陷，提出结合混合整数规划的DAGs with Tears方法，并引入先验知识约束以增强结构学习的实用性。
AI.result: 通过数值实验和工业案例验证，新方法在保证图无环性的同时提升了结构学习精度和鲁棒性，优于传统NOTEAR方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合整数规划方法有效解决了NOTEAR的两个关键问题，为工业场景下的贝叶斯网络结构学习提供了更可靠的技术方案。

search_text: Directed Acyclic Graphs With Tears 含泪的有向无环图 Bayesian network is a frequently-used method for fault detection and diagnosis in industrial processes. The basis of Bayesian network is structure learning which learns a directed acyclic graph (DAG) from data. However, the search space will scale super-exponentially with the increase of process variables, which makes the data-driven structure learning a challenging problem. To this end, the DAGs with NOTEARs methods are being well studied not only for their conversion of the discrete optimization into continuous optimization problem but also their compatibility with deep learning framework. Nevertheless, there still remain challenges for NOTEAR-based methods: 1) the infeasible solution results from the gradient descent-based optimization paradigm; 2) the truncation operation to promise the learned graph acyclic. In this work, the reason for challenge 1) is analyzed theoretically, and a novel method named DAGs with Tears method is proposed based on mix-integer programming to alleviate challenge 2). In addition, prior knowledge is able to incorporate into the new proposed method, making structure learning more practical and useful in industrial processes. Finally, a numerical example and an industrial example are adopted as case studies to demonstrate the superiority of the developed method. 贝叶斯网络是工业过程中常用的故障检测和诊断方法。贝叶斯网络的基础是结构学习，它从数据中学习有向无环图（DAG）。然而，搜索空间将随着过程变量的增加而超指数扩展，这使得数据驱动的结构学习成为一个具有挑战性的问题。为此，采用NOTEAR方法的DAG正在得到深入研究，不仅因为它们将离散优化问题转换为连续优化问题，而且还因为它们与深度学习框架的兼容性。尽管如此，基于NOTEAR的方法仍然存在挑战：1）基于梯度下降的优化范式导致不可行的解决方案； 2）截断操作以保证学习到的图是无环的。在这项工作中，从理论上分析了挑战 1) 的原因，并提出了一种基于混合整数规划的新方法，称为 DAGs with Tears 方法来缓解挑战 2)。此外，先验知识能够融入新提出的方法中，使结构学习在工业过程中更加实用和有用。最后，通过数值例子和工业例子作为案例研究来证明所开发方法的优越性。 本文提出一种基于混合整数规划的新型DAG结构学习方法（DAGs with Tears），以解决NOTEAR方法在工业过程故障诊断中的两个核心挑战。 Zhichao Chen,Zhiqiang Ge cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Pinghui Wang,Chengjin Yang,Dongdong Xie,Junzhou Zhao,Hui Li,Jing Tao,Xiaohong Guan
title: An Effective and Differentially Private Protocol for Secure Distributed Cardinality Estimation
title_zh: 用于安全分布式基数估计的有效且差分私有协议
abstract: Counting the number of distinct elements distributed over multiple data holders is a fundamental problem with many real-world applications ranging from crowd counting to network monitoring. Although a number of space and computational efficient sketch methods (e.g., the Flajolet-Martin sketch and the HyperLogLog sketch) for cardinality estimation have been proposed to solve the above problem, these sketch methods are insecure when considering privacy concerns related to the use of each data holder's personal dataset. Despite a recently proposed protocol that successfully implements the well-known Flajolet-Martin (FM) sketch on a secret-sharing based multiparty computation (MPC) framework for solving the problem of private distributed cardinality estimation (PDCE), we observe that this MPC-FM protocol is not differentially private. In addition, the MPC-FM protocol is computationally expensive, which limits its applications to data holders with limited computation resources. To address the above issues, in this paper we propose a novel protocol DP-DICE, which is computationally efficient and differentially private for solving the problem of PDCE. Experimental results show that our DP-DICE achieves orders of magnitude speedup and reduces the estimation error by several times in comparison with state-of-the-arts under the same security requirements.
summary: Counting the number of distinct elements distributed over multiple data holders is a fundamental problem with many real-world applications ranging from crowd counting to network monitoring. Although a number of space and computational efficient sketch methods (e.g., the Flajolet-Martin sketch and the HyperLogLog sketch) for cardinality estimation have been proposed to solve the above problem, these sketch methods are insecure when considering privacy concerns related to the use of each data holder's personal dataset. Despite a recently proposed protocol that successfully implements the well-known Flajolet-Martin (FM) sketch on a secret-sharing based multiparty computation (MPC) framework for solving the problem of private distributed cardinality estimation (PDCE), we observe that this MPC-FM protocol is not differentially private. In addition, the MPC-FM protocol is computationally expensive, which limits its applications to data holders with limited computation resources. To address the above issues, in this paper we propose a novel protocol DP-DICE, which is computationally efficient and differentially private for solving the problem of PDCE. Experimental results show that our DP-DICE achieves orders of magnitude speedup and reduces the estimation error by several times in comparison with state-of-the-arts under the same security requirements.
abstract_zh: 计算分布在多个数据持有者上的不同元素的数量是许多现实世界应用（从人群计数到网络监控）的一个基本问题。尽管已经提出了许多用于基数估计的空间和计算高效的草图方法（例如，Flajolet-Martin草图和HyperLogLog草图）来解决上述问题，但在考虑与每个数据持有者的个人数据集的使用相关的隐私问题时，这些草图方法是不安全的。尽管最近提出的协议在基于秘密共享的多方计算 (MPC) 框架上成功实现了著名的 Flajolet-Martin (FM) 草图，以解决私有分布式基数估计 (PDCE) 问题，但我们观察到该 MPC-FM 协议不是差分私有的。此外，MPC-FM协议的计算成本较高，这限制了其应用到计算资源有限的数据持有者。为了解决上述问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的协议 DP-DICE，它具有计算效率高且差分隐私的特点，可以解决 PDCE 问题。实验结果表明，在相同安全要求下，与现有技术相比，我们的 DP-DICE 实现了数量级的加速，并将估计误差降低了数倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效且具有差分隐私的协议DP-DICE，用于解决隐私分布式基数估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的基数估计方法在隐私保护方面存在不足，并且计算成本较高，限制了其在计算资源有限的数据持有者中的应用。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于差分隐私的协议DP-DICE，结合了高效的计算方法和隐私保护机制，以解决隐私分布式基数估计问题。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DP-DICE在保证相同安全要求的情况下，相比现有方法实现了数量级的速度提升，并减少了估计误差。
AI.conclusion: DP-DICE协议在计算效率和隐私保护方面具有显著优势，适合用于隐私分布式基数估计场景。

authors_text: Haojie Ren,Sha Zhang,Sugang Li,Yao Li,Xinchen Li,Jianmin Ji,Yu Zhang,Yanyong Zhang
title: TrajMatch: Towards Automatic Spatio-temporal Calibration for Roadside LiDARs through Trajectory Matching
title_zh: TrajMatch：通过轨迹匹配实现路边激光雷达的自动时空校准
abstract: Recently, it has become popular to deploy sensors such as LiDARs on the roadside to monitor the passing traffic and assist autonomous vehicle perception. Unlike autonomous vehicle systems, roadside sensors are usually affiliated with different subsystems and lack synchronization both in time and space. Calibration is a key technology which allows the central server to fuse the data generated by different location infrastructures, which can deliver improve the sensing range and detection robustness. Unfortunately, existing calibration algorithms often assume that the LiDARs are significantly overlapped or that the temporal calibration is already achieved. Since these assumptions do not always hold in the real world, the calibration results from the existing algorithms are often unsatisfactory and always need human involvement, which brings high labor costs. In this paper, we propose TrajMatch -- the first system that can automatically calibrate for roadside LiDARs in both time and space. The main idea is to automatically calibrate the sensors based on the result of the detection/tracking task instead of extracting special features. More deeply, we propose a mechanism for evaluating calibration parameters that is consistent with our algorithm, and we demonstrate the effectiveness of this scheme experimentally, which can also be used to guide parameter iterations for multiple calibration. Finally, to evaluate the performance of TrajMatch , we collect two dataset, one simulated dataset LiDARnet-sim 1.0 and a real-world dataset. Experiment results show that TrajMatch can achieve a spatial calibration error of less than 10cm and a temporal calibration error of less than 1.5ms.
summary: Recently, it has become popular to deploy sensors such as LiDARs on the roadside to monitor the passing traffic and assist autonomous vehicle perception. Unlike autonomous vehicle systems, roadside sensors are usually affiliated with different subsystems and lack synchronization both in time and space. Calibration is a key technology which allows the central server to fuse the data generated by different location infrastructures, which can deliver improve the sensing range and detection robustness. Unfortunately, existing calibration algorithms often assume that the LiDARs are significantly overlapped or that the temporal calibration is already achieved. Since these assumptions do not always hold in the real world, the calibration results from the existing algorithms are often unsatisfactory and always need human involvement, which brings high labor costs. In this paper, we propose TrajMatch -- the first system that can automatically calibrate for roadside LiDARs in both time and space. The main idea is to automatically calibrate the sensors based on the result of the detection/tracking task instead of extracting special features. More deeply, we propose a mechanism for evaluating calibration parameters that is consistent with our algorithm, and we demonstrate the effectiveness of this scheme experimentally, which can also be used to guide parameter iterations for multiple calibration. Finally, to evaluate the performance of TrajMatch , we collect two dataset, one simulated dataset LiDARnet-sim 1.0 and a real-world dataset. Experiment results show that TrajMatch can achieve a spatial calibration error of less than 10cm and a temporal calibration error of less than 1.5ms.
abstract_zh: 最近，在路边部署激光雷达等传感器来监控过往交通并辅助自动驾驶车辆感知已变得流行。与自动驾驶车辆系统不同，路边传感器通常隶属于不同的子系统，并且在时间和空间上缺乏同步。校准是一项关键技术，它允许中央服务器融合不同位置基础设施生成的数据，从而提高传感范围和检测鲁棒性。不幸的是，现有的校准算法通常假设激光雷达明显重叠或者已经实现了时间校准。由于这些假设在现实世界中并不总是成立，现有算​​法的校准结果往往并不令人满意，并且总是需要人工参与，这带来了高昂的人工成本。在本文中，我们提出了 TrajMatch——第一个可以在时间和空间上自动校准路边激光雷达的系统。主要思想是根据检测/跟踪任务的结果自动校准传感器，而不是提取特殊特征。更深入地说，我们提出了一种与我们的算法一致的评估校准参数的机制，并通过实验证明了该方案的有效性，它也可以用于指导多次校准的参数迭代。最后，为了评估 TrajMatch 的性能，我们收集了两个数据集，一个是模拟数据集 LiDARnet-sim 1.0，另一个是真实数据集。实验结果表明，TrajMatch可以实现空间校准误差小于10cm，时间校准误差小于1.5ms。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrajMatch系统，通过轨迹匹配实现路边激光雷达的时空自动校准。
AI.motivation: 现有校准算法依赖激光雷达重叠或预同步假设，导致实际应用中校准效果差且需人工干预，存在高成本问题。
AI.method: 基于检测/跟踪任务结果而非特殊特征进行校准，并提出与算法一致的参数评估机制以指导多轮校准迭代。
AI.result: 在LiDARnet-sim 1.0仿真数据集和真实数据集上实现空间校准误差<10cm、时间校准误差<1.5ms。
AI.conclusion: TrajMatch通过轨迹匹配有效解决了路边激光雷达的时空校准问题，验证了方法在实际场景中的可行性与精度。

More deeply, we propose a mechanism for evaluating calibration parameters that is consistent with our algorithm, and we demonstrate the effectiveness of this scheme experimentally, which can also be used to guide parameter iterations for multiple calibration. Finally, to evaluate the performance of TrajMatch , we collect two dataset, one simulated dataset LiDARnet-sim 1.0 and a real-world dataset. Experiment results show that TrajMatch can achieve a spatial calibration error of less than 10cm and a temporal calibration error of less than 1.5ms. 最近，在路边部署激光雷达等传感器来监控过往交通并辅助自动驾驶车辆感知已变得流行。与自动驾驶车辆系统不同，路边传感器通常隶属于不同的子系统，并且在时间和空间上缺乏同步。校准是一项关键技术，它允许中央服务器融合不同位置基础设施生成的数据，从而提高传感范围和检测鲁棒性。不幸的是，现有的校准算法通常假设激光雷达明显重叠或者已经实现了时间校准。由于这些假设在现实世界中并不总是成立，现有算​​法的校准结果往往并不令人满意，并且总是需要人工参与，这带来了高昂的人工成本。在本文中，我们提出了 TrajMatch——第一个可以在时间和空间上自动校准路边激光雷达的系统。主要思想是根据检测/跟踪任务的结果自动校准传感器，而不是提取特殊特征。更深入地说，我们提出了一种与我们的算法一致的评估校准参数的机制，并通过实验证明了该方案的有效性，它也可以用于指导多次校准的参数迭代。最后，为了评估 TrajMatch 的性能，我们收集了两个数据集，一个是模拟数据集 LiDARnet-sim 1.0，另一个是真实数据集。实验结果表明，TrajMatch可以实现空间校准误差小于10cm，时间校准误差小于1.5ms。 本文提出TrajMatch系统，通过轨迹匹配实现路边激光雷达的时空自动校准。 Haojie Ren,Sha Zhang,Sugang Li,Yao Li,Xinchen Li,Jianmin Ji,Yu Zhang,Yanyong Zhang cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Hailin Wang,Jiangjun Peng,Wenjin Qin,Jianjun Wang,Deyu Meng
title: Guaranteed Tensor Recovery Fused Low-rankness and Smoothness
title_zh: 保证张量恢复融合低秩性和平滑性
abstract: The tensor data recovery task has thus attracted much research attention in recent years. Solving such an ill-posed problem generally requires to explore intrinsic prior structures underlying tensor data, and formulate them as certain forms of regularization terms for guiding a sound estimate of the restored tensor. Recent research have made significant progress by adopting two insightful tensor priors, i.e., global low-rankness (L) and local smoothness (S) across different tensor modes, which are always encoded as a sum of two separate regularization terms into the recovery models. However, unlike the primary theoretical developments on low-rank tensor recovery, these joint L+S models have no theoretical exact-recovery guarantees yet, making the methods lack reliability in real practice. To this crucial issue, in this work, we build a unique regularization term, which essentially encodes both L and S priors of a tensor simultaneously. Especially, by equipping this single regularizer into the recovery models, we can rigorously prove the exact recovery guarantees for two typical tensor recovery tasks, i.e., tensor completion (TC) and tensor robust principal component analysis (TRPCA). To the best of our knowledge, this should be the first exact-recovery results among all related L+S methods for tensor recovery. Significant recovery accuracy improvements over many other SOTA methods in several TC and TRPCA tasks with various kinds of visual tensor data are observed in extensive experiments. Typically, our method achieves a workable performance when the missing rate is extremely large, e.g., 99.5%, for the color image inpainting task, while all its peers totally fail in such challenging case.
summary: The tensor data recovery task has thus attracted much research attention in recent years. Solving such an ill-posed problem generally requires to explore intrinsic prior structures underlying tensor data, and formulate them as certain forms of regularization terms for guiding a sound estimate of the restored tensor. Recent research have made significant progress by adopting two insightful tensor priors, i.e., global low-rankness (L) and local smoothness (S) across different tensor modes, which are always encoded as a sum of two separate regularization terms into the recovery models. However, unlike the primary theoretical developments on low-rank tensor recovery, these joint L+S models have no theoretical exact-recovery guarantees yet, making the methods lack reliability in real practice. To this crucial issue, in this work, we build a unique regularization term, which essentially encodes both L and S priors of a tensor simultaneously. Especially, by equipping this single regularizer into the recovery models, we can rigorously prove the exact recovery guarantees for two typical tensor recovery tasks, i.e., tensor completion (TC) and tensor robust principal component analysis (TRPCA). To the best of our knowledge, this should be the first exact-recovery results among all related L+S methods for tensor recovery. Significant recovery accuracy improvements over many other SOTA methods in several TC and TRPCA tasks with various kinds of visual tensor data are observed in extensive experiments. Typically, our method achieves a workable performance when the missing rate is extremely large, e.g., 99.5%, for the color image inpainting task, while all its peers totally fail in such challenging case.
abstract_zh: 因此，张量数据恢复任务近年来引起了广泛的研究关注。解决这种不适定问题通常需要探索张量数据背后的内在先验结构，并将它们表示为某些形式的正则化项，以指导恢复张量的合理估计。最近的研究通过采用两个有洞察力的张量先验取得了重大进展，即不同张量模式的全局低秩（L）和局部平滑（S），它们总是被编码为两个单独的正则化项的总和到恢复模型中。然而，与低阶张量恢复的主要理论发展不同，这些联合L+S模型尚无理论上的精确恢复保证，使得这些方法在实际应用中缺乏可靠性。对于这个关键问题，在这项工作中，我们构建了一个独特的正则化项，它本质上同时对张量的 L 和 S 先验进行编码。特别是，通过将这个单一正则化器配备到恢复模型中，我们可以严格证明两个典型张量恢复任务的精确恢复保证，即张量完成（TC）和张量鲁棒主成分分析（TRPCA）。据我们所知，这应该是所有相关的张量恢复 L+S 方法中第一个精确恢复结果。在大量实验中观察到，在具有各种视觉张量数据的多个 TC 和 TRPCA 任务中，恢复精度比许多其他 SOTA 方法有显着提高。通常，当彩色图像修复任务的缺失率非常大（例如 99.5％）时，我们的方法可以实现可行的性能，而所有同行在这种具有挑战性的情况下都完全失败。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合张量低秩性与平滑性的正则化方法，用于保证张量恢复的精确性。
AI.motivation: 现有联合低秩（L）和平滑（S）的张量恢复模型缺乏理论上的精确恢复保证，导致实际应用可靠性不足。
AI.method: 构建一个单一正则化项同时编码张量的全局低秩性与局部平滑性，并证明其在张量补全（TC）和鲁棒主成分分析（TRPCA）任务中的精确恢复理论保证。
AI.result: 在多种视觉张量数据任务中显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其在缺失率高达99.5%的图像修复任务中仍能有效工作。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为联合L+S的张量恢复方法提供了精确恢复理论保证，实现了极端缺失场景下的可靠恢复性能。

authors_text: Dimitrios E. Diamantis,Panagiota Gatoula,Anastasios Koulaouzidis,Dimitris K. Iakovidis
title: This Intestine Does Not Exist: Multiscale Residual Variational Autoencoder for Realistic Wireless Capsule Endoscopy Image Generation
title_zh: 这种肠道不存在：用于真实无线胶囊内窥镜图像生成的多尺度残差自动编码器
abstract: Medical image synthesis has emerged as a promising solution to address the limited availability of annotated medical data needed for training machine learning algorithms in the context of image-based Clinical Decision Support (CDS) systems. To this end, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been mainly applied to support the algorithm training process by generating synthetic images for data augmentation. However, in the field of Wireless Capsule Endoscopy (WCE), the limited content diversity and size of existing publicly available annotated datasets, adversely affect both the training stability and synthesis performance of GANs. Aiming to a viable solution for WCE image synthesis, a novel Variational Autoencoder architecture is proposed, namely "This Intestine Does not Exist" (TIDE). The proposed architecture comprises multiscale feature extraction convolutional blocks and residual connections, which enable the generation of high-quality and diverse datasets even with a limited number of training images. Contrary to the current approaches, which are oriented towards the augmentation of the available datasets, this study demonstrates that using TIDE, real WCE datasets can be fully substituted by artificially generated ones, without compromising classification performance. Furthermore, qualitative and user evaluation studies by experienced WCE specialists, validate from a medical viewpoint that both the normal and abnormal WCE images synthesized by TIDE are sufficiently realistic.
summary: Medical image synthesis has emerged as a promising solution to address the limited availability of annotated medical data needed for training machine learning algorithms in the context of image-based Clinical Decision Support (CDS) systems. To this end, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been mainly applied to support the algorithm training process by generating synthetic images for data augmentation. However, in the field of Wireless Capsule Endoscopy (WCE), the limited content diversity and size of existing publicly available annotated datasets, adversely affect both the training stability and synthesis performance of GANs. Aiming to a viable solution for WCE image synthesis, a novel Variational Autoencoder architecture is proposed, namely "This Intestine Does not Exist" (TIDE). The proposed architecture comprises multiscale feature extraction convolutional blocks and residual connections, which enable the generation of high-quality and diverse datasets even with a limited number of training images. Contrary to the current approaches, which are oriented towards the augmentation of the available datasets, this study demonstrates that using TIDE, real WCE datasets can be fully substituted by artificially generated ones, without compromising classification performance. Furthermore, qualitative and user evaluation studies by experienced WCE specialists, validate from a medical viewpoint that both the normal and abnormal WCE images synthesized by TIDE are sufficiently realistic.
abstract_zh: 医学图像合成已成为一种有前景的解决方案，可解决在基于图像的临床决策支持 (CDS) 系统中训练机器学习算法所需的带注释的医学数据的可用性有限的问题。为此，生成对抗网络（GAN）主要用于通过生成用于数据增强的合成图像来支持算法训练过程。然而，在无线胶囊内窥镜（WCE）领域，现有公开注释数据集的内容多样性和大小有限，对 GAN 的训练稳定性和合成性能产生不利影响。针对 WCE 图像合成的可行解决方案，提出了一种新颖的变分自动编码器架构，即“This Intestine does not Exist”（TIDE）。所提出的架构包括多尺度特征提取卷积块和残差连接，即使训练图像数量有限，也能够生成高质量和多样化的数据集。与当前旨在增加可用数据集的方法相反，本研究表明，使用 TIDE，真实的 WCE 数据集可以完全替换为人工生成的数据集，而不会影响分类性能。此外，由经验丰富的 WCE 专家进行的定性和用户评估研究，从医学角度验证了 TIDE 合成的正常和异常 WCE 图像都足够真实。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TIDE的多尺度残差变分自编码器，用于生成高质量的无线胶囊内镜图像以解决医学数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有公开标注的无线胶囊内镜数据集内容多样性不足且规模有限，导致生成对抗网络（GAN）训练不稳定且合成效果差，亟需新的图像生成方法。
AI.method: 设计包含多尺度特征提取卷积块和残差连接的变分自编码器架构TIDE，通过人工生成数据替代真实数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 合成图像在分类性能上与真实数据相当，经专科医生评估具有足够真实感，成功替代真实数据集用于训练。
AI.conclusion: TIDE模型能有效生成高质量无线胶囊内镜图像，为临床决策支持系统提供数据保障，推动医疗AI发展。

The proposed architecture comprises multiscale feature extraction convolutional blocks and residual connections, which enable the generation of high-quality and diverse datasets even with a limited number of training images. Contrary to the current approaches, which are oriented towards the augmentation of the available datasets, this study demonstrates that using TIDE, real WCE datasets can be fully substituted by artificially generated ones, without compromising classification performance. Furthermore, qualitative and user evaluation studies by experienced WCE specialists, validate from a medical viewpoint that both the normal and abnormal WCE images synthesized by TIDE are sufficiently realistic. 医学图像合成已成为一种有前景的解决方案，可解决在基于图像的临床决策支持 (CDS) 系统中训练机器学习算法所需的带注释的医学数据的可用性有限的问题。为此，生成对抗网络（GAN）主要用于通过生成用于数据增强的合成图像来支持算法训练过程。然而，在无线胶囊内窥镜（WCE）领域，现有公开注释数据集的内容多样性和大小有限，对 GAN 的训练稳定性和合成性能产生不利影响。针对 WCE 图像合成的可行解决方案，提出了一种新颖的变分自动编码器架构，即“This Intestine does not Exist”（TIDE）。所提出的架构包括多尺度特征提取卷积块和残差连接，即使训练图像数量有限，也能够生成高质量和多样化的数据集。与当前旨在增加可用数据集的方法相反，本研究表明，使用 TIDE，真实的 WCE 数据集可以完全替换为人工生成的数据集，而不会影响分类性能。此外，由经验丰富的 WCE 专家进行的定性和用户评估研究，从医学角度验证了 TIDE 合成的正常和异常 WCE 图像都足够真实。 本文提出一种名为TIDE的多尺度残差变分自编码器，用于生成高质量的无线胶囊内镜图像以解决医学数据不足的问题。 Dimitrios E. Diamantis,Panagiota Gatoula,Anastasios Koulaouzidis,Dimitris K. Iakovidis cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Jone Uria-Albizuri,Giovanni Sirio Carmantini,Peter beim Graben,Serafim Rodrigues
title: Invariants for neural automata
title_zh: 神经自动机的不变量
abstract: Computational modeling of neurodynamical systems often deploys neural networks and symbolic dynamics. A particular way for combining these approaches within a framework called vector symbolic architectures leads to neural automata. An interesting research direction we have pursued under this framework has been to consider mapping symbolic dynamics onto neurodynamics, represented as neural automata. This representation theory, enables us to ask questions, such as, how does the brain implement Turing computations. Specifically, in this representation theory, neural automata result from the assignment of symbols and symbol strings to numbers, known as Gödel encoding. Under this assignment symbolic computation becomes represented by trajectories of state vectors in a real phase space, that allows for statistical correlation analyses with real-world measurements and experimental data. However, these assignments are usually completely arbitrary. Hence, it makes sense to address the problem question of, which aspects of the dynamics observed under such a representation is intrinsic to the dynamics and which are not. In this study, we develop a formally rigorous mathematical framework for the investigation of symmetries and invariants of neural automata under different encodings. As a central concept we define patterns of equality for such systems. We consider different macroscopic observables, such as the mean activation level of the neural network, and ask for their invariance properties. Our main result shows that only step functions that are defined over those patterns of equality are invariant under recodings, while the mean activation is not. Our work could be of substantial importance for related regression studies of real-world measurements with neurosymbolic processors for avoiding confounding results that are dependant on a particular encoding and not intrinsic to the dynamics.

abstract_zh: 神经动力学系统的计算建模通常部署神经网络和符号动力学。将这些方法组合在称为矢量符号架构的框架内的一种特殊方式导致了神经自动机。我们在这个框架下追求的一个有趣的研究方向是考虑将符号动力学映射到神经动力学，表示为神经自动机。这种表示理论使我们能够提出问题，例如大脑如何实现图灵计算。具体来说，在这种表示理论中，神经自动机是由将符号和符号串分配给数字而产生的，称为哥德尔编码。在这种分配下，符号计算由真实相空间中的状态向量轨迹表示，这允许与真实世界的测量和实验数据进行统计相关分析。然而，这些分配通常是完全任意的。因此，解决这样的问题是有意义的：在这种表示下观察到的动力学的哪些方面是动力学固有的，哪些不是。在这项研究中，我们开发了一个形式严格的数学框架，用于研究不同编码下神经自动机的对称性和不变量。作为一个中心概念，我们为此类系统定义了平等模式。我们考虑不同的宏观可观察量，例如神经网络的平均激活水平，并要求它们的不变性。我们的主要结果表明，只有在这些等式模式上定义的阶跃函数在重新编码下是不变的，而平均激活则不是。我们的工作对于使用神经符号处理器进行现实世界测量的相关回归研究具有重要意义，以避免依赖于特定编码而不是动态固有的混淆结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究神经自动机在不同编码下的对称性和不变量，确定其动态特性中哪些是内在的。
AI.motivation: 现有符号动力学到神经动力学的映射依赖任意编码，可能导致结果混淆，需识别真正反映动态本质的不变量以提升实际应用可靠性。
AI.method: 构建数学框架定义神经自动机的等价模式，分析宏观观测值（如平均激活水平）的编码不变性。
AI.result: 仅基于等价模式的阶梯函数具有编码不变性，而平均激活水平等观测值不具备此特性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为神经符号系统提供了理论工具，可避免编码依赖的混淆，推动其在真实数据回归分析中的应用。

authors_text: Feng Xue,Yu Li,Deyin Liu,Yincen Xie,Lin Wu,Richang Hong
title: LipFormer: Learning to Lipread Unseen Speakers based on Visual-Landmark Transformers
title_zh: LipFormer：基于 Visual-Landmark Transformers 学习唇读看不见的说话者
abstract: Lipreading refers to understanding and further translating the speech of a speaker in the video into natural language. State-of-the-art lipreading methods excel in interpreting overlap speakers, i.e., speakers appear in both training and inference sets. However, generalizing these methods to unseen speakers incurs catastrophic performance degradation due to the limited number of speakers in training bank and the evident visual variations caused by the shape/color of lips for different speakers. Therefore, merely depending on the visible changes of lips tends to cause model overfitting. To address this problem, we propose to use multi-modal features across visual and landmarks, which can describe the lip motion irrespective to the speaker identities. Then, we develop a sentence-level lipreading framework based on visual-landmark transformers, namely LipFormer. Specifically, LipFormer consists of a lip motion stream, a facial landmark stream, and a cross-modal fusion. The embeddings from the two streams are produced by self-attention, which are fed to the cross-attention module to achieve the alignment between visuals and landmarks. Finally, the resulting fused features can be decoded to output texts by a cascade seq2seq model. Experiments demonstrate that our method can effectively enhance the model generalization to unseen speakers.
summary: Lipreading refers to understanding and further translating the speech of a speaker in the video into natural language. State-of-the-art lipreading methods excel in interpreting overlap speakers, i.e., speakers appear in both training and inference sets. However, generalizing these methods to unseen speakers incurs catastrophic performance degradation due to the limited number of speakers in training bank and the evident visual variations caused by the shape/color of lips for different speakers. Therefore, merely depending on the visible changes of lips tends to cause model overfitting. To address this problem, we propose to use multi-modal features across visual and landmarks, which can describe the lip motion irrespective to the speaker identities. Then, we develop a sentence-level lipreading framework based on visual-landmark transformers, namely LipFormer. Specifically, LipFormer consists of a lip motion stream, a facial landmark stream, and a cross-modal fusion. The embeddings from the two streams are produced by self-attention, which are fed to the cross-attention module to achieve the alignment between visuals and landmarks. Finally, the resulting fused features can be decoded to output texts by a cascade seq2seq model. Experiments demonstrate that our method can effectively enhance the model generalization to unseen speakers.
abstract_zh: 唇读是指理解并进一步将视频中说话者的讲话翻译成自然语言。最先进的唇读方法擅长解释重叠说话者，即说话者同时出现在训练和推理集中。然而，由于训练库中说话者的数量有限以及不同说话者嘴唇的形状/颜色引起的明显视觉变化，将这些方法推广到看不见的说话者会导致灾难性的性能下降。因此，仅仅依靠嘴唇的可见变化往往会导致模型过度拟合。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用跨视觉和地标的多模态特征，它可以描述嘴唇运动，而不管说话者的身份如何。然后，我们开发了一个基于视觉标志变换器的句子级唇读框架，即 LipFormer。具体来说，LipFormer 由嘴唇运动流、面部标志流和跨模态融合组成。两个流的嵌入是由自注意力生成的，这些嵌入被馈送到交叉注意力模块以实现视觉效果和地标之间的对齐。最后，得到的融合特征可以通过级联 seq2seq 模型解码为输出文本。实验表明，我们的方法可以有效增强模型对未见过的说话人的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 提出LipFormer框架，通过结合视觉和面部关键点信息，提升唇读模型对未见过说话者的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现有方法在未见过的说话者上性能下降，因训练数据有限及说话者间视觉差异导致模型过拟合
AI.method: 采用多模态特征融合，构建包含唇部运动流、面部关键点流和跨模态对齐的LipFormer框架，通过自注意力和交叉注意力机制实现视觉与关键点信息对齐
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效提升模型对未见过说话者的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态融合与跨模态对齐，LipFormer有效解决了唇读模型在未见过说话者上的泛化问题

authors_text: Danilo Vasconcellos Vargas,Tham Yik Foong,Heng Zhang
title: Dynamical Equations With Bottom-up Self-Organizing Properties Learn Accurate Dynamical Hierarchies Without Any Loss Function
title_zh: 具有自下而上自组织特性的动态方程无需任何损失函数即可学习准确的动态层次结构
abstract: Self-organization is ubiquitous in nature and mind. However, machine learning and theories of cognition still barely touch the subject. The hurdle is that general patterns are difficult to define in terms of dynamical equations and designing a system that could learn by reordering itself is still to be seen. Here, we propose a learning system, where patterns are defined within the realm of nonlinear dynamics with positive and negative feedback loops, allowing attractor-repeller pairs to emerge for each pattern observed. Experiments reveal that such a system can map temporal to spatial correlation, enabling hierarchical structures to be learned from sequential data. The results are accurate enough to surpass state-of-the-art unsupervised learning algorithms in seven out of eight experiments as well as two real-world problems. Interestingly, the dynamic nature of the system makes it inherently adaptive, giving rise to phenomena similar to phase transitions in chemistry/thermodynamics when the input structure changes. Thus, the work here sheds light on how self-organization can allow for pattern recognition and hints at how intelligent behavior might emerge from simple dynamic equations without any objective/loss function.
summary: Self-organization is ubiquitous in nature and mind. However, machine learning and theories of cognition still barely touch the subject. The hurdle is that general patterns are difficult to define in terms of dynamical equations and designing a system that could learn by reordering itself is still to be seen. Here, we propose a learning system, where patterns are defined within the realm of nonlinear dynamics with positive and negative feedback loops, allowing attractor-repeller pairs to emerge for each pattern observed. Experiments reveal that such a system can map temporal to spatial correlation, enabling hierarchical structures to be learned from sequential data. The results are accurate enough to surpass state-of-the-art unsupervised learning algorithms in seven out of eight experiments as well as two real-world problems. Interestingly, the dynamic nature of the system makes it inherently adaptive, giving rise to phenomena similar to phase transitions in chemistry/thermodynamics when the input structure changes. Thus, the work here sheds light on how self-organization can allow for pattern recognition and hints at how intelligent behavior might emerge from simple dynamic equations without any objective/loss function.
abstract_zh: 自组织在自然界和心灵中无处不在。然而，机器学习和认知理论仍然几乎没有触及这个主题。障碍在于，一般模式很难用动力学方程来定义，并且设计一个可以通过自身重新排序来学习的系统仍有待观察。在这里，我们提出了一个学习系统，其中模式是在具有正反馈循环和负反馈循环的非线性动力学领域内定义的，允许针对观察到的每个模式出现吸引子-排斥子对。实验表明，这样的系统可以将时间相关性映射到空间相关性，从而能够从顺序数据中学习层次结构。在八个实验中的七个以及两个现实问题中，结果足够准确，足以超越最先进的无监督学习算法。有趣的是，系统的动态性质使其具有固有的适应性，当输入结构发生变化时，会产生类似于化学/热力学中相变的现象。因此，这里的工作揭示了自组织如何允许模式识别，并暗示智能行为如何从没有任何目标/损失函数的简单动态方程中出现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需损失函数的自组织学习系统，通过动态方程学习准确的动态层次结构。
AI.motivation: 自组织在自然和认知中普遍存在，但现有机器学习难以模拟其机制，尤其缺乏无需损失函数的自组织学习方法。
AI.method: 基于非线性动力学构建正负反馈环，生成吸引子-排斥子对，通过时间序列数据映射空间相关性以学习分层结构。
AI.result: 在8个实验中的7个及2个实际问题中超越当前最佳无监督算法，系统适应性可引发类似相变的动态响应。
AI.conclusion: 自组织机制可实现无需损失函数的模式识别，揭示智能行为可能源自简单动态方程的自组织特性。

authors_text: Min Peng,Chongyang Wang,Yu Shi,Xiang-Dong Zhou
title: Efficient End-to-End Video Question Answering with Pyramidal Multimodal Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Pyramidal Multimodal Transformer 进行高效的端到端视频问答
abstract: This paper presents a new method for end-to-end Video Question Answering (VideoQA), aside from the current popularity of using large-scale pre-training with huge feature extractors. We achieve this with a pyramidal multimodal transformer (PMT) model, which simply incorporates a learnable word embedding layer, a few convolutional and transformer layers. We use the anisotropic pyramid to fulfill video-language interactions across different spatio-temporal scales. In addition to the canonical pyramid, which includes both bottom-up and top-down pathways with lateral connections, novel strategies are proposed to decompose the visual feature stream into spatial and temporal sub-streams at different scales and implement their interactions with the linguistic semantics while preserving the integrity of local and global semantics. We demonstrate better or on-par performances with high computational efficiency against state-of-the-art methods on five VideoQA benchmarks. Our ablation study shows the scalability of our model that achieves competitive results for text-to-video retrieval by leveraging feature extractors with reusable pre-trained weights, and also the effectiveness of the pyramid.
summary: This paper presents a new method for end-to-end Video Question Answering (VideoQA), aside from the current popularity of using large-scale pre-training with huge feature extractors. We achieve this with a pyramidal multimodal transformer (PMT) model, which simply incorporates a learnable word embedding layer, a few convolutional and transformer layers. We use the anisotropic pyramid to fulfill video-language interactions across different spatio-temporal scales. In addition to the canonical pyramid, which includes both bottom-up and top-down pathways with lateral connections, novel strategies are proposed to decompose the visual feature stream into spatial and temporal sub-streams at different scales and implement their interactions with the linguistic semantics while preserving the integrity of local and global semantics. We demonstrate better or on-par performances with high computational efficiency against state-of-the-art methods on five VideoQA benchmarks. Our ablation study shows the scalability of our model that achieves competitive results for text-to-video retrieval by leveraging feature extractors with reusable pre-trained weights, and also the effectiveness of the pyramid.
abstract_zh: 除了当前流行的使用大型特征提取器进行大规模预训练之外，本文还提出了一种用于端到端视频问答（VideoQA）的新方法。我们通过金字塔多模态变换器（PMT）模型来实现这一目标，该模型简单地结合了一个可学习的词嵌入层、一些卷积层和变换器层。我们使用各向异性金字塔来实现跨不同时空尺度的视频语言交互。除了包括具有横向连接的自下而上和自上而下路径的规范金字塔之外，还提出了新的策略，将视觉特征流分解为不同尺度的空间和时间子流，并实现它们与语言语义的交互，同时保留局部和全局语义的完整性。我们在五个 VideoQA 基准测试中展示了与最先进方法相比更好或同等的性能和高计算效率。我们的消融研究表明，我们的模型具有可扩展性，通过利用具有可重复使用的预训练权重的特征提取器，可以在文本到视频检索方面实现有竞争力的结果，以及金字塔的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的端到端视频问答方法，利用金字塔多模态Transformer模型处理视频与语言的交互。
AI.motivation: 为了解决现有方法依赖大规模预训练和复杂特征提取器导致的高计算成本问题，提出更高效且性能相近的模型。
AI.method: 采用金字塔多模态Transformer（PMT）模型，结合各向异性金字塔结构，将视觉特征分解为空间和时间子流，在不同尺度上与语言语义进行交互，同时保持局部和全局语义的完整性。
AI.result: 在五个视频问答基准测试中，模型在保持高计算效率的同时，性能优于或与现有最先进方法相当，消融实验证明了模型结构的有效性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在计算效率和性能上均表现出色，证明了金字塔结构在多模态视频问答任务中的有效性，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Hao Du,Qihua Dong,Yan Xu,Jing Liao
title: Weakly-Supervised 3D Medical Image Segmentation using Geometric Prior and Contrastive Similarity
title_zh: 使用几何先验和对比相似性的弱监督 3D 医学图像分割
comment: Weakly-supervised Segmentation, Medical Image Segmentation, Contrastive Similarity, Geometric Prior, Point Cloud
comments: Weakly-supervised Segmentation, Medical Image Segmentation, Contrastive Similarity, Geometric Prior, Point Cloud
abstract: Medical image segmentation is almost the most important pre-processing procedure in computer-aided diagnosis but is also a very challenging task due to the complex shapes of segments and various artifacts caused by medical imaging, (i.e., low-contrast tissues, and non-homogenous textures). In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective segmentation framework that incorporates the geometric prior and contrastive similarity into the weakly-supervised segmentation framework in a loss-based fashion. The proposed geometric prior built on point cloud provides meticulous geometry to the weakly-supervised segmentation proposal, which serves as better supervision than the inherent property of the bounding-box annotation (i.e., height and width). Furthermore, we propose contrastive similarity to encourage organ pixels to gather around in the contrastive embedding space, which helps better distinguish low-contrast tissues. The proposed contrastive embedding space can make up for the poor representation of the conventionally-used gray space. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness and the robustness of the proposed weakly-supervised segmentation framework. The proposed framework is superior to state-of-the-art weakly-supervised methods on the following publicly accessible datasets: LiTS 2017 Challenge, KiTS 2021 Challenge, and LPBA40. We also dissect our method and evaluate the performance of each component.
summary: Medical image segmentation is almost the most important pre-processing procedure in computer-aided diagnosis but is also a very challenging task due to the complex shapes of segments and various artifacts caused by medical imaging, (i.e., low-contrast tissues, and non-homogenous textures). In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective segmentation framework that incorporates the geometric prior and contrastive similarity into the weakly-supervised segmentation framework in a loss-based fashion. The proposed geometric prior built on point cloud provides meticulous geometry to the weakly-supervised segmentation proposal, which serves as better supervision than the inherent property of the bounding-box annotation (i.e., height and width). Furthermore, we propose contrastive similarity to encourage organ pixels to gather around in the contrastive embedding space, which helps better distinguish low-contrast tissues. The proposed contrastive embedding space can make up for the poor representation of the conventionally-used gray space. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness and the robustness of the proposed weakly-supervised segmentation framework. The proposed framework is superior to state-of-the-art weakly-supervised methods on the following publicly accessible datasets: LiTS 2017 Challenge, KiTS 2021 Challenge, and LPBA40. We also dissect our method and evaluate the performance of each component.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分割几乎是计算机辅助诊断中最重要的预处理过程，但由于医学成像引起的分割形状复杂和各种伪影（即低对比度组织和非均匀纹理），这也是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的分割框架，该框架以基于损失的方式将几何先验和对比相似性合并到弱监督分割框架中。所提出的基于点云的几何先验为弱监督分割建议提供了细致的几何形状，这比边界框注释的固有属性（即高度和宽度）提供了更好的监督。此外，我们提出对比相似性，以鼓励器官像素聚集在对比嵌入空间中，这有助于更好地区分低对比度组织。所提出的对比嵌入空间可以弥补传统使用的灰色空间的不良表示。进行了大量的实验来验证所提出的弱监督分割框架的有效性和鲁棒性。所提出的框架优于以下可公开访问的数据集上最先进的弱监督方法：LiTS 2017 Challenge、KiTS 2021 Challenge 和 LPBA40。我们还剖析了我们的方法并评估每个组件的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合几何先验和对比相似性的弱监督3D医学图像分割框架，以解决医学图像分割中复杂形状和低对比度组织等挑战。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割因器官形状复杂、低对比度组织和非均匀纹理等 artifacts 而极具挑战性，传统弱监督方法依赖的边界框标注无法提供足够几何信息，需更精确的监督机制。
AI.method: 基于点云构建几何先验以提供精细形状信息，并引入对比相似性损失函数，使器官像素在对比嵌入空间中聚集，从而增强低对比度区域的区分能力。
AI.result: 在LiTS 2017、KiTS 2021和LPBA40数据集上优于现有弱监督方法，且通过组件分析验证了几何先验和对比相似性模块的有效性。
