search_text: Weakly-Supervised 3D Medical Image Segmentation using Geometric Prior and Contrastive Similarity 使用几何先验和对比相似性的弱监督 3D 医学图像分割 Medical image segmentation is almost the most important pre-processing procedure in computer-aided diagnosis but is also a very challenging task due to the complex shapes of segments and various artifacts caused by medical imaging, (i.e., low-contrast tissues, and non-homogenous textures). In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective segmentation framework that incorporates the geometric prior and contrastive similarity into the weakly-supervised segmentation framework in a loss-based fashion. The proposed geometric prior built on point cloud provides meticulous geometry to the weakly-supervised segmentation proposal, which serves as better supervision than the inherent property of the bounding-box annotation (i.e., height and width). Furthermore, we propose contrastive similarity to encourage organ pixels to gather around in the contrastive embedding space, which helps better distinguish low-contrast tissues. The proposed contrastive embedding space can make up for the poor representation of the conventionally-used gray space. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness and the robustness of the proposed weakly-supervised segmentation framework. The proposed framework is superior to state-of-the-art weakly-supervised methods on the following publicly accessible datasets: LiTS 2017 Challenge, KiTS 2021 Challenge, and LPBA40. We also dissect our method and evaluate the performance of each component. 医学图像分割几乎是计算机辅助诊断中最重要的预处理过程，但由于医学成像引起的分割形状复杂和各种伪影（即低对比度组织和非均匀纹理），这也是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的分割框架，该框架以基于损失的方式将几何先验和对比相似性合并到弱监督分割框架中。所提出的基于点云的几何先验为弱监督分割建议提供了细致的几何形状，这比边界框注释的固有属性（即高度和宽度）提供了更好的监督。此外，我们提出对比相似性，以鼓励器官像素聚集在对比嵌入空间中，这有助于更好地区分低对比度组织。所提出的对比嵌入空间可以弥补传统使用的灰色空间的不良表示。进行了大量的实验来验证所提出的弱监督分割框架的有效性和鲁棒性。所提出的框架优于以下可公开访问的数据集上最先进的弱监督方法：LiTS 2017 Challenge、KiTS 2021 Challenge 和 LPBA40。我们还剖析了我们的方法并评估每个组件的性能。 本文提出了一种结合几何先验和对比相似性的弱监督3D医学图像分割框架，以解决医学图像分割中复杂形状和低对比度组织等挑战。 Hao Du,Qihua Dong,Yan Xu,Jing Liao eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jingqiang Chen
title: Transform, Contrast and Tell: Coherent Entity-Aware Multi-Image Captioning
title_zh: 变换、对比和讲述：连贯的实体感知多图像字幕
abstract: Coherent entity-aware multi-image captioning aims to generate coherent captions for neighboring images in a news document. There are coherence relationships among neighboring images because they often describe same entities or events. These relationships are important for entity-aware multi-image captioning, but are neglected in entity-aware single-image captioning. Most existing work focuses on single-image captioning, while multi-image captioning has not been explored before. Hence, this paper proposes a coherent entity-aware multi-image captioning model by making use of coherence relationships. The model consists of a Transformer-based caption generation model and two types of contrastive learning-based coherence mechanisms. The generation model generates the caption by paying attention to the image and the accompanying text. The caption-caption coherence mechanism aims to render entities in the caption of the image be also in captions of neighboring images. The caption-image-text coherence mechanism aims to render entities in the caption of the image be also in the accompanying text. To evaluate coherence between captions, two coherence evaluation metrics are proposed. The new dataset DM800K is constructed that has more images per document than two existing datasets GoodNews and NYT800K, and is more suitable for multi-image captioning. Experiments on three datasets show the proposed captioning model outperforms 7 baselines according to BLUE, Rouge, METEOR, and entity precision and recall scores. Experiments also show that the generated captions are more coherent than that of baselines according to caption entity scores, caption Rouge scores, the two proposed coherence evaluation metrics, and human evaluations.

There are coherence relationships among neighboring images because they often describe same entities or events. These relationships are important for entity-aware multi-image captioning, but are neglected in entity-aware single-image captioning. Most existing work focuses on single-image captioning, while multi-image captioning has not been explored before. The generation model generates the caption by paying attention to the image and the accompanying text.标题-标题一致性机制旨在使图像标题中的实体也出现在相邻图像的标题中。 The caption-image-text coherence mechanism aims to render entities in the caption of the image be also in the accompanying text. To evaluate coherence between captions, two coherence evaluation metrics are proposed.构建的新数据集 DM800K 比两个现有数据集 GoodNews 和 NYT800K 每个文档包含更多图像，并且更适合多图像字幕。对三个数据集的实验表明，根据 BLUE、Rouge、METEOR 以及实体精度和召回分数，所提出的字幕模型优于 7 个基线。实验还表明，根据字幕实体分数、字幕 Rouge 分数、两个提出的连贯性评估指标和人类评估，生成的字幕比基线更加连贯。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实体感知的多图像连贯性生成模型，通过利用新闻文档中相邻图像的连贯性关系生成更一致的图像标题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注单图像标题生成，忽视了新闻文档中相邻图像间的实体或事件关联性，导致多图像标题生成的连贯性不足。
AI.method: 设计包含Transformer生成模型和两种对比学习机制（标题-标题连贯性、标题-图文连贯性）的框架，并构建包含更多图像的DM800K数据集，提出两种连贯性评估指标。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上优于7种基线方法，BLEU、ROUGE、METEOR等指标及实体精度召回率均提升，人类评估显示生成标题连贯性更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过实体感知的连贯性机制和新数据集，该模型有效提升了多图像标题生成的连贯性与实体一致性，为多图像生成任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Elicia Ye
title: Greedy Ordering of Layer Weight Matrices in Transformers Improves Translation
title_zh: Transformer 中层权重矩阵的贪婪排序改进了翻译
comment: The paper contains an error in the implementation of the algorithm
comments: The paper contains an error in the implementation of the algorithm
abstract: Prior work has attempted to understand the internal structures and functionalities of Transformer-based encoder-decoder architectures on the level of multi-head attention and feed-forward sublayers. Interpretations have focused on the encoder and decoder, along with the combinatorial possibilities of the self-attention, cross-attention, and feed-forward sublayers. However, without examining the low-level structures, one gains limited understanding of the motivation behind sublayer reordering. Could we dive into the sublayer abstraction and permute layer weight matrices to improve the quality of translation? We propose AEIUOrder to greedily reorder layer weight matrices in the encoder by their well-trainedness, as measured by Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization (HT-SR) metrics, and order the decoder matrices correspondingly. Our results suggest that greedily reordering layer weight matrices to maximize Total well-trainedness facilitates the model to learn representations and generate translations more effectively.
summary: Prior work has attempted to understand the internal structures and functionalities of Transformer-based encoder-decoder architectures on the level of multi-head attention and feed-forward sublayers. Interpretations have focused on the encoder and decoder, along with the combinatorial possibilities of the self-attention, cross-attention, and feed-forward sublayers. However, without examining the low-level structures, one gains limited understanding of the motivation behind sublayer reordering. Could we dive into the sublayer abstraction and permute layer weight matrices to improve the quality of translation? We propose AEIUOrder to greedily reorder layer weight matrices in the encoder by their well-trainedness, as measured by Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization (HT-SR) metrics, and order the decoder matrices correspondingly. Our results suggest that greedily reordering layer weight matrices to maximize Total well-trainedness facilitates the model to learn representations and generate translations more effectively.
abstract_zh: 之前的工作试图在多头注意力和前馈子层的层面上理解基于 Transformer 的编码器-解码器架构的内部结构和功能。解释集中在编码器和解码器，以及自注意力、交叉注意力和前馈子层的组合可能性。 However, without examining the low-level structures, one gains limited understanding of the motivation behind sublayer reordering. Could we dive into the sublayer abstraction and permute layer weight matrices to improve the quality of translation?我们提出 AEIUOrder，通过重尾自正则化（HT-SR）指标测量的训练有素的编码器中的层权重矩阵贪婪地重新排序，并相应地对解码器矩阵进行排序。我们的结果表明，贪婪地重新排序层权重矩阵以最大化总训练良好度有助于模型更有效地学习表示并生成翻译。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过贪心排序Transformer模型中层权重矩阵以提升翻译质量的方法AEIUOrder。
AI.motivation: 现有研究聚焦于Transformer子层结构但缺乏对低层权重矩阵重排序的深入探索，难以解释子层重排序的动机。
AI.method: 基于Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization指标衡量层训练完备性，通过贪心算法对编码器层权重矩阵排序并同步调整解码器矩阵。
AI.result: 实验表明该排序策略能有效提升模型表征学习能力和翻译生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 层权重矩阵的有序排列有助于优化模型性能，未来可探索更精细的排序策略与理论依据。

motivation: 现有研究聚焦于Transformer子层结构但缺乏对低层权重矩阵重排序的深入探索，难以解释子层重排序的动机。
method: 基于Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization指标衡量层训练完备性，通过贪心算法对编码器层权重矩阵排序并同步调整解码器矩阵。
result: 实验表明该排序策略能有效提升模型表征学习能力和翻译生成质量。
conclusion: 层权重矩阵的有序排列有助于优化模型性能，未来可探索更精细的排序策略与理论依据。
search_text: Greedy Ordering of Layer Weight Matrices in Transformers Improves Translation Transformer 中层权重矩阵的贪婪排序改进了翻译 Prior work has attempted to understand the internal structures and functionalities of Transformer-based encoder-decoder architectures on the level of multi-head attention and feed-forward sublayers. Interpretations have focused on the encoder and decoder, along with the combinatorial possibilities of the self-attention, cross-attention, and feed-forward sublayers. However, without examining the low-level structures, one gains limited understanding of the motivation behind sublayer reordering. Could we dive into the sublayer abstraction and permute layer weight matrices to improve the quality of translation? We propose AEIUOrder to greedily reorder layer weight matrices in the encoder by their well-trainedness, as measured by Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization (HT-SR) metrics, and order the decoder matrices correspondingly. Our results suggest that greedily reordering layer weight matrices to maximize Total well-trainedness facilitates the model to learn representations and generate translations more effectively. 之前的工作试图在多头注意力和前馈子层的层面上理解基于 Transformer 的编码器-解码器架构的内部结构和功能。解释集中在编码器和解码器，以及自注意力、交叉注意力和前馈子层的组合可能性。 However, without examining the low-level structures, one gains limited understanding of the motivation behind sublayer reordering. Could we dive into the sublayer abstraction and permute layer weight matrices to improve the quality of translation?我们提出 AEIUOrder，通过重尾自正则化（HT-SR）指标测量的训练有素的编码器中的层权重矩阵贪婪地重新排序，并相应地对解码器矩阵进行排序。我们的结果表明，贪婪地重新排序层权重矩阵以最大化总训练良好度有助于模型更有效地学习表示并生成翻译。 本文提出通过贪心排序Transformer模型中层权重矩阵以提升翻译质量的方法AEIUOrder。 Elicia Ye cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Deepak Kanneganti
title: A New cross-domain strategy based XAI models for fake news detection
title_zh: 一种新的基于跨域策略的假新闻检测 XAI 模型
abstract: In this study, we presented a four-level cross-domain strategy for fake news detection on pre-trained models. Cross-domain text classification is a task of a model adopting a target domain by using the knowledge of the source domain. Explainability is crucial in understanding the behaviour of these complex models. A fine-tune BERT model is used to. perform cross-domain classification with several experiments using datasets from different domains. Explanatory models like Anchor, ELI5, LIME and SHAP are used to design a novel explainable approach to cross-domain levels. The experimental analysis has given an ideal pair of XAI models on different levels of cross-domain.
summary: In this study, we presented a four-level cross-domain strategy for fake news detection on pre-trained models. Cross-domain text classification is a task of a model adopting a target domain by using the knowledge of the source domain. Explainability is crucial in understanding the behaviour of these complex models. A fine-tune BERT model is used to. perform cross-domain classification with several experiments using datasets from different domains. Explanatory models like Anchor, ELI5, LIME and SHAP are used to design a novel explainable approach to cross-domain levels. The experimental analysis has given an ideal pair of XAI models on different levels of cross-domain.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们提出了一种在预训练模型上进行假新闻检测的四级跨域策略。跨域文本分类是模型利用源域的知识采用目标域的任务。可解释性对于理解这些复杂模型的行为至关重要。使用 BERT 模型进行微调。使用来自不同域的数据集通过多个实验执行跨域分类。 Anchor、ELI5、LIME 和 SHAP 等解释模型用于设计一种新颖的可解释的跨领域方法。实验分析给出了不同层次跨域的理想XAI模型对。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可解释人工智能(XAI)的四层跨领域策略，用于提升预训练模型在假新闻检测中的跨领域分类效果。
AI.motivation: 跨领域文本分类需要利用源领域知识提升目标领域性能，而模型的可解释性对于理解复杂模型行为和增强用户信任至关重要。
AI.method: 采用微调BERT模型进行跨领域分类，结合Anchor、ELI5、LIME和SHAP等XAI方法设计可解释框架，并通过多领域数据集验证不同跨领域层级的模型效果。
AI.result: 实验分析发现特定XAI模型组合在不同跨领域层级上表现出最佳的假新闻检测性能与可解释性平衡。
AI.conclusion: 融合跨领域策略与XAI方法能有效提升模型的泛化能力与决策透明度，为假新闻检测提供更可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Hanjing Ye,Jieting Zhao,Yaling Pan,Weinan Chen,Li He,Hong Zhang
title: Robot Person Following Under Partial Occlusion
title_zh: 部分遮挡下的机器人人跟随
abstract: Robot person following (RPF) is a capability that supports many useful human-robot-interaction (HRI) applications. However, existing solutions to person following often assume full observation of the tracked person. As a consequence, they cannot track the person reliably under partial occlusion where the assumption of full observation is not satisfied. In this paper, we focus on the problem of robot person following under partial occlusion caused by a limited field of view of a monocular camera. Based on the key insight that it is possible to locate the target person when one or more of his/her joints are visible, we propose a method in which each visible joint contributes a location estimate of the followed person. Experiments on a public person-following dataset show that, even under partial occlusion, the proposed method can still locate the person more reliably than the existing SOTA methods. As well, the application of our method is demonstrated in real experiments on a mobile robot.
summary: Robot person following (RPF) is a capability that supports many useful human-robot-interaction (HRI) applications. However, existing solutions to person following often assume full observation of the tracked person. As a consequence, they cannot track the person reliably under partial occlusion where the assumption of full observation is not satisfied. In this paper, we focus on the problem of robot person following under partial occlusion caused by a limited field of view of a monocular camera. Based on the key insight that it is possible to locate the target person when one or more of his/her joints are visible, we propose a method in which each visible joint contributes a location estimate of the followed person. Experiments on a public person-following dataset show that, even under partial occlusion, the proposed method can still locate the person more reliably than the existing SOTA methods. As well, the application of our method is demonstrated in real experiments on a mobile robot.
abstract_zh: 机器人人员跟随 (RPF) 是一种支持许多有用的人机交互 (HRI) 应用程序的功能。然而，现有的人员跟踪解决方案通常假设对被跟踪人员进行全面观察。因此，在不满足完全观察假设的情况下，他们无法在部分遮挡下可靠地跟踪人。在本文中，我们重点研究单目相机视场有限导致的部分遮挡下机器人人跟随的问题。基于当目标人的一个或多个关节可见时可以定位目标人的关键见解，我们提出了一种方法，其中每个可见关节贡献对跟随者的位置估计。在公共追踪数据集上的实验表明，即使在部分遮挡的情况下，所提出的方法仍然可以比现有的 SOTA 方法更可靠地定位人员。此外，我们的方法的应用也在移动机器人的实际实验中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在单目相机有限视野导致的部分遮挡情况下，机器人跟随目标人物的可靠方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人跟随方法假设目标人物完全可见，但在部分遮挡场景下无法可靠跟踪，需解决有限视野下的遮挡问题。
AI.method: 通过检测目标人物可见的关节位置，利用多个可见关节提供的位置信息估计目标整体位置，从而实现遮挡下的跟踪。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和实际移动机器人实验中，该方法在部分遮挡场景下的定位可靠性优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于可见关节的位置估计方法有效解决了单目相机视野限制下的遮挡问题，提升了机器人跟随的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Dexun Li,Wenjun Li,Pradeep Varakantham
title: Diversity Induced Environment Design via Self-Play
title_zh: 通过自我游戏进行多样性诱导的环境设计
abstract: Recent work on designing an appropriate distribution of environments has shown promise for training effective generally capable agents. Its success is partly because of a form of adaptive curriculum learning that generates environment instances (or levels) at the frontier of the agent's capabilities. However, such an environment design framework often struggles to find effective levels in challenging design spaces and requires costly interactions with the environment. In this paper, we aim to introduce diversity in the Unsupervised Environment Design (UED) framework. Specifically, we propose a task-agnostic method to identify observed/hidden states that are representative of a given level. The outcome of this method is then utilized to characterize the diversity between two levels, which as we show can be crucial to effective performance. In addition, to improve sampling efficiency, we incorporate the self-play technique that allows the environment generator to automatically generate environments that are of great benefit to the training agent. Quantitatively, our approach, Diversity-induced Environment Design via Self-Play (DivSP), shows compelling performance over existing methods.
summary: Recent work on designing an appropriate distribution of environments has shown promise for training effective generally capable agents. Its success is partly because of a form of adaptive curriculum learning that generates environment instances (or levels) at the frontier of the agent's capabilities. However, such an environment design framework often struggles to find effective levels in challenging design spaces and requires costly interactions with the environment. In this paper, we aim to introduce diversity in the Unsupervised Environment Design (UED) framework. Specifically, we propose a task-agnostic method to identify observed/hidden states that are representative of a given level. The outcome of this method is then utilized to characterize the diversity between two levels, which as we show can be crucial to effective performance. In addition, to improve sampling efficiency, we incorporate the self-play technique that allows the environment generator to automatically generate environments that are of great benefit to the training agent. Quantitatively, our approach, Diversity-induced Environment Design via Self-Play (DivSP), shows compelling performance over existing methods.
abstract_zh: 最近关于设计适当的环境分布的工作已经显示出训练有效的通用智能体的希望。它的成功部分归功于一种自适应课程学习形式，该学习形式可以在代理能力的前沿生成环境实例（或级别）。然而，这样的环境设计框架通常很难在具有挑战性的设计空间中找到有效的水平，并且需要与环境进行昂贵的交互。在本文中，我们的目标是在无监督环境设计（UED）框架中引入多样性。具体来说，我们提出了一种与任务无关的方法来识别代表给定级别的观察/隐藏状态。然后利用该方法的结果来表征两个级别之间的多样性，正如我们所表明的，这对于有效的性能至关重要。此外，为了提高采样效率，我们采用了自我对弈技术，使环境生成器能够自动生成对训练代理非常有利的环境。从数量上讲，我们的方法“通过自我游戏进行多样性诱导的环境设计”（DivSP）显示出优于现有方法的令人信服的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过自博弈引入多样性来设计环境，以提升智能体训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有环境设计框架在复杂设计空间中难以生成有效层级，且依赖高成本的环境交互。
AI.method: 提出任务无关的代表性状态识别方法，结合自博弈技术生成多样化环境层级。
AI.result: DivSP方法在定量评估中显著优于现有环境设计方法。
AI.conclusion: 多样性诱导与自博弈结合可有效提升环境设计质量，促进智能体训练效率。

search_text: Diversity Induced Environment Design via Self-Play 通过自我游戏进行多样性诱导的环境设计 Recent work on designing an appropriate distribution of environments has shown promise for training effective generally capable agents. Its success is partly because of a form of adaptive curriculum learning that generates environment instances (or levels) at the frontier of the agent's capabilities. However, such an environment design framework often struggles to find effective levels in challenging design spaces and requires costly interactions with the environment. In this paper, we aim to introduce diversity in the Unsupervised Environment Design (UED) framework. Specifically, we propose a task-agnostic method to identify observed/hidden states that are representative of a given level. The outcome of this method is then utilized to characterize the diversity between two levels, which as we show can be crucial to effective performance. In addition, to improve sampling efficiency, we incorporate the self-play technique that allows the environment generator to automatically generate environments that are of great benefit to the training agent. Quantitatively, our approach, Diversity-induced Environment Design via Self-Play (DivSP), shows compelling performance over existing methods. 最近关于设计适当的环境分布的工作已经显示出训练有效的通用智能体的希望。它的成功部分归功于一种自适应课程学习形式，该学习形式可以在代理能力的前沿生成环境实例（或级别）。然而，这样的环境设计框架通常很难在具有挑战性的设计空间中找到有效的水平，并且需要与环境进行昂贵的交互。在本文中，我们的目标是在无监督环境设计（UED）框架中引入多样性。具体来说，我们提出了一种与任务无关的方法来识别代表给定级别的观察/隐藏状态。然后利用该方法的结果来表征两个级别之间的多样性，正如我们所表明的，这对于有效的性能至关重要。此外，为了提高采样效率，我们采用了自我对弈技术，使环境生成器能够自动生成对训练代理非常有利的环境。从数量上讲，我们的方法“通过自我游戏进行多样性诱导的环境设计”（DivSP）显示出优于现有方法的令人信服的性能。 本文提出通过自博弈引入多样性来设计环境，以提升智能体训练效果。 Dexun Li,Wenjun Li,Pradeep Varakantham cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhenyang Li,Yangyang Guo,Kejie Wang,Fan Liu,Liqiang Nie,Mohan Kankanhalli
title: Learning to Agree on Vision Attention for Visual Commonsense Reasoning
title_zh: 学习同意视觉注意力以进行视觉常识推理
abstract: Visual Commonsense Reasoning (VCR) remains a significant yet challenging research problem in the realm of visual reasoning. A VCR model generally aims at answering a textual question regarding an image, followed by the rationale prediction for the preceding answering process. Though these two processes are sequential and intertwined, existing methods always consider them as two independent matching-based instances. They, therefore, ignore the pivotal relationship between the two processes, leading to sub-optimal model performance. This paper presents a novel visual attention alignment method to efficaciously handle these two processes in a unified framework. To achieve this, we first design a re-attention module for aggregating the vision attention map produced in each process. Thereafter, the resultant two sets of attention maps are carefully aligned to guide the two processes to make decisions based on the same image regions. We apply this method to both conventional attention and the recent Transformer models and carry out extensive experiments on the VCR benchmark dataset. The results demonstrate that with the attention alignment module, our method achieves a considerable improvement over the baseline methods, evidently revealing the feasibility of the coupling of the two processes as well as the effectiveness of the proposed method.

To achieve this, we first design a re-attention module for aggregating the vision attention map produced in each process. Thereafter, the resultant two sets of attention maps are carefully aligned to guide the two processes to make decisions based on the same image regions. We apply this method to both conventional attention and the recent Transformer models and carry out extensive experiments on the VCR benchmark dataset. The results demonstrate that with the attention alignment module, our method achieves a considerable improvement over the baseline methods, evidently revealing the feasibility of the coupling of the two processes as well as the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 视觉常识推理（VCR）仍然是视觉推理领域中一个重要但具有挑战性的研究问题。 VCR 模型通常旨在回答有关图像的文本问题，然后对前面的回答过程进行基本原理预测。尽管这两个过程是连续且交​​织在一起的，但现有方法始终将它们视为两个独立的基于匹配的实例。因此，他们忽略了两个过程之间的关键关系，导致模型性能不佳。本文提出了一种新颖的视觉注意对齐方法，可以在统一的框架中有效地处理这两个过程。为了实现这一目标，我们首先设计一个重新注意模块，用于聚合每个过程中生成的视觉注意图。此后，仔细对齐所得的两组注意力图，以指导两个过程基于相同的图像区域做出决策。我们将该方法应用于传统的注意力模型和最近的 Transformer 模型，并在 VCR 基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，通过注意对齐模块，我们的方法比基线方法取得了相当大的改进，明显揭示了两个过程耦合的可行性以及所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种视觉注意力对齐方法，通过统一框架耦合视觉常识推理中的回答与解释生成过程，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将VCR中的回答与解释生成视为独立过程，忽略两者间的关键关联，导致模型表现次优。
AI.method: 设计重新注意力模块聚合两个过程的视觉注意力图，并通过对齐机制引导两者基于相同图像区域决策，适用于传统注意力与Transformer模型。
AI.result: 在VCR基准数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于基线模型，验证了过程耦合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 耦合回答与解释生成过程并实现注意力对齐，能有效提升视觉常识推理模型的性能。

authors_text: Gousia Habib,Tausifa Jan Saleem,Brejesh Lall
title: Knowledge Distillation in Vision Transformers: A Critical Review
title_zh: 视觉变压器中的知识蒸馏：批判性回顾
abstract: In Natural Language Processing (NLP), Transformers have already revolutionized the field by utilizing an attention-based encoder-decoder model. Recently, some pioneering works have employed Transformer-like architectures in Computer Vision (CV) and they have reported outstanding performance of these architectures in tasks such as image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation. Vision Transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated impressive performance improvements over Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) due to their competitive modelling capabilities. However, these architectures demand massive computational resources which makes these models difficult to be deployed in the resource-constrained applications. Many solutions have been developed to combat this issue, such as compressive transformers and compression functions such as dilated convolution, min-max pooling, 1D convolution, etc. Model compression has recently attracted considerable research attention as a potential remedy. A number of model compression methods have been proposed in the literature such as weight quantization, weight multiplexing, pruning and Knowledge Distillation (KD). However, techniques like weight quantization, pruning and weight multiplexing typically involve complex pipelines for performing the compression. KD has been found to be a simple and much effective model compression technique that allows a relatively simple model to perform tasks almost as accurately as a complex model. This paper discusses various approaches based upon KD for effective compression of ViT models. The paper elucidates the role played by KD in reducing the computational and memory requirements of these models. The paper also presents the various challenges faced by ViTs that are yet to be resolved.

The paper also presents the various challenges faced by ViTs that are yet to be resolved.
abstract_zh: 在自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域，Transformers 已经通过利用基于注意力的编码器-解码器模型彻底改变了该领域。最近，一些开创性的工作在计算机视觉（CV）中采用了类似 Transformer 的架构，并且报告了这些架构在图像分类、对象检测和语义分割等任务中的出色性能。由于其具有竞争力的建模能力，视觉变换器 (ViT) 相对于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 表现出了令人印象深刻的性能改进。然而，这些架构需要大量的计算资源，这使得这些模型难以部署在资源受限的应用程序中。人们已经开发了许多解决方案来解决这个问题，例如压缩变换器和压缩函数，例如扩张卷积、最小-最大池化、一维卷积等。模型压缩作为一种潜在的补救措施最近引起了相当多的研究关注。文献中已经提出了许多模型压缩方法，例如权重量化、权重复用、剪枝和知识蒸馏（KD）。然而，权重量化、修剪和权重复用等技术通常涉及用于执行压缩的复杂管道。人们发现 KD 是一种简单且非常有效的模型压缩技术，它允许相对简单的模型几乎与复杂模型一样准确地执行任务。本文讨论了基于 KD 的 ViT 模型有效压缩的各种方法。该论文阐明了 KD 在减少这些模型的计算和内存需求方面所发挥的作用。该论文还提出了 ViT 面临的各种尚未解决的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了知识蒸馏（KD）在视觉Transformer（ViT）中的应用，分析其在模型压缩中的效果及面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: ViT虽性能优异，但计算资源需求高，难以部署于资源受限场景，需有效压缩方法。KD作为简单高效的压缩技术备受关注。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，系统分析现有KD方法在ViT中的应用，探讨其降低计算和内存需求的机制，并总结技术挑战。
AI.result: 明确了KD在ViT压缩中的关键作用，指出现有方法在效率、泛化能力及可扩展性上的不足，需进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: KD为ViT压缩提供有效途径，但需解决知识迁移质量、计算开销与模型性能平衡等核心问题以推动实际应用。

The paper also presents the various challenges faced by ViTs that are yet to be resolved. 在自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域，Transformers 已经通过利用基于注意力的编码器-解码器模型彻底改变了该领域。最近，一些开创性的工作在计算机视觉（CV）中采用了类似 Transformer 的架构，并且报告了这些架构在图像分类、对象检测和语义分割等任务中的出色性能。由于其具有竞争力的建模能力，视觉变换器 (ViT) 相对于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 表现出了令人印象深刻的性能改进。然而，这些架构需要大量的计算资源，这使得这些模型难以部署在资源受限的应用程序中。人们已经开发了许多解决方案来解决这个问题，例如压缩变换器和压缩函数，例如扩张卷积、最小-最大池化、一维卷积等。模型压缩作为一种潜在的补救措施最近引起了相当多的研究关注。文献中已经提出了许多模型压缩方法，例如权重量化、权重复用、剪枝和知识蒸馏（KD）。然而，权重量化、修剪和权重复用等技术通常涉及用于执行压缩的复杂管道。人们发现 KD 是一种简单且非常有效的模型压缩技术，它允许相对简单的模型几乎与复杂模型一样准确地执行任务。本文讨论了基于 KD 的 ViT 模型有效压缩的各种方法。该论文阐明了 KD 在减少这些模型的计算和内存需求方面所发挥的作用。该论文还提出了 ViT 面临的各种尚未解决的挑战。 本文综述了知识蒸馏（KD）在视觉Transformer（ViT）中的应用，分析其在模型压缩中的效果及面临的挑战。 Gousia Habib,Tausifa Jan Saleem,Brejesh Lall cs.CV

authors_text: Yang Li,Xinyan Chen,Wenxuan Guo,Xijun Li,Wanqian Luo,Junhua Huang,Hui-Ling Zhen,Mingxuan Yuan,Junchi Yan
title: HardSATGEN: Understanding the Difficulty of Hard SAT Formula Generation and A Strong Structure-Hardness-Aware Baseline
title_zh: HardSATGEN：了解 Hard SAT 公式生成的难度和强大的结构硬度感知基线
abstract: Industrial SAT formula generation is a critical yet challenging task. Existing SAT generation approaches can hardly simultaneously capture the global structural properties and maintain plausible computational hardness. We first present an in-depth analysis for the limitation of previous learning methods in reproducing the computational hardness of original instances, which may stem from the inherent homogeneity in their adopted split-merge procedure. On top of the observations that industrial formulae exhibit clear community structure and oversplit substructures lead to the difficulty in semantic formation of logical structures, we propose HardSATGEN, which introduces a fine-grained control mechanism to the neural split-merge paradigm for SAT formula generation to better recover the structural and computational properties of the industrial benchmarks. Experiments including evaluations on private and practical corporate testbed show the superiority of HardSATGEN being the only method to successfully augment formulae maintaining similar computational hardness and capturing the global structural properties simultaneously. Compared to the best previous methods, the average performance gains achieve 38.5% in structural statistics, 88.4% in computational metrics, and over 140.7% in the effectiveness of guiding solver tuning by our generated instances. Source code is available at http://github.com/Thinklab-SJTU/HardSATGEN
summary: Industrial SAT formula generation is a critical yet challenging task. Existing SAT generation approaches can hardly simultaneously capture the global structural properties and maintain plausible computational hardness. We first present an in-depth analysis for the limitation of previous learning methods in reproducing the computational hardness of original instances, which may stem from the inherent homogeneity in their adopted split-merge procedure. On top of the observations that industrial formulae exhibit clear community structure and oversplit substructures lead to the difficulty in semantic formation of logical structures, we propose HardSATGEN, which introduces a fine-grained control mechanism to the neural split-merge paradigm for SAT formula generation to better recover the structural and computational properties of the industrial benchmarks. Experiments including evaluations on private and practical corporate testbed show the superiority of HardSATGEN being the only method to successfully augment formulae maintaining similar computational hardness and capturing the global structural properties simultaneously. Compared to the best previous methods, the average performance gains achieve 38.5% in structural statistics, 88.4% in computational metrics, and over 140.7% in the effectiveness of guiding solver tuning by our generated instances. Source code is available at http://github.com/Thinklab-SJTU/HardSATGEN
abstract_zh: 工业 SAT 公式生成是一项关键但具有挑战性的任务。现有的 SAT 生成方法很难同时捕获全局结构特性并保持合理的计算难度。我们首先对以前的学习方法在再现原始实例的计算难度方面的局限性进行了深入分析，这可能源于其采用的分割合并过程中固有的同质性。基于工业公式表现出清晰的社区结构和过度分裂的子结构导致逻辑结构语义形成困难的观察结果，我们提出了HardSATGEN，它在SAT公式生成的神经分裂合并范式中引入了细粒度的控制机制，以更好地恢复工业基准的结构和计算属性。包括对私人和实际企业测试台的评估在内的实验表明，HardSATGEN 的优越性是成功增强公式并同时保持类似计算难度和捕获全局结构特性的唯一方法。与之前最好的方法相比，结构统计方面的平均性能提高了 38.5%，计算指标方面提高了 88.4%，通过我们生成的实例指导求解器调整的效率提高了 140.7% 以上。源代码位于 http://github.com/Thinklab-SJTU/HardSATGEN

AI.tldr: 本文提出HardSATGEN方法，解决工业级SAT公式生成中同时保持计算难度和结构属性的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有SAT生成方法难以同时捕捉全局结构特性并保持合理计算难度，且分裂-合并过程的同质性限制了性能，工业公式中的社区结构和过度分裂子结构进一步加剧了问题。
AI.method: 设计HardSATGEN，通过引入细粒度控制机制改进神经网络分裂-合并范式，以更精确恢复工业基准的结构与计算特性。
AI.result: HardSATGEN是唯一能同时保持难度与结构的方法，在结构统计、计算指标及引导求解器调优效果上分别提升38.5%、88.4%和140.7%。
AI.conclusion: HardSATGEN验证了结构-硬度关联的重要性，为工业SAT生成提供了有效基线，推动了生成模型与实际计算需求的结合。

authors_text: Emmanuel Aboah Boateng,Bruce J. W
title: Unsupervised Ensemble Methods for Anomaly Detection in PLC-based Process Control
title_zh: 基于 PLC 的过程控制中异常检测的无监督集成方法
abstract: Programmable logic controller (PLC) based industrial control systems (ICS) are used to monitor and control critical infrastructure. Integration of communication networks and an Internet of Things approach in ICS has increased ICS vulnerability to cyber-attacks. This work proposes novel unsupervised machine learning ensemble methods for anomaly detection in PLC-based ICS. The work presents two broad approaches to anomaly detection: a weighted voting ensemble approach with a learning algorithm based on coefficient of determination and a stacking-based ensemble approach using isolation forest meta-detector. The two ensemble methods were analyzed via an open-source PLC-based ICS subjected to multiple attack scenarios as a case study. The work considers four different learning models for the weighted voting ensemble method. Comparative performance analyses of five ensemble methods driven diverse base detectors are presented. Results show that stacking-based ensemble method using isolation forest meta-detector achieves superior performance to previous work on all performance metrics. Results also suggest that effective unsupervised ensemble methods, such as stacking-based ensemble having isolation forest meta-detector, can robustly detect anomalies in arbitrary ICS datasets. Finally, the presented results were validated by using statistical hypothesis tests.
summary: Programmable logic controller (PLC) based industrial control systems (ICS) are used to monitor and control critical infrastructure. Integration of communication networks and an Internet of Things approach in ICS has increased ICS vulnerability to cyber-attacks. This work proposes novel unsupervised machine learning ensemble methods for anomaly detection in PLC-based ICS. The work presents two broad approaches to anomaly detection: a weighted voting ensemble approach with a learning algorithm based on coefficient of determination and a stacking-based ensemble approach using isolation forest meta-detector. The two ensemble methods were analyzed via an open-source PLC-based ICS subjected to multiple attack scenarios as a case study. The work considers four different learning models for the weighted voting ensemble method. Comparative performance analyses of five ensemble methods driven diverse base detectors are presented. Results show that stacking-based ensemble method using isolation forest meta-detector achieves superior performance to previous work on all performance metrics. Results also suggest that effective unsupervised ensemble methods, such as stacking-based ensemble having isolation forest meta-detector, can robustly detect anomalies in arbitrary ICS datasets. Finally, the presented results were validated by using statistical hypothesis tests.
abstract_zh: 基于可编程逻辑控制器 (PLC) 的工业控制系统 (ICS) 用于监视和控制关键基础设施。 ICS 中通信网络和物联网方法的集成增加了 ICS 遭受网络攻击的脆弱性。这项工作提出了一种新颖的无监督机器学习集成方法，用于基于 PLC 的 ICS 中的异常检测。这项工作提出了两种广泛的异常检测方法：具有基于确定系数的学习算法的加权投票集成方法和使用隔离森林元检测器的基于堆叠的集成方法。作为案例研究，通过基于 PLC 的开源 ICS 进行了多种攻击场景的分析，对这两种集成方法进行了分析。这项工作考虑了加权投票集成方法的四种不同的学习模型。提出了驱动不同基础检测器的五种集成方法的性能比较分析。结果表明，使用隔离森林元检测器的基于堆叠的集成方法在所有性能指标上均实现了优于先前工作的性能。结果还表明，有效的无监督集成方法，例如具有隔离森林元检测器的基于堆叠的集成，可以稳健地检测任意 ICS 数据集中的异常。最后，通过统计假设检验验证了所提出的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种无监督集成方法用于PLC-based工业控制系统（ICS）的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 随着ICS与物联网的集成，其面临网络攻击的风险增加，亟需有效且无需标注数据的异常检测方法。
AI.method: 提出加权投票集成方法（基于决定系数）和堆叠集成方法（使用孤立森林元检测器），通过开源ICS案例进行多攻击场景测试，并对比五种集成方法的性能。
AI.result: 堆叠集成方法在所有性能指标上优于现有方法，且能稳健检测任意ICS数据集的异常，结果通过统计假设检验验证。
AI.conclusion: 基于孤立森林元检测器的堆叠集成方法是检测ICS异常的有效无监督方案，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Paula Maddigan,Teo Susnjak
title: Chat2VIS: Generating Data Visualisations via Natural Language using ChatGPT, Codex and GPT-3 Large Language Models
title_zh: Chat2VIS：使用 ChatGPT、Codex 和 GPT-3 大语言模型通过自然语言生成数据可视化
abstract: The field of data visualisation has long aimed to devise solutions for generating visualisations directly from natural language text. Research in Natural Language Interfaces (NLIs) has contributed towards the development of such techniques. However, the implementation of workable NLIs has always been challenging due to the inherent ambiguity of natural language, as well as in consequence of unclear and poorly written user queries which pose problems for existing language models in discerning user intent. Instead of pursuing the usual path of developing new iterations of language models, this study uniquely proposes leveraging the advancements in pre-trained large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT and GPT-3 to convert free-form natural language directly into code for appropriate visualisations. This paper presents a novel system, Chat2VIS, which takes advantage of the capabilities of LLMs and demonstrates how, with effective prompt engineering, the complex problem of language understanding can be solved more efficiently, resulting in simpler and more accurate end-to-end solutions than prior approaches. Chat2VIS shows that LLMs together with the proposed prompts offer a reliable approach to rendering visualisations from natural language queries, even when queries are highly misspecified and underspecified. This solution also presents a significant reduction in costs for the development of NLI systems, while attaining greater visualisation inference abilities compared to traditional NLP approaches that use hand-crafted grammar rules and tailored models. This study also presents how LLM prompts can be constructed in a way that preserves data security and privacy while being generalisable to different datasets. This work compares the performance of GPT-3, Codex and ChatGPT across a number of case studies and contrasts the performances with prior studies.
summary: The field of data visualisation has long aimed to devise solutions for generating visualisations directly from natural language text. Research in Natural Language Interfaces (NLIs) has contributed towards the development of such techniques. However, the implementation of workable NLIs has always been challenging due to the inherent ambiguity of natural language, as well as in consequence of unclear and poorly written user queries which pose problems for existing language models in discerning user intent. Instead of pursuing the usual path of developing new iterations of language models, this study uniquely proposes leveraging the advancements in pre-trained large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT and GPT-3 to convert free-form natural language directly into code for appropriate visualisations. This paper presents a novel system, Chat2VIS, which takes advantage of the capabilities of LLMs and demonstrates how, with effective prompt engineering, the complex problem of language understanding can be solved more efficiently, resulting in simpler and more accurate end-to-end solutions than prior approaches. Chat2VIS shows that LLMs together with the proposed prompts offer a reliable approach to rendering visualisations from natural language queries, even when queries are highly misspecified and underspecified. This solution also presents a significant reduction in costs for the development of NLI systems, while attaining greater visualisation inference abilities compared to traditional NLP approaches that use hand-crafted grammar rules and tailored models. This study also presents how LLM prompts can be constructed in a way that preserves data security and privacy while being generalisable to different datasets. This work compares the performance of GPT-3, Codex and ChatGPT across a number of case studies and contrasts the performances with prior studies.
abstract_zh: 数据可视化领域长期以来的目标是设计直接从自然语言文本生成可视化的解决方案。自然语言接口（NLI）的研究为此类技术的发展做出了贡献。然而，由于自然语言固有的歧义性，以及用户查询不明确且写得不好的结果，可行的 NLI 的实现一直充满挑战，这给现有语言模型识别用户意图带来了问题。这项研究没有遵循开发新的语言模型迭代的通常路径，而是独特地建议利用 ChatGPT 和 GPT-3 等预训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 的进步，将自由形式的自然语言直接转换为适当可视化的代码。本文提出了一种新颖的系统 Chat2VIS，它利用了法学硕士的能力，并演示了如何通过有效的提示工程，更有效地解决语言理解的复杂问题，从而产生比以前的方法更简单、更准确的端到端解决方案。 Chat2VIS 表明，法学硕士与建议的提示一起提供了一种可靠的方法来呈现自然语言查询的可视化，即使查询高度错误指定和未指定。与使用手工语法规则和定制模型的传统 NLP 方法相比，该解决方案还显着降低了 NLI 系统的开发成本，同时获得了更强的可视化推理能力。这项研究还介绍了如何以保护数据安全和隐私的方式构建法学硕士提示，同时可推广到不同的数据集。这项工作通过大量案例研究比较了 GPT-3、Codex 和 ChatGPT 的性能，并将性能与之前的研究进行了对比。

AI.tldr: 提出Chat2VIS系统，利用ChatGPT、Codex和GPT-3等大语言模型，通过自然语言生成数据可视化图表。
AI.motivation: 解决自然语言歧义和用户查询不明确的问题，提供更高效准确的可视化生成方案，并降低传统NLI系统开发成本。
AI.method: 通过提示工程将自然语言转换为可视化代码，构建Chat2VIS系统，并设计通用且安全的提示模板。
AI.result: Chat2VIS在处理模糊查询时表现可靠，显著降低NLI开发成本，且可视化能力优于传统NLP方法。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型结合提示工程可有效生成可视化，具有广泛适用性和安全性，未来需优化模型与提示策略。

authors_text: Tanmoy Chowdhury,Chen Ling,Xuchao Zhang,Xujiang Zhao,Guangji Bai,Jian Pei,Haifeng Chen,Liang Zhao
title: Knowledge-enhanced Neural Machine Reasoning: A Review
title_zh: 知识增强神经机器推理：回顾
abstract: Knowledge-enhanced neural machine reasoning has garnered significant attention as a cutting-edge yet challenging research area with numerous practical applications. Over the past few years, plenty of studies have leveraged various forms of external knowledge to augment the reasoning capabilities of deep models, tackling challenges such as effective knowledge integration, implicit knowledge mining, and problems of tractability and optimization. However, there is a dearth of a comprehensive technical review of the existing knowledge-enhanced reasoning techniques across the diverse range of application domains. This survey provides an in-depth examination of recent advancements in the field, introducing a novel taxonomy that categorizes existing knowledge-enhanced methods into two primary categories and four subcategories. We systematically discuss these methods and highlight their correlations, strengths, and limitations. Finally, we elucidate the current application domains and provide insight into promising prospects for future research.
summary: Knowledge-enhanced neural machine reasoning has garnered significant attention as a cutting-edge yet challenging research area with numerous practical applications. Over the past few years, plenty of studies have leveraged various forms of external knowledge to augment the reasoning capabilities of deep models, tackling challenges such as effective knowledge integration, implicit knowledge mining, and problems of tractability and optimization. However, there is a dearth of a comprehensive technical review of the existing knowledge-enhanced reasoning techniques across the diverse range of application domains. This survey provides an in-depth examination of recent advancements in the field, introducing a novel taxonomy that categorizes existing knowledge-enhanced methods into two primary categories and four subcategories. We systematically discuss these methods and highlight their correlations, strengths, and limitations. Finally, we elucidate the current application domains and provide insight into promising prospects for future research.
abstract_zh: 知识增强神经机器推理作为一个具有众多实际应用的前沿但具有挑战性的研究领域，已经引起了广泛的关注。过去几年，大量研究利用各种形式的外部知识来增强深度模型的推理能力，解决有效知识集成、隐性知识挖掘以及可处理和优化问题等挑战。然而，缺乏对跨不同应用领域的现有知识增强推理技术的全面技术审查。这项调查对该领域的最新进展进行了深入研究，引入了一种新颖的分类法，将现有的知识增强方法分为两个主要类别和四个子类别。我们系统地讨论这些方法并强调它们的相关性、优点和局限性。最后，我们阐明了当前的应用领域，并为未来研究的前景提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文对知识增强的神经机器推理领域进行系统综述，提出新的分类框架并分析现有方法的优缺点及应用前景。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对知识增强推理技术的全面技术回顾，需系统整理不同应用领域的技术进展以推动领域发展。
AI.method: 提出包含两大类四子类的新型分类体系，系统梳理并对比分析各类方法的关联性、优势与局限性。
AI.result: 构建了知识增强推理方法的分类框架，总结了典型应用场景，并指出现阶段研究的不足与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究在知识整合有效性、可解释性及优化效率方面仍存在挑战，未来需加强跨领域技术融合与算法创新。

authors_text: Zecheng Hao,Tong Bu,Jianhao Ding,Tiejun Huang,Zhaofei Yu
title: Reducing ANN-SNN Conversion Error through Residual Membrane Potential
title_zh: 通过残膜电势减少 ANN-SNN 转换误差
comment: Accepted as a AAAI 2023 Oral Paper
comments: Accepted as a AAAI 2023 Oral Paper
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have received extensive academic attention due to the unique properties of low power consumption and high-speed computing on neuromorphic chips. Among various training methods of SNNs, ANN-SNN conversion has shown the equivalent level of performance as ANNs on large-scale datasets. However, unevenness error, which refers to the deviation caused by different temporal sequences of spike arrival on activation layers, has not been effectively resolved and seriously suffers the performance of SNNs under the condition of short time-steps. In this paper, we make a detailed analysis of unevenness error and divide it into four categories. We point out that the case of the ANN output being zero while the SNN output being larger than zero accounts for the largest percentage. Based on this, we theoretically prove the sufficient and necessary conditions of this case and propose an optimization strategy based on residual membrane potential to reduce unevenness error. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet datasets. For example, we reach top-1 accuracy of 64.32\% on ImageNet with 10-steps. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time ANN-SNN conversion can simultaneously achieve high accuracy and ultra-low-latency on the complex dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/hzc1208/ANN2SNN\_SRP.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have received extensive academic attention due to the unique properties of low power consumption and high-speed computing on neuromorphic chips. Among various training methods of SNNs, ANN-SNN conversion has shown the equivalent level of performance as ANNs on large-scale datasets. However, unevenness error, which refers to the deviation caused by different temporal sequences of spike arrival on activation layers, has not been effectively resolved and seriously suffers the performance of SNNs under the condition of short time-steps. In this paper, we make a detailed analysis of unevenness error and divide it into four categories. We point out that the case of the ANN output being zero while the SNN output being larger than zero accounts for the largest percentage. Based on this, we theoretically prove the sufficient and necessary conditions of this case and propose an optimization strategy based on residual membrane potential to reduce unevenness error. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet datasets. For example, we reach top-1 accuracy of 64.32\% on ImageNet with 10-steps. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time ANN-SNN conversion can simultaneously achieve high accuracy and ultra-low-latency on the complex dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/hzc1208/ANN2SNN\_SRP.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）由于神经形态芯片低功耗和高速计算的独特特性而受到了学术界的广泛关注。在 SNN 的各种训练方法中，ANN-SNN 转换在大规模数据集上表现出了与 ANN 相当的性能水平。然而，不均匀误差（即尖峰到达激活层的时间顺序不同而引起的偏差）尚未得到有效解决，严重影响了 SNN 在短时间步长条件下的性能。本文对不均匀误差进行了详细分析，并将其分为四类。我们指出，ANN 输出为零而 SNN 输出大于零的情况所占比例最大。基于此，我们从理论上证明了这种情况的充分必要条件，并提出了一种基于残余膜电位的优化策略来减少不均匀误差。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。例如，我们通过 10 步在 ImageNet 上达到了 64.32% 的 top-1 准确率。据我们所知，这是 ANN-SNN 转换首次能够在复杂数据集上同时实现高精度和超低延迟。代码可在 https://github.com/hzc1208/ANN2SNN\_SRP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过残差膜电位减少人工神经网络（ANN）到脉冲神经网络（SNN）转换中的不均匀误差，以提升SNN性能。
AI.motivation: ANN-SNN转换中存在因脉冲到达时间差异导致的不均匀误差，尤其在短时间步长下严重影响SNN性能，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 作者对不均匀误差进行分类，发现ANN输出为零而SNN输出非零的情况占比最高，并提出基于残差膜电位的优化策略以修正此类误差。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet数据集上达到最优性能，例如在ImageNet上10步时top-1准确率为64.32%，首次实现复杂数据集的高精度与超低延迟兼顾。
AI.conclusion: 残差膜电位方法有效缓解了ANN-SNN转换误差，显著提升了SNN在复杂任务中的表现。

search_text: Reducing ANN-SNN Conversion Error through Residual Membrane Potential 通过残膜电势减少 ANN-SNN 转换误差 Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have received extensive academic attention due to the unique properties of low power consumption and high-speed computing on neuromorphic chips. Among various training methods of SNNs, ANN-SNN conversion has shown the equivalent level of performance as ANNs on large-scale datasets. However, unevenness error, which refers to the deviation caused by different temporal sequences of spike arrival on activation layers, has not been effectively resolved and seriously suffers the performance of SNNs under the condition of short time-steps. In this paper, we make a detailed analysis of unevenness error and divide it into four categories. We point out that the case of the ANN output being zero while the SNN output being larger than zero accounts for the largest percentage. Based on this, we theoretically prove the sufficient and necessary conditions of this case and propose an optimization strategy based on residual membrane potential to reduce unevenness error. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet datasets. For example, we reach top-1 accuracy of 64.32\% on ImageNet with 10-steps. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time ANN-SNN conversion can simultaneously achieve high accuracy and ultra-low-latency on the complex dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/hzc1208/ANN2SNN\_SRP. 尖峰神经网络（SNN）由于神经形态芯片低功耗和高速计算的独特特性而受到了学术界的广泛关注。在 SNN 的各种训练方法中，ANN-SNN 转换在大规模数据集上表现出了与 ANN 相当的性能水平。然而，不均匀误差（即尖峰到达激活层的时间顺序不同而引起的偏差）尚未得到有效解决，严重影响了 SNN 在短时间步长条件下的性能。本文对不均匀误差进行了详细分析，并将其分为四类。我们指出，ANN 输出为零而 SNN 输出大于零的情况所占比例最大。基于此，我们从理论上证明了这种情况的充分必要条件，并提出了一种基于残余膜电位的优化策略来减少不均匀误差。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。例如，我们通过 10 步在 ImageNet 上达到了 64.32% 的 top-1 准确率。据我们所知，这是 ANN-SNN 转换首次能够在复杂数据集上同时实现高精度和超低延迟。代码可在 https://github.com/hzc1208/ANN2SNN\_SRP 获取。 本文提出通过残差膜电位减少人工神经网络（ANN）到脉冲神经网络（SNN）转换中的不均匀误差，以提升SNN性能。 Zecheng Hao,Tong Bu,Jianhao Ding,Tiejun Huang,Zhaofei Yu cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuchong Yao,Nandakishor Desai,Marimuthu Palaniswami
title: MOMA:Distill from Self-Supervised Teachers
title_zh: MOMA：自我监督教师的精华
abstract: Contrastive Learning and Masked Image Modelling have demonstrated exceptional performance on self-supervised representation learning, where Momentum Contrast (i.e., MoCo) and Masked AutoEncoder (i.e., MAE) are the state-of-the-art, respectively. In this work, we propose MOMA to distill from pre-trained MoCo and MAE in a self-supervised manner to collaborate the knowledge from both paradigms. We introduce three different mechanisms of knowledge transfer in the propsoed MOMA framework. : (1) Distill pre-trained MoCo to MAE. (2) Distill pre-trained MAE to MoCo (3) Distill pre-trained MoCo and MAE to a random initialized student. During the distillation, the teacher and the student are fed with original inputs and masked inputs, respectively. The learning is enabled by aligning the normalized representations from the teacher and the projected representations from the student. This simple design leads to efficient computation with extremely high mask ratio and dramatically reduced training epochs, and does not require extra considerations on the distillation target. The experiments show MOMA delivers compact student models with comparable performance to existing state-of-the-art methods, combining the power of both self-supervised learning paradigms. It presents competitive results against different benchmarks in computer vision. We hope our method provides an insight on transferring and adapting the knowledge from large-scale pre-trained models in a computationally efficient way.
summary: Contrastive Learning and Masked Image Modelling have demonstrated exceptional performance on self-supervised representation learning, where Momentum Contrast (i.e., MoCo) and Masked AutoEncoder (i.e., MAE) are the state-of-the-art, respectively. In this work, we propose MOMA to distill from pre-trained MoCo and MAE in a self-supervised manner to collaborate the knowledge from both paradigms. We introduce three different mechanisms of knowledge transfer in the propsoed MOMA framework. : (1) Distill pre-trained MoCo to MAE. (2) Distill pre-trained MAE to MoCo (3) Distill pre-trained MoCo and MAE to a random initialized student. During the distillation, the teacher and the student are fed with original inputs and masked inputs, respectively. The learning is enabled by aligning the normalized representations from the teacher and the projected representations from the student. This simple design leads to efficient computation with extremely high mask ratio and dramatically reduced training epochs, and does not require extra considerations on the distillation target. The experiments show MOMA delivers compact student models with comparable performance to existing state-of-the-art methods, combining the power of both self-supervised learning paradigms. It presents competitive results against different benchmarks in computer vision. We hope our method provides an insight on transferring and adapting the knowledge from large-scale pre-trained models in a computationally efficient way.
abstract_zh: 对比学习和蒙版图像建模在自监督表示学习方面表现出了卓越的性能，其中动量对比（即 MoCo）和蒙版自动编码器（即 MAE）分别是最先进的。在这项工作中，我们建议 MOMA 以自我监督的方式从预先训练的 MoCo 和 MAE 中提取，以协作来自这两个范式的知识。我们在提出的 MOMA 框架中引入了三种不同的知识转移机制。 ：（1）将预训练的MoCo蒸馏为MAE。 (2) 将预训练的 MAE 提取到 MoCo (3) 将预训练的 MoCo 和 MAE 提取到随机初始化的学生。在蒸馏过程中，教师和学生分别接受原始输入和屏蔽输入。通过调整教师的标准化表征和学生的投影表征来实现学习。这种简单的设计可以实现具有极高掩模比的高效计算，并显着减少训练周期，并且不需要额外考虑蒸馏目标。实验表明，MOMA 结合了两种自我监督学习范式的力量，提供了紧凑的学生模型，其性能与现有最先进的方法相当。它针对计算机视觉的不同基准提供了具有竞争力的结果。我们希望我们的方法能够以计算有效的方式提供关于从大规模预训练模型中转移和调整知识的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOMA框架，通过自监督方式从MoCo和MAE预训练模型中蒸馏知识，结合对比学习与掩码图像建模的优势。
AI.motivation: 对比学习（MoCo）和掩码图像建模（MAE）分别在自监督表征学习中表现优异，但缺乏两者的协同整合。本文旨在通过知识蒸馏高效融合两种范式的优势。
AI.method: 设计三种知识迁移机制：(1) 将MoCo蒸馏到MAE；(2) 将MAE蒸馏到MoCo；(3) 联合蒸馏MoCo和MAE到随机初始化的学生模型。教师模型与学生模型分别输入原始图像和掩码图像，通过对齐归一化表示实现学习。
AI.result: MOMA在保持高性能的同时显著减少训练周期和计算资源，学生模型在多个视觉基准测试中达到与现有SOTA方法相当的效果。
AI.conclusion: MOMA为大规模预训练模型的知识迁移提供了高效且通用的解决方案，验证了对比学习与掩码建模范式结合的潜力。

authors_text: Susan Liang,Chao Huang,Yapeng Tian,Anurag Kumar,Chenliang Xu
title: AV-NeRF: Learning Neural Fields for Real-World Audio-Visual Scene Synthesis
title_zh: AV-NeRF：学习神经场以进行真实世界的视听场景合成
abstract: Can machines recording an audio-visual scene produce realistic, matching audio-visual experiences at novel positions and novel view directions? We answer it by studying a new task -- real-world audio-visual scene synthesis -- and a first-of-its-kind NeRF-based approach for multimodal learning. Concretely, given a video recording of an audio-visual scene, the task is to synthesize new videos with spatial audios along arbitrary novel camera trajectories in that scene. We propose an acoustic-aware audio generation module that integrates prior knowledge of audio propagation into NeRF, in which we implicitly associate audio generation with the 3D geometry and material properties of a visual environment. Furthermore, we present a coordinate transformation module that expresses a view direction relative to the sound source, enabling the model to learn sound source-centric acoustic fields. To facilitate the study of this new task, we collect a high-quality Real-World Audio-Visual Scene (RWAVS) dataset. We demonstrate the advantages of our method on this real-world dataset and the simulation-based SoundSpaces dataset.
summary: Can machines recording an audio-visual scene produce realistic, matching audio-visual experiences at novel positions and novel view directions? We answer it by studying a new task -- real-world audio-visual scene synthesis -- and a first-of-its-kind NeRF-based approach for multimodal learning. Concretely, given a video recording of an audio-visual scene, the task is to synthesize new videos with spatial audios along arbitrary novel camera trajectories in that scene. We propose an acoustic-aware audio generation module that integrates prior knowledge of audio propagation into NeRF, in which we implicitly associate audio generation with the 3D geometry and material properties of a visual environment. Furthermore, we present a coordinate transformation module that expresses a view direction relative to the sound source, enabling the model to learn sound source-centric acoustic fields. To facilitate the study of this new task, we collect a high-quality Real-World Audio-Visual Scene (RWAVS) dataset. We demonstrate the advantages of our method on this real-world dataset and the simulation-based SoundSpaces dataset.
abstract_zh: 记录视听场景的机器能否在新颖的位置和新颖的视角方向上产生逼真、匹配的视听体验？我们通过研究一项新任务——现实世界的视听场景合成——以及首个基于 NeRF 的多模态学习方法来回答这个问题。具体来说，给定视听场景的视频记录，任务是沿着该场景中任意新颖的摄像机轨迹合成新视频和空间音频。我们提出了一种声学感知音频生成模块，它将音频传播的先验知识集成到 NeRF 中，其中我们隐式地将音频生成与视觉环境的 3D 几何和材料属性相关联。此外，我们提出了一个坐标变换模块，它表示相对于声源的视图方向，使模型能够学习以声源为中心的声场。为了促进这项新任务的研究，我们收集了高质量的真实世界视听场景（RWAVS）数据集。我们在这个真实世界的数据集和基于模拟的 SoundSpaces 数据集上展示了我们的方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AV-NeRF方法，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）实现真实世界音频-视觉场景的合成，能够在任意新视角和相机轨迹下生成匹配的视听内容。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在真实场景中同步生成符合物理规律的音频与视觉内容，且缺乏对声学传播特性的建模，导致合成效果不真实。
AI.method: 设计声学感知音频生成模块，将音频传播知识融入NeRF，结合场景三维几何与材质属性；提出坐标变换模块，以声源为中心学习声学场；构建真实世界音频-视觉数据集RWAVS进行验证。
AI.result: 在RWAVS和SoundSpaces数据集上，AV-NeRF在音频-视觉一致性、空间声场准确性及视觉逼真度方面均优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: AV-NeRF通过融合声学物理特性与神经场建模，实现了真实场景下视听内容的高质量合成，为多模态场景理解与生成提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出AV-NeRF方法，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）实现真实世界音频-视觉场景的合成，能够在任意新视角和相机轨迹下生成匹配的视听内容。

search_text: AV-NeRF: Learning Neural Fields for Real-World Audio-Visual Scene Synthesis AV-NeRF：学习神经场以进行真实世界的视听场景合成 Can machines recording an audio-visual scene produce realistic, matching audio-visual experiences at novel positions and novel view directions? We answer it by studying a new task -- real-world audio-visual scene synthesis -- and a first-of-its-kind NeRF-based approach for multimodal learning. Concretely, given a video recording of an audio-visual scene, the task is to synthesize new videos with spatial audios along arbitrary novel camera trajectories in that scene. We propose an acoustic-aware audio generation module that integrates prior knowledge of audio propagation into NeRF, in which we implicitly associate audio generation with the 3D geometry and material properties of a visual environment. Furthermore, we present a coordinate transformation module that expresses a view direction relative to the sound source, enabling the model to learn sound source-centric acoustic fields. To facilitate the study of this new task, we collect a high-quality Real-World Audio-Visual Scene (RWAVS) dataset. We demonstrate the advantages of our method on this real-world dataset and the simulation-based SoundSpaces dataset. 记录视听场景的机器能否在新颖的位置和新颖的视角方向上产生逼真、匹配的视听体验？我们通过研究一项新任务——现实世界的视听场景合成——以及首个基于 NeRF 的多模态学习方法来回答这个问题。具体来说，给定视听场景的视频记录，任务是沿着该场景中任意新颖的摄像机轨迹合成新视频和空间音频。我们提出了一种声学感知音频生成模块，它将音频传播的先验知识集成到 NeRF 中，其中我们隐式地将音频生成与视觉环境的 3D 几何和材料属性相关联。此外，我们提出了一个坐标变换模块，它表示相对于声源的视图方向，使模型能够学习以声源为中心的声场。为了促进这项新任务的研究，我们收集了高质量的真实世界视听场景（RWAVS）数据集。我们在这个真实世界的数据集和基于模拟的 SoundSpaces 数据集上展示了我们的方法的优势。 本文提出AV-NeRF方法，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）实现真实世界音频-视觉场景的合成，能够在任意新视角和相机轨迹下生成匹配的视听内容。 Susan Liang,Chao Huang,Yapeng Tian,Anurag Kumar,Chenliang Xu cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Michal Kosinski
title: Evaluating Large Language Models in Theory of Mind Tasks
title_zh: 评估心理理论任务中的大型语言模型
comment: TRY RUNNING ToM EXPERIMENTS ON YOUR OWN: The code and tasks used in this study are available at Colab (https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1ZRtmw87CdA4xp24DNS_Ik_uA2ypaRnoU). Don't worry if you are not an expert coder, you should be able to run this code with no-to-minimum Python skills. Or copy-paste the tasks to ChatGPT's web interface. abstract: Eleven Large Language Models (LLMs) were assessed using a custom-made battery of false-belief tasks, considered a gold standard in testing Theory of Mind (ToM) in humans. The battery included 640 prompts spread across 40 diverse tasks, each one including a false-belief scenario, three closely matched true-belief control scenarios, and the reversed versions of all four. To solve a single task, a model needed to correctly answer 16 prompts across all eight scenarios. Smaller and older models solved no tasks; GPT-3-davinci-003 (from November 2022) and ChatGPT-3.5-turbo (from March 2023) solved 20% of the tasks; ChatGPT-4 (from June 2023) solved 75% of the tasks, matching the performance of six-year-old children observed in past studies. We explore the potential interpretation of these findings, including the intriguing possibility that ToM, previously considered exclusive to humans, may have spontaneously emerged as a byproduct of LLMs' improving language skills.
summary: Eleven Large Language Models (LLMs) were assessed using a custom-made battery of false-belief tasks, considered a gold standard in testing Theory of Mind (ToM) in humans. The battery included 640 prompts spread across 40 diverse tasks, each one including a false-belief scenario, three closely matched true-belief control scenarios, and the reversed versions of all four. To solve a single task, a model needed to correctly answer 16 prompts across all eight scenarios. Smaller and older models solved no tasks; GPT-3-davinci-003 (from November 2022) and ChatGPT-3.5-turbo (from March 2023) solved 20% of the tasks; ChatGPT-4 (from June 2023) solved 75% of the tasks, matching the performance of six-year-old children observed in past studies. We explore the potential interpretation of these findings, including the intriguing possibility that ToM, previously considered exclusive to humans, may have spontaneously emerged as a byproduct of LLMs' improving language skills.
abstract_zh: 使用一组定制的错误信念任务对 11 个大型语言模型 (LLM) 进行了评估，这被认为是测试人类心智理论 (ToM) 的黄金标准。该电池包括 640 个提示，分布在 40 个不同的任务中，每个提示都包含一个错误信念场景、三个紧密匹配的真实信念控制场景以及所有四个场景的相反版本。为了解决单个任务，模型需要在所有 8 个场景中正确回答 16 个提示。 Smaller and older models solved no tasks; GPT-3-davinci-003（自2022年11月起）和ChatGPT-3.5-turbo（自2023年3月起）解决了20%的任务； ChatGPT-4（自 2023 年 6 月起）解决了 75% 的任务，与过去研究中观察到的六岁儿童的表现相匹配。我们探讨了这些发现的潜在解释，包括一种有趣的可能性，即以前被认为是人类独有的 ToM，可能是法学硕士提高语言技能的副产品而自发出现的。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了11种大语言模型在心智理论（ToM）任务中的表现，通过设计包含错误信念场景的测试电池。
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型是否具备心智理论能力，即理解他人信念与现实差异的能力，这是人类特有的认知能力。
AI.method: 使用自定义的错误信念任务测试电池，包含640个提示分布在40个任务中，每个任务包含错误信念场景、三个真实信念对照场景及逆向版本，模型需正确回答16个提示才能完成任务。
AI.result: 小型和旧版模型无一通过，GPT-3-davinci-003和ChatGPT-3.5-turbo完成20%任务，ChatGPT-4完成75%，与六岁儿童表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 心智理论能力可能作为语言模型语言技能提升的副产品自发出现，挑战了其专属于人类的传统观点。

authors_text: Chenghong Sun,Weidong Ji,Guohui Zhou,Hui Guo,Zengxiang Yin,Yuqi Yue
title: FGSI: Distant Supervision for Relation Extraction method based on Fine-Grained Semantic Information
title_zh: FGSI：基于细粒度语义信息的远程监督关系抽取方法
abstract: The main purpose of relation extraction is to extract the semantic relationships between tagged pairs of entities in a sentence, which plays an important role in the semantic understanding of sentences and the construction of knowledge graphs. In this paper, we propose that the key semantic information within a sentence plays a key role in the relationship extraction of entities. We propose the hypothesis that the key semantic information inside the sentence plays a key role in entity relationship extraction. And based on this hypothesis, we split the sentence into three segments according to the location of the entity from the inside of the sentence, and find the fine-grained semantic features inside the sentence through the intra-sentence attention mechanism to reduce the interference of irrelevant noise information. The proposed relational extraction model can make full use of the available positive semantic information. The experimental results show that the proposed relation extraction model improves the accuracy-recall curves and P@N values compared with existing methods, which proves the effectiveness of this model.
summary: The main purpose of relation extraction is to extract the semantic relationships between tagged pairs of entities in a sentence, which plays an important role in the semantic understanding of sentences and the construction of knowledge graphs. In this paper, we propose that the key semantic information within a sentence plays a key role in the relationship extraction of entities. We propose the hypothesis that the key semantic information inside the sentence plays a key role in entity relationship extraction. And based on this hypothesis, we split the sentence into three segments according to the location of the entity from the inside of the sentence, and find the fine-grained semantic features inside the sentence through the intra-sentence attention mechanism to reduce the interference of irrelevant noise information. The proposed relational extraction model can make full use of the available positive semantic information. The experimental results show that the proposed relation extraction model improves the accuracy-recall curves and P@N values compared with existing methods, which proves the effectiveness of this model.
abstract_zh: 关系抽取的主要目的是提取句子中带标签的实体对之间的语义关系，这对于句子的语义理解和知识图谱的构建具有重要作用。在本文中，我们提出句子中的关键语义信息在实体的关系提取中起着关键作用。我们提出假设，句子内的关键语义信息在实体关系提取中起着关键作用。并且基于这个假设，我们根据实体从句子内部的位置将句子分成三段，并通过句内注意力机制找到句子内部的细粒度语义特征，以减少不相关噪声信息的干扰。所提出的关系提取模型可以充分利用可用的积极语义信息。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的关系提取模型提高了准确率-召回率曲线和P@N值，证明了该模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于细粒度语义信息的关系抽取方法，通过关键语义信息提升实体关系抽取效果。
AI.motivation: 现有关系抽取方法未能充分利用句子中的关键语义信息，导致噪声干扰，需改进方法提升准确性。
AI.method: 通过将句子按实体位置分割为三段，结合句内注意力机制提取细粒度语义特征，减少噪声干扰。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在准确率-召回率曲线和P@N值上优于现有方法，验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 证明基于细粒度语义信息的关系抽取方法有效，关键语义信息对提升关系抽取性能具有重要作用。

And based on this hypothesis, we split the sentence into three segments according to the location of the entity from the inside of the sentence, and find the fine-grained semantic features inside the sentence through the intra-sentence attention mechanism to reduce the interference of irrelevant noise information. The proposed relational extraction model can make full use of the available positive semantic information. The experimental results show that the proposed relation extraction model improves the accuracy-recall curves and P@N values compared with existing methods, which proves the effectiveness of this model. 关系抽取的主要目的是提取句子中带标签的实体对之间的语义关系，这对于句子的语义理解和知识图谱的构建具有重要作用。在本文中，我们提出句子中的关键语义信息在实体的关系提取中起着关键作用。我们提出假设，句子内的关键语义信息在实体关系提取中起着关键作用。并且基于这个假设，我们根据实体从句子内部的位置将句子分成三段，并通过句内注意力机制找到句子内部的细粒度语义特征，以减少不相关噪声信息的干扰。所提出的关系提取模型可以充分利用可用的积极语义信息。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的关系提取模型提高了准确率-召回率曲线和P@N值，证明了该模型的有效性。 提出一种基于细粒度语义信息的关系抽取方法，通过关键语义信息提升实体关系抽取效果。 Chenghong Sun,Weidong Ji,Guohui Zhou,Hui Guo,Zengxiang Yin,Yuqi Yue cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Leqi Shen,Tao He,Yuchen Guo,Guiguang Ding
title: X-ReID: Cross-Instance Transformer for Identity-Level Person Re-Identification
title_zh: X-ReID：用于身份级人员重新识别的跨实例转换器
abstract: Currently, most existing person re-identification methods use Instance-Level features, which are extracted only from a single image. However, these Instance-Level features can easily ignore the discriminative information due to the appearance of each identity varies greatly in different images. Thus, it is necessary to exploit Identity-Level features, which can be shared across different images of each identity. In this paper, we propose to promote Instance-Level features to Identity-Level features by employing cross-attention to incorporate information from one image to another of the same identity, thus more unified and discriminative pedestrian information can be obtained. We propose a novel training framework named X-ReID. Specifically, a Cross Intra-Identity Instances module (IntraX) fuses different intra-identity instances to transfer Identity-Level knowledge and make Instance-Level features more compact. A Cross Inter-Identity Instances module (InterX) involves hard positive and hard negative instances to improve the attention response to the same identity instead of different identity, which minimizes intra-identity variation and maximizes inter-identity variation. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show the superiority of our method over existing works. Particularly, on the challenging MSMT17, our proposed method gains 1.1% mAP improvements when compared to the second place.
summary: Currently, most existing person re-identification methods use Instance-Level features, which are extracted only from a single image. However, these Instance-Level features can easily ignore the discriminative information due to the appearance of each identity varies greatly in different images. Thus, it is necessary to exploit Identity-Level features, which can be shared across different images of each identity. In this paper, we propose to promote Instance-Level features to Identity-Level features by employing cross-attention to incorporate information from one image to another of the same identity, thus more unified and discriminative pedestrian information can be obtained. We propose a novel training framework named X-ReID. Specifically, a Cross Intra-Identity Instances module (IntraX) fuses different intra-identity instances to transfer Identity-Level knowledge and make Instance-Level features more compact. A Cross Inter-Identity Instances module (InterX) involves hard positive and hard negative instances to improve the attention response to the same identity instead of different identity, which minimizes intra-identity variation and maximizes inter-identity variation. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show the superiority of our method over existing works. Particularly, on the challenging MSMT17, our proposed method gains 1.1% mAP improvements when compared to the second place.
abstract_zh: 目前，大多数现有的行人重新识别方法都使用实例级特征，这些特征仅从单个图像中提取。然而，由于每个身份在不同图像中的外观差异很大，这些实例级特征很容易忽略判别信息。因此，有必要利用身份级别的特征，这些特征可以在每个身份的不同图像之间共享。在本文中，我们建议通过采用交叉注意力将信息从一张图像合并到另一张相同身份的图像中，将实例级特征提升为身份级特征，从而获得更加统一和有区别的行人信息。我们提出了一种名为 X-ReID 的新型训练框架。具体来说，跨身份内部实例模块（IntraX）融合了不同的内部身份实例，以传输身份级知识并使实例级特征更加紧凑。跨身份实例模块（InterX）涉及硬正实例和硬负实例，以提高对相同身份而不是不同身份的注意力响应，从而最小化身份内变化并最大化身份间变化。对基准数据集的广泛实验表明我们的方法相对于现有工作的优越性。特别是，在具有挑战性的 MSMT17 上，与第二名相比，我们提出的方法获得了 1.1% 的 mAP 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-ReID方法，通过跨实例Transformer提升行人重识别的Identity-Level特征学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖单图Instance-Level特征易忽略身份间的差异性，而Identity-Level特征能跨图像共享且更具判别性。
AI.method: 设计X-ReID框架，包含IntraX模块融合同身份实例生成身份知识，以及InterX模块利用难例增强同身份注意力以最大化身份差异。
AI.result: 在MSMT17等基准数据集上优于现有方法，其中MSMT17的mAP提升1.1%。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨实例特征交互增强身份表征，X-ReID在行人重识别任务中取得显著性能提升。

authors_text: Zongyuan Yang,Yongping Xiong,Guibin Wu
title: GDB: Gated convolutions-based Document Binarization
title_zh: GDB：基于门控卷积的文档二值化
abstract: Document binarization is a key pre-processing step for many document analysis tasks. However, existing methods can not extract stroke edges finely, mainly due to the fair-treatment nature of vanilla convolutions and the extraction of stroke edges without adequate supervision by boundary-related information. In this paper, we formulate text extraction as the learning of gating values and propose an end-to-end gated convolutions-based network (GDB) to solve the problem of imprecise stroke edge extraction. The gated convolutions are applied to selectively extract the features of strokes with different attention. Our proposed framework consists of two stages. Firstly, a coarse sub-network with an extra edge branch is trained to get more precise feature maps by feeding a priori mask and edge. Secondly, a refinement sub-network is cascaded to refine the output of the first stage by gated convolutions based on the sharp edge. For global information, GDB also contains a multi-scale operation to combine local and global features. We conduct comprehensive experiments on ten Document Image Binarization Contest (DIBCO) datasets from 2009 to 2019. Experimental results show that our proposed methods outperform the state-of-the-art methods in terms of all metrics on average and achieve top ranking on six benchmark datasets.
summary: Document binarization is a key pre-processing step for many document analysis tasks. However, existing methods can not extract stroke edges finely, mainly due to the fair-treatment nature of vanilla convolutions and the extraction of stroke edges without adequate supervision by boundary-related information. In this paper, we formulate text extraction as the learning of gating values and propose an end-to-end gated convolutions-based network (GDB) to solve the problem of imprecise stroke edge extraction. The gated convolutions are applied to selectively extract the features of strokes with different attention. Our proposed framework consists of two stages. Firstly, a coarse sub-network with an extra edge branch is trained to get more precise feature maps by feeding a priori mask and edge. Secondly, a refinement sub-network is cascaded to refine the output of the first stage by gated convolutions based on the sharp edge. For global information, GDB also contains a multi-scale operation to combine local and global features. We conduct comprehensive experiments on ten Document Image Binarization Contest (DIBCO) datasets from 2009 to 2019. Experimental results show that our proposed methods outperform the state-of-the-art methods in terms of all metrics on average and achieve top ranking on six benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 文档二值化是许多文档分析任务的关键预处理步骤。然而，现有方法无法精细地提取笔划边缘，这主要是由于普通卷积的公平处理性质以及在没有边界相关信息充分监督的情况下提取笔划边缘。在本文中，我们将文本提取表述为门值的学习，并提出一种基于端到端门控卷积的网络（GDB）来解决笔画边缘提取不精确的问题。应用门控卷积来选择性地提取具有不同关注度的笔画特征。我们提出的框架由两个阶段组成。首先，训练具有额外边缘分支的粗子网络，以通过输入先验掩模和边缘来获得更精确的特征图。其次，级联细化子网络，通过基于锐边的门控卷积来细化第一阶段的输出。对于全局信息，GDB还包含结合局部和全局特征的多尺度操作。我们对 2009 年至 2019 年的 10 个文档图像二值化竞赛（DIBCO）数据集进行了全面的实验。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在所有指标方面平均优于最先进的方法，并在六个基准数据集上取得了最高排名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于门控卷积的文档二值化方法（GDB），以解决现有方法在精确提取笔画边缘方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有文档二值化方法因普通卷积的公平性特性及缺乏边界信息监督，难以精细提取笔画边缘。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：第一阶段通过带边缘分支的粗略子网络结合先验掩码提升特征图精度；第二阶段利用门控卷积的精炼子网络基于锐利边缘优化结果，并引入多尺度操作融合局部与全局特征。
AI.result: 在2009-2019年DIBCO数据集上全面实验表明，GDB在所有指标上均优于现有方法，并在六个基准数据集上排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 门控卷积有效提升了笔画边缘提取精度，所提方法在文档二值化任务中具有显著优势。

The gated convolutions are applied to selectively extract the features of strokes with different attention. Our proposed framework consists of two stages. Firstly, a coarse sub-network with an extra edge branch is trained to get more precise feature maps by feeding a priori mask and edge. Secondly, a refinement sub-network is cascaded to refine the output of the first stage by gated convolutions based on the sharp edge. For global information, GDB also contains a multi-scale operation to combine local and global features. authors_text: Bohan Li,Xiao Xu,Xinghao Wang,Yutai Hou,Yunlong Feng,Feng Wang,Xuanliang Zhang,Qingfu Zhu,Wanxiang Che
title: Semantic-Guided Generative Image Augmentation Method with Diffusion Models for Image Classification
title_zh: 用于图像分类的具有扩散模型的语义引导生成图像增强方法
abstract: Existing image augmentation methods consist of two categories: perturbation-based methods and generative methods. Perturbation-based methods apply pre-defined perturbations to augment an original image, but only locally vary the image, thus lacking image diversity. In contrast, generative methods bring more image diversity in the augmented images but may not preserve semantic consistency, thus incorrectly changing the essential semantics of the original image. To balance image diversity and semantic consistency in augmented images, we propose SGID, a Semantic-guided Generative Image augmentation method with Diffusion models for image classification. Specifically, SGID employs diffusion models to generate augmented images with good image diversity. More importantly, SGID takes image labels and captions as guidance to maintain semantic consistency between the augmented and original images. Experimental results show that SGID outperforms the best augmentation baseline by 1.72% on ResNet-50 (from scratch), 0.33% on ViT (ImageNet-21k), and 0.14% on CLIP-ViT (LAION-2B). Moreover, SGID can be combined with other image augmentation baselines and further improves the overall performance. We demonstrate the semantic consistency and image diversity of SGID through quantitative human and automated evaluations, as well as qualitative case studies.
summary: Existing image augmentation methods consist of two categories: perturbation-based methods and generative methods. Perturbation-based methods apply pre-defined perturbations to augment an original image, but only locally vary the image, thus lacking image diversity. In contrast, generative methods bring more image diversity in the augmented images but may not preserve semantic consistency, thus incorrectly changing the essential semantics of the original image. To balance image diversity and semantic consistency in augmented images, we propose SGID, a Semantic-guided Generative Image augmentation method with Diffusion models for image classification. Specifically, SGID employs diffusion models to generate augmented images with good image diversity. More importantly, SGID takes image labels and captions as guidance to maintain semantic consistency between the augmented and original images. Experimental results show that SGID outperforms the best augmentation baseline by 1.72% on ResNet-50 (from scratch), 0.33% on ViT (ImageNet-21k), and 0.14% on CLIP-ViT (LAION-2B). Moreover, SGID can be combined with other image augmentation baselines and further improves the overall performance. We demonstrate the semantic consistency and image diversity of SGID through quantitative human and automated evaluations, as well as qualitative case studies.
abstract_zh: 现有的图像增强方法包括两类：基于扰动的方法和生成方法。基于扰动的方法应用预定义的扰动来增强原始图像，但仅局部改变图像，因此缺乏图像多样性。相比之下，生成方法在增强图像中带来了更多的图像多样性，但可能无法保持语义一致性，从而错误地改变了原始图像的基本语义。为了平衡增强图像中的图像多样性和语义一致性，我们提出了 SGID，一种语义引导的生成图像增强方法，具有用于图像分类的扩散模型。具体来说，SGID 采用扩散模型来生成具有良好图像多样性的增强图像。更重要的是，SGID 以图像标签和标题作为指导，以保持增强图像和原始图像之间的语义一致性。实验结果表明，SGID 在 ResNet-50（从头开始）上优于最佳增强基线 1.72%，在 ViT (ImageNet-21k) 上优于最佳增强基线 0.33%，在 CLIP-ViT (LAION-2B) 上优于最佳增强基线 0.14%。此外，SGID可以与其他图像增强基线相结合，进一步提高整体性能。我们通过定量的人工和自动评估以及定性案例研究来证明 SGID 的语义一致性和图像多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的语义引导生成图像增强方法SGID，旨在提升图像分类任务中增强图像的多样性与语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统图像增强方法存在局部扰动不足或语义不一致的问题，需平衡图像多样性与语义保真度以提升分类性能。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型生成多样化图像，并通过图像标签和标题作为引导，确保增强图像与原图语义一致。
AI.result: SGID在ResNet-50、ViT和CLIP-ViT上分别优于最佳基线1.72%、0.33%和0.14%，且可与其他增强方法结合提升整体性能。
AI.conclusion: SGID通过语义引导有效兼顾图像多样性与语义一致性，实验验证其在多个模型上的优越性及兼容性。
