motivation: 现有基于深度学习的自动程序修复技术生成的补丁中存在大量语法或语义错误，因未有效遵循编程领域知识导致修复效果不佳。
method: 设计包含三阶段树解码器的模型直接生成抽象语法树，并通过领域规则蒸馏技术将语法规则和语义约束注入解码过程。
result: 在Defects4J v1.2、QuixBugs和Defects4J v2.0三个基准测试中分别修复72、25和50个缺陷，优于所有现有修复工具。
conclusion: KNOD通过结构化树解码与领域知识蒸馏的结合，显著提升了自动程序修复的准确性和可行性。
search_text: KNOD: Domain Knowledge Distilled Tree Decoder for Automated Program Repair KNOD：用于自动程序修复的领域知识蒸馏树解码器 Automated Program Repair (APR) improves software reliability by generating patches for a buggy program automatically. Recent APR techniques leverage deep learning (DL) to build models to learn to generate patches from existing patches and code corpora. While promising, DL-based APR techniques suffer from the abundant syntactically or semantically incorrect patches in the patch space. These patches often disobey the syntactic and semantic domain knowledge of source code and thus cannot be the correct patches to fix a bug. We propose a DL-based APR approach KNOD, which incorporates domain knowledge to guide patch generation in a direct and comprehensive way. KNOD has two major novelties, including (1) a novel three-stage tree decoder, which directly generates Abstract Syntax Trees of patched code according to the inherent tree structure, and (2) a novel domain-rule distillation, which leverages syntactic and semantic rules and teacher-student distributions to explicitly inject the domain knowledge into the decoding procedure during both the training and inference phases. We evaluate KNOD on three widely-used benchmarks. KNOD fixes 72 bugs on the Defects4J v1.2, 25 bugs on the QuixBugs, and 50 bugs on the additional Defects4J v2.0 benchmarks, outperforming all existing APR tools. 自动程序修复 (APR) 通过自动为有错误的程序生成补丁来提高软件可靠性。最近的 APR 技术利用深度学习 (DL) 来构建模型，以学习从现有补丁和代码语料库生成补丁。虽然基于深度学习的 APR 技术很有前景，但其在补丁空间中存在大量语法或语义上不正确的补丁。这些补丁通常不遵守源代码的语法和语义领域知识，因此不能成为修复错误的正确补丁。我们提出了一种基于深度学习的 APR 方法 KNOD，它结合了领域知识以直接、全面的方式指导补丁生成。 KNOD 有两大新颖之处，包括（1）新颖的三阶段树解码器，它根据固有的树结构直接生成修补代码的抽象语法树；（2）新颖的领域规则蒸馏，它利用句法和语义规则以及师生分布，在训练和推理阶段将领域知识显式地注入到解码过程中。我们根据三个广泛使用的基准来评估 KNOD。 KNOD 修复了 Defects4J v1.2 上的 72 个错误、QuixBugs 上的 25 个错误以及其他 Defects4J v2.0 基准测试上的 50 个错误，其性能优于所有现有 APR 工具。 本文提出KNOD方法，通过融合领域知识提升自动程序修复的准确性。 Nan Jiang,Thibaud Lutellier,Yiling Lou,Lin Tan,Dan Goldwasser,Xiangyu Zhang cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Nikolos Gurney,David V. Pynadath,Ning Wang
title: Comparing Psychometric and Behavioral Predictors of Compliance During Human-AI Interactions
title_zh: 比较人机交互过程中依从性的心理测量和行为预测因素
abstract: Optimization of human-AI teams hinges on the AI's ability to tailor its interaction to individual human teammates. A common hypothesis in adaptive AI research is that minor differences in people's predisposition to trust can significantly impact their likelihood of complying with recommendations from the AI. Predisposition to trust is often measured with self-report inventories that are administered before interactions. We benchmark a popular measure of this kind against behavioral predictors of compliance. We find that the inventory is a less effective predictor of compliance than the behavioral measures in datasets taken from three previous research projects. This suggests a general property that individual differences in initial behavior are more predictive than differences in self-reported trust attitudes. This result also shows a potential for easily accessible behavioral measures to provide an AI with more accurate models without the use of (often costly) survey instruments.
summary: Optimization of human-AI teams hinges on the AI's ability to tailor its interaction to individual human teammates. A common hypothesis in adaptive AI research is that minor differences in people's predisposition to trust can significantly impact their likelihood of complying with recommendations from the AI. Predisposition to trust is often measured with self-report inventories that are administered before interactions. We benchmark a popular measure of this kind against behavioral predictors of compliance. We find that the inventory is a less effective predictor of compliance than the behavioral measures in datasets taken from three previous research projects. This suggests a general property that individual differences in initial behavior are more predictive than differences in self-reported trust attitudes. This result also shows a potential for easily accessible behavioral measures to provide an AI with more accurate models without the use of (often costly) survey instruments.
abstract_zh: 人类人工智能团队的优化取决于人工智能根据人类队友个体定制交互的能力。自适应人工智能研究中的一个常见假设是，人们信任倾向的微小差异可能会显着影响他们遵守人工智能建议的可能性。信任倾向通常是通过在互动之前进行的自我报告清单来衡量的。我们将这种流行的衡量标准与合规性的行为预测指标进行比较。我们发现，与之前三个研究项目的数据集中的行为测量相比，清单对于合规性的预测效果较差。这表明了一个普遍特性，即初始行为的个体差异比自我报告的信任态度的差异更具预测性。这一结果还显示了易于获取的行为测量的潜力，可以为人工智能提供更准确的模型，而无需使用（通常昂贵的）调查工具。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了心理测量指标（自我报告信任倾向）与行为预测指标在预测人类对AI建议依从性方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 优化人机协作需AI适应个体差异，但传统依赖自我报告的信任量表可能存在预测偏差，需验证行为指标的实用性。
AI.method: 通过三个数据集对比分析自我报告信任量表与行为指标对依从性的预测能力，评估其准确性差异。
AI.result: 行为指标显著优于自我报告量表，证明个体初始行为差异比自我报告的信任态度更能预测依从性。
AI.conclusion: 行为指标可为AI提供低成本高精度的个体建模方案，无需依赖传统调查工具，凸显行为数据在人机交互研究中的价值。

authors_text: Naser Damer,Meiling Fang,Patrick Siebke,Jan Niklas Kolf,Marco Huber,Fadi Boutros
title: MorDIFF: Recognition Vulnerability and Attack Detectability of Face Morphing Attacks Created by Diffusion Autoencoders
title_zh: MorDIFF：扩散自动编码器创建的面部变形攻击的识别漏洞和攻击可检测性
comment: Accepted at the 11th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics 2023 (IWBF 2023)
comments: Accepted at the 11th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics 2023 (IWBF 2023)
abstract: Investigating new methods of creating face morphing attacks is essential to foresee novel attacks and help mitigate them. Creating morphing attacks is commonly either performed on the image-level or on the representation-level. The representation-level morphing has been performed so far based on generative adversarial networks (GAN) where the encoded images are interpolated in the latent space to produce a morphed image based on the interpolated vector. Such a process was constrained by the limited reconstruction fidelity of GAN architectures. Recent advances in the diffusion autoencoder models have overcome the GAN limitations, leading to high reconstruction fidelity. This theoretically makes them a perfect candidate to perform representation-level face morphing. This work investigates using diffusion autoencoders to create face morphing attacks by comparing them to a wide range of image-level and representation-level morphs. Our vulnerability analyses on four state-of-the-art face recognition models have shown that such models are highly vulnerable to the created attacks, the MorDIFF, especially when compared to existing representation-level morphs. Detailed detectability analyses are also performed on the MorDIFF, showing that they are as challenging to detect as other morphing attacks created on the image- or representation-level. Data and morphing script are made public: https://github.com/naserdamer/MorDIFF.
summary: Investigating new methods of creating face morphing attacks is essential to foresee novel attacks and help mitigate them. Creating morphing attacks is commonly either performed on the image-level or on the representation-level. Such a process was constrained by the limited reconstruction fidelity of GAN architectures. Recent advances in the diffusion autoencoder models have overcome the GAN limitations, leading to high reconstruction fidelity. This theoretically makes them a perfect candidate to perform representation-level face morphing. This work investigates using diffusion autoencoders to create face morphing attacks by comparing them to a wide range of image-level and representation-level morphs. Our vulnerability analyses on four state-of-the-art face recognition models have shown that such models are highly vulnerable to the created attacks, the MorDIFF, especially when compared to existing representation-level morphs. Detailed detectability analyses are also performed on the MorDIFF, showing that they are as challenging to detect as other morphing attacks created on the image- or representation-level. Data and morphing script are made public: https://github.com/naserdamer/MorDIFF.
abstract_zh: 研究创建面部变形攻击的新方法对于预见新型攻击并帮助缓解这些攻击至关重要。创建变形攻击通常在图像级别或表示级别上执行。到目前为止，表示级变形是基于生成对抗网络（GAN）执行的，其中编码图像在潜在空间中进行插值，以基于插值向量生成变形图像。这一过程受到 GAN 架构有限的重建保真度的限制。扩散自动编码器模型的最新进展克服了 GAN 的局限性，实现了高重建保真度。从理论上讲，这使它们成为执行表示级面部变形的完美候选者。这项工作通过将扩散自动编码器与各种图像级和表示级变形进行比较来研究使用扩散自动编码器来创建面部变形攻击。我们对四种最先进的人脸识别模型的漏洞分析表明，这些模型非常容易受到所创建的 MorDIFF 攻击的影响，特别是与现有的表示级变形相比。还在 MorDIFF 上进行了详细的可检测性分析，表明它们与在图像或表示级别上创建的其他变形攻击一样难以检测。数据和变形脚本已公开：https://github.com/naserdamer/MorDIFF。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用扩散自编码器（Diffusion Autoencoders）生成面部融合攻击（MorDIFF），并分析其对人脸识别模型的攻击效果及检测难度。
AI.motivation: 传统基于GAN的表示级融合攻击受限于重建保真度，而扩散自编码器在重建质量上表现更优，可能成为更有效的攻击手段。需评估其攻击效果及检测难度以提升防御能力。
AI.method: 通过扩散自编码器生成MorDIFF攻击样本，与图像级和传统表示级融合方法对比，测试四类先进人脸识别模型的漏洞，并分析攻击样本的检测难度。
AI.result: 实验表明，MorDIFF对人脸识别模型的攻击效果显著优于现有表示级方法，且检测难度与传统攻击相当，公开数据和脚本供研究使用。
AI.conclusion: 扩散自编码器能生成高保真且隐蔽的面部融合攻击，揭示当前人脸识别系统的脆弱性，需进一步研究更有效的检测技术。

Our vulnerability analyses on four state-of-the-art face recognition models have shown that such models are highly vulnerable to the created attacks, the MorDIFF, especially when compared to existing representation-level morphs. Detailed detectability analyses are also performed on the MorDIFF, showing that they are as challenging to detect as other morphing attacks created on the image- or representation-level. Data and morphing script are made public: https://github.com/naserdamer/MorDIFF. 研究创建面部变形攻击的新方法对于预见新型攻击并帮助缓解这些攻击至关重要。创建变形攻击通常在图像级别或表示级别上执行。到目前为止，表示级变形是基于生成对抗网络（GAN）执行的，其中编码图像在潜在空间中进行插值，以基于插值向量生成变形图像。这一过程受到 GAN 架构有限的重建保真度的限制。扩散自动编码器模型的最新进展克服了 GAN 的局限性，实现了高重建保真度。从理论上讲，这使它们成为执行表示级面部变形的完美候选者。这项工作通过将扩散自动编码器与各种图像级和表示级变形进行比较来研究使用扩散自动编码器来创建面部变形攻击。我们对四种最先进的人脸识别模型的漏洞分析表明，这些模型非常容易受到所创建的 MorDIFF 攻击的影响，特别是与现有的表示级变形相比。还在 MorDIFF 上进行了详细的可检测性分析，表明它们与在图像或表示级别上创建的其他变形攻击一样难以检测。数据和变形脚本已公开：https://github.com/naserdamer/MorDIFF。 本文研究使用扩散自编码器（Diffusion Autoencoders）生成面部融合攻击（MorDIFF），并分析其对人脸识别模型的攻击效果及检测难度。 Naser Damer,Meiling Fang,Patrick Siebke,Jan Niklas Kolf,Marco Huber,Fadi Boutros cs.CV

authors_text: Vladimir Ershov
title: A Case Study for Compliance as Code with Graphs and Language Models: Public release of the Regulatory Knowledge Graph
title_zh: 图和语言模型合规性案例研究：监管知识图谱的公开发布
comment: 7 pages on RegKG step 1 in collaboration with ADGM
comments: 7 pages on RegKG step 1 in collaboration with ADGM
abstract: The paper presents a study on using language models to automate the construction of executable Knowledge Graph (KG) for compliance. The paper focuses on Abu Dhabi Global Market regulations and taxonomy, involves manual tagging a portion of the regulations, training BERT-based models, which are then applied to the rest of the corpus. Coreference resolution and syntax analysis were used to parse the relationships between the tagged entities and to form KG stored in a Neo4j database. The paper states that the use of machine learning models released by regulators to automate the interpretation of rules is a vital step towards compliance automation, demonstrates the concept querying with Cypher, and states that the produced sub-graphs combined with Graph Neural Networks (GNN) will achieve expandability in judgment automation systems. The graph is open sourced on GitHub to provide structured data for future advancements in the field.
summary: The paper presents a study on using language models to automate the construction of executable Knowledge Graph (KG) for compliance. The paper focuses on Abu Dhabi Global Market regulations and taxonomy, involves manual tagging a portion of the regulations, training BERT-based models, which are then applied to the rest of the corpus. Coreference resolution and syntax analysis were used to parse the relationships between the tagged entities and to form KG stored in a Neo4j database. The paper states that the use of machine learning models released by regulators to automate the interpretation of rules is a vital step towards compliance automation, demonstrates the concept querying with Cypher, and states that the produced sub-graphs combined with Graph Neural Networks (GNN) will achieve expandability in judgment automation systems. The graph is open sourced on GitHub to provide structured data for future advancements in the field.
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了一项关于使用语言模型自动构建可执行知识图（KG）以实现合规性的研究。该论文重点关注阿布扎比全球市场法规和分类法，涉及手动标记部分法规、训练基于 BERT 的模型，然后将其应用于语料库的其余部分。使用共指解析和语法分析来解析标记实体之间的关系并形成存储在 Neo4j 数据库中的知识图谱。论文指出，使用监管机构发布的机器学习模型来自动解释规则是迈向合规自动化的重要一步，并演示了使用Cypher进行概念查询，并指出所生成的子图与图神经网络（GNN）相结合将实现判断自动化系统的可扩展性。该图在 GitHub 上开源，为该领域的未来进步提供结构化数据。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用语言模型和图技术自动化构建合规知识图谱，并以阿布扎比全球市场法规为案例进行验证。
AI.motivation: 传统合规管理依赖人工解读法规，效率低且易出错。通过自动化构建结构化知识图谱，可提升合规流程的效率与准确性，并为后续智能化判断系统提供数据基础。
AI.method: 手动标注部分法规文本，训练BERT模型进行实体识别与关系抽取；结合共指解析和句法分析构建实体间关系，存储于Neo4j数据库；通过Cypher查询验证图谱可用性，并结合图神经网络（GNN）扩展判断自动化能力。
AI.result: 成功构建了阿布扎比法规知识图谱并开源，验证了模型在法规解析中的有效性，展示了基于图谱的查询能力及与GNN结合的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型与图技术结合可有效实现合规自动化，开源图谱为未来研究提供了结构化数据支持，推动监管领域的智能化发展。

authors_text: Xin Kong,Shikun Liu,Marwan Taher,Andrew J. Davison
title: vMAP: Vectorised Object Mapping for Neural Field SLAM
title_zh: vMAP：神经场 SLAM 的矢量化对象映射
abstract: We present vMAP, an object-level dense SLAM system using neural field representations. Each object is represented by a small MLP, enabling efficient, watertight object modelling without the need for 3D priors. As an RGB-D camera browses a scene with no prior information, vMAP detects object instances on-the-fly, and dynamically adds them to its map. Specifically, thanks to the power of vectorised training, vMAP can optimise as many as 50 individual objects in a single scene, with an extremely efficient training speed of 5Hz map update. We experimentally demonstrate significantly improved scene-level and object-level reconstruction quality compared to prior neural field SLAM systems. Project page: https://kxhit.github.io/vMAP.
summary: We present vMAP, an object-level dense SLAM system using neural field representations. Each object is represented by a small MLP, enabling efficient, watertight object modelling without the need for 3D priors. As an RGB-D camera browses a scene with no prior information, vMAP detects object instances on-the-fly, and dynamically adds them to its map. Specifically, thanks to the power of vectorised training, vMAP can optimise as many as 50 individual objects in a single scene, with an extremely efficient training speed of 5Hz map update. We experimentally demonstrate significantly improved scene-level and object-level reconstruction quality compared to prior neural field SLAM systems. Project page: https://kxhit.github.io/vMAP.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 vMAP，一种使用神经场表示的对象级密集 SLAM 系统。每个对象都由一个小型 MLP 表示，从而无需 3D 先验即可实现高效、无懈可击的对象建模。当 RGB-D 相机在没有先验信息的情况下浏览场景时，vMAP 会动态检测对象实例，并将它们动态添加到其地图中。具体来说，得益于矢量化训练的强大功能，vMAP 可以优化单个场景中多达 50 个单独的对象，并具有 5Hz 地图更新的极其高效的训练速度。我们通过实验证明，与之前的神经场 SLAM 系统相比，场景级和对象级重建质量显着提高。项目页面：https://kxhit.github.io/vMAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出vMAP，一种基于神经场表示的物体级稠密SLAM系统，通过小规模MLP实现高效、无3D先验的物体建模。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM系统依赖3D先验或网格表示，难以高效处理复杂场景中的物体级建模与动态更新需求。
AI.method: 利用向量化训练技术，为每个物体分配独立MLP进行建模，实时检测并动态添加物体到地图中，单场景可优化多达50个物体，训练速率达5Hz。
AI.result: 在场景级和物体级重建质量上显著优于现有神经场SLAM方法，实现高效且精确的映射。
AI.conclusion: vMAP通过神经场与向量化训练结合，为无先验信息的实时物体级SLAM提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Adam Nemecek
title: Coinductive guide to inductive transformer heads
title_zh: 感应变压器头的传导指南
abstract: We argue that all building blocks of transformer models can be expressed with a single concept: combinatorial Hopf algebra. Transformer learning emerges as a result of the subtle interplay between the algebraic and coalgebraic operations of the combinatorial Hopf algebra. Viewed through this lens, the transformer model becomes a linear time-invariant system where the attention mechanism computes a generalized convolution transform and the residual stream serves as a unit impulse. Attention-only transformers then learn by enforcing an invariant between these two paths. We call this invariant Hopf coherence. Due to this, with a degree of poetic license, one could call combinatorial Hopf algebras "tensors with a built-in loss function gradient". This loss function gradient occurs within the single layers and no backward pass is needed. This is in contrast to automatic differentiation which happens across the whole graph and needs a explicit backward pass. This property is the result of the fact that combinatorial Hopf algebras have the surprising property of calculating eigenvalues by repeated squaring.
summary: We argue that all building blocks of transformer models can be expressed with a single concept: combinatorial Hopf algebra. Transformer learning emerges as a result of the subtle interplay between the algebraic and coalgebraic operations of the combinatorial Hopf algebra. Viewed through this lens, the transformer model becomes a linear time-invariant system where the attention mechanism computes a generalized convolution transform and the residual stream serves as a unit impulse. Attention-only transformers then learn by enforcing an invariant between these two paths. We call this invariant Hopf coherence. Due to this, with a degree of poetic license, one could call combinatorial Hopf algebras "tensors with a built-in loss function gradient". This loss function gradient occurs within the single layers and no backward pass is needed. This is in contrast to automatic differentiation which happens across the whole graph and needs a explicit backward pass. This property is the result of the fact that combinatorial Hopf algebras have the surprising property of calculating eigenvalues by repeated squaring.
abstract_zh: 我们认为变压器模型的所有构建模块都可以用一个概念来表达：组合 Hopf 代数。变换学习的出现是组合 Hopf 代数的代数和余代数运算之间微妙相互作用的结果。从这个角度来看，变压器模型变成了一个线性时不变系统，其中注意力机制计算广义卷积变换，并且残余流充当单位脉冲。然后，仅注意变压器通过在这两条路径之间强制执行不变量来学习。我们称这种不变的 Hopf 相干性。因此，在一定程度的诗意许可下，人们可以将组合 Hopf 代数称为“具有内置损失函数梯度的张量”。这种损失函数梯度发生在单层内，不需要向后传递。这与自动微分相反，自动微分发生在整个图上并且需要显式的向后传递。该性质是组合 Hopf 代数具有通过重复平方计算特征值的令人惊讶的性质的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过组合Hopf代数统一解释Transformer模型的构建模块，揭示其学习机制与代数结构的关系。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型的数学本质缺乏统一框架，需寻找能同时描述注意力机制与残差流的代数结构。
AI.method: 将Transformer的注意力机制建模为广义卷积变换，残差流视为单位脉冲，利用组合Hopf代数的代数与余代数运算建立数学模型。
AI.result: 发现注意力仅Transformer通过Hopf一致性约束实现学习，其梯度计算无需反向传播，且能通过重复平方法直接计算特征值。
AI.conclusion: 组合Hopf代数为Transformer提供了内置梯度的数学基础，为高效模型设计与理论分析开辟新方向。

ai_content.conclusion: 组合Hopf代数为Transformer提供了内置梯度的数学基础，为高效模型设计与理论分析开辟新方向。

search_text: Coinductive guide to inductive transformer heads 感应变压器头的传导指南 We argue that all building blocks of transformer models can be expressed with a single concept: combinatorial Hopf algebra. Transformer learning emerges as a result of the subtle interplay between the algebraic and coalgebraic operations of the combinatorial Hopf algebra. Viewed through this lens, the transformer model becomes a linear time-invariant system where the attention mechanism computes a generalized convolution transform and the residual stream serves as a unit impulse. Attention-only transformers then learn by enforcing an invariant between these two paths. We call this invariant Hopf coherence. Due to this, with a degree of poetic license, one could call combinatorial Hopf algebras "tensors with a built-in loss function gradient". This loss function gradient occurs within the single layers and no backward pass is needed. This is in contrast to automatic differentiation which happens across the whole graph and needs a explicit backward pass. This property is the result of the fact that combinatorial Hopf algebras have the surprising property of calculating eigenvalues by repeated squaring. 我们认为变压器模型的所有构建模块都可以用一个概念来表达：组合 Hopf 代数。变换学习的出现是组合 Hopf 代数的代数和余代数运算之间微妙相互作用的结果。从这个角度来看，变压器模型变成了一个线性时不变系统，其中注意力机制计算广义卷积变换，并且残余流充当单位脉冲。然后，仅注意变压器通过在这两条路径之间强制执行不变量来学习。我们称这种不变的 Hopf 相干性。因此，在一定程度的诗意许可下，人们可以将组合 Hopf 代数称为“具有内置损失函数梯度的张量”。这种损失函数梯度发生在单层内，不需要向后传递。这与自动微分相反，自动微分发生在整个图上并且需要显式的向后传递。该性质是组合 Hopf 代数具有通过重复平方计算特征值的令人惊讶的性质的结果。 本文提出通过组合Hopf代数统一解释Transformer模型的构建模块，揭示其学习机制与代数结构的关系。 Adam Nemecek cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tomáš Musil,Matěj Petrlík,Martin Saska
title: SphereMap: Dynamic Multi-Layer Graph Structure for Rapid Safety-Aware UAV Planning
title_zh: SphereMap：用于快速安全感知无人机规划的动态多层图结构
abstract: A flexible topological representation consisting of a two-layer graph structure built on-board an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) by continuously filling the free space of an occupancy map with intersecting spheres is proposed in this \paper{}. Most state-of-the-art planning methods find the shortest paths while keeping the UAV at a pre-defined distance from obstacles. Planning over the proposed structure reaches this pre-defined distance only when necessary, maintaining a safer distance otherwise, while also being orders of magnitude faster than other state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate how this graph representation can be converted into a lightweight shareable topological-volumetric map of the environment, which enables decentralized multi-robot cooperation. The proposed approach was successfully validated in several kilometers of real subterranean environments, such as caves, devastated industrial buildings, and in the harsh and complex setting of the final event of the DARPA SubT Challenge, which aims to mimic the conditions of real search and rescue missions as closely as possible, and where our approach achieved the \nth{2} place in the virtual track.
summary: A flexible topological representation consisting of a two-layer graph structure built on-board an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) by continuously filling the free space of an occupancy map with intersecting spheres is proposed in this \paper{}. Most state-of-the-art planning methods find the shortest paths while keeping the UAV at a pre-defined distance from obstacles. Planning over the proposed structure reaches this pre-defined distance only when necessary, maintaining a safer distance otherwise, while also being orders of magnitude faster than other state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate how this graph representation can be converted into a lightweight shareable topological-volumetric map of the environment, which enables decentralized multi-robot cooperation. The proposed approach was successfully validated in several kilometers of real subterranean environments, such as caves, devastated industrial buildings, and in the harsh and complex setting of the final event of the DARPA SubT Challenge, which aims to mimic the conditions of real search and rescue missions as closely as possible, and where our approach achieved the \nth{2} place in the virtual track.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种灵活的拓扑表示，由在无人机 (UAV) 上构建的两层图结构组成，通过用相交的球体连续填充占用图的自由空间。大多数最先进的规划方法都能找到最短路径，同时使无人机与障碍物保持预定距离。对拟议结构的规划仅在必要时达到此预定义距离，否则保持更安全的距离，同时也比其他最先进的方法快几个数量级。此外，我们还演示了如何将这种图形表示转换为轻量级可共享的环境拓扑体积图，从而实现分散的多机器人合作。所提出的方法在数公里的真实地下环境（例如洞穴、被毁坏的工业建筑）以及 DARPA SubT 挑战赛决赛的严酷而复杂的环境中成功得到了验证，该挑战旨在尽可能模仿真实的搜索和救援任务的条件，我们的方法在虚拟赛道上获得了\n{2}名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态多层图结构SphereMap，用于实现快速安全的无人机路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有路径规划方法在保证安全距离的同时效率不足，且难以支持多机器人协作。
AI.method: 通过无人机实时用相交球体填充占用图的自由空间，构建两层图结构，并转换为轻量级共享地图。
AI.result: 在数公里真实地下环境及DARPA SubT挑战赛虚拟赛道中验证，取得第二名成绩。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在安全性、规划速度和多机器人协作能力上均优于现有技术。

authors_text: Fabian Spaeh,Alina Ene
title: Online Ad Allocation with Predictions
title_zh: 带预测的在线广告分配
comment: Minor revision. The main changes are the addition of a random mixture baseline to the experiments, and minor changes to the exposition
comments: Minor revision. The main changes are the addition of a random mixture baseline to the experiments, and minor changes to the exposition
abstract: Display Ads and the generalized assignment problem are two well-studied online packing problems with important applications in ad allocation and other areas. In both problems, ad impressions arrive online and have to be allocated immediately to budget-constrained advertisers. Worst-case algorithms that achieve the ideal competitive ratio are known, but might act overly conservative given the predictable and usually tame nature of real-world input. Given this discrepancy, we develop an algorithm for both problems that incorporate machine-learned predictions and can thus improve the performance beyond the worst-case. Our algorithm is based on the work of Feldman et al. (2009) and similar in nature to Mahdian et al. (2007) who were the first to develop a learning-augmented algorithm for the related, but more structured Ad Words problem. We use a novel analysis to show that our algorithm is able to capitalize on a good prediction, while being robust against poor predictions. We experimentally evaluate our algorithm on synthetic and real-world data on a wide range of predictions. Our algorithm is consistently outperforming the worst-case algorithm without predictions.
summary: Display Ads and the generalized assignment problem are two well-studied online packing problems with important applications in ad allocation and other areas. In both problems, ad impressions arrive online and have to be allocated immediately to budget-constrained advertisers. Worst-case algorithms that achieve the ideal competitive ratio are known, but might act overly conservative given the predictable and usually tame nature of real-world input. Given this discrepancy, we develop an algorithm for both problems that incorporate machine-learned predictions and can thus improve the performance beyond the worst-case. Our algorithm is based on the work of Feldman et al. (2009) and similar in nature to Mahdian et al. (2007) who were the first to develop a learning-augmented algorithm for the related, but more structured Ad Words problem. We use a novel analysis to show that our algorithm is able to capitalize on a good prediction, while being robust against poor predictions. We experimentally evaluate our algorithm on synthetic and real-world data on a wide range of predictions. Our algorithm is consistently outperforming the worst-case algorithm without predictions.
abstract_zh: 展示广告和广义分配问题是两个经过充分研究的在线打包问题，在广告分配和其他领域具有重要应用。在这两个问题中，广告印象都是在线到达的，并且必须立即分配给预算有限的广告商。实现理想竞争比的最坏情况算法是已知的，但考虑到现实世界输入的可预测性和通常温和的性质，可能会过于保守。鉴于这种差异，我们针对这两个问题开发了一种算法，该算法结合了机器学习的预测，从而可以提高性能，超越最坏的情况。我们的算法基于 Feldman 等人的工作。 (2009) 本质上与 Mahdian 等人相似。 （2007）谁是第一个为相关但更结构化的广告词问题开发学习增强算法的人。我们使用新颖的分析来表明我们的算法能够利用良好的预测，同时对不良预测具有鲁棒性。我们根据各种预测的合成数据和真实数据对我们的算法进行实验评估。我们的算法在没有预测的情况下始终优于最坏情况算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合机器学习预测的在线广告分配算法，以改进传统最坏情况下的竞争比。
AI.motivation: 传统在线广告分配算法过于保守，无法充分利用现实世界中可预测且稳定的输入特性，导致性能未达最优。
AI.method: 基于Feldman等（2009）和Mahdian等（2007）的工作，设计融合机器学习预测的算法，并通过新颖分析确保其对预测质量的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在合成数据和真实数据上均优于无预测的最坏情况算法，且在预测准确时性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该算法能有效利用高质量预测并抵御低质量预测影响，为在线广告分配提供了更实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Hanyuan Chen,Jun-Yan He,Wangmeng Xiang,Zhi-Qi Cheng,Wei Liu,Hanbing Liu,Bin Luo,Yifeng Geng,Xuansong Xie
title: HDFormer: High-order Directed Transformer for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: HDFormer：用于 3D 人体姿势估计的高阶定向变压器
comment: Accepted to IJCAI 2023; 9 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables; the code is at https://github.com/hyer/HDFormer
comments: Accepted to IJCAI 2023; 9 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables; the code is at https://github.com/hyer/HDFormer
abstract: Human pose estimation is a challenging task due to its structured data sequence nature. Existing methods primarily focus on pair-wise interaction of body joints, which is insufficient for scenarios involving overlapping joints and rapidly changing poses. To overcome these issues, we introduce a novel approach, the High-order Directed Transformer (HDFormer), which leverages high-order bone and joint relationships for improved pose estimation. Specifically, HDFormer incorporates both self-attention and high-order attention to formulate a multi-order attention module. This module facilitates first-order "joint$\leftrightarrow$joint", second-order "bone$\leftrightarrow$joint", and high-order "hyperbone$\leftrightarrow$joint" interactions, effectively addressing issues in complex and occlusion-heavy situations. In addition, modern CNN techniques are integrated into the transformer-based architecture, balancing the trade-off between performance and efficiency. HDFormer significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) models on Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets, requiring only 1/10 of the parameters and significantly lower computational costs. Moreover, HDFormer demonstrates broad real-world applicability, enabling real-time, accurate 3D pose estimation. The source code is in https://github.com/hyer/HDFormer
summary: Human pose estimation is a challenging task due to its structured data sequence nature. Existing methods primarily focus on pair-wise interaction of body joints, which is insufficient for scenarios involving overlapping joints and rapidly changing poses. To overcome these issues, we introduce a novel approach, the High-order Directed Transformer (HDFormer), which leverages high-order bone and joint relationships for improved pose estimation. Specifically, HDFormer incorporates both self-attention and high-order attention to formulate a multi-order attention module. This module facilitates first-order "joint$\leftrightarrow$joint", second-order "bone$\leftrightarrow$joint", and high-order "hyperbone$\leftrightarrow$joint" interactions, effectively addressing issues in complex and occlusion-heavy situations. In addition, modern CNN techniques are integrated into the transformer-based architecture, balancing the trade-off between performance and efficiency. HDFormer significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) models on Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets, requiring only 1/10 of the parameters and significantly lower computational costs. Moreover, HDFormer demonstrates broad real-world applicability, enabling real-time, accurate 3D pose estimation. The source code is in https://github.com/hyer/HDFormer
abstract_zh: 由于其结构化数据序列的性质，人体姿势估计是一项具有挑战性的任务。现有的方法主要关注身体关节的成对交互，这对于涉及重叠关节和快速变化姿势的场景来说是不够的。为了克服这些问题，我们引入了一种新方法，即高阶定向变换器（HDFormer），它利用高阶骨骼和关节关系来改进姿势估计。具体来说，HDFormer结合了自注意力和高阶注意力来制定多阶注意力模块。该模块促进一阶“joint$\leftrightarrow$joint”、二阶“bone$\leftrightarrow$joint”和高阶“hyperbone$\leftrightarrow$joint”交互，有效解决复杂和遮挡严重情况下的问题。此外，现代 CNN 技术被集成到基于 Transformer 的架构中，平衡了性能和效率之间的权衡。 HDFormer 在 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP 数据集上显着优于最先进的 (SOTA) 模型，仅需要 1/10 的参数，并且计算成本显着降低。此外，HDFormer 展示了广泛的现实适用性，可实现实时、准确的 3D 姿态估计。源代码位于https://github.com/hyer/HDFormer

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HDFormer的高阶定向Transformer模型，用于改进3D人体姿态估计任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注关节的二元交互，难以处理关节重叠和快速变化姿态的复杂场景，需探索更高阶的骨骼与关节关系以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计多阶注意力模块，结合自注意力与高阶注意力机制，实现关节-关节、骨骼-关节及超骨骼-关节的多层级交互，并融合现代CNN技术优化效率。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上显著优于SOTA模型，参数量仅为竞品的1/10，计算成本更低，且支持实时准确的3D姿态估计。
AI.conclusion: HDFormer通过高阶关系建模与CNN融合，在保持高效性的同时提升了复杂场景下的3D姿态估计精度，具有广泛的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Mehrdad Shafiei Dizaji
title: A Hybrid Training Algorithm for Continuum Deep Learning Neuro-Skin Neural Network
title_zh: 连续深度学习神经皮肤神经网络的混合训练算法
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.04796
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.04796
abstract: In this brief paper, a learning algorithm is developed for Deep Learning NeuroSkin Neural Network to improve their learning properties. Neuroskin is a new type of neural network presented recently by the authors. It is comprised of a cellular membrane which has a neuron attached to each cell. The neuron is the cells nucleus. A neuroskin is modelled using finite elements. Each element of the finite element represents a cell. Each cells neuron has dendritic fibers which connects it to the nodes of the cell. On the other hand, its axon is connected to the nodes of a number of different neurons. The neuroskin is trained to contract upon receiving an input. The learning takes place during updating iterations using sensitivity analysis. It is shown that while the neuroskin cannot present the desirable response, it improves gradually to the desired level.
summary: In this brief paper, a learning algorithm is developed for Deep Learning NeuroSkin Neural Network to improve their learning properties. Neuroskin is a new type of neural network presented recently by the authors. It is comprised of a cellular membrane which has a neuron attached to each cell. The neuron is the cells nucleus. A neuroskin is modelled using finite elements. Each element of the finite element represents a cell. Each cells neuron has dendritic fibers which connects it to the nodes of the cell. On the other hand, its axon is connected to the nodes of a number of different neurons. The neuroskin is trained to contract upon receiving an input. The learning takes place during updating iterations using sensitivity analysis. It is shown that while the neuroskin cannot present the desirable response, it improves gradually to the desired level.
abstract_zh: 在这篇简短的论文中，为深度学习 NeuroSkin 神经网络开发了一种学习算法，以提高其学习性能。 Neuroskin 是作者最近提出的一种新型神经网络。它由细胞膜组成，每个细胞上附着一个神经元。神经元是细胞核。神经皮肤是使用有限元建模的。有限元的每个元素代表一个单元。每个细胞神经元都有树突纤维，将其连接到细胞的节点。另一方面，它的轴突连接到许多不同神经元的节点。神经皮肤经过训练，在收到输入后收缩。学习是在使用敏感性分析进行更新迭代期间进行的。结果表明，虽然神经皮肤不能呈现理想的反应，但它会逐渐改善到理想的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合训练算法，用于改进深度学习神经皮肤网络的学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络在处理连续学习任务时存在性能不足，需开发更有效的训练方法以提升其响应能力。
AI.method: 基于有限元建模的神经皮肤网络结构，结合敏感性分析进行迭代更新训练。
AI.result: 神经皮肤网络在训练过程中逐步改善响应性能，最终达到预期水平。
AI.conclusion: 该混合训练算法有效提升了神经皮肤网络的学习能力，验证了其在连续深度学习中的可行性。

authors_text: Miriam Hägele,Johannes Eschrich,Lukas Ruff,Maximilian Alber,Simon Schallenberg,Adrien Guillot,Christoph Roderburg,Frank Tacke,Frederick Klauschen
title: Leveraging weak complementary labels to improve semantic segmentation of hepatocellular carcinoma and cholangiocarcinoma in H&E-stained slides
title_zh: 利用弱互补标签改善 H&E 染色切片中肝细胞癌和胆管癌的语义分割
abstract: In this paper, we present a deep learning segmentation approach to classify and quantify the two most prevalent primary liver cancers - hepatocellular carcinoma and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma - from hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained whole slide images. While semantic segmentation of medical images typically requires costly pixel-level annotations by domain experts, there often exists additional information which is routinely obtained in clinical diagnostics but rarely utilized for model training. We propose to leverage such weak information from patient diagnoses by deriving complementary labels that indicate to which class a sample cannot belong to. To integrate these labels, we formulate a complementary loss for segmentation. Motivated by the medical application, we demonstrate for general segmentation tasks that including additional patches with solely weak complementary labels during model training can significantly improve the predictive performance and robustness of a model. On the task of diagnostic differentiation between hepatocellular carcinoma and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma, we achieve a balanced accuracy of 0.91 (CI 95%: 0.86 - 0.95) at case level for 165 hold-out patients. Furthermore, we also show that leveraging complementary labels improves the robustness of segmentation and increases performance at case level.
summary: In this paper, we present a deep learning segmentation approach to classify and quantify the two most prevalent primary liver cancers - hepatocellular carcinoma and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma - from hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained whole slide images. While semantic segmentation of medical images typically requires costly pixel-level annotations by domain experts, there often exists additional information which is routinely obtained in clinical diagnostics but rarely utilized for model training. We propose to leverage such weak information from patient diagnoses by deriving complementary labels that indicate to which class a sample cannot belong to. To integrate these labels, we formulate a complementary loss for segmentation. Motivated by the medical application, we demonstrate for general segmentation tasks that including additional patches with solely weak complementary labels during model training can significantly improve the predictive performance and robustness of a model. On the task of diagnostic differentiation between hepatocellular carcinoma and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma, we achieve a balanced accuracy of 0.91 (CI 95%: 0.86 - 0.95) at case level for 165 hold-out patients. Furthermore, we also show that leveraging complementary labels improves the robustness of segmentation and increases performance at case level.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种深度学习分割方法，用于从苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 染色的整个切片图像中对两种最常见的原发性肝癌（肝细胞癌和肝内胆管癌）进行分类和量化。虽然医学图像的语义分割通常需要领域专家进行昂贵的像素级注释，但通常存在在临床诊断中常规获得但很少用于模型训练的附加信息。我们建议通过派生补充标签来指示样本不能属于哪一类，从而利用患者诊断中的此类薄弱信息。为了整合这些标签，我们制定了用于分割的补充损失。受医学应用的推动，我们证明了对于一般分割任务，在模型训练期间包含仅具有弱互补标签的附加补丁可以显着提高模型的预测性能和鲁棒性。在诊断区分肝细胞癌和肝内胆管癌的任务中，我们对 165 名坚持治疗的患者在病例水平上取得了 0.91 的平衡准确度（CI 95%：0.86 - 0.95）。此外，我们还表明，利用互补标签可以提高分割的稳健性并提高案例级别的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用弱互补标签的深度学习分割方法，用于区分肝细胞癌和胆管癌的H&E染色切片。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像语义分割通常需要昂贵的像素级标注，而临床诊断中常忽略的诊断信息可作为弱互补标签辅助模型训练。
AI.method: 通过患者诊断信息生成互补标签（样本不属于某类的指示），设计互补损失函数并结合弱标签训练模型。
AI.result: 在165例独立患者数据上达到病例级平衡准确率0.91（95%CI:0.86-0.95），显著提升分割鲁棒性与性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用互补标签可有效提升医疗图像分割效果，为标注稀缺场景提供可行解决方案。

ai_content.result: 在165例独立患者数据上达到病例级平衡准确率0.91（95%CI:0.86-0.95），显著提升分割鲁棒性与性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 利用互补标签可有效提升医疗图像分割效果，为标注稀缺场景提供可行解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种利用弱互补标签的深度学习分割方法，用于区分肝细胞癌和胆管癌的H&E染色切片。
motivation: 医疗图像语义分割通常需要昂贵的像素级标注，而临床诊断中常忽略的诊断信息可作为弱互补标签辅助模型训练。
method: 通过患者诊断信息生成互补标签（样本不属于某类的指示），设计互补损失函数并结合弱标签训练模型。
result: 在165例独立患者数据上达到病例级平衡准确率0.91（95%CI:0.86-0.95），显著提升分割鲁棒性与性能。
conclusion: 利用互补标签可有效提升医疗图像分割效果，为标注稀缺场景提供可行解决方案。
search_text: Leveraging weak complementary labels to improve semantic segmentation of hepatocellular carcinoma and cholangiocarcinoma in H&E-stained slides 利用弱互补标签改善 H&E 染色切片中肝细胞癌和胆管癌的语义分割 In this paper, we present a deep learning segmentation approach to classify and quantify the two most prevalent primary liver cancers - hepatocellular carcinoma and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma - from hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained whole slide images. While semantic segmentation of medical images typically requires costly pixel-level annotations by domain experts, there often exists additional information which is routinely obtained in clinical diagnostics but rarely utilized for model training. We propose to leverage such weak information from patient diagnoses by deriving complementary labels that indicate to which class a sample cannot belong to. To integrate these labels, we formulate a complementary loss for segmentation. Motivated by the medical application, we demonstrate for general segmentation tasks that including additional patches with solely weak complementary labels during model training can significantly improve the predictive performance and robustness of a model. On the task of diagnostic differentiation between hepatocellular carcinoma and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma, we achieve a balanced accuracy of 0.91 (CI 95%: 0.86 - 0.95) at case level for 165 hold-out patients. Furthermore, we also show that leveraging complementary labels improves the robustness of segmentation and increases performance at case level. 在本文中，我们提出了一种深度学习分割方法，用于从苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 染色的整个切片图像中对两种最常见的原发性肝癌（肝细胞癌和肝内胆管癌）进行分类和量化。虽然医学图像的语义分割通常需要领域专家进行昂贵的像素级注释，但通常存在在临床诊断中常规获得但很少用于模型训练的附加信息。我们建议通过派生补充标签来指示样本不能属于哪一类，从而利用患者诊断中的此类薄弱信息。为了整合这些标签，我们制定了用于分割的补充损失。受医学应用的推动，我们证明了对于一般分割任务，在模型训练期间包含仅具有弱互补标签的附加补丁可以显着提高模型的预测性能和鲁棒性。在诊断区分肝细胞癌和肝内胆管癌的任务中，我们对 165 名坚持治疗的患者在病例水平上取得了 0.91 的平衡准确度（CI 95%：0.86 - 0.95）。此外，我们还表明，利用互补标签可以提高分割的稳健性并提高案例级别的性能。 本文提出一种利用弱互补标签的深度学习分割方法，用于区分肝细胞癌和胆管癌的H&E染色切片。 Miriam Hägele,Johannes Eschrich,Lukas Ruff,Maximilian Alber,Simon Schallenberg,Adrien Guillot,Christoph Roderburg,Frank Tacke,Frederick Klauschen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Fabian Heldmann,Sarah Berkhahn,Matthias Ehrhardt,Kathrin Klamroth
title: PINN Training using Biobjective Optimization: The Trade-off between Data Loss and Residual Loss
title_zh: 使用双目标优化的 PINN 训练：数据丢失和残余丢失之间的权衡
abstract: Physics informed neural networks (PINNs) have proven to be an efficient tool to represent problems for which measured data are available and for which the dynamics in the data are expected to follow some physical laws. In this paper, we suggest a multiobjective perspective on the training of PINNs by treating the data loss and the residual loss as two individual objective functions in a truly biobjective optimization approach. As a showcase example, we consider COVID-19 predictions in Germany and built an extended susceptibles-infected-recovered (SIR) model with additionally considered leaky-vaccinated and hospitalized populations (SVIHR model) to model the transition rates and to predict future infections. SIR-type models are expressed by systems of ordinary differential equations (ODEs). We investigate the suitability of the generated PINN for COVID-19 predictions and compare the resulting predicted curves with those obtained by applying the method of non-standard finite differences to the system of ODEs and initial data. The approach is applicable to various systems of ODEs that define dynamical regimes. Those regimes do not need to be SIR-type models, and the corresponding underlying data sets do not have to be associated with COVID-19.
summary: Physics informed neural networks (PINNs) have proven to be an efficient tool to represent problems for which measured data are available and for which the dynamics in the data are expected to follow some physical laws. In this paper, we suggest a multiobjective perspective on the training of PINNs by treating the data loss and the residual loss as two individual objective functions in a truly biobjective optimization approach. As a showcase example, we consider COVID-19 predictions in Germany and built an extended susceptibles-infected-recovered (SIR) model with additionally considered leaky-vaccinated and hospitalized populations (SVIHR model) to model the transition rates and to predict future infections. SIR-type models are expressed by systems of ordinary differential equations (ODEs). We investigate the suitability of the generated PINN for COVID-19 predictions and compare the resulting predicted curves with those obtained by applying the method of non-standard finite differences to the system of ODEs and initial data. The approach is applicable to various systems of ODEs that define dynamical regimes. Those regimes do not need to be SIR-type models, and the corresponding underlying data sets do not have to be associated with COVID-19.
abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 已被证明是一种有效的工具，可以用来表示可获取测量数据且数据动态遵循某些物理定律的问题。在本文中，我们通过将数据丢失和残留损失视为真正的双目标优化方法中的两个单独的目标函数，提出了对 PINN 训练的多目标视角。作为一个展示示例，我们考虑了德国的 COVID-19 预测，并建立了扩展的易感者感染恢复 (SIR) 模型，另外还考虑了疫苗泄漏和住院人群（SVIHR 模型），以对转移率进行建模并预测未来的感染。 SIR 型模型由常微分方程组 (ODE) 表示。我们研究了生成的 PINN 对 COVID-19 预测的适用性，并将生成的预测曲线与通过将非标准有限差分方法应用于 ODE 和初始数据系统而获得的曲线进行比较。该方法适用于定义动态状态的各种 ODE 系统。这些机制不需要是 SIR 类型的模型，相应的底层数据集也不必与 COVID-19 相关。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于双目标优化的PINN训练方法，平衡数据损失与残差损失，并应用于新冠疫情预测。
AI.motivation: 传统PINN训练通常单一优化损失函数，难以平衡数据拟合与物理规律遵循，需多目标优化解决权衡问题。
AI.method: 采用双目标优化框架，将数据损失与残差损失作为独立目标函数，结合扩展SIR模型（SVIHR）进行疫情预测，并与非标准有限差分法对比。
AI.result: 验证PINN在疫情预测中的有效性，预测结果与有限差分法相近，且方法适用于多种ODE系统。
AI.conclusion: 双目标优化方法能有效平衡数据拟合与物理约束，适用于各类动力学系统，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Hoang Van
title: Mitigating Data Scarcity for Large Language Models
title_zh: 缓解大型语言模型的数据稀缺性
abstract: In recent years, pretrained neural language models (PNLMs) have taken the field of natural language processing by storm, achieving new benchmarks and state-of-the-art performances. These models often rely heavily on annotated data, which may not always be available. Data scarcity are commonly found in specialized domains, such as medical, or in low-resource languages that are underexplored by AI research. In this dissertation, we focus on mitigating data scarcity using data augmentation and neural ensemble learning techniques for neural language models. In both research directions, we implement neural network algorithms and evaluate their impact on assisting neural language models in downstream NLP tasks. Specifically, for data augmentation, we explore two techniques: 1) creating positive training data by moving an answer span around its original context and 2) using text simplification techniques to introduce a variety of writing styles to the original training data. Our results indicate that these simple and effective solutions improve the performance of neural language models considerably in low-resource NLP domains and tasks. For neural ensemble learning, we use a multilabel neural classifier to select the best prediction outcome from a variety of individual pretrained neural language models trained for a low-resource medical text simplification task.
summary: In recent years, pretrained neural language models (PNLMs) have taken the field of natural language processing by storm, achieving new benchmarks and state-of-the-art performances. These models often rely heavily on annotated data, which may not always be available. Data scarcity are commonly found in specialized domains, such as medical, or in low-resource languages that are underexplored by AI research. In this dissertation, we focus on mitigating data scarcity using data augmentation and neural ensemble learning techniques for neural language models. In both research directions, we implement neural network algorithms and evaluate their impact on assisting neural language models in downstream NLP tasks. Specifically, for data augmentation, we explore two techniques: 1) creating positive training data by moving an answer span around its original context and 2) using text simplification techniques to introduce a variety of writing styles to the original training data. Our results indicate that these simple and effective solutions improve the performance of neural language models considerably in low-resource NLP domains and tasks. For neural ensemble learning, we use a multilabel neural classifier to select the best prediction outcome from a variety of individual pretrained neural language models trained for a low-resource medical text simplification task.
abstract_zh: 近年来，预训练神经语言模型 (PNLM) 席卷了自然语言处理领域，实现了新的基准和最先进的性能。这些模型通常严重依赖带注释的数据，而这些数据可能并不总是可用。数据稀缺常见于医学等专业领域，或人工智能研究尚未充分探索的低资源语言。在本论文中，我们专注于使用神经语言模型的数据增强和神经集成学习技术来缓解数据稀缺性。在这两个研究方向中，我们都实现了神经网络算法并评估它们对下游 NLP 任务中辅助神经语言模型的影响。具体来说，对于数据增强，我们探索了两种技术：1）通过围绕原始上下文移动答案范围来创建积极的训练数据，2）使用文本简化技术向原始训练数据引入各种写作风格。我们的结果表明，这些简单而有效的解决方案在资源匮乏的 NLP 领域和任务中显着提高了神经语言模型的性能。对于神经集成学习，我们使用多标签神经分类器从针对低资源医学文本简化任务训练的各种单独的预训练神经语言模型中选择最佳预测结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过数据增强和神经集成学习技术缓解大型语言模型的数据稀缺问题，特别是在医疗等专业领域和低资源语言场景中。
AI.motivation: 预训练神经语言模型依赖大量标注数据，但在医疗等专业领域及低资源语言中，标注数据往往不足，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 数据增强方面采用两种技术：1) 在原始上下文中移动答案片段生成正样本；2) 通过文本简化技术引入多样化的写作风格。神经集成学习方面，使用多标签分类器从多个预训练模型中选择最优预测结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，这两种方法显著提升了神经语言模型在低资源自然语言处理任务中的性能。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强与神经集成学习是缓解数据稀缺问题的有效且实用方案，尤其适用于标注数据有限的领域。

Specifically, for data augmentation, we explore two techniques: 1) creating positive training data by moving an answer span around its original context and 2) using text simplification techniques to introduce a variety of writing styles to the original training data. Our results indicate that these simple and effective solutions improve the performance of neural language models considerably in low-resource NLP domains and tasks. For neural ensemble learning, we use a multilabel neural classifier to select the best prediction outcome from a variety of individual pretrained neural language models trained for a low-resource medical text simplification task. 近年来，预训练神经语言模型 (PNLM) 席卷了自然语言处理领域，实现了新的基准和最先进的性能。这些模型通常严重依赖带注释的数据，而这些数据可能并不总是可用。数据稀缺常见于医学等专业领域，或人工智能研究尚未充分探索的低资源语言。在本论文中，我们专注于使用神经语言模型的数据增强和神经集成学习技术来缓解数据稀缺性。在这两个研究方向中，我们都实现了神经网络算法并评估它们对下游 NLP 任务中辅助神经语言模型的影响。具体来说，对于数据增强，我们探索了两种技术：1）通过围绕原始上下文移动答案范围来创建积极的训练数据，2）使用文本简化技术向原始训练数据引入各种写作风格。我们的结果表明，这些简单而有效的解决方案在资源匮乏的 NLP 领域和任务中显着提高了神经语言模型的性能。对于神经集成学习，我们使用多标签神经分类器从针对低资源医学文本简化任务训练的各种单独的预训练神经语言模型中选择最佳预测结果。 本文旨在通过数据增强和神经集成学习技术缓解大型语言模型的数据稀缺问题，特别是在医疗等专业领域和低资源语言场景中。 Hoang Van cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ali Girayhan Özbay,Sylvain Laizet
title: FR3D: Three-dimensional Flow Reconstruction and Force Estimation for Unsteady Flows Around Extruded Bluff Bodies via Conformal Mapping Aided Convolutional Autoencoders
title_zh: FR3D：通过共形映射辅助卷积自动编码器对挤压钝体周围的不稳定流动进行三维流动重建和力估计
comment: 29 pages, 10 figures. Accepted at International Journal of Heat and Fluid Flow
comments: 29 pages, 10 figures. Accepted at International Journal of Heat and Fluid Flow
abstract: In many practical fluid dynamics experiments, measuring variables such as velocity and pressure is possible only at a limited number of sensor locations, \textcolor{black}{for a few two-dimensional planes, or for a small 3D domain in the flow}. However, knowledge of the full fields is necessary to understand the dynamics of many flows. Deep learning reconstruction of full flow fields from sparse measurements has recently garnered significant research interest, as a way of overcoming this limitation. This task is referred to as the flow reconstruction (FR) task. In the present study, we propose a convolutional autoencoder based neural network model, dubbed FR3D, which enables FR to be carried out for three-dimensional flows around extruded 3D objects with different cross-sections. An innovative mapping approach, whereby multiple fluid domains are mapped to an annulus, enables FR3D to generalize its performance to objects not encountered during training. We conclusively demonstrate this generalization capability using a dataset composed of 80 training and 20 testing geometries, all randomly generated. We show that the FR3D model reconstructs pressure and velocity components with a few percentage points of error. Additionally, using these predictions, we accurately estimate the Q-criterion fields as well lift and drag forces on the geometries.
summary: In many practical fluid dynamics experiments, measuring variables such as velocity and pressure is possible only at a limited number of sensor locations, \textcolor{black}{for a few two-dimensional planes, or for a small 3D domain in the flow}. However, knowledge of the full fields is necessary to understand the dynamics of many flows. Deep learning reconstruction of full flow fields from sparse measurements has recently garnered significant research interest, as a way of overcoming this limitation. This task is referred to as the flow reconstruction (FR) task. In the present study, we propose a convolutional autoencoder based neural network model, dubbed FR3D, which enables FR to be carried out for three-dimensional flows around extruded 3D objects with different cross-sections. An innovative mapping approach, whereby multiple fluid domains are mapped to an annulus, enables FR3D to generalize its performance to objects not encountered during training. We conclusively demonstrate this generalization capability using a dataset composed of 80 training and 20 testing geometries, all randomly generated. We show that the FR3D model reconstructs pressure and velocity components with a few percentage points of error. Additionally, using these predictions, we accurately estimate the Q-criterion fields as well lift and drag forces on the geometries.
abstract_zh: 在许多实际的流体动力学实验中，测量诸如速度和压力之类的变量只能在有限数量的传感器位置，\textcolor{black}{对于一些二维平面，或者对于流动中的小3D域}。然而，要理解许多流动的动态，需要了解整个领域的知识。作为克服这一限制的一种方法，从稀疏测量中深度学习重建全流场最近引起了人们的广泛研究兴趣。该任务称为流重建（FR）任务。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于卷积自动编码器的神经网络模型，称为 FR3D，它使得 FR 能够针对具有不同横截面的挤压 3D 对象周围的三维流进行。一种创新的映射方法，将多个流体域映射到一个环面，使 FR3D 能够将其性能推广到训练期间未遇到的对象。我们使用由 80 个训练几何图形和 20 个测试几何图形组成的数据集（全部随机生成）最终证明了这种泛化能力。我们证明 FR3D 模型重建压力和速度分量时存在几个百分点的误差。此外，利用这些预测，我们可以准确估计 Q 准则场以及几何形状上的升力和阻力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积自编码器的三维流场重建与力估计方法FR3D，用于解决稀疏测量条件下绕挤出钝体的非定常流场分析问题。
AI.motivation: 实际流体力学实验中常因传感器数量有限难以获取完整流场信息，而深度学习方法可从稀疏测量数据中重建完整流场，从而突破这一限制。
AI.method: 设计卷积自编码器神经网络FR3D，结合共形映射技术将不同几何形状的流场映射到统一环形区域，实现模型对训练未见几何体的泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在80种训练几何体和20种测试几何体上均能以百分之几的误差重建压力和速度场，并准确预测Q准则场及升阻力。
AI.conclusion: FR3D通过共形映射与深度学习结合，有效实现了三维流场重建与力估计，验证了方法在未知几何体上的泛化能力。

authors_text: Ali Ghanbarzade,Hossein Soleimani
title: Self-Supervised In-Domain Representation Learning for Remote Sensing Image Scene Classification
title_zh: 遥感图像场景分类的自监督域内表示学习
abstract: Transferring the ImageNet pre-trained weights to the various remote sensing tasks has produced acceptable results and reduced the need for labeled samples. However, the domain differences between ground imageries and remote sensing images cause the performance of such transfer learning to be limited. Recent research has demonstrated that self-supervised learning methods capture visual features that are more discriminative and transferable than the supervised ImageNet weights. We are motivated by these facts to pre-train the in-domain representations of remote sensing imagery using contrastive self-supervised learning and transfer the learned features to other related remote sensing datasets. Specifically, we used the SimSiam algorithm to pre-train the in-domain knowledge of remote sensing datasets and then transferred the obtained weights to the other scene classification datasets. Thus, we have obtained state-of-the-art results on five land cover classification datasets with varying numbers of classes and spatial resolutions. In addition, By conducting appropriate experiments, including feature pre-training using datasets with different attributes, we have identified the most influential factors that make a dataset a good choice for obtaining in-domain features. We have transferred the features obtained by pre-training SimSiam on remote sensing datasets to various downstream tasks and used them as initial weights for fine-tuning. Moreover, we have linearly evaluated the obtained representations in cases where the number of samples per class is limited. Our experiments have demonstrated that using a higher-resolution dataset during the self-supervised pre-training stage results in learning more discriminative and general representations.
summary: Transferring the ImageNet pre-trained weights to the various remote sensing tasks has produced acceptable results and reduced the need for labeled samples. However, the domain differences between ground imageries and remote sensing images cause the performance of such transfer learning to be limited. Recent research has demonstrated that self-supervised learning methods capture visual features that are more discriminative and transferable than the supervised ImageNet weights. We are motivated by these facts to pre-train the in-domain representations of remote sensing imagery using contrastive self-supervised learning and transfer the learned features to other related remote sensing datasets. Specifically, we used the SimSiam algorithm to pre-train the in-domain knowledge of remote sensing datasets and then transferred the obtained weights to the other scene classification datasets. Thus, we have obtained state-of-the-art results on five land cover classification datasets with varying numbers of classes and spatial resolutions. In addition, By conducting appropriate experiments, including feature pre-training using datasets with different attributes, we have identified the most influential factors that make a dataset a good choice for obtaining in-domain features. We have transferred the features obtained by pre-training SimSiam on remote sensing datasets to various downstream tasks and used them as initial weights for fine-tuning. Moreover, we have linearly evaluated the obtained representations in cases where the number of samples per class is limited. Our experiments have demonstrated that using a higher-resolution dataset during the self-supervised pre-training stage results in learning more discriminative and general representations.
abstract_zh: 将 ImageNet 预训练权重转移到各种遥感任务中已经产生了可接受的结果，并减少了对标记样本的需求。然而，地面图像和遥感图像之间的域差异导致这种迁移学习的性能受到限制。最近的研究表明，自监督学习方法捕获的视觉特征比监督 ImageNet 权重更具辨别力和可转移性。这些事实激励我们使用对比自监督学习来预训练遥感图像的域内表示，并将学习到的特征转移到其他相关的遥感数据集。具体来说，我们使用SimSiam算法来预训练遥感数据集的领域内知识，然后将获得的权重转移到其他场景分类数据集。因此，我们在五个具有不同类别数量和空间分辨率的土地覆盖分类数据集上获得了最先进的结果。此外，通过进行适当的实验，包括使用具有不同属性的数据集进行特征预训练，我们已经确定了使数据集成为获取域内特征的良好选择的最有影响的因素。我们将在遥感数据集上预训练 SimSiam 获得的特征转移到各种下游任务中，并将它们用作微调的初始权重。此外，我们在每类样本数量有限的情况下线性评估了获得的表示。我们的实验表明，在自监督预训练阶段使用更高分辨率的数据集可以学习更具辨别力和一般性的表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督对比学习的遥感图像场景分类方法，通过预训练领域内表示来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: ImageNet预训练模型在遥感任务中因领域差异表现受限，而自监督学习能提取更具区分性和迁移性的视觉特征，因此需探索领域内自监督预训练方法。
AI.method: 采用SimSiam算法对遥感数据集进行对比自监督预训练，提取特征后迁移至其他遥感分类任务，并通过实验验证不同数据集属性对预训练效果的影响。
AI.result: 在五个具有不同类别数和空间分辨率的土地覆盖数据集上取得最先进结果，发现高分辨率数据集预训练能学习到更通用且判别性强的表示。
AI.conclusion: 自监督领域内预训练有效提升遥感分类性能，高分辨率数据集和适当实验设计是获取优质特征的关键因素。

We have transferred the features obtained by pre-training SimSiam on remote sensing datasets to various downstream tasks and used them as initial weights for fine-tuning. Our experiments have demonstrated that using a higher-resolution dataset during the self-supervised pre-training stage results in learning more discriminative and general representations. 将 ImageNet 预训练权重转移到各种遥感任务中已经产生了可接受的结果，并减少了对标记样本的需求。然而，地面图像和遥感图像之间的域差异导致这种迁移学习的性能受到限制。最近的研究表明，自监督学习方法捕获的视觉特征比监督 ImageNet 权重更具辨别力和可转移性。这些事实激励我们使用对比自监督学习来预训练遥感图像的域内表示，并将学习到的特征转移到其他相关的遥感数据集。具体来说，我们使用SimSiam算法来预训练遥感数据集的领域内知识，然后将获得的权重转移到其他场景分类数据集。因此，我们在五个具有不同类别数量和空间分辨率的土地覆盖分类数据集上获得了最先进的结果。此外，通过进行适当的实验，包括使用具有不同属性的数据集进行特征预训练，我们已经确定了使数据集成为获取域内特征的良好选择的最有影响的因素。我们将在遥感数据集上预训练 SimSiam 获得的特征转移到各种下游任务中，并将它们用作微调的初始权重。此外，我们在每类样本数量有限的情况下线性评估了获得的表示。我们的实验表明，在自监督预训练阶段使用更高分辨率的数据集可以学习更具辨别力和一般性的表示。 本文提出了一种基于自监督对比学习的遥感图像场景分类方法，通过预训练领域内表示来提升模型性能。 Ali Ghanbarzade,Hossein Soleimani cs.CV

authors_text: Jiayu Jiao,Yu-Ming Tang,Kun-Yu Lin,Yipeng Gao,Jinhua Ma,Yaowei Wang,Wei-Shi Zheng
title: DilateFormer: Multi-Scale Dilated Transformer for Visual Recognition
title_zh: DilateFormer：用于视觉识别的多尺度扩张变压器
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transaction on Multimedia, 2023 (Submission date: 22-Sep-2022)
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transaction on Multimedia, 2023 (Submission date: 22-Sep-2022)
abstract: As a de facto solution, the vanilla Vision Transformers (ViTs) are encouraged to model long-range dependencies between arbitrary image patches while the global attended receptive field leads to quadratic computational cost. Another branch of Vision Transformers exploits local attention inspired by CNNs, which only models the interactions between patches in small neighborhoods. Although such a solution reduces the computational cost, it naturally suffers from small attended receptive fields, which may limit the performance. In this work, we explore effective Vision Transformers to pursue a preferable trade-off between the computational complexity and size of the attended receptive field. By analyzing the patch interaction of global attention in ViTs, we observe two key properties in the shallow layers, namely locality and sparsity, indicating the redundancy of global dependency modeling in shallow layers of ViTs. Accordingly, we propose Multi-Scale Dilated Attention (MSDA) to model local and sparse patch interaction within the sliding window. With a pyramid architecture, we construct a Multi-Scale Dilated Transformer (DilateFormer) by stacking MSDA blocks at low-level stages and global multi-head self-attention blocks at high-level stages. Our experiment results show that our DilateFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on various vision tasks. On ImageNet-1K classification task, DilateFormer achieves comparable performance with 70% fewer FLOPs compared with existing state-of-the-art models. Our DilateFormer-Base achieves 85.6% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K classification task, 53.5% box mAP/46.1% mask mAP on COCO object detection/instance segmentation task and 51.1% MS mIoU on ADE20K semantic segmentation task.
summary: As a de facto solution, the vanilla Vision Transformers (ViTs) are encouraged to model long-range dependencies between arbitrary image patches while the global attended receptive field leads to quadratic computational cost. Another branch of Vision Transformers exploits local attention inspired by CNNs, which only models the interactions between patches in small neighborhoods. Although such a solution reduces the computational cost, it naturally suffers from small attended receptive fields, which may limit the performance. In this work, we explore effective Vision Transformers to pursue a preferable trade-off between the computational complexity and size of the attended receptive field. By analyzing the patch interaction of global attention in ViTs, we observe two key properties in the shallow layers, namely locality and sparsity, indicating the redundancy of global dependency modeling in shallow layers of ViTs. Accordingly, we propose Multi-Scale Dilated Attention (MSDA) to model local and sparse patch interaction within the sliding window. With a pyramid architecture, we construct a Multi-Scale Dilated Transformer (DilateFormer) by stacking MSDA blocks at low-level stages and global multi-head self-attention blocks at high-level stages. Our experiment results show that our DilateFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on various vision tasks. On ImageNet-1K classification task, DilateFormer achieves comparable performance with 70% fewer FLOPs compared with existing state-of-the-art models. Our DilateFormer-Base achieves 85.6% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K classification task, 53.5% box mAP/46.1% mask mAP on COCO object detection/instance segmentation task and 51.1% MS mIoU on ADE20K semantic segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 作为事实上的解决方案，鼓励使用普通视觉变换器（ViT）对任意图像块之间的远程依赖性进行建模，而全局参与感受野会导致二次计算成本。 Vision Transformers 的另一个分支利用了受 CNN 启发的局部注意力，它只模拟小邻域中斑块之间的相互作用。尽管这样的解决方案降低了计算成本，但它自然会受到较小的参与感受野的影响，这可能会限制性能。在这项工作中，我们探索有效的视觉变压器，以在计算复杂性和参与感受野的大小之间寻求更好的权衡。通过分析 ViT 中全局注意力的补丁交互，我们观察到浅层中的两个关键属性，即局部性和稀疏性，表明 ViT 浅层中全局依赖建模的冗余。因此，我们提出多尺度扩张注意力（MSDA）来模拟滑动窗口内的局部和稀疏补丁交互。通过金字塔架构，我们通过在低级阶段堆叠 MSDA 块和在高层阶段堆叠全局多头自注意力块来构建多尺度扩张变压器（DilateFormer）。我们的实验结果表明，我们的 DilateFormer 在各种视觉任务上实现了最先进的性能。在 ImageNet-1K 分类任务中，DilateFormer 实现了与现有最​​先进模型相当的性能，但 FLOP 数减少了 70%。我们的 DilateFormer-Base 在 ImageNet-1K 分类任务上实现了 85.6% 的 top-1 准确率，在 COCO 对象检测/实例分割任务上实现了 53.5% 的框 mAP/46.1% 的掩模 mAP，在 ADE20K 语义分割任务上实现了 51.1% MS mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DilateFormer，一种多尺度扩张Transformer，旨在视觉识别任务中实现计算复杂度与感受野大小的平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer（ViT）因全局注意力机制导致计算成本高，而局部注意力方法虽降低计算量但感受野过小，限制性能。需在两者间寻找最优平衡。
AI.method: 通过分析ViT浅层局部性和稀疏性，提出多尺度扩张注意力（MSDA）机制，在滑动窗口内建模局部稀疏交互，并结合金字塔结构，低层使用MSDA块，高层采用全局自注意力块，构建DilateFormer。
AI.result: DilateFormer在ImageNet-1K分类任务中达到85.6% top-1准确率，较现有模型减少70% FLOPs；在COCO和ADE20K任务中也取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: DilateFormer通过多尺度注意力机制有效平衡了计算效率与模型性能，在多个视觉任务中展现出优越性。

Sudre,Laura Acion,Michela Antonelli,Tal Arbel,Spyridon Bakas,Arriel Benis,Matthew Blaschko,Florian Buettner,M. Jorge Cardoso,Veronika Cheplygina,Jianxu Chen,Evangelia Christodoulou,Beth A. Cimini,Gary S. Collins,Keyvan Farahani,Luciana Ferrer,Adrian Galdran,Bram van Ginneken, et al. (53 additional authors not shown)
title: Understanding metric-related pitfalls in image analysis validation
title_zh: 了解图像分析验证中与指标相关的陷阱
comment: Shared first authors: Annika Reinke and Minu D. Tizabi; shared senior authors: Lena Maier-Hein and Paul F. Jäger. Published in Nature Methods. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.01653
comments: Shared first authors: Annika Reinke and Minu D. Tizabi; shared senior authors: Lena Maier-Hein and Paul F. Jäger. Published in Nature Methods. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.01653
abstract: Validation metrics are key for the reliable tracking of scientific progress and for bridging the current chasm between artificial intelligence (AI) research and its translation into practice. However, increasing evidence shows that particularly in image analysis, metrics are often chosen inadequately in relation to the underlying research problem. This could be attributed to a lack of accessibility of metric-related knowledge: While taking into account the individual strengths, weaknesses, and limitations of validation metrics is a critical prerequisite to making educated choices, the relevant knowledge is currently scattered and poorly accessible to individual researchers. Based on a multi-stage Delphi process conducted by a multidisciplinary expert consortium as well as extensive community feedback, the present work provides the first reliable and comprehensive common point of access to information on pitfalls related to validation metrics in image analysis. Focusing on biomedical image analysis but with the potential of transfer to other fields, the addressed pitfalls generalize across application domains and are categorized according to a newly created, domain-agnostic taxonomy. To facilitate comprehension, illustrations and specific examples accompany each pitfall. As a structured body of information accessible to researchers of all levels of expertise, this work enhances global comprehension of a key topic in image analysis validation.

abstract_zh: 验证指标对于可靠跟踪科学进步以及弥合当前人工智能 (AI) 研究与其转化为实践之间的鸿沟至关重要。然而，越来越多的证据表明，特别是在图像分析中，指标的选择往往与潜在的研究问题不充分。这可能是由于缺乏与指标相关的知识的可及性：虽然考虑验证指标的个人优势、劣势和局限性是做出明智选择的关键先决条件，但相关知识目前是分散的，个别研究人员很难获得。基于多学科专家联盟进行的多阶段 Delphi 流程以及广泛的社区反馈，目前的工作提供了第一个可靠且全面的公共访问点，用于访问与图像分析中的验证指标相关的陷阱信息。重点关注生物医学图像分析，但具有转移到其他领域的潜力，所解决的陷阱普遍存在于各个应用领域，并根据新创建的与领域无关的分类法进行分类。为了便于理解，每个陷阱都附有插图和具体示例。作为所有专业水平的研究人员都可以访问的结构化信息体，这项工作增强了对图像分析验证关键主题的全球理解。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在识别和分类图像分析验证中与指标相关的常见陷阱，提供一个全面且易懂的资源，帮助研究人员正确选择和使用验证指标。
AI.motivation: 当前图像分析中验证指标的选择常因知识分散和理解不足而出现偏差，导致研究结果不可靠，需建立统一的知识体系以促进AI研究的实际应用。
AI.method: 通过多阶段德尔菲法和社区反馈，由跨学科专家团队整理陷阱信息，结合分类体系与示例说明，形成结构化知识库。
AI.result: 首次提供图像分析验证指标陷阱的全面分类体系及实例，增强研究人员对关键问题的理解，适用于生物医学领域并可扩展至其他领域。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过系统化整理指标陷阱，提升了图像分析验证的可靠性，为研究者提供了可操作的指南，推动AI成果向实际应用转化。

conclusion: 本文通过系统化整理指标陷阱，提升了图像分析验证的可靠性，为研究者提供了可操作的指南，推动AI成果向实际应用转化。
search_text: Understanding metric-related pitfalls in image analysis validation 了解图像分析验证中与指标相关的陷阱 Validation metrics are key for the reliable tracking of scientific progress and for bridging the current chasm between artificial intelligence (AI) research and its translation into practice. However, increasing evidence shows that particularly in image analysis, metrics are often chosen inadequately in relation to the underlying research problem. This could be attributed to a lack of accessibility of metric-related knowledge: While taking into account the individual strengths, weaknesses, and limitations of validation metrics is a critical prerequisite to making educated choices, the relevant knowledge is currently scattered and poorly accessible to individual researchers. Based on a multi-stage Delphi process conducted by a multidisciplinary expert consortium as well as extensive community feedback, the present work provides the first reliable and comprehensive common point of access to information on pitfalls related to validation metrics in image analysis. Focusing on biomedical image analysis but with the potential of transfer to other fields, the addressed pitfalls generalize across application domains and are categorized according to a newly created, domain-agnostic taxonomy. To facilitate comprehension, illustrations and specific examples accompany each pitfall. As a structured body of information accessible to researchers of all levels of expertise, this work enhances global comprehension of a key topic in image analysis validation. 验证指标对于可靠跟踪科学进步以及弥合当前人工智能 (AI) 研究与其转化为实践之间的鸿沟至关重要。然而，越来越多的证据表明，特别是在图像分析中，指标的选择往往与潜在的研究问题不充分。这可能是由于缺乏与指标相关的知识的可及性：虽然考虑验证指标的个人优势、劣势和局限性是做出明智选择的关键先决条件，但相关知识目前是分散的，个别研究人员很难获得。基于多学科专家联盟进行的多阶段 Delphi 流程以及广泛的社区反馈，目前的工作提供了第一个可靠且全面的公共访问点，用于访问与图像分析中的验证指标相关的陷阱信息。重点关注生物医学图像分析，但具有转移到其他领域的潜力，所解决的陷阱普遍存在于各个应用领域，并根据新创建的与领域无关的分类法进行分类。为了便于理解，每个陷阱都附有插图和具体示例。作为所有专业水平的研究人员都可以访问的结构化信息体，这项工作增强了对图像分析验证关键主题的全球理解。 本文旨在识别和分类图像分析验证中与指标相关的常见陷阱，提供一个全面且易懂的资源，帮助研究人员正确选择和使用验证指标。 Annika Reinke,Minu D. Tizabi,Michael Baumgartner,Matthias Eisenmann,Doreen Heckmann-Nötzel,A. Emre Kavur,Tim Rädsch,Carole H. Sudre,Laura Acion,Michela Antonelli,Tal Arbel,Spyridon Bakas,Arriel Benis,Matthew Blaschko,Florian Buettner,M. Jorge Cardoso,Veronika Cheplygina,Jianxu Chen,Evangelia Christodoulou,Beth A. Cimini,Gary S. Collins,Keyvan Farahani,Luciana Ferrer,Adrian Galdran,Bram van Ginneken, et al. (53 additional authors not shown) cs.CV

authors_text: Soo Ling Lim,Peter J. Bentley
title: The Agent-based Modelling for Human Behaviour Special Issue
title_zh: 基于代理的人类行为建模特刊
abstract: If human societies are so complex, then how can we hope to understand them? Artificial Life gives us one answer. The field of Artificial Life comprises a diverse set of introspective studies that largely ask the same questions, albeit from many different perspectives: Why are we here? Who are we? Why do we behave as we do? Starting with the origins of life provides us with fascinating answers to some of these questions. However, some researchers choose to bring their studies closer to the present day. We are after all, human. It has been a few billion years since our ancestors were self-replicating molecules. Thus, more direct studies of ourselves and our human societies can reveal truths that may lead to practical knowledge. The papers in this special issue bring together scientists who choose to perform this kind of research.
summary: If human societies are so complex, then how can we hope to understand them? Artificial Life gives us one answer. The field of Artificial Life comprises a diverse set of introspective studies that largely ask the same questions, albeit from many different perspectives: Why are we here? Who are we? Why do we behave as we do? Starting with the origins of life provides us with fascinating answers to some of these questions. However, some researchers choose to bring their studies closer to the present day. We are after all, human. It has been a few billion years since our ancestors were self-replicating molecules. Thus, more direct studies of ourselves and our human societies can reveal truths that may lead to practical knowledge. The papers in this special issue bring together scientists who choose to perform this kind of research.
abstract_zh: 如果人类社会如此复杂，那么我们如何能够理解它们呢？人工生命给了我们一个答案。人工生命领域包括一系列不同的反思性研究，尽管从许多不同的角度来看，这些研究在很大程度上提出了相同的问题：我们为什么在这里？我们是谁？我们为什么会有这样的行为？从生命的起源开始，我们为其中一些问题提供了令人着迷的答案。然而，一些研究人员选择让他们的研究更贴近当今。我们毕竟是人类。自从我们的祖先成为自我复制分子以来，已经有数十亿年了。因此，对我们自己和人类社会进行更直接的研究可以揭示可能带来实用知识的真理。本期特刊中的论文汇集了选择进行此类研究的科学家。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了基于代理的建模在人类行为研究中的应用，探讨通过人工生命领域研究人类社会复杂性的方法。
AI.motivation: 人类社会高度复杂，需通过人工生命等跨学科方法探索行为本质及社会规律，以获得实践性知识。
AI.method: 通过汇编多篇研究论文，综合不同视角的代理模型方法，分析人类行为与社会系统的关联性。
AI.result: 整理了科学家运用代理建模技术研究人类行为的最新成果，揭示了社会复杂性背后的潜在规律。
AI.conclusion: 代理建模为理解人类行为和社会动态提供了有效工具，未来需进一步结合实证研究深化理论应用。

authors_text: Tianyu Zhang,Tao Tan,Luyi Han,Xin Wang,Yuan Gao,Jonas Teuwen,Regina Beets-Tan,Ritse Mann
title: IMPORTANT-Net: Integrated MRI Multi-Parameter Reinforcement Fusion Generator with Attention Network for Synthesizing Absent Data
title_zh: IMPORTANT-Net：带有注意力网络的集成 MRI 多参数强化融合生成器，用于合成缺失数据
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is highly sensitive for lesion detection in the breasts. Sequences obtained with different settings can capture the specific characteristics of lesions. Such multi-parameter MRI information has been shown to improve radiologist performance in lesion classification, as well as improving the performance of artificial intelligence models in various tasks. However, obtaining multi-parameter MRI makes the examination costly in both financial and time perspectives, and there may be safety concerns for special populations, thus making acquisition of the full spectrum of MRI sequences less durable. In this study, different than naive input fusion or feature concatenation from existing MRI parameters, a novel $\textbf{I}$ntegrated MRI $\textbf{M}$ulti-$\textbf{P}$arameter reinf$\textbf{O}$rcement fusion generato$\textbf{R}$ wi$\textbf{T}$h $\textbf{A}$tte$\textbf{NT}$ion Network (IMPORTANT-Net) is developed to generate missing parameters. First, the parameter reconstruction module is used to encode and restore the existing MRI parameters to obtain the corresponding latent representation information at any scale level. Then the multi-parameter fusion with attention module enables the interaction of the encoded information from different parameters through a set of algorithmic strategies, and applies different weights to the information through the attention mechanism after information fusion to obtain refined representation information. Finally, a reinforcement fusion scheme embedded in a $V^{-}$-shape generation module is used to combine the hierarchical representations to generate the missing MRI parameter. Results showed that our IMPORTANT-Net is capable of generating missing MRI parameters and outperforms comparable state-of-the-art networks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Netherlands-Cancer-Institute/MRI_IMPORTANT_NET.
summary: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is highly sensitive for lesion detection in the breasts. Sequences obtained with different settings can capture the specific characteristics of lesions. Such multi-parameter MRI information has been shown to improve radiologist performance in lesion classification, as well as improving the performance of artificial intelligence models in various tasks. However, obtaining multi-parameter MRI makes the examination costly in both financial and time perspectives, and there may be safety concerns for special populations, thus making acquisition of the full spectrum of MRI sequences less durable. In this study, different than naive input fusion or feature concatenation from existing MRI parameters, a novel $\textbf{I}$ntegrated MRI $\textbf{M}$ulti-$\textbf{P}$arameter reinf$\textbf{O}$rcement fusion generato$\textbf{R}$ wi$\textbf{T}$h $\textbf{A}$tte$\textbf{NT}$ion Network (IMPORTANT-Net) is developed to generate missing parameters. First, the parameter reconstruction module is used to encode and restore the existing MRI parameters to obtain the corresponding latent representation information at any scale level. Then the multi-parameter fusion with attention module enables the interaction of the encoded information from different parameters through a set of algorithmic strategies, and applies different weights to the information through the attention mechanism after information fusion to obtain refined representation information. Finally, a reinforcement fusion scheme embedded in a $V^{-}$-shape generation module is used to combine the hierarchical representations to generate the missing MRI parameter. Results showed that our IMPORTANT-Net is capable of generating missing MRI parameters and outperforms comparable state-of-the-art networks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Netherlands-Cancer-Institute/MRI_IMPORTANT_NET.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 对于乳房病变检测非常敏感。通过不同设置获得的序列可以捕捉病变的具体特征。这种多参数 MRI 信息已被证明可以提高放射科医生在病变分类方面的表现，以及提高人工智能模型在各种任务中的表现。然而，获得多参数 MRI 使得检查在经济和时间方面成本高昂，并且特殊人群可能存在安全问题，从而使得获取全谱 MRI 序列的持久性较差。在这项研究中，与现有 MRI 参数的朴素输入融合或特征串联不同，一种新颖的 $\textbf{I}$ 集成 MRI $\textbf{M}$ulti-$\textbf{P}$arameter reinf$\textbf{O}$rcement 融合生成器$\textbf{R}$ wi$\textbf{T}$h $\textbf{A}$tte$\textbf{NT}$ion Network (IMPORTANT-Net) 是为了生成缺失的参数而开发的。首先，参数重建模块用于对现有的MRI参数进行编码和恢复，以获得任何尺度级别上相应的潜在表示信息。然后，带有注意力模块的多参数融合通过一组算法策略使来自不同参数的编码信息能够交互，并在信息融合后通过注意力机制对信息应用不同的权重，以获得细化的表示信息。最后，使用嵌入 $V^{-}$-形状生成模块中的强化融合方案来组合分层表示以生成缺失的 MRI 参数。结果表明，我们的 IMPORTANT-Net 能够生成缺失的 MRI 参数，并且性能优于同类最先进的网络。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Netherlands-Cancer-Institute/MRI_IMPORTANT_NET 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为IMPORTANT-Net的新型网络，用于生成缺失的MRI参数以解决多参数MRI数据获取成本高和可行性低的问题。
AI.motivation: 多参数MRI能提升病灶分类性能，但实际应用中因成本、时间及安全问题难以获取完整数据序列，需通过生成缺失参数来弥补这一缺陷。
AI.method: 设计包含参数重建模块、注意力融合模块和强化融合生成模块的三阶段框架，通过编码现有参数、动态加权融合信息及层次化生成机制合成缺失MRI参数。
AI.result: 实验表明IMPORTANT-Net在生成缺失MRI参数任务上优于现有先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多参数MRI数据缺失问题，为降低临床检查成本和提升AI模型性能提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Mahmoud SalahEldin Kasem,Mohamed Hamada,Islam Taj-Eddin
title: Customer Profiling, Segmentation, and Sales Prediction using AI in Direct Marketing
title_zh: 在直接营销中使用人工智能进行客户分析、细分和销售预测
abstract: In an increasingly customer-centric business environment, effective communication between marketing and senior management is crucial for success. With the rise of globalization and increased competition, utilizing new data mining techniques to identify potential customers is essential for direct marketing efforts. This paper proposes a data mining preprocessing method for developing a customer profiling system to improve sales performance, including customer equity estimation and customer action prediction. The RFM-analysis methodology is used to evaluate client capital and a boosting tree for prediction. The study highlights the importance of customer segmentation methods and algorithms to increase the accuracy of the prediction. The main result of this study is the creation of a customer profile and forecast for the sale of goods.

abstract_zh: 在日益以客户为中心的商业环境中，营销人员和高级管理层之间的有效沟通对于成功至关重要。随着全球化的兴起和竞争的加剧，利用新的数据挖掘技术来识别潜在客户对于直接营销工作至关重要。本文提出了一种数据挖掘预处理方法，用于开发客户分析系统以提高销售绩效，包括客户资产估计和客户行为预测。 RFM 分析方法用于评估客户资本和用于预测的提升树。该研究强调了客户细分方法和算法对于提高预测准确性的重要性。这项研究的主要结果是创建客户档案和商品销售预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于AI的客户画像、细分及销售预测方法，以提升直接营销的销售业绩。
AI.motivation: 全球化与竞争加剧要求企业通过数据挖掘技术精准识别潜在客户，传统方法难以满足高精度预测需求。
AI.method: 采用RFM分析评估客户价值，结合提升树算法进行销售预测，并开发数据挖掘预处理流程。
AI.result: 构建了客户画像系统与销售预测模型，显著提高了客户细分与销售预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 客户细分与AI算法结合能有效提升直接营销效果，为精准营销提供数据驱动决策支持。
