authors_text: Rajagopal Venkatesaramani,Zhiyu Wan,Bradley A. Malin,Yevgeniy Vorobeychik
title: Enabling Trade-offs in Privacy and Utility in Genomic Data Beacons and Summary Statistics
title_zh: 在基因组数据信标和汇总统计中实现隐私和实用性的权衡
abstract: The collection and sharing of genomic data are becoming increasingly commonplace in research, clinical, and direct-to-consumer settings. The computational protocols typically adopted to protect individual privacy include sharing summary statistics, such as allele frequencies, or limiting query responses to the presence/absence of alleles of interest using web-services called Beacons. However, even such limited releases are susceptible to likelihood-ratio-based membership-inference attacks. Several approaches have been proposed to preserve privacy, which either suppress a subset of genomic variants or modify query responses for specific variants (e.g., adding noise, as in differential privacy). However, many of these approaches result in a significant utility loss, either suppressing many variants or adding a substantial amount of noise. In this paper, we introduce optimization-based approaches to explicitly trade off the utility of summary data or Beacon responses and privacy with respect to membership-inference attacks based on likelihood-ratios, combining variant suppression and modification. We consider two attack models. In the first, an attacker applies a likelihood-ratio test to make membership-inference claims. In the second model, an attacker uses a threshold that accounts for the effect of the data release on the separation in scores between individuals in the dataset and those who are not. We further introduce highly scalable approaches for approximately solving the privacy-utility tradeoff problem when information is either in the form of summary statistics or presence/absence queries. Finally, we show that the proposed approaches outperform the state of the art in both utility and privacy through an extensive evaluation with public datasets.
summary: The collection and sharing of genomic data are becoming increasingly commonplace in research, clinical, and direct-to-consumer settings. The computational protocols typically adopted to protect individual privacy include sharing summary statistics, such as allele frequencies, or limiting query responses to the presence/absence of alleles of interest using web-services called Beacons. However, even such limited releases are susceptible to likelihood-ratio-based membership-inference attacks. Several approaches have been proposed to preserve privacy, which either suppress a subset of genomic variants or modify query responses for specific variants (e.g., adding noise, as in differential privacy). However, many of these approaches result in a significant utility loss, either suppressing many variants or adding a substantial amount of noise. In this paper, we introduce optimization-based approaches to explicitly trade off the utility of summary data or Beacon responses and privacy with respect to membership-inference attacks based on likelihood-ratios, combining variant suppression and modification. We consider two attack models. In the first, an attacker applies a likelihood-ratio test to make membership-inference claims. In the second model, an attacker uses a threshold that accounts for the effect of the data release on the separation in scores between individuals in the dataset and those who are not. We further introduce highly scalable approaches for approximately solving the privacy-utility tradeoff problem when information is either in the form of summary statistics or presence/absence queries. Finally, we show that the proposed approaches outperform the state of the art in both utility and privacy through an extensive evaluation with public datasets.
abstract_zh: 基因组数据的收集和共享在研究、临床和直接面向消费者的环境中变得越来越普遍。通常用于保护个人隐私的计算协议包括共享摘要统计数据，例如等位基因频率，或使用称为信标的网络服务限制对感兴趣的等位基因是否存在的查询响应。然而，即使如此有限的发布也容易受到基于似然比的成员资格推断攻击。已经提出了几种保护隐私的方法，这些方法要么抑制基因组变体的子集，要么修改特定变体的查询响应（例如，添加噪声，如差异隐私）。然而，许多这些方法会导致显着的效用损失，要么抑制许多变体，要么增加大量噪声。在本文中，我们引入基于优化的方法，以明确权衡摘要数据或信标响应的效用和基于似然比的成员推理攻击的隐私，结合变体抑制和修改。我们考虑两种攻击模型。首先，攻击者应用似然比测试来做出成员资格推断声明。在第二个模型中，攻击者使用一个阈值来解释数据发布对数据集中个体和非数据集中个体之间分数差异的影响。我们进一步介绍了高度可扩展的方法，用于近似解决当信息采用摘要统计或存在/不存在查询的形式时的隐私与实用性权衡问题。最后，我们通过对公共数据集的广泛评估表明，所提出的方法在实用性和隐私性方面均优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于优化的方法，在基因组数据信标和汇总统计中实现隐私与效用的权衡，通过结合变异抑制和响应修改来应对似然比攻击。
AI.motivation: 基因组数据共享面临隐私泄露风险，现有方法（如抑制变异或添加噪声）导致效用显著损失，需在隐私保护与数据效用间找到平衡。
AI.method: 引入优化框架，结合变异抑制与响应修改，针对两种攻击模型（似然比测试与阈值分离）设计可扩展的隐私-效用权衡解决方案。
AI.result: 在公共数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在隐私保护和数据效用方面均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化权衡策略有效提升基因组数据共享的安全性与实用性，为隐私保护提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yiming Li,Mengxi Ya,Yang Bai,Yong Jiang,Shu-Tao Xia
title: BackdoorBox: A Python Toolbox for Backdoor Learning
title_zh: BackdoorBox：用于后门学习的Python工具箱
comment: BackdoorBox V0.1. The first two authors contributed equally to this toolbox. 13 pages
comments: BackdoorBox V0.1. The first two authors contributed equally to this toolbox. 13 pages
abstract: Third-party resources ($e.g.$, samples, backbones, and pre-trained models) are usually involved in the training of deep neural networks (DNNs), which brings backdoor attacks as a new training-phase threat. In general, backdoor attackers intend to implant hidden backdoor in DNNs, so that the attacked DNNs behave normally on benign samples whereas their predictions will be maliciously changed to a pre-defined target label if hidden backdoors are activated by attacker-specified trigger patterns. To facilitate the research and development of more secure training schemes and defenses, we design an open-sourced Python toolbox that implements representative and advanced backdoor attacks and defenses under a unified and flexible framework. Our toolbox has four important and promising characteristics, including consistency, simplicity, flexibility, and co-development. It allows researchers and developers to easily implement and compare different methods on benchmark or their local datasets. This Python toolbox, namely \texttt{BackdoorBox}, is available at \url{https://github.com/THUYimingLi/BackdoorBox}.
summary: Third-party resources ($e.g.$, samples, backbones, and pre-trained models) are usually involved in the training of deep neural networks (DNNs), which brings backdoor attacks as a new training-phase threat. In general, backdoor attackers intend to implant hidden backdoor in DNNs, so that the attacked DNNs behave normally on benign samples whereas their predictions will be maliciously changed to a pre-defined target label if hidden backdoors are activated by attacker-specified trigger patterns. To facilitate the research and development of more secure training schemes and defenses, we design an open-sourced Python toolbox that implements representative and advanced backdoor attacks and defenses under a unified and flexible framework. Our toolbox has four important and promising characteristics, including consistency, simplicity, flexibility, and co-development. It allows researchers and developers to easily implement and compare different methods on benchmark or their local datasets. This Python toolbox, namely \texttt{BackdoorBox}, is available at \url{https://github.com/THUYimingLi/BackdoorBox}.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）的训练通常涉及第三方资源（例如样本、骨干网和预训练模型），这将后门攻击作为新的训练阶段威胁。一般来说，后门攻击者打算在 DNN 中植入隐藏的后门，以便受攻击的 DNN 在良性样本上表现正常，而如果隐藏后门被攻击者指定的触发模式激活，则其预测将被恶意更改为预定义的目标标签。为了便于研发更安全的训练方案和防御，我们设计了一个开源的Python工具箱，在统一灵活的框架下实现了具有代表性和先进性的后门攻击和防御。我们的工具箱有四个重要且有前途的特征，包括一致性、简单性、灵活性和共同开发。它允许研究人员和开发人员轻松地在基准测试或本地数据集上实施和比较不同的方法。这个 Python 工具箱，即 \texttt{BackdoorBox}，可从 \url{https://github.com/THUYimingLi/BackdoorBox} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为BackdoorBox的Python工具箱，用于实现和研究深度神经网络中的后门攻击与防御方法。
AI.motivation: 第三方资源（如样本、预训练模型）的使用使深度学习模型面临训练阶段的后门攻击威胁，亟需统一工具支持安全训练方案和防御研究。
AI.method: 设计一个统一灵活的框架，实现多种代表性后门攻击与防御方法，支持在基准数据集或本地数据集上快速对比实验。
AI.result: 开发了具有一致性、简洁性、灵活性和协同开发特性的开源工具箱，可在GitHub获取并用于研究不同方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: BackdoorBox为后门攻击与防御研究提供了高效实验平台，有助于推动更安全的深度学习训练方案发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一个名为BackdoorBox的Python工具箱，用于实现和研究深度神经网络中的后门攻击与防御方法。

search_text: BackdoorBox: A Python Toolbox for Backdoor Learning BackdoorBox：用于后门学习的Python工具箱 Third-party resources ($e.g.$, samples, backbones, and pre-trained models) are usually involved in the training of deep neural networks (DNNs), which brings backdoor attacks as a new training-phase threat. In general, backdoor attackers intend to implant hidden backdoor in DNNs, so that the attacked DNNs behave normally on benign samples whereas their predictions will be maliciously changed to a pre-defined target label if hidden backdoors are activated by attacker-specified trigger patterns. To facilitate the research and development of more secure training schemes and defenses, we design an open-sourced Python toolbox that implements representative and advanced backdoor attacks and defenses under a unified and flexible framework. Our toolbox has four important and promising characteristics, including consistency, simplicity, flexibility, and co-development. It allows researchers and developers to easily implement and compare different methods on benchmark or their local datasets. This Python toolbox, namely \texttt{BackdoorBox}, is available at \url{https://github.com/THUYimingLi/BackdoorBox}. 深度神经网络（DNN）的训练通常涉及第三方资源（例如样本、骨干网和预训练模型），这将后门攻击作为新的训练阶段威胁。一般来说，后门攻击者打算在 DNN 中植入隐藏的后门，以便受攻击的 DNN 在良性样本上表现正常，而如果隐藏后门被攻击者指定的触发模式激活，则其预测将被恶意更改为预定义的目标标签。为了便于研发更安全的训练方案和防御，我们设计了一个开源的Python工具箱，在统一灵活的框架下实现了具有代表性和先进性的后门攻击和防御。我们的工具箱有四个重要且有前途的特征，包括一致性、简单性、灵活性和共同开发。它允许研究人员和开发人员轻松地在基准测试或本地数据集上实施和比较不同的方法。这个 Python 工具箱，即 \texttt{BackdoorBox}，可从 \url{https://github.com/THUYimingLi/BackdoorBox} 获取。 本文提出一个名为BackdoorBox的Python工具箱，用于实现和研究深度神经网络中的后门攻击与防御方法。 Yiming Li,Mengxi Ya,Yang Bai,Yong Jiang,Shu-Tao Xia cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ciprian-Octavian Truică,Elena-Simona Apostol,Panagiotis Karras
title: DANES: Deep Neural Network Ensemble Architecture for Social and Textual Context-aware Fake News Detection
title_zh: DANES：用于社交和文本上下文感知假新闻检测的深度神经网络集成架构
abstract: The growing popularity of social media platforms has simplified the creation and distribution of news articles but also creates a conduit for spreading fake news. In consequence, the need arises for effective context-aware fake news detection mechanisms, where the contextual information can be built either from the textual content of posts or from available social data (e.g., information about the users, reactions to posts, or the social network). In this paper, we propose DANES, a Deep Neural Network Ensemble Architecture for Social and Textual Context-aware Fake News Detection. DANES comprises a Text Branch for a textual content-based context and a Social Branch for the social context. These two branches are used to create a novel Network Embedding. Preliminary ablation results on 3 real-world datasets, i.e., BuzzFace, Twitter15, and Twitter16, are promising, with an accuracy that outperforms state-of-the-art solutions when employing both social and textual content features.
summary: The growing popularity of social media platforms has simplified the creation and distribution of news articles but also creates a conduit for spreading fake news. In consequence, the need arises for effective context-aware fake news detection mechanisms, where the contextual information can be built either from the textual content of posts or from available social data (e.g., information about the users, reactions to posts, or the social network). In this paper, we propose DANES, a Deep Neural Network Ensemble Architecture for Social and Textual Context-aware Fake News Detection. DANES comprises a Text Branch for a textual content-based context and a Social Branch for the social context. These two branches are used to create a novel Network Embedding. Preliminary ablation results on 3 real-world datasets, i.e., BuzzFace, Twitter15, and Twitter16, are promising, with an accuracy that outperforms state-of-the-art solutions when employing both social and textual content features.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体平台的日益普及简化了新闻文章的创作和传播，但也为传播假新闻创造了渠道。因此，需要有效的上下文感知假新闻检测机制，其中上下文信息可以从帖子的文本内容或可用的社交数据（例如，有关用户的信息、对帖子的反应或社交网络）构建。在本文中，我们提出了 DANES，一种用于社交和文本上下文感知假新闻检测的深度神经网络集成架构。 DANES 包括用于基于文本内容的上下文的文本分支和用于社交上下文的社交分支。这两个分支用于创建新颖的网络嵌入。 3 个现实世界数据集（即 BuzzFace、Twitter15 和 Twitter16）的初步消融结果很有希望，在使用社交和文本内容特征时，其准确性优于最先进的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DANES深度神经网络集成架构，用于结合社交和文本上下文信息的假新闻检测。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体的普及导致假新闻传播加剧，传统检测方法难以有效利用文本内容与社交数据的上下文信息。
AI.method: 设计包含文本分支（处理文本内容）和社会分支（分析用户社交数据）的双分支架构，生成融合嵌入表示进行假新闻检测。
AI.result: 在BuzzFace、Twitter15和Twitter16三个数据集上的消融实验显示，DANES准确率优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合文本与社交上下文信息的深度集成架构能有效提升假新闻检测性能，为后续研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Aleksei Gavron,Konstantin Belev,Konstantin Kudelkin,Vladislav Shikhov,Andrey Akushevich,Alexey Fartukov,Vladimir Paramonov,Dmitry Syromolotov,Artem Makoyan
title: Motion ID: Human Authentication Approach
title_zh: Motion ID：人工身份验证方法
abstract: We introduce a novel approach to user authentication called Motion ID. The method employs motion sensing provided by inertial measurement units (IMUs), using it to verify the persons identity via short time series of IMU data captured by the mobile device. The paper presents two labeled datasets with unlock events: the first features IMU measurements, provided by six users who continuously collected data on six different smartphones for a period of 12 weeks. The second one contains 50 hours of IMU data for one specific motion pattern, provided by 101 users. Moreover, we present a two-stage user authentication process that employs motion pattern identification and user verification and is based on data preprocessing and machine learning. The Results section details the assessment of the method proposed, comparing it with existing biometric authentication methods and the Android biometric standard. The method has demonstrated high accuracy, indicating that it could be successfully used in combination with existing methods. Furthermore, the method exhibits significant promise as a standalone solution. We provide the datasets to the scholarly community and share our project code.
summary: We introduce a novel approach to user authentication called Motion ID. The method employs motion sensing provided by inertial measurement units (IMUs), using it to verify the persons identity via short time series of IMU data captured by the mobile device. The paper presents two labeled datasets with unlock events: the first features IMU measurements, provided by six users who continuously collected data on six different smartphones for a period of 12 weeks. The second one contains 50 hours of IMU data for one specific motion pattern, provided by 101 users. Moreover, we present a two-stage user authentication process that employs motion pattern identification and user verification and is based on data preprocessing and machine learning. The Results section details the assessment of the method proposed, comparing it with existing biometric authentication methods and the Android biometric standard. The method has demonstrated high accuracy, indicating that it could be successfully used in combination with existing methods. Furthermore, the method exhibits significant promise as a standalone solution. We provide the datasets to the scholarly community and share our project code.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种称为 Motion ID 的新颖的用户身份验证方法。该方法采用惯性测量单元 (IMU) 提供的运动传感，通过移动设备捕获的 IMU 数据的短时间序列来验证人员身份。该论文提出了两个带有解锁事件的标记数据集：第一个具有 IMU 测量结果，由 6 位用户提供，他们在 12 周内连续收集六种不同智能手机上的数据。第二个包含由 101 位用户提供的针对一种特定运动模式的 50 小时 IMU 数据。此外，我们提出了一个两阶段的用户身份验证过程，该过程采用运动模式识别和用户验证，并且基于数据预处理和机器学习。结果部分详细介绍了对所提出方法的评估，并将其与现有的生物识别认证方法和 Android 生物识别标准进行了比较。该方法表现出较高的准确性，表明它可以成功地与现有方法结合使用。此外，该方法作为独立解决方案展现出巨大的前景。我们向学术界提供数据集并共享我们的项目代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于惯性测量单元（IMU）运动数据的新型用户身份验证方法Motion ID，并通过两个数据集和机器学习进行验证。
AI.motivation: 现有生物特征认证方法存在安全性和便捷性不足的问题，需探索更可靠且普适的用户身份验证方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段认证流程：首先通过运动模式识别提取特征，再结合数据预处理与机器学习进行用户验证，使用包含6名用户12周数据及101名用户特定动作数据的两个数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法准确率高于现有生物特征认证及Android标准，既可作为独立方案亦可与其他方法结合使用。
AI.conclusion: Motion ID展现出作为新型身份验证技术的潜力，公开数据集和代码有助于推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Nicola Rizzo,Manuel Cáceres,Veli Mäkinen
title: Chaining of Maximal Exact Matches in Graphs
title_zh: 图中最大精确匹配的链接
abstract: We show how to chain maximal exact matches (MEMs) between a query string $Q$ and a labeled directed acyclic graph (DAG) $G=(V,E)$ to solve the longest common subsequence (LCS) problem between $Q$ and $G$. We obtain our result via a new symmetric formulation of chaining in DAGs that we solve in $O(m+n+k^2|V| + |E| + kN\log N)$ time, where $m=|Q|$, $n$ is the total length of node labels, $k$ is the minimum number of paths covering the nodes of $G$ and $N$ is the number of MEMs between $Q$ and node labels, which we show encode full MEMs.
summary: We show how to chain maximal exact matches (MEMs) between a query string $Q$ and a labeled directed acyclic graph (DAG) $G=(V,E)$ to solve the longest common subsequence (LCS) problem between $Q$ and $G$. We obtain our result via a new symmetric formulation of chaining in DAGs that we solve in $O(m+n+k^2|V| + |E| + kN\log N)$ time, where $m=|Q|$, $n$ is the total length of node labels, $k$ is the minimum number of paths covering the nodes of $G$ and $N$ is the number of MEMs between $Q$ and node labels, which we show encode full MEMs.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了如何在查询字符串 $Q$ 和标记有向无环图 (DAG) $G=(V,E)$ 之间链接最大精确匹配 (MEM)，以解决 $Q$ 和 $G$ 之间的最长公共子序列 (LCS) 问题。我们通过 DAG 中链接的新对称公式获得结果，该公式需要 $O(m+n+k^2|V| + |E| + kN\log N)$ 时间求解，其中 $m=|Q|$，$n$ 是节点标签的总长度，$k$ 是覆盖 $G$ 节点的路径的最小数量，$N$ 是 $Q$ 和节点标签之间的 MEM 数量，我们展示了对完整 MEM 进行编码。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过链式连接最大精确匹配（MEMs）来解决查询字符串与有向无环图（DAG）之间的最长公共子序列（LCS）问题的方法。
AI.motivation: 解决在DAG结构中高效计算LCS的挑战，现有方法可能效率不足，需要更优算法。
AI.method: 提出一种对称的DAG中链式处理方法，结合MEMs的编码，时间复杂度为O(m+n+k²|V| + |E| + kN log N)。
AI.result: 实现了在DAG中高效求解LCS，时间复杂度如上述公式所示，且MEMs能完整编码。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理DAG结构的LCS问题提供了理论基础和高效算法，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Anargyros Michaloliakos,Chongan Wang,Alexander F. Vakakis
title: Machine Learning Extreme Acoustic Non-reciprocity in a Linear Waveguide with Multiple Nonlinear Asymmetric Gates
title_zh: 具有多个非线性不对称门的线性波导中的机器学习极端声学非互易性
abstract: This work is a study of acoustic non-reciprocity exhibited by a passive one-dimensional linear waveguide incorporating two local strongly nonlinear, asymmetric gates. Two local nonlinear gates break the symmetry and linearity of the waveguide, yielding strong global non-reciprocal acoustics, in the way that extremely different acoustical responses occur depending on the side of application of harmonic excitation. To the authors' best knowledge that the present two-gated waveguide is capable of extremely high acoustic non-reciprocity, at a much higher level to what is reported by active or passive devices in the current literature; moreover, this extreme performance combines with acceptable levels of transmissibility in the desired direction of wave propagation. Machine learning is utilized for predictive design of this gated waveguide in terms of the measures of transmissibility and non-reciprocity, with the aim of reducing the required computational time for high-dimensional parameter space analysis. The study sheds new light into the physics of these media and considers the advantages and limitations of using neural networks to analyze this type of physical problems. In the predicted desirable parameter space for intense non-reciprocity, the maximum transmissibility reaches as much as 40%, and the transmitted energy from upstream to downstream varies up to nine orders of magnitude, depending on the direction of wave transmission. The machine learning tools along with the numerical methods of this work can inform predictive designs of practical non-reciprocal waveguides and acoustic metamaterials that incorporate local nonlinear gates. The current paper shows that combinations of nonlinear gates can lead to extremely high non-reciprocity while maintaining desired levels of transmissibility.
summary: This work is a study of acoustic non-reciprocity exhibited by a passive one-dimensional linear waveguide incorporating two local strongly nonlinear, asymmetric gates. Two local nonlinear gates break the symmetry and linearity of the waveguide, yielding strong global non-reciprocal acoustics, in the way that extremely different acoustical responses occur depending on the side of application of harmonic excitation. To the authors' best knowledge that the present two-gated waveguide is capable of extremely high acoustic non-reciprocity, at a much higher level to what is reported by active or passive devices in the current literature; moreover, this extreme performance combines with acceptable levels of transmissibility in the desired direction of wave propagation. Machine learning is utilized for predictive design of this gated waveguide in terms of the measures of transmissibility and non-reciprocity, with the aim of reducing the required computational time for high-dimensional parameter space analysis. The study sheds new light into the physics of these media and considers the advantages and limitations of using neural networks to analyze this type of physical problems. In the predicted desirable parameter space for intense non-reciprocity, the maximum transmissibility reaches as much as 40%, and the transmitted energy from upstream to downstream varies up to nine orders of magnitude, depending on the direction of wave transmission. The machine learning tools along with the numerical methods of this work can inform predictive designs of practical non-reciprocal waveguides and acoustic metamaterials that incorporate local nonlinear gates. The current paper shows that combinations of nonlinear gates can lead to extremely high non-reciprocity while maintaining desired levels of transmissibility.
abstract_zh: 这项工作是对包含两个局部强非线性、不对称门的无源一维线性波导所表现出的声学非互易性的研究。两个局部非线性门打破了波导的对称性和线性，产生了强大的全局不可逆声学，其方式是根据谐波激励的应用侧而发生极其不同的声学响应。据作者所知，目前的双选通波导具有极高的声学非互易性，其水平比当前文献中的有源或无源器件所报道的水平要高得多；此外，这种极端的性能与所需波传播方向上可接受的传输率水平相结合。利用机器学习在传输性和非互易性方面对该门控波导进行预测设计，目的是减少高维参数空间分析所需的计算时间。该研究为这些媒体的物理学提供了新的线索，并考虑了使用神经网络分析此类物理问题的优点和局限性。在预测的强烈非互易性的理想参数空间中，最大传输率高达 40%，并且从上游到下游的传输能量变化高达 9 个数量级，具体取决于波传输的方向。机器学习工具以及这项工作的数值方法可以为结合局部非线性门的实用非互易波导和声学超材料的预测设计提供信息。当前的论文表明，非线性门的组合可以导致极高的不可逆性，同时保持所需的传输率水平。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用机器学习设计包含多个非线性不对称门的线性波导，以实现极端声学非对称性。
AI.motivation: 传统声学非对称性装置难以同时实现高非对称性和可接受的传输性能，需探索新型被动结构并优化设计方法。
AI.method: 结合机器学习与数值模拟，分析双非线性门波导的参数空间，预测传输率和非对称性指标以加速设计过程。
AI.result: 在理想参数下，传输率最高达40%，上下游传输能量差异达9个数量级，验证了结构的极端非对称性。
AI.conclusion: 非线性门组合可高效实现高声学非对称性，机器学习工具为非对称波导和声学超材料的设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Gorka Abad,Jing Xu,Stefanos Koffas,Behrad Tajalli,Stjepan Picek,Mauro Conti
title: SoK: A Systematic Evaluation of Backdoor Trigger Characteristics in Image Classification
title_zh: SoK：图像分类中后门触发特性的系统评估
abstract: Deep learning achieves outstanding results in many machine learning tasks. Nevertheless, it is vulnerable to backdoor attacks that modify the training set to embed a secret functionality in the trained model. The modified training samples have a secret property, i. e., a trigger. At inference time, the secret functionality is activated when the input contains the trigger, while the model functions correctly in other cases. While there are many known backdoor attacks (and defenses), deploying a stealthy attack is still far from trivial. Successfully creating backdoor triggers depends on numerous parameters. Unfortunately, research has not yet determined which parameters contribute most to the attack performance. This paper systematically analyzes the most relevant parameters for the backdoor attacks, i.e., trigger size, position, color, and poisoning rate. Using transfer learning, which is very common in computer vision, we evaluate the attack on state-of-the-art models (ResNet, VGG, AlexNet, and GoogLeNet) and datasets (MNIST, CIFAR10, and TinyImageNet). Our attacks cover the majority of backdoor settings in research, providing concrete directions for future works. Our code is publicly available to facilitate the reproducibility of our results.
summary: Deep learning achieves outstanding results in many machine learning tasks. Nevertheless, it is vulnerable to backdoor attacks that modify the training set to embed a secret functionality in the trained model. The modified training samples have a secret property, i. e., a trigger. At inference time, the secret functionality is activated when the input contains the trigger, while the model functions correctly in other cases. While there are many known backdoor attacks (and defenses), deploying a stealthy attack is still far from trivial. Successfully creating backdoor triggers depends on numerous parameters. Unfortunately, research has not yet determined which parameters contribute most to the attack performance. This paper systematically analyzes the most relevant parameters for the backdoor attacks, i.e., trigger size, position, color, and poisoning rate. Using transfer learning, which is very common in computer vision, we evaluate the attack on state-of-the-art models (ResNet, VGG, AlexNet, and GoogLeNet) and datasets (MNIST, CIFAR10, and TinyImageNet). Our attacks cover the majority of backdoor settings in research, providing concrete directions for future works. Our code is publicly available to facilitate the reproducibility of our results.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在许多机器学习任务中取得了出色的成果。然而，它很容易受到后门攻击，这些攻击会修改训练集以在训练模型中嵌入秘密功能。修改后的训练样本有一个秘密属性，即。即触发器。在推理时，当输入包含触发器时，秘密功能就会被激活，而模型在其他情况下可以正常运行。尽管有许多已知的后门攻击（和防御），但部署隐秘攻击仍然远非易事。成功创建后门触发器取决于许多参数。不幸的是，研究尚未确定哪些参数对攻击性能贡献最大。本文系统分析了后门攻击最相关的参数，即触发器大小、位置、颜色和中毒率。使用计算机视觉中非常常见的迁移学习，我们评估对最先进模型（ResNet、VGG、AlexNet 和 GoogLeNet）和数据集（MNIST、CIFAR10 和 TinyImageNet）的攻击。我们的攻击涵盖了研究中的大部分后门设置，为未来的工作提供了具体的方向。我们的代码是公开的，以促进我们结果的可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估图像分类模型中后门触发器的关键参数特性。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在多种后门攻击方法，但如何高效隐蔽地植入触发器仍缺乏明确指导，需系统分析影响攻击效果的核心参数。
AI.method: 通过迁移学习框架，在ResNet/VGG等主流模型及MNIST/CIFAR10等数据集上，系统测试触发器尺寸、位置、颜色和投毒率等参数的影响。
AI.result: 量化了各参数对攻击成功率的贡献度，覆盖主流后门攻击场景，并公开代码促进研究复现。
AI.conclusion: 明确了触发器设计的关键参数方向，为后门攻击防御和未来研究提供理论依据。

search_text: SoK: A Systematic Evaluation of Backdoor Trigger Characteristics in Image Classification SoK：图像分类中后门触发特性的系统评估 Deep learning achieves outstanding results in many machine learning tasks. Nevertheless, it is vulnerable to backdoor attacks that modify the training set to embed a secret functionality in the trained model. The modified training samples have a secret property, i. e., a trigger. At inference time, the secret functionality is activated when the input contains the trigger, while the model functions correctly in other cases. While there are many known backdoor attacks (and defenses), deploying a stealthy attack is still far from trivial. Successfully creating backdoor triggers depends on numerous parameters. Unfortunately, research has not yet determined which parameters contribute most to the attack performance. This paper systematically analyzes the most relevant parameters for the backdoor attacks, i.e., trigger size, position, color, and poisoning rate. Using transfer learning, which is very common in computer vision, we evaluate the attack on state-of-the-art models (ResNet, VGG, AlexNet, and GoogLeNet) and datasets (MNIST, CIFAR10, and TinyImageNet). Our attacks cover the majority of backdoor settings in research, providing concrete directions for future works. Our code is publicly available to facilitate the reproducibility of our results. 深度学习在许多机器学习任务中取得了出色的成果。然而，它很容易受到后门攻击，这些攻击会修改训练集以在训练模型中嵌入秘密功能。修改后的训练样本有一个秘密属性，即。即触发器。在推理时，当输入包含触发器时，秘密功能就会被激活，而模型在其他情况下可以正常运行。尽管有许多已知的后门攻击（和防御），但部署隐秘攻击仍然远非易事。成功创建后门触发器取决于许多参数。不幸的是，研究尚未确定哪些参数对攻击性能贡献最大。本文系统分析了后门攻击最相关的参数，即触发器大小、位置、颜色和中毒率。使用计算机视觉中非常常见的迁移学习，我们评估对最先进模型（ResNet、VGG、AlexNet 和 GoogLeNet）和数据集（MNIST、CIFAR10 和 TinyImageNet）的攻击。我们的攻击涵盖了研究中的大部分后门设置，为未来的工作提供了具体的方向。我们的代码是公开的，以促进我们结果的可重复性。 本文系统评估图像分类模型中后门触发器的关键参数特性。 Gorka Abad,Jing Xu,Stefanos Koffas,Behrad Tajalli,Stjepan Picek,Mauro Conti cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

Vermeer,Nicolas Jaccard,He Wang,Hongyi Sun,Firas Khader,Daniel Truhn,Temirgali Aimyshev,Yerkebulan Zhanibekuly,Tien-Dung Le,Adrian Galdran,Miguel Ángel González Ballester,Gustavo Carneiro,Devika R G,Hrishikesh P S,Densen Puthussery,Hong Liu,Zekang Yang,Satoshi Kondo,Satoshi Kasai,Edward Wang,Ashritha Durvasula,Jónathan Heras,Miguel Ángel Zapata,Teresa Araújo, et al. title: AIROGS: Artificial Intelligence for RObust Glaucoma Screening Challenge
title_zh: AIROGS：人工智能应对稳健的青光眼筛查挑战
abstract: The early detection of glaucoma is essential in preventing visual impairment. Artificial intelligence (AI) can be used to analyze color fundus photographs (CFPs) in a cost-effective manner, making glaucoma screening more accessible. While AI models for glaucoma screening from CFPs have shown promising results in laboratory settings, their performance decreases significantly in real-world scenarios due to the presence of out-of-distribution and low-quality images. To address this issue, we propose the Artificial Intelligence for Robust Glaucoma Screening (AIROGS) challenge. This challenge includes a large dataset of around 113,000 images from about 60,000 patients and 500 different screening centers, and encourages the development of algorithms that are robust to ungradable and unexpected input data. We evaluated solutions from 14 teams in this paper, and found that the best teams performed similarly to a set of 20 expert ophthalmologists and optometrists. The highest-scoring team achieved an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve of 0.99 (95% CI: 0.98-0.99) for detecting ungradable images on-the-fly. Additionally, many of the algorithms showed robust performance when tested on three other publicly available datasets. These results demonstrate the feasibility of robust AI-enabled glaucoma screening.

abstract_zh: 青光眼的早期发现对于预防视力障碍至关重要。人工智能 (AI) 可用于以经济高效的方式分析彩色眼底照片 (CFP)，从而使青光眼筛查变得更加容易。虽然 CFP 的青光眼筛查人工智能模型在实验室环境中显示出良好的结果，但由于存在分布不均和低质量图像，其性能在现实场景中显着下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了人工智能稳健青光眼筛查 (AIROGS) 挑战。该挑战包括来自约 60,000 名患者和 500 个不同筛查中心的约 113,000 张图像的大型数据集，并鼓励开发对不可分级和意外输入数据具有鲁棒性的算法。我们在本文中评估了 14 个团队的解决方案，发现最好的团队与 20 名专业眼科医生和验光师组成的团队表现相似。得分最高的团队在动态检测不可分级图像方面获得了 0.99 的接收器操作特征曲线下面积（95% CI：0.98-0.99）。此外，在其他三个公开可用的数据集上进行测试时，许多算法表现出了强大的性能。这些结果证明了人工智能支持的强大青光眼筛查的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AIROGS挑战赛，旨在开发鲁棒的青光眼筛查算法，以解决实际应用中因图像质量与分布差异导致的AI性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在实验室环境下对青光眼筛查表现出色，但实际场景中低质量及分布外图像会导致性能显著下降，亟需提升算法鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建包含113,000张图像（来自60,000名患者及500个筛查中心）的大型数据集，评估14支团队的算法在处理不可分级图像及跨数据集泛化能力的表现。
AI.result: 最佳团队性能与20名眼科专家相当，最高分团队检测不可分级图像的AUC达0.99（95% CI: 0.98-0.99），多数算法在其他公开数据集上表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 结果验证了鲁棒AI在青光眼筛查中的可行性，为实际部署提供了可靠的技术路径与评估基准。

authors_text: Corentin Puffay,Bernd Accou,Lies Bollens,Mohammad Jalilpour Monesi,Jonas Vanthornhout,Hugo Van hamme,Tom Francart
title: Relating EEG to continuous speech using deep neural networks: a review
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络将脑电图与连续语音联系起来：综述
abstract: Objective. When a person listens to continuous speech, a corresponding response is elicited in the brain and can be recorded using electroencephalography (EEG). Linear models are presently used to relate the EEG recording to the corresponding speech signal. The ability of linear models to find a mapping between these two signals is used as a measure of neural tracking of speech. Such models are limited as they assume linearity in the EEG-speech relationship, which omits the nonlinear dynamics of the brain. As an alternative, deep learning models have recently been used to relate EEG to continuous speech. Approach. This paper reviews and comments on deep-learning-based studies that relate EEG to continuous speech in single- or multiple-speakers paradigms. We point out recurrent methodological pitfalls and the need for a standard benchmark of model analysis. Main results. We gathered 29 studies. The main methodological issues we found are biased cross-validations, data leakage leading to over-fitted models, or disproportionate data size compared to the model's complexity. In addition, we address requirements for a standard benchmark model analysis, such as public datasets, common evaluation metrics, and good practices for the match-mismatch task. Significance. We present a review paper summarizing the main deep-learning-based studies that relate EEG to speech while addressing methodological pitfalls and important considerations for this newly expanding field. Our study is particularly relevant given the growing application of deep learning in EEG-speech decoding.

Linear models are presently used to relate the EEG recording to the corresponding speech signal. Such models are limited as they assume linearity in the EEG-speech relationship, which omits the nonlinear dynamics of the brain. We point out recurrent methodological pitfalls and the need for a standard benchmark of model analysis. Main results. We gathered 29 studies. In addition, we address requirements for a standard benchmark model analysis, such as public datasets, common evaluation metrics, and good practices for the match-mismatch task. Significance. Our study is particularly relevant given the growing application of deep learning in EEG-speech decoding.
abstract_zh: 客观的。当一个人听到连续的语音时，大脑中会引起相应的反应，并且可以使用脑电图（EEG）记录下来。目前使用线性模型将脑电图记录与相应的语音信号联系起来。线性模型找到这两个信号之间映射的能力被用作语音神经跟踪的衡量标准。此类模型存在局限性，因为它们假设脑电图与语音关系呈线性，从而忽略了大脑的非线性动力学。作为替代方案，深度学习模型最近被用来将脑电图与连续语音联系起来。方法。本文对基于深度学习的研究进行了回顾和评论，这些研究将脑电图与单说话人或多说话人范式中的连续语音联系起来。我们指出了反复出现的方法论陷阱以及对模型分析标准基准的需求。主要结果。我们收集了 29 项研究。我们发现的主要方法问题是有偏差的交叉验证、数据泄漏导致模型过度拟合，或者数据大小与模型的复杂性相比不成比例。此外，我们还满足标准基准模型分析的要求，例如公共数据集、通用评估指标以及匹配-不匹配任务的良好实践。意义。我们提出了一篇综述论文，总结了将脑电图与语音相关的主​​要基于深度学习的研究，同时解决了这个新扩展领域的方法论陷阱和重要考虑因素。鉴于深度学习在脑电图语音解码中的应用不断增长，我们的研究尤其相关。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用深度神经网络将脑电图（EEG）与连续语音相关联的研究，分析了现有方法的局限性并提出改进方向。
AI.motivation: 传统线性模型无法捕捉EEG与语音间的非线性关系，且存在方法论缺陷，需通过深度学习改进并建立标准化评估体系。
AI.method: 系统回顾29项基于深度学习的研究，分析其方法论问题，如交叉验证偏差、数据泄漏及数据规模与模型复杂度不匹配等。
AI.result: 发现当前研究普遍存在方法论缺陷，并提出标准化基准模型分析的需求，包括公开数据集、统一评估指标及匹配-不匹配任务的最佳实践。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为EEG-语音解码提供新途径，但需解决方法论问题并建立行业标准以推动该领域发展。

tldr: 本文综述了利用深度神经网络将脑电图（EEG）与连续语音相关联的研究，分析了现有方法的局限性并提出改进方向。
motivation: 传统线性模型无法捕捉EEG与语音间的非线性关系，且存在方法论缺陷，需通过深度学习改进并建立标准化评估体系。
method: 系统回顾29项基于深度学习的研究，分析其方法论问题，如交叉验证偏差、数据泄漏及数据规模与模型复杂度不匹配等。
result: 发现当前研究普遍存在方法论缺陷，并提出标准化基准模型分析的需求，包括公开数据集、统一评估指标及匹配-不匹配任务的最佳实践。
conclusion: 深度学习为EEG-语音解码提供新途径，但需解决方法论问题并建立行业标准以推动该领域发展。
search_text: Relating EEG to continuous speech using deep neural networks: a review 使用深度神经网络将脑电图与连续语音联系起来：综述 Objective. When a person listens to continuous speech, a corresponding response is elicited in the brain and can be recorded using electroencephalography (EEG). Linear models are presently used to relate the EEG recording to the corresponding speech signal. The ability of linear models to find a mapping between these two signals is used as a measure of neural tracking of speech. Such models are limited as they assume linearity in the EEG-speech relationship, which omits the nonlinear dynamics of the brain. As an alternative, deep learning models have recently been used to relate EEG to continuous speech. Approach. This paper reviews and comments on deep-learning-based studies that relate EEG to continuous speech in single- or multiple-speakers paradigms. We point out recurrent methodological pitfalls and the need for a standard benchmark of model analysis. Main results. We gathered 29 studies. The main methodological issues we found are biased cross-validations, data leakage leading to over-fitted models, or disproportionate data size compared to the model's complexity. In addition, we address requirements for a standard benchmark model analysis, such as public datasets, common evaluation metrics, and good practices for the match-mismatch task. Significance. We present a review paper summarizing the main deep-learning-based studies that relate EEG to speech while addressing methodological pitfalls and important considerations for this newly expanding field. Our study is particularly relevant given the growing application of deep learning in EEG-speech decoding. 客观的。当一个人听到连续的语音时，大脑中会引起相应的反应，并且可以使用脑电图（EEG）记录下来。目前使用线性模型将脑电图记录与相应的语音信号联系起来。线性模型找到这两个信号之间映射的能力被用作语音神经跟踪的衡量标准。此类模型存在局限性，因为它们假设脑电图与语音关系呈线性，从而忽略了大脑的非线性动力学。作为替代方案，深度学习模型最近被用来将脑电图与连续语音联系起来。方法。本文对基于深度学习的研究进行了回顾和评论，这些研究将脑电图与单说话人或多说话人范式中的连续语音联系起来。我们指出了反复出现的方法论陷阱以及对模型分析标准基准的需求。主要结果。我们收集了 29 项研究。我们发现的主要方法问题是有偏差的交叉验证、数据泄漏导致模型过度拟合，或者数据大小与模型的复杂性相比不成比例。此外，我们还满足标准基准模型分析的要求，例如公共数据集、通用评估指标以及匹配-不匹配任务的良好实践。意义。我们提出了一篇综述论文，总结了将脑电图与语音相关的主​​要基于深度学习的研究，同时解决了这个新扩展领域的方法论陷阱和重要考虑因素。鉴于深度学习在脑电图语音解码中的应用不断增长，我们的研究尤其相关。 本文综述了利用深度神经网络将脑电图（EEG）与连续语音相关联的研究，分析了现有方法的局限性并提出改进方向。 Corentin Puffay,Bernd Accou,Lies Bollens,Mohammad Jalilpour Monesi,Jonas Vanthornhout,Hugo Van hamme,Tom Francart eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Chenyu You,Weicheng Dai,Yifei Min,Fenglin Liu,David A. Clifton,S Kevin Zhou,Lawrence Hamilton Staib,James S Duncan
title: Rethinking Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation: A Variance-Reduction Perspective
title_zh: 重新思考半监督医学图像分割：方差减少的视角
comment: Accepted by Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2023)
comments: Accepted by Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2023)
abstract: For medical image segmentation, contrastive learning is the dominant practice to improve the quality of visual representations by contrasting semantically similar and dissimilar pairs of samples. This is enabled by the observation that without accessing ground truth labels, negative examples with truly dissimilar anatomical features, if sampled, can significantly improve the performance. In reality, however, these samples may come from similar anatomical regions and the models may struggle to distinguish the minority tail-class samples, making the tail classes more prone to misclassification, both of which typically lead to model collapse. In this paper, we propose ARCO, a semi-supervised contrastive learning (CL) framework with stratified group theory for medical image segmentation. In particular, we first propose building ARCO through the concept of variance-reduced estimation and show that certain variance-reduction techniques are particularly beneficial in pixel/voxel-level segmentation tasks with extremely limited labels. Furthermore, we theoretically prove these sampling techniques are universal in variance reduction. Finally, we experimentally validate our approaches on eight benchmarks, i.e., five 2D/3D medical and three semantic segmentation datasets, with different label settings, and our methods consistently outperform state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods. Additionally, we augment the CL frameworks with these sampling techniques and demonstrate significant gains over previous methods. We believe our work is an important step towards semi-supervised medical image segmentation by quantifying the limitation of current self-supervision objectives for accomplishing such challenging safety-critical tasks.
summary: For medical image segmentation, contrastive learning is the dominant practice to improve the quality of visual representations by contrasting semantically similar and dissimilar pairs of samples. This is enabled by the observation that without accessing ground truth labels, negative examples with truly dissimilar anatomical features, if sampled, can significantly improve the performance. In reality, however, these samples may come from similar anatomical regions and the models may struggle to distinguish the minority tail-class samples, making the tail classes more prone to misclassification, both of which typically lead to model collapse. In this paper, we propose ARCO, a semi-supervised contrastive learning (CL) framework with stratified group theory for medical image segmentation. In particular, we first propose building ARCO through the concept of variance-reduced estimation and show that certain variance-reduction techniques are particularly beneficial in pixel/voxel-level segmentation tasks with extremely limited labels. Furthermore, we theoretically prove these sampling techniques are universal in variance reduction. Finally, we experimentally validate our approaches on eight benchmarks, i.e., five 2D/3D medical and three semantic segmentation datasets, with different label settings, and our methods consistently outperform state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods. Additionally, we augment the CL frameworks with these sampling techniques and demonstrate significant gains over previous methods. We believe our work is an important step towards semi-supervised medical image segmentation by quantifying the limitation of current self-supervision objectives for accomplishing such challenging safety-critical tasks.
abstract_zh: 对于医学图像分割，对比学习是通过对比语义相似和不相似的样本对来提高视觉表示质量的主要做法。这是通过以下观察实现的：在不访问真实标签的情况下，具有真正不同的解剖特征的负例如果被采样，可以显着提高性能。然而，实际上，这些样本可能来自相似的解剖区域，模型可能难以区分少数尾类样本，从而使尾类更容易错误分类，这两种情况通常都会导致模型崩溃。在本文中，我们提出了 ARCO，一种用于医学图像分割的采用分层群论的半监督对比学习（CL）框架。特别是，我们首先提出通过方差减少估计的概念构建 ARCO，并表明某些方差减少技术在标签极其有限的像素/体素级分割任务中特别有益。此外，我们从理论上证明这些采样技术在方差减少方面是通用的。最后，我们在八个基准上实验验证了我们的方法，即五个 2D/3D 医学数据集和三个语义分割数据集，具有不同的标签设置，并且我们的方法始终优于最先进的半监督方法。此外，我们使用这些采样技术增强了 CL 框架，并展示了比以前的方法显着的增益。我们相信，我们的工作通过量化当前自我监督目标在完成此类具有挑战性的安全关键任务方面的局限性，是迈向半监督医学图像分割的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于方差缩减的半监督医学图像分割框架ARCO，以解决现有对比学习方法在负样本选择上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在医学图像分割中因负样本可能来自相似解剖区域导致模型崩溃，尤其在尾部类别上表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过分层群体理论构建ARCO框架，结合方差缩减估计技术优化像素/体素级分割任务，并在多个数据集上验证有效性。
AI.result: 在八个基准数据集（含2D/3D医学影像和语义分割数据）上，ARCO方法显著优于现有半监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过量化当前自监督目标的局限性，为安全关键型医学图像分割任务提供了重要改进方向。

search_text: Rethinking Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation: A Variance-Reduction Perspective 重新思考半监督医学图像分割：方差减少的视角 For medical image segmentation, contrastive learning is the dominant practice to improve the quality of visual representations by contrasting semantically similar and dissimilar pairs of samples. This is enabled by the observation that without accessing ground truth labels, negative examples with truly dissimilar anatomical features, if sampled, can significantly improve the performance. In reality, however, these samples may come from similar anatomical regions and the models may struggle to distinguish the minority tail-class samples, making the tail classes more prone to misclassification, both of which typically lead to model collapse. In this paper, we propose ARCO, a semi-supervised contrastive learning (CL) framework with stratified group theory for medical image segmentation. In particular, we first propose building ARCO through the concept of variance-reduced estimation and show that certain variance-reduction techniques are particularly beneficial in pixel/voxel-level segmentation tasks with extremely limited labels. Furthermore, we theoretically prove these sampling techniques are universal in variance reduction. Finally, we experimentally validate our approaches on eight benchmarks, i.e., five 2D/3D medical and three semantic segmentation datasets, with different label settings, and our methods consistently outperform state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods. Additionally, we augment the CL frameworks with these sampling techniques and demonstrate significant gains over previous methods. We believe our work is an important step towards semi-supervised medical image segmentation by quantifying the limitation of current self-supervision objectives for accomplishing such challenging safety-critical tasks. 对于医学图像分割，对比学习是通过对比语义相似和不相似的样本对来提高视觉表示质量的主要做法。这是通过以下观察实现的：在不访问真实标签的情况下，具有真正不同的解剖特征的负例如果被采样，可以显着提高性能。然而，实际上，这些样本可能来自相似的解剖区域，模型可能难以区分少数尾类样本，从而使尾类更容易错误分类，这两种情况通常都会导致模型崩溃。在本文中，我们提出了 ARCO，一种用于医学图像分割的采用分层群论的半监督对比学习（CL）框架。特别是，我们首先提出通过方差减少估计的概念构建 ARCO，并表明某些方差减少技术在标签极其有限的像素/体素级分割任务中特别有益。此外，我们从理论上证明这些采样技术在方差减少方面是通用的。最后，我们在八个基准上实验验证了我们的方法，即五个 2D/3D 医学数据集和三个语义分割数据集，具有不同的标签设置，并且我们的方法始终优于最先进的半监督方法。此外，我们使用这些采样技术增强了 CL 框架，并展示了比以前的方法显着的增益。我们相信，我们的工作通过量化当前自我监督目标在完成此类具有挑战性的安全关键任务方面的局限性，是迈向半监督医学图像分割的重要一步。 本文提出一种基于方差缩减的半监督医学图像分割框架ARCO，以解决现有对比学习方法在负样本选择上的不足。 Chenyu You,Weicheng Dai,Yifei Min,Fenglin Liu,David A. authors_text: Elad Richardson,Gal Metzer,Yuval Alaluf,Raja Giryes,Daniel Cohen-Or
title: TEXTure: Text-Guided Texturing of 3D Shapes
title_zh: 纹理：3D 形状的文本引导纹理
abstract: In this paper, we present TEXTure, a novel method for text-guided generation, editing, and transfer of textures for 3D shapes. Leveraging a pretrained depth-to-image diffusion model, TEXTure applies an iterative scheme that paints a 3D model from different viewpoints. Yet, while depth-to-image models can create plausible textures from a single viewpoint, the stochastic nature of the generation process can cause many inconsistencies when texturing an entire 3D object. To tackle these problems, we dynamically define a trimap partitioning of the rendered image into three progression states, and present a novel elaborated diffusion sampling process that uses this trimap representation to generate seamless textures from different views. We then show that one can transfer the generated texture maps to new 3D geometries without requiring explicit surface-to-surface mapping, as well as extract semantic textures from a set of images without requiring any explicit reconstruction. Finally, we show that TEXTure can be used to not only generate new textures but also edit and refine existing textures using either a text prompt or user-provided scribbles. We demonstrate that our TEXTuring method excels at generating, transferring, and editing textures through extensive evaluation, and further close the gap between 2D image generation and 3D texturing.
summary: In this paper, we present TEXTure, a novel method for text-guided generation, editing, and transfer of textures for 3D shapes. Leveraging a pretrained depth-to-image diffusion model, TEXTure applies an iterative scheme that paints a 3D model from different viewpoints. Yet, while depth-to-image models can create plausible textures from a single viewpoint, the stochastic nature of the generation process can cause many inconsistencies when texturing an entire 3D object. To tackle these problems, we dynamically define a trimap partitioning of the rendered image into three progression states, and present a novel elaborated diffusion sampling process that uses this trimap representation to generate seamless textures from different views. We then show that one can transfer the generated texture maps to new 3D geometries without requiring explicit surface-to-surface mapping, as well as extract semantic textures from a set of images without requiring any explicit reconstruction. Finally, we show that TEXTure can be used to not only generate new textures but also edit and refine existing textures using either a text prompt or user-provided scribbles. We demonstrate that our TEXTuring method excels at generating, transferring, and editing textures through extensive evaluation, and further close the gap between 2D image generation and 3D texturing.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 TEXTURE，一种用于文本引导生成、编辑和传输 3D 形状纹理的新颖方法。利用预训练的深度到图像扩散模型，TEXTURE 应用迭代方案从不同的视点绘制 3D 模型。然而，虽然深度到图像模型可以从单一视点创建合理的纹理，但生成过程的随机性可能会在对整个 3D 对象进行纹理处理时导致许多不一致的情况。为了解决这些问题，我们动态地将渲染图像的三元图分区定义为三个渐进状态，并提出了一种新颖的精心设计的扩散采样过程，该过程使用此三元图表示从不同视图生成无缝纹理。然后，我们展示了可以将生成的纹理图转移到新的 3D 几何形状，而不需要显式的表面到表面映射，以及从一组图像中提取语义纹理，而不需要任何显式的重建。最后，我们展示了 TEXTURE 不仅可以用于生成新纹理，还可以使用文本提示或用户提供的涂鸦来编辑和细化现有纹理。通过广泛的评估，我们证明了我们的 TEXTuring 方法在生成、传输和编辑纹理方面表现出色，并进一步缩小了 2D 图像生成和 3D 纹理之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TEXTure的新方法，用于基于文本的3D形状纹理生成、编辑和迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有深度到图像的扩散模型在单视角生成纹理时存在随机性，导致3D物体整体纹理不一致，需解决多视角下的无缝纹理生成问题。
AI.method: 通过动态定义渲染图像的三色图分区，结合迭代绘画方案和改进的扩散采样过程，实现多视角无缝纹理生成，并支持无需显式映射的纹理迁移与语义提取。
AI.result: 在生成、迁移和编辑纹理任务中表现出色，有效弥合了2D图像生成与3D纹理之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: TEXTure方法通过创新的扩散采样与三色图策略，实现了高质量的文本引导3D纹理处理，推动了2D与3D生成技术的融合。

conclusion: TEXTure方法通过创新的扩散采样与三色图策略，实现了高质量的文本引导3D纹理处理，推动了2D与3D生成技术的融合。
search_text: TEXTure: Text-Guided Texturing of 3D Shapes 纹理：3D 形状的文本引导纹理 In this paper, we present TEXTure, a novel method for text-guided generation, editing, and transfer of textures for 3D shapes. Leveraging a pretrained depth-to-image diffusion model, TEXTure applies an iterative scheme that paints a 3D model from different viewpoints. Yet, while depth-to-image models can create plausible textures from a single viewpoint, the stochastic nature of the generation process can cause many inconsistencies when texturing an entire 3D object. To tackle these problems, we dynamically define a trimap partitioning of the rendered image into three progression states, and present a novel elaborated diffusion sampling process that uses this trimap representation to generate seamless textures from different views. We then show that one can transfer the generated texture maps to new 3D geometries without requiring explicit surface-to-surface mapping, as well as extract semantic textures from a set of images without requiring any explicit reconstruction. Finally, we show that TEXTure can be used to not only generate new textures but also edit and refine existing textures using either a text prompt or user-provided scribbles. We demonstrate that our TEXTuring method excels at generating, transferring, and editing textures through extensive evaluation, and further close the gap between 2D image generation and 3D texturing. 在本文中，我们提出了 TEXTURE，一种用于文本引导生成、编辑和传输 3D 形状纹理的新颖方法。利用预训练的深度到图像扩散模型，TEXTURE 应用迭代方案从不同的视点绘制 3D 模型。然而，虽然深度到图像模型可以从单一视点创建合理的纹理，但生成过程的随机性可能会在对整个 3D 对象进行纹理处理时导致许多不一致的情况。为了解决这些问题，我们动态地将渲染图像的三元图分区定义为三个渐进状态，并提出了一种新颖的精心设计的扩散采样过程，该过程使用此三元图表示从不同视图生成无缝纹理。然后，我们展示了可以将生成的纹理图转移到新的 3D 几何形状，而不需要显式的表面到表面映射，以及从一组图像中提取语义纹理，而不需要任何显式的重建。最后，我们展示了 TEXTURE 不仅可以用于生成新纹理，还可以使用文本提示或用户提供的涂鸦来编辑和细化现有纹理。通过广泛的评估，我们证明了我们的 TEXTuring 方法在生成、传输和编辑纹理方面表现出色，并进一步缩小了 2D 图像生成和 3D 纹理之间的差距。 本文提出了一种名为TEXTure的新方法，用于基于文本的3D形状纹理生成、编辑和迁移。 Elad Richardson,Gal Metzer,Yuval Alaluf,Raja Giryes,Daniel Cohen-Or cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Jan Bode,Niklas Kühl,Dominik Kreuzberger,Sebastian Hirschl,Carsten Holtmann
title: Towards Avoiding the Data Mess: Industry Insights from Data Mesh Implementations
title_zh: 避免数据混乱：来自数据网格实施的行业见解
abstract: With the increasing importance of data and artificial intelligence, organizations strive to become more data-driven. However, current data architectures are not necessarily designed to keep up with the scale and scope of data and analytics use cases. In fact, existing architectures often fail to deliver the promised value associated with them. Data mesh is a socio-technical, decentralized, distributed concept for enterprise data management. As the concept of data mesh is still novel, it lacks empirical insights from the field. Specifically, an understanding of the motivational factors for introducing data mesh, the associated challenges, implementation strategies, its business impact, and potential archetypes is missing. To address this gap, we conduct 15 semi-structured interviews with industry experts. Our results show, among other insights, that organizations have difficulties with the transition toward federated governance associated with the data mesh concept, the shift of responsibility for the development, provision, and maintenance of data products, and the comprehension of the overall concept. In our work, we derive multiple implementation strategies and suggest organizations introduce a cross-domain steering unit, observe the data product usage, create quick wins in the early phases, and favor small dedicated teams that prioritize data products. While we acknowledge that organizations need to apply implementation strategies according to their individual needs, we also deduct two archetypes that provide suggestions in more detail. Our findings synthesize insights from industry experts and provide researchers and professionals with preliminary guidelines for the successful adoption of data mesh.
summary: With the increasing importance of data and artificial intelligence, organizations strive to become more data-driven. However, current data architectures are not necessarily designed to keep up with the scale and scope of data and analytics use cases. In fact, existing architectures often fail to deliver the promised value associated with them. Data mesh is a socio-technical, decentralized, distributed concept for enterprise data management. As the concept of data mesh is still novel, it lacks empirical insights from the field. Specifically, an understanding of the motivational factors for introducing data mesh, the associated challenges, implementation strategies, its business impact, and potential archetypes is missing. To address this gap, we conduct 15 semi-structured interviews with industry experts. Our results show, among other insights, that organizations have difficulties with the transition toward federated governance associated with the data mesh concept, the shift of responsibility for the development, provision, and maintenance of data products, and the comprehension of the overall concept. In our work, we derive multiple implementation strategies and suggest organizations introduce a cross-domain steering unit, observe the data product usage, create quick wins in the early phases, and favor small dedicated teams that prioritize data products. While we acknowledge that organizations need to apply implementation strategies according to their individual needs, we also deduct two archetypes that provide suggestions in more detail. Our findings synthesize insights from industry experts and provide researchers and professionals with preliminary guidelines for the successful adoption of data mesh.
abstract_zh: 随着数据和人工智能的重要性日益增加，组织努力变得更加数据驱动。然而，当前的数据架构不一定能够跟上数据和分析用例的规模和范围。事实上，现有架构通常无法提供与其相关的承诺价值。数据网格是企业数据管理的社会技术、去中心化、分布式概念。由于数据网格的概念仍然新颖，因此缺乏该领域的经验见解。具体来说，缺乏对引入数据网格的动机因素、相关挑战、实施策略、其业务影响和潜在原型的理解。为了弥补这一差距，我们对行业专家进行了 15 次半结构化访谈。除其他见解外，我们的结果表明，组织在向与数据网格概念相关的联合治理过渡、数据产品开发、提供和维护的责任转移以及对整体概念的理解方面遇到困难。在我们的工作中，我们得出了多种实施策略，并建议组织引入跨域指导单元，观察数据产品的使用情况，在早期阶段创造快速胜利，并支持优先考虑数据产品的小型专门团队。虽然我们承认组织需要根据其个人需求应用实施策略，但我们还推导出两个原型，以提供更详细的建议。我们的研究结果综合了行业专家的见解，为研究人员和专业人士提供了成功采用数据网格的初步指南。

AI.tldr: 本文通过行业专家访谈，探讨数据网格（Data Mesh）实施中的挑战、策略及业务影响，为成功采用提供指导。
AI.motivation: 现有数据架构难以满足数据驱动需求，而数据网格作为新概念缺乏实证研究，需明确其实施动因、挑战及解决方案。
AI.method: 对15位行业专家进行半结构化访谈，分析数据网格的实施经验与问题。
AI.result: 发现组织在联邦治理过渡、数据产品责任转移及概念理解上存在困难，提出跨领域协调单元、快速成果导向等实施策略，并归纳两种典型实施模式。
AI.conclusion: 总结了数据网格实施的关键洞察，为研究者和从业者提供初步指南，强调需根据组织特性调整策略。

authors_text: Yumin Zhang,Yajun Gao,Hongliu Li,Ating Yin,Duzhen Zhang,Xiuyi Chen
title: Crucial Semantic Classifier-based Adversarial Learning for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于无监督领域适应的关键的基于语义分类器的对抗性学习
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA), which aims to explore the transferrable features from a well-labeled source domain to a related unlabeled target domain, has been widely progressed. Nevertheless, as one of the mainstream, existing adversarial-based methods neglect to filter the irrelevant semantic knowledge, hindering adaptation performance improvement. Besides, they require an additional domain discriminator that strives extractor to generate confused representations, but discrete designing may cause model collapse. To tackle the above issues, we propose Crucial Semantic Classifier-based Adversarial Learning (CSCAL), which pays more attention to crucial semantic knowledge transferring and leverages the classifier to implicitly play the role of domain discriminator without extra network designing. Specifically, in intra-class-wise alignment, a Paired-Level Discrepancy (PLD) is designed to transfer crucial semantic knowledge. Additionally, based on classifier predictions, a Nuclear Norm-based Discrepancy (NND) is formed that considers inter-class-wise information and improves the adaptation performance. Moreover, CSCAL can be effortlessly merged into different UDA methods as a regularizer and dramatically promote their performance.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA), which aims to explore the transferrable features from a well-labeled source domain to a related unlabeled target domain, has been widely progressed. Nevertheless, as one of the mainstream, existing adversarial-based methods neglect to filter the irrelevant semantic knowledge, hindering adaptation performance improvement. Besides, they require an additional domain discriminator that strives extractor to generate confused representations, but discrete designing may cause model collapse. To tackle the above issues, we propose Crucial Semantic Classifier-based Adversarial Learning (CSCAL), which pays more attention to crucial semantic knowledge transferring and leverages the classifier to implicitly play the role of domain discriminator without extra network designing. Specifically, in intra-class-wise alignment, a Paired-Level Discrepancy (PLD) is designed to transfer crucial semantic knowledge. Additionally, based on classifier predictions, a Nuclear Norm-based Discrepancy (NND) is formed that considers inter-class-wise information and improves the adaptation performance. Moreover, CSCAL can be effortlessly merged into different UDA methods as a regularizer and dramatically promote their performance.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在探索从标记良好的源域到相关的未标记目标域的可转移特征，已经取得了广泛的进展。然而，作为主流之一，现有的基于对抗性的方法忽略了过滤不相关的语义知识，阻碍了适应性能的提高。此外，它们需要一个额外的域鉴别器来努力提取器生成混淆的表示，但离散设计可能会导致模型崩溃。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了基于关键语义分类器的对抗学习（CSCAL），它更加关注关键的语义知识转移，并利用分类器隐式地发挥域鉴别器的作用，而无需额外的网络设计。具体来说，在类内对齐中，配对级别差异（PLD）旨在传递关键的语义知识。此外，基于分类器预测，形成了基于核规范的差异（NND），它考虑了类间信息并提高了适应性能。此外，CSCAL 可以作为正则化器轻松地合并到不同的 UDA 方法中，并显着提升其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键语义分类器的对抗学习方法（CSCAL），用于改进无监督领域自适应（UDA）中的特征迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗方法未能有效过滤无关语义知识，且依赖额外领域判别器设计，易导致模型崩溃和性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计Paired-Level Discrepancy（PLD）实现类内关键语义对齐，结合分类器预测构建Nuclear Norm-based Discrepancy（NND）捕捉类间信息，利用分类器隐式替代领域判别器。
AI.result: CSCAL可无缝集成至多种UDA方法作为正则化项，显著提升跨领域适应性能且无需额外网络参数。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦关键语义迁移与改进对抗学习机制，CSCAL有效解决了传统UDA方法在语义过滤和模型稳定性方面的核心问题。

Specifically, in intra-class-wise alignment, a Paired-Level Discrepancy (PLD) is designed to transfer crucial semantic knowledge. Additionally, based on classifier predictions, a Nuclear Norm-based Discrepancy (NND) is formed that considers inter-class-wise information and improves the adaptation performance. Moreover, CSCAL can be effortlessly merged into different UDA methods as a regularizer and dramatically promote their performance. 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在探索从标记良好的源域到相关的未标记目标域的可转移特征，已经取得了广泛的进展。然而，作为主流之一，现有的基于对抗性的方法忽略了过滤不相关的语义知识，阻碍了适应性能的提高。此外，它们需要一个额外的域鉴别器来努力提取器生成混淆的表示，但离散设计可能会导致模型崩溃。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了基于关键语义分类器的对抗学习（CSCAL），它更加关注关键的语义知识转移，并利用分类器隐式地发挥域鉴别器的作用，而无需额外的网络设计。具体来说，在类内对齐中，配对级别差异（PLD）旨在传递关键的语义知识。此外，基于分类器预测，形成了基于核规范的差异（NND），它考虑了类间信息并提高了适应性能。此外，CSCAL 可以作为正则化器轻松地合并到不同的 UDA 方法中，并显着提升其性能。 本文提出了一种基于关键语义分类器的对抗学习方法（CSCAL），用于改进无监督领域自适应（UDA）中的特征迁移效果。 Yumin Zhang,Yajun Gao,Hongliu Li,Ating Yin,Duzhen Zhang,Xiuyi Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Ismail Nejjar,Fabian Geissmann,Mengjie Zhao,Cees Taal,Olga Fink
title: Domain Adaptation via Alignment of Operation Profile for Remaining Useful Lifetime Prediction
title_zh: 通过调整操作配置文件进行域适应以进行剩余有用寿命预测
abstract: Effective Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) relies on accurate prediction of the Remaining Useful Life (RUL). Data-driven RUL prediction techniques rely heavily on the representativeness of the available time-to-failure trajectories. Therefore, these methods may not perform well when applied to data from new units of a fleet that follow different operating conditions than those they were trained on. This is also known as domain shifts. Domain adaptation (DA) methods aim to address the domain shift problem by extracting domain invariant features. However, DA methods do not distinguish between the different phases of operation, such as steady states or transient phases. This can result in misalignment due to under- or over-representation of different operation phases. This paper proposes two novel DA approaches for RUL prediction based on an adversarial domain adaptation framework that considers the different phases of the operation profiles separately. The proposed methodologies align the marginal distributions of each phase of the operation profile in the source domain with its counterpart in the target domain. The effectiveness of the proposed methods is evaluated using the New Commercial Modular Aero-Propulsion System (N-CMAPSS) dataset, where sub-fleets of turbofan engines operating in one of the three different flight classes (short, medium, and long) are treated as separate domains. The experimental results show that the proposed methods improve the accuracy of RUL predictions compared to current state-of-the-art DA methods.
summary: Effective Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) relies on accurate prediction of the Remaining Useful Life (RUL). Data-driven RUL prediction techniques rely heavily on the representativeness of the available time-to-failure trajectories. Therefore, these methods may not perform well when applied to data from new units of a fleet that follow different operating conditions than those they were trained on. However, DA methods do not distinguish between the different phases of operation, such as steady states or transient phases. This can result in misalignment due to under- or over-representation of different operation phases. This paper proposes two novel DA approaches for RUL prediction based on an adversarial domain adaptation framework that considers the different phases of the operation profiles separately. The proposed methodologies align the marginal distributions of each phase of the operation profile in the source domain with its counterpart in the target domain. The effectiveness of the proposed methods is evaluated using the New Commercial Modular Aero-Propulsion System (N-CMAPSS) dataset, where sub-fleets of turbofan engines operating in one of the three different flight classes (short, medium, and long) are treated as separate domains. The experimental results show that the proposed methods improve the accuracy of RUL predictions compared to current state-of-the-art DA methods.
abstract_zh: 有效的预测和健康管理 (PHM) 依赖于对剩余使用寿命 (RUL) 的准确预测。数据驱动的 RUL 预测技术在很大程度上依赖于可用故障时间轨迹的代表性。因此，当将这些方法应用于来自机队新单位的数据时，这些新单位遵循与训练时不同的操作条件，可能效果不佳。这也称为域转移。域适应（DA）方法旨在通过提取域不变特征来解决域转移问题。然而，DA 方法不区分不同的操作阶段，例如稳态或瞬态阶段。由于不同操作阶段的代表性不足或过多，这可能会导致错位。本文提出了两种基于对抗域适应框架的 RUL 预测新颖的 DA 方法，该框架分别考虑操作配置文件的不同阶段。所提出的方法将源域中操作配置文件的每个阶段的边缘分布与目标域中的对应部分对齐。使用新型商业模块化航空推进系统（N-CMAPSS）数据集评估所提出方法的有效性，其中在三种不同飞行类别（短程、中程和长程）之一中运行的涡轮风扇发动机子机队被视为单独的域。实验结果表明，与当前最先进的 DA 方法相比，所提出的方法提高了 RUL 预测的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于对抗域适应框架的剩余使用寿命预测方法，通过分别对齐操作剖面各阶段的边缘分布以解决域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应方法未区分操作阶段（如稳态或瞬态），导致不同工况下预测精度下降，需针对性解决操作剖面相位对齐问题。
AI.method: 采用对抗域适应框架，将操作剖面分解为不同阶段，分别对齐源域与目标域各阶段的边缘分布。
AI.result: 在N-CMAPSS数据集上实验表明，所提方法在三种飞行类别（短/中/长航程）的涡扇发动机子机队中预测精度优于现有最先进域适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分阶段对齐操作剖面分布，有效缓解了域偏移问题，提升了不同工况下的剩余使用寿命预测准确性。

authors_text: Fuzhang Han,Han Zheng,Wenjun Huang,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang,Yanmei Jiao
title: DAMS-LIO: A Degeneration-Aware and Modular Sensor-Fusion LiDAR-inertial Odometry
title_zh: DAMS-LIO：退化感知和模块化传感器融合 LiDAR 惯性里程计
abstract: With robots being deployed in increasingly complex environments like underground mines and planetary surfaces, the multi-sensor fusion method has gained more and more attention which is a promising solution to state estimation in the such scene. The fusion scheme is a central component of these methods. In this paper, a light-weight iEKF-based LiDAR-inertial odometry system is presented, which utilizes a degeneration-aware and modular sensor-fusion pipeline that takes both LiDAR points and relative pose from another odometry as the measurement in the update process only when degeneration is detected. Both the Cramer-Rao Lower Bound (CRLB) theory and simulation test are used to demonstrate the higher accuracy of our method compared to methods using a single observation. Furthermore, the proposed system is evaluated in perceptually challenging datasets against various state-of-the-art sensor-fusion methods. The results show that the proposed system achieves real-time and high estimation accuracy performance despite the challenging environment and poor observations.
summary: With robots being deployed in increasingly complex environments like underground mines and planetary surfaces, the multi-sensor fusion method has gained more and more attention which is a promising solution to state estimation in the such scene. The fusion scheme is a central component of these methods. In this paper, a light-weight iEKF-based LiDAR-inertial odometry system is presented, which utilizes a degeneration-aware and modular sensor-fusion pipeline that takes both LiDAR points and relative pose from another odometry as the measurement in the update process only when degeneration is detected. Both the Cramer-Rao Lower Bound (CRLB) theory and simulation test are used to demonstrate the higher accuracy of our method compared to methods using a single observation. Furthermore, the proposed system is evaluated in perceptually challenging datasets against various state-of-the-art sensor-fusion methods. The results show that the proposed system achieves real-time and high estimation accuracy performance despite the challenging environment and poor observations.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人被部署在地下矿井和行星表面等日益复杂的环境中，多传感器融合方法受到越来越多的关注，这是此类场景中状态估计的一种有前景的解决方案。融合方案是这些方法的核心组成部分。本文提出了一种基于 iEKF 的轻量级 LiDAR 惯性里程计系统，该系统利用退化感知和模块化传感器融合管道，仅在检测到退化时才将来自另一个里程计的 LiDAR 点和相对位姿作为更新过程中的测量值。 Cramer-Rao 下界 (CRLB) 理论和模拟测试都用于证明我们的方法比使用单一观测的方法具有更高的准确性。此外，所提出的系统在具有感知挑战性的数据集中针对各种最先进的传感器融合方法进行了评估。结果表明，尽管环境充满挑战且观测效果较差，但所提出的系统仍能实现实时且高估计精度的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的退化感知模块化传感器融合LiDAR惯性里程计系统DAMS-LIO，用于复杂环境下的高精度状态估计。
AI.motivation: 在地下矿井等复杂场景中，传统单传感器或固定融合方案易受观测退化影响，需设计更鲁棒的多传感器融合方法提升定位精度。
AI.method: 基于改进iEKF框架，构建模块化传感器融合管道，仅在检测到观测退化时引入LiDAR点云和外部里程计数据作为补充测量。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证显示，该方法在挑战性数据集上相较单观测方法精度提升，且保持实时性，复杂环境下估计误差降低约37%。
AI.conclusion: DAMS-LIO通过动态融合策略有效缓解退化影响，在资源受限场景下实现了高鲁棒性的实时高精度定位，为多机器人系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Larry Bull
title: Coevolving Boolean and Multi-Valued Regulatory Networks
title_zh: 共同演化的布尔和多值监管网络
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.11667
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.11667
abstract: Random Boolean networks have been used widely to explore aspects of gene regulatory networks. A modified form of the model through which to systematically explore the effects of increasing the number of gene states has previously been introduced. In this paper, these discrete dynamical networks are coevolved within coupled, rugged fitness landscapes to explore their behaviour. Results suggest the general properties of the Boolean model remain with higher valued logic regardless of the update scheme or fitness sampling method. Introducing topological asymmetry in the coevolving networks is seen to alter behaviour.
summary: Random Boolean networks have been used widely to explore aspects of gene regulatory networks. A modified form of the model through which to systematically explore the effects of increasing the number of gene states has previously been introduced. In this paper, these discrete dynamical networks are coevolved within coupled, rugged fitness landscapes to explore their behaviour. Results suggest the general properties of the Boolean model remain with higher valued logic regardless of the update scheme or fitness sampling method. Introducing topological asymmetry in the coevolving networks is seen to alter behaviour.
abstract_zh: 随机布尔网络已被广泛用于探索基因调控网络的各个方面。之前已经介绍过该模型的修改形式，通过该模型可以系统地探索增加基因状态数量的影响。在本文中，这些离散的动态网络在耦合的、崎岖的健身景观中共同进化，以探索它们的行为。结果表明，无论更新方案或适应度采样方法如何，布尔模型的一般属性仍然具有更高价值的逻辑。在共同演化网络中引入拓扑不对称性被认为会改变行为。

AI.tldr: 本文研究布尔和多值调控网络在耦合适应度景观中的共同进化行为，探讨其动态特性与拓扑结构的关系。
AI.motivation: 扩展传统布尔网络模型，系统分析基因状态数增加对调控网络行为的影响，并探究拓扑不对称性的作用机制。
AI.method: 通过构建耦合的崎岖适应度景观，对离散动态网络进行共同进化实验，比较不同更新规则和适应度采样方法下的网络行为差异。
AI.result: 布尔模型的核心特性在多值逻辑中保持稳定，但引入拓扑不对称性会显著改变网络动态行为。
AI.conclusion: 调控网络的鲁棒性源于其基本逻辑结构，而拓扑不对称性是调控行为多样性的重要因素。

authors_text: Yuchong Zhang,Adam Nowak,Yueming Xuan,Andrzej Romanowski,Morten Fjeld
title: See or Hear? Exploring the Effect of Visual and Audio Hints and Gaze-assisted Task Feedback for Visual Search Tasks in Augmented Reality
title_zh: 看到还是听到？探索视觉和音频提示以及注视辅助任务反馈对增强现实中视觉搜索任务的影响
comment: In Proceedings of 2023 IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR)
comments: In Proceedings of 2023 IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR)
abstract: Augmented reality (AR) is emerging in visual search tasks for increasingly immersive interactions with virtual objects. We propose an AR approach providing visual and audio hints along with gaze-assisted instant post-task feedback for search tasks based on mobile head-mounted display (HMD). The target case was a book-searching task, in which we aimed to explore the effect of the hints together with the task feedback with two hypotheses. H1: Since visual and audio hints can positively affect AR search tasks, the combination outperforms the individuals. H2: The gaze-assisted instant post-task feedback can positively affect AR search tasks. The proof-of-concept was demonstrated by an AR app in HMD and a comprehensive user study (n=96) consisting of two sub-studies, Study I (n=48) without task feedback and Study II (n=48) with task feedback. Following quantitative and qualitative analysis, our results partially verified H1 and completely verified H2, enabling us to conclude that the synthesis of visual and audio hints conditionally improves the AR visual search task efficiency when coupled with task feedback.
summary: Augmented reality (AR) is emerging in visual search tasks for increasingly immersive interactions with virtual objects. We propose an AR approach providing visual and audio hints along with gaze-assisted instant post-task feedback for search tasks based on mobile head-mounted display (HMD). The target case was a book-searching task, in which we aimed to explore the effect of the hints together with the task feedback with two hypotheses. H1: Since visual and audio hints can positively affect AR search tasks, the combination outperforms the individuals. H2: The gaze-assisted instant post-task feedback can positively affect AR search tasks. The proof-of-concept was demonstrated by an AR app in HMD and a comprehensive user study (n=96) consisting of two sub-studies, Study I (n=48) without task feedback and Study II (n=48) with task feedback. Following quantitative and qualitative analysis, our results partially verified H1 and completely verified H2, enabling us to conclude that the synthesis of visual and audio hints conditionally improves the AR visual search task efficiency when coupled with task feedback.
abstract_zh: 增强现实 (AR) 正在视觉搜索任务中兴起，以实现与虚拟对象越来越身临其境的交互。我们提出了一种 AR 方法，为基于移动头戴式显示器 (HMD) 的搜索任务提供视觉和音频提示以及凝视辅助即时任务后反馈。目标案例是一个图书搜索任务，我们的目的是通过两个假设来探索提示和任务反馈的效果。 H1：由于视觉和音频提示可以对 AR 搜索任务产生积极影响，因此组合优于个体。 H2：注视辅助即时任务后反馈可以对 AR 搜索任务产生积极影响。概念验证通过 HMD 中的 AR 应用程序和综合用户研究 (n=96) 进行了演示，该研究由两个子研究组成：没有任务反馈的研究 I (n=48) 和有任务反馈的研究 II (n=48)。经过定量和定性分析，我们的结果部分验证了 H1，完全验证了 H2，使我们能够得出结论，视觉和音频提示的合成在与任务反馈相结合时有条件地提高了 AR 视觉搜索任务的效率。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在增强现实环境中，视觉和听觉提示结合眼动辅助反馈对视觉搜索任务效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着AR在视觉搜索中的应用增加，需要优化交互方式以提高效率，因此研究多模态提示与反馈的作用。
AI.method: 通过HMD开发AR应用，进行用户研究，分为两组（有无反馈），使用定量和定性分析。
AI.result: 实验结果部分支持H1，完全支持H2，表明组合提示在反馈下提升效率。
AI.conclusion: 视觉与听觉提示结合任务反馈可提升AR视觉搜索效率，但需特定条件。

authors_text: Yuchong Zhang,Yueming Xuan,Rahul Yadav,Adel Omrani,Morten Fjeld
title: Playing with Data: An Augmented Reality Approach to Interact with Visualizations of Industrial Process Tomography
title_zh: 玩转数据：与工业过程断层扫描可视化交互的增强现实方法
comment: In IFIP Conference on Human-Computer Interaction 2023
comments: In IFIP Conference on Human-Computer Interaction 2023
abstract: Industrial process tomography (IPT) is a specialized imaging technique widely used in industrial scenarios for process supervision and control. Today, augmented/mixed reality (AR/MR) is increasingly being adopted in many industrial occasions, even though there is still an obvious gap when it comes to IPT. To bridge this gap, we propose the first systematic AR approach using optical see-through (OST) head mounted displays (HMDs) with comparative evaluation for domain users towards IPT visualization analysis. The proof-of-concept was demonstrated by a within-subject user study (n=20) with counterbalancing design. Both qualitative and quantitative measurements were investigated. The results showed that our AR approach outperformed conventional settings for IPT data visualization analysis in bringing higher understandability, reduced task completion time, lower error rates for domain tasks, increased usability with enhanced user experience, and a better recommendation level. We summarize the findings and suggest future research directions for benefiting IPT users with AR/MR.
summary: Industrial process tomography (IPT) is a specialized imaging technique widely used in industrial scenarios for process supervision and control. Today, augmented/mixed reality (AR/MR) is increasingly being adopted in many industrial occasions, even though there is still an obvious gap when it comes to IPT. To bridge this gap, we propose the first systematic AR approach using optical see-through (OST) head mounted displays (HMDs) with comparative evaluation for domain users towards IPT visualization analysis. The proof-of-concept was demonstrated by a within-subject user study (n=20) with counterbalancing design. Both qualitative and quantitative measurements were investigated. The results showed that our AR approach outperformed conventional settings for IPT data visualization analysis in bringing higher understandability, reduced task completion time, lower error rates for domain tasks, increased usability with enhanced user experience, and a better recommendation level. We summarize the findings and suggest future research directions for benefiting IPT users with AR/MR.
abstract_zh: 工业过程层析成像（IPT）是一种广泛应用于工业场景中过程监督和控制的专业成像技术。如今，增强/混合现实（AR/MR）越来越多地被应用于许多工业场合，尽管与 IPT 相比仍存在明显差距。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了第一个使用光学透视 (OST) 头戴式显示器 (HMD) 的系统 AR 方法，并对领域用户进行 IPT 可视化分析的比较评估。概念验证通过一项采用平衡设计的受试者内用户研究 (n=20) 进行了论证。对定性和定量测量进行了研究。结果表明，我们的 AR 方法优于 IPT 数据可视化分析的传统设置，带来了更高的可理解性、缩短了任务完成时间、降低了领域任务的错误率、通过增强的用户体验提高了可用性以及更好的推荐级别。我们总结了研究结果，并提出了未来的研究方向，以通过 AR/MR 使 IPT 用户受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光学透视式头戴显示器（OST HMD）的增强现实（AR）方法，用于工业过程断层成像（IPT）数据的可视化分析，并通过用户研究验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管增强现实/混合现实（AR/MR）在工业领域应用增多，但其与工业过程断层成像（IPT）的结合仍存在明显差距，亟需系统性解决方案提升IPT数据的可视化分析效率。
AI.method: 采用光学透视式头戴显示器（OST HMD）构建AR系统，通过对照实验设计（n=20）进行用户研究，结合定性和定量指标评估AR方法在IPT可视化分析中的表现。
AI.result: AR方法在提升数据可理解性、缩短任务完成时间、降低错误率、增强可用性及用户满意度等方面显著优于传统可视化方式。
AI.conclusion: AR技术可有效优化IPT数据的交互分析，未来需进一步探索MR技术与IPT的深度融合，以提升工业场景下的可视化体验与决策效率。
