motivation: 尽管增强现实/混合现实（AR/MR）在工业领域应用增多，但其与工业过程断层成像（IPT）的结合仍存在明显差距，亟需系统性解决方案提升IPT数据的可视化分析效率。
method: 采用光学透视式头戴显示器（OST HMD）构建AR系统，通过对照实验设计（n=20）进行用户研究，结合定性和定量指标评估AR方法在IPT可视化分析中的表现。
result: AR方法在提升数据可理解性、缩短任务完成时间、降低错误率、增强可用性及用户满意度等方面显著优于传统可视化方式。
conclusion: AR技术可有效优化IPT数据的交互分析，未来需进一步探索MR技术与IPT的深度融合，以提升工业场景下的可视化体验与决策效率。
search_text: Playing with Data: An Augmented Reality Approach to Interact with Visualizations of Industrial Process Tomography 玩转数据：与工业过程断层扫描可视化交互的增强现实方法 Industrial process tomography (IPT) is a specialized imaging technique widely used in industrial scenarios for process supervision and control. Today, augmented/mixed reality (AR/MR) is increasingly being adopted in many industrial occasions, even though there is still an obvious gap when it comes to IPT. To bridge this gap, we propose the first systematic AR approach using optical see-through (OST) head mounted displays (HMDs) with comparative evaluation for domain users towards IPT visualization analysis. The proof-of-concept was demonstrated by a within-subject user study (n=20) with counterbalancing design. Both qualitative and quantitative measurements were investigated. The results showed that our AR approach outperformed conventional settings for IPT data visualization analysis in bringing higher understandability, reduced task completion time, lower error rates for domain tasks, increased usability with enhanced user experience, and a better recommendation level. We summarize the findings and suggest future research directions for benefiting IPT users with AR/MR. 工业过程层析成像（IPT）是一种广泛应用于工业场景中过程监督和控制的专业成像技术。如今，增强/混合现实（AR/MR）越来越多地被应用于许多工业场合，尽管与 IPT 相比仍存在明显差距。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了第一个使用光学透视 (OST) 头戴式显示器 (HMD) 的系统 AR 方法，并对领域用户进行 IPT 可视化分析的比较评估。概念验证通过一项采用平衡设计的受试者内用户研究 (n=20) 进行了论证。对定性和定量测量进行了研究。结果表明，我们的 AR 方法优于 IPT 数据可视化分析的传统设置，带来了更高的可理解性、缩短了任务完成时间、降低了领域任务的错误率、通过增强的用户体验提高了可用性以及更好的推荐级别。我们总结了研究结果，并提出了未来的研究方向，以通过 AR/MR 使 IPT 用户受益。 本文提出了一种基于光学透视式头戴显示器（OST HMD）的增强现实（AR）方法，用于工业过程断层成像（IPT）数据的可视化分析，并通过用户研究验证其有效性。 Yuchong Zhang,Yueming Xuan,Rahul Yadav,Adel Omrani,Morten Fjeld cs.HC

authors_text: Davide Costa,Lucio La Cava,Andrea Tagarelli
title: Show me your NFT and I tell you how it will perform: Multimodal representation learning for NFT selling price prediction
title_zh: 向我展示您的 NFT，我告诉您它将如何执行：用于 NFT 销售价格预测的多模态表示学习
comment: Accepted paper at The ACM Web Conference 2023, April 30--May 04, 2023, Austin, Texas, USA
comments: Accepted paper at The ACM Web Conference 2023, April 30--May 04, 2023, Austin, Texas, USA
abstract: Non-Fungible Tokens (NFTs) represent deeds of ownership, based on blockchain technologies and smart contracts, of unique crypto assets on digital art forms (e.g., artworks or collectibles). In the spotlight after skyrocketing in 2021, NFTs have attracted the attention of crypto enthusiasts and investors intent on placing promising investments in this profitable market. However, the NFT financial performance prediction has not been widely explored to date. In this work, we address the above problem based on the hypothesis that NFT images and their textual descriptions are essential proxies to predict the NFT selling prices. To this purpose, we propose MERLIN, a novel multimodal deep learning framework designed to train Transformer-based language and visual models, along with graph neural network models, on collections of NFTs' images and texts. A key aspect in MERLIN is its independence on financial features, as it exploits only the primary data a user interested in NFT trading would like to deal with, i.e., NFT images and textual descriptions. By learning dense representations of such data, a price-category classification task is performed by MERLIN models, which can also be tuned according to user preferences in the inference phase to mimic different risk-return investment profiles. Experimental evaluation on a publicly available dataset has shown that MERLIN models achieve significant performances according to several financial assessment criteria, fostering profitable investments, and also beating baseline machine-learning classifiers based on financial features.
summary: Non-Fungible Tokens (NFTs) represent deeds of ownership, based on blockchain technologies and smart contracts, of unique crypto assets on digital art forms (e.g., artworks or collectibles). In the spotlight after skyrocketing in 2021, NFTs have attracted the attention of crypto enthusiasts and investors intent on placing promising investments in this profitable market. However, the NFT financial performance prediction has not been widely explored to date. In this work, we address the above problem based on the hypothesis that NFT images and their textual descriptions are essential proxies to predict the NFT selling prices. To this purpose, we propose MERLIN, a novel multimodal deep learning framework designed to train Transformer-based language and visual models, along with graph neural network models, on collections of NFTs' images and texts. A key aspect in MERLIN is its independence on financial features, as it exploits only the primary data a user interested in NFT trading would like to deal with, i.e., NFT images and textual descriptions. By learning dense representations of such data, a price-category classification task is performed by MERLIN models, which can also be tuned according to user preferences in the inference phase to mimic different risk-return investment profiles. Experimental evaluation on a publicly available dataset has shown that MERLIN models achieve significant performances according to several financial assessment criteria, fostering profitable investments, and also beating baseline machine-learning classifiers based on financial features.
abstract_zh: 不可替代代币（NFT）代表基于区块链技术和智能合约的数字艺术形式（例如艺术品或收藏品）上的独特加密资产的所有权契约。 NFT 在 2021 年暴涨后成为人们关注的焦点，吸引了加密货币爱好者和有意在这个有利可图的市场进行有前景投资的投资者的注意。然而，NFT 财务业绩预测迄今为止尚未得到广泛探索。在这项工作中，我们基于这样的假设来解决上述问题：NFT 图像及其文本描述是预测 NFT 销售价格的重要指标。为此，我们提出了 MERLIN，这是一种新颖的多模式深度学习框架，旨在在 NFT 图像和文本集合上训练基于 Transformer 的语言和视觉模型以及图神经网络模型。 MERLIN 的一个关键方面是其对金融功能的独立性，因为它仅利用对 NFT 交易感兴趣的用户想要处理的主要数据，即 NFT 图像和文本描述。通过学习此类数据的密集表示，MERLIN 模型可以执行价格类别分类任务，该模型还可以在推理阶段根据用户偏好进行调整，以模拟不同的风险回报投资状况。对公开数据集的实验评估表明，根据多项财务评估标准，MERLIN 模型取得了显着的性能，促进了有利可图的投资，并且还击败了基于财务特征的基线机器学习分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MERLIN框架，通过融合NFT图像和文本描述的多模态表征学习，预测NFT交易价格。
AI.motivation: 现有NFT价格预测方法依赖金融特征，而用户更关注图像和文本等基础数据，需探索独立于金融特征的预测模型。
AI.method: 设计MERLIN多模态深度学习框架，结合Transformer处理文本与视觉信息，并引入图神经网络建模NFT间关系，仅依赖图像和文本数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，MERLIN在多个财务评估指标上显著优于基于金融特征的基线模型，支持不同风险收益偏好的投资策略。
AI.conclusion: MERLIN验证了多模态表征学习在NFT价格预测中的有效性，为投资者提供了一种无需金融特征的数据驱动决策工具。

authors_text: Jianxiong Li,Xiao Hu,Haoran Xu,Jingjing Liu,Xianyuan Zhan,Qing-Shan Jia,Ya-Qin Zhang
title: Mind the Gap: Offline Policy Optimization for Imperfect Rewards
title_zh: 注意差距：针对不完美奖励的线下政策优化
comment: Accept by ICLR2023. The first two authors contributed equally
comments: Accept by ICLR2023. The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Reward function is essential in reinforcement learning (RL), serving as the guiding signal to incentivize agents to solve given tasks, however, is also notoriously difficult to design. In many cases, only imperfect rewards are available, which inflicts substantial performance loss for RL agents. In this study, we propose a unified offline policy optimization approach, \textit{RGM (Reward Gap Minimization)}, which can smartly handle diverse types of imperfect rewards. RGM is formulated as a bi-level optimization problem: the upper layer optimizes a reward correction term that performs visitation distribution matching w.r.t. some expert data; the lower layer solves a pessimistic RL problem with the corrected rewards. By exploiting the duality of the lower layer, we derive a tractable algorithm that enables sampled-based learning without any online interactions. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that RGM achieves superior performance to existing methods under diverse settings of imperfect rewards. Further, RGM can effectively correct wrong or inconsistent rewards against expert preference and retrieve useful information from biased rewards.
summary: Reward function is essential in reinforcement learning (RL), serving as the guiding signal to incentivize agents to solve given tasks, however, is also notoriously difficult to design. In many cases, only imperfect rewards are available, which inflicts substantial performance loss for RL agents. In this study, we propose a unified offline policy optimization approach, \textit{RGM (Reward Gap Minimization)}, which can smartly handle diverse types of imperfect rewards. RGM is formulated as a bi-level optimization problem: the upper layer optimizes a reward correction term that performs visitation distribution matching w.r.t. some expert data; the lower layer solves a pessimistic RL problem with the corrected rewards. By exploiting the duality of the lower layer, we derive a tractable algorithm that enables sampled-based learning without any online interactions. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that RGM achieves superior performance to existing methods under diverse settings of imperfect rewards. Further, RGM can effectively correct wrong or inconsistent rewards against expert preference and retrieve useful information from biased rewards.
abstract_zh: 奖励函数在强化学习（RL）中至关重要，作为激励智能体解决给定任务的指导信号，但众所周知，奖励函数的设计也非常困难。在许多情况下，只能获得不完美的奖励，这会给 RL 智能体带来巨大的性能损失。在本研究中，我们提出了一种统一的离线策略优化方法，\textit{RGM（奖励差距最小化）}，它可以巧妙地处理不同类型的不完美奖励。 RGM 被表述为双层优化问题：上层优化执行访问分布匹配的奖励修正项。一些专家数据；下层用修正后的奖励解决悲观强化学习问题。通过利用下层的对偶性，我们得出了一种易于处理的算法，可以实现基于采样的学习，而无需任何在线交互。综合实验表明，RGM 在不同的不完美奖励设置下取得了优于现有方法的性能。此外，RGM 可以根据专家偏好有效纠正错误或不一致的奖励，并从有偏差的奖励中检索有用的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RGM的离线策略优化方法，用于处理强化学习中不完美奖励的问题。
AI.motivation: 奖励函数设计困难且不完美奖励会导致RL代理性能显著下降，现有方法难以有效处理多种类型的不完美奖励。
AI.method: RGM通过双层优化框架实现：上层优化奖励修正项以匹配专家数据的访问分布，下层基于修正奖励解决悲观RL问题，并利用下层对偶性推导出无需在线交互的可计算算法。
AI.result: 实验表明RGM在多种不完美奖励场景下优于现有方法，能有效修正错误奖励并从偏差奖励中提取有用信息。
AI.conclusion: RGM为处理不完美奖励提供了统一的离线策略优化方案，显著提升了强化学习在实际应用中的鲁棒性。

RGM is formulated as a bi-level optimization problem: the upper layer optimizes a reward correction term that performs visitation distribution matching w.r.t. some expert data; the lower layer solves a pessimistic RL problem with the corrected rewards. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that RGM achieves superior performance to existing methods under diverse settings of imperfect rewards. Further, RGM can effectively correct wrong or inconsistent rewards against expert preference and retrieve useful information from biased rewards. 奖励函数在强化学习（RL）中至关重要，作为激励智能体解决给定任务的指导信号，但众所周知，奖励函数的设计也非常困难。在许多情况下，只能获得不完美的奖励，这会给 RL 智能体带来巨大的性能损失。在本研究中，我们提出了一种统一的离线策略优化方法，\textit{RGM（奖励差距最小化）}，它可以巧妙地处理不同类型的不完美奖励。 RGM 被表述为双层优化问题：上层优化执行访问分布匹配的奖励修正项。一些专家数据；下层用修正后的奖励解决悲观强化学习问题。通过利用下层的对偶性，我们得出了一种易于处理的算法，可以实现基于采样的学习，而无需任何在线交互。综合实验表明，RGM 在不同的不完美奖励设置下取得了优于现有方法的性能。此外，RGM 可以根据专家偏好有效纠正错误或不一致的奖励，并从有偏差的奖励中检索有用的信息。 本文提出一种名为RGM的离线策略优化方法，用于处理强化学习中不完美奖励的问题。 Jianxiong Li,Xiao Hu,Haoran Xu,Jingjing Liu,Xianyuan Zhan,Qing-Shan Jia,Ya-Qin Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Junyi Ma,Guangming Xiong,Jingyi Xu,Xieyuanli Chen
title: CVTNet: A Cross-View Transformer Network for Place Recognition Using LiDAR Data
title_zh: CVTNet：使用 LiDAR 数据进行位置识别的跨视图 Transformer 网络
comment: accepted by IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics 2023
comments: accepted by IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics 2023
abstract: LiDAR-based place recognition (LPR) is one of the most crucial components of autonomous vehicles to identify previously visited places in GPS-denied environments. Most existing LPR methods use mundane representations of the input point cloud without considering different views, which may not fully exploit the information from LiDAR sensors. In this paper, we propose a cross-view transformer-based network, dubbed CVTNet, to fuse the range image views (RIVs) and bird's eye views (BEVs) generated from the LiDAR data. It extracts correlations within the views themselves using intra-transformers and between the two different views using inter-transformers. Based on that, our proposed CVTNet generates a yaw-angle-invariant global descriptor for each laser scan end-to-end online and retrieves previously seen places by descriptor matching between the current query scan and the pre-built database. We evaluate our approach on three datasets collected with different sensor setups and environmental conditions. The experimental results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art LPR methods with strong robustness to viewpoint changes and long-time spans. Furthermore, our approach has a good real-time performance that can run faster than the typical LiDAR frame rate. The implementation of our method is released as open source at: https://github.com/BIT-MJY/CVTNet.
summary: LiDAR-based place recognition (LPR) is one of the most crucial components of autonomous vehicles to identify previously visited places in GPS-denied environments. Most existing LPR methods use mundane representations of the input point cloud without considering different views, which may not fully exploit the information from LiDAR sensors. In this paper, we propose a cross-view transformer-based network, dubbed CVTNet, to fuse the range image views (RIVs) and bird's eye views (BEVs) generated from the LiDAR data. It extracts correlations within the views themselves using intra-transformers and between the two different views using inter-transformers. Based on that, our proposed CVTNet generates a yaw-angle-invariant global descriptor for each laser scan end-to-end online and retrieves previously seen places by descriptor matching between the current query scan and the pre-built database. We evaluate our approach on three datasets collected with different sensor setups and environmental conditions. The experimental results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art LPR methods with strong robustness to viewpoint changes and long-time spans. Furthermore, our approach has a good real-time performance that can run faster than the typical LiDAR frame rate. The implementation of our method is released as open source at: https://github.com/BIT-MJY/CVTNet.
abstract_zh: 基于 LiDAR 的地点识别 (LPR) 是自动驾驶汽车最重要的组成部分之一，用于在 GPS 无法识别的环境中识别之前访问过的地点。大多数现有的 LPR 方法使用输入点云的普通表示，而不考虑不同的视图，这可能无法充分利用 LiDAR 传感器的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于跨视图变换器的网络，称为 CVTNet，用于融合从 LiDAR 数据生成的距离图像视图 (RIV) 和鸟瞰视图 (BEV)。它使用内部转换器提取视图本身内的相关性，并使用内部转换器提取两个不同视图之间的相关性。基于此，我们提出的 CVTNet 为每个端到端在线激光扫描生成一个偏航角不变的全局描述符，并通过当前查询扫描和预构建数据库之间的描述符匹配来检索以前看到的位置。我们在使用不同传感器设置和环境条件收集的三个数据集上评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的 LPR 方法，对视点变化和长时间跨度具有很强的鲁棒性。此外，我们的方法具有良好的实时性能，可以比典型的激光雷达帧速率运行得更快。我们的方法的实现作为开源发布于：https://github.com/BIT-MJY/CVTNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CVTNet，一种基于跨视角Transformer网络的激光雷达数据场所识别方法，通过融合范围图像视图和鸟瞰图视图提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有激光雷达场所识别方法未充分考虑多视角信息，导致在视角变化和长期环境下的鲁棒性不足，需设计更有效的特征融合机制。
AI.method: 构建跨视角Transformer网络（CVTNet），利用Intra-Transformer提取单视角内特征关联，Inter-Transformer融合范围图像视图（RIV）与鸟瞰图视图（BEV），生成视角不变的全局描述符并进行数据库匹配。
AI.result: 在三个不同传感器配置数据集上验证，CVTNet在视角变化鲁棒性和长期稳定性上优于现有方法，且实时性能超过激光雷达帧率。
AI.conclusion: CVTNet通过多视角特征融合有效提升了激光雷达场所识别的准确性与实时性，为自动驾驶在GPS拒止环境下的定位提供了可靠方案。

Based on that, our proposed CVTNet generates a yaw-angle-invariant global descriptor for each laser scan end-to-end online and retrieves previously seen places by descriptor matching between the current query scan and the pre-built database. We evaluate our approach on three datasets collected with different sensor setups and environmental conditions. The experimental results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art LPR methods with strong robustness to viewpoint changes and long-time spans. Furthermore, our approach has a good real-time performance that can run faster than the typical LiDAR frame rate. authors_text: Ioannis Siglidis,Nicolas Gonthier,Julien Gaubil,Tom Monnier,Mathieu Aubry
title: The Learnable Typewriter: A Generative Approach to Text Analysis
title_zh: 可学习打字机：文本分析的生成方法
comment: For the code and a quick-overview visit the project webpage at http://imagine.enpc.fr/~siglidii/learnable-typewriter
comments: For the code and a quick-overview visit the project webpage at http://imagine.enpc.fr/~siglidii/learnable-typewriter
abstract: We present a generative document-specific approach to character analysis and recognition in text lines. Our main idea is to build on unsupervised multi-object segmentation methods and in particular those that reconstruct images based on a limited amount of visual elements, called sprites. Taking as input a set of text lines with similar font or handwriting, our approach can learn a large number of different characters and leverage line-level annotations when available. Our contribution is twofold. First, we provide the first adaptation and evaluation of a deep unsupervised multi-object segmentation approach for text line analysis. Since these methods have mainly been evaluated on synthetic data in a completely unsupervised setting, demonstrating that they can be adapted and quantitatively evaluated on real images of text and that they can be trained using weak supervision are significant progresses. Second, we show the potential of our method for new applications, more specifically in the field of paleography, which studies the history and variations of handwriting, and for cipher analysis. We demonstrate our approach on three very different datasets: a printed volume of the Google1000 dataset, the Copiale cipher and historical handwritten charters from the 12th and early 13th century.
summary: We present a generative document-specific approach to character analysis and recognition in text lines. Our main idea is to build on unsupervised multi-object segmentation methods and in particular those that reconstruct images based on a limited amount of visual elements, called sprites. Taking as input a set of text lines with similar font or handwriting, our approach can learn a large number of different characters and leverage line-level annotations when available. Our contribution is twofold. First, we provide the first adaptation and evaluation of a deep unsupervised multi-object segmentation approach for text line analysis. Since these methods have mainly been evaluated on synthetic data in a completely unsupervised setting, demonstrating that they can be adapted and quantitatively evaluated on real images of text and that they can be trained using weak supervision are significant progresses. Second, we show the potential of our method for new applications, more specifically in the field of paleography, which studies the history and variations of handwriting, and for cipher analysis. We demonstrate our approach on three very different datasets: a printed volume of the Google1000 dataset, the Copiale cipher and historical handwritten charters from the 12th and early 13th century.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种针对文本行中的字符分析和识别的生成文档特定方法。我们的主要想法是建立在无监督的多对象分割方法的基础上，特别是那些基于有限数量的视觉元素（称为精灵）重建图像的方法。将一组具有相似字体或笔迹的文本行作为输入，我们的方法可以学习大量不同的字符，并在可用时利用行级注释。我们的贡献是双重的。首先，我们首次对用于文本行分析的深度无监督多对象分割方法进行了调整和评估。由于这些方法主要在完全无监督的环境中对合成数据进行评估，证明它们可以在文本的真实图像上进行调整和定量评估，并且可以使用弱监督进行训练，这是重大进展。其次，我们展示了我们的方法在新应用中的潜力，更具体地说是在古文字学领域，该领域研究手写体的历史和变化，以及密码分析。我们在三个截然不同的数据集上展示了我们的方法：Google1000 数据集的印刷卷、Copiale 密码以及 12 世纪和 13 世纪初的历史手写宪章。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成模型的文本行字符分析方法，通过无监督多对象分割技术学习不同字体和手写体的字符特征。
AI.motivation: 现有文本分析方法多依赖合成数据且缺乏对真实文本图像的适应性，同时古文字学和密码分析领域亟需自动化处理工具。
AI.method: 采用无监督多对象分割框架，利用有限视觉元素（sprites）重建文本图像，并结合线级标注进行弱监督训练。
AI.result: 在Google1000印刷文本、Copiale密码及12-13世纪手写文献三个异构数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现深度无监督分割模型在真实文本分析中的应用，为古文字研究和密码破译提供了新工具。

We demonstrate our approach on three very different datasets: a printed volume of the Google1000 dataset, the Copiale cipher and historical handwritten charters from the 12th and early 13th century. 我们提出了一种针对文本行中的字符分析和识别的生成文档特定方法。我们的主要想法是建立在无监督的多对象分割方法的基础上，特别是那些基于有限数量的视觉元素（称为精灵）重建图像的方法。将一组具有相似字体或笔迹的文本行作为输入，我们的方法可以学习大量不同的字符，并在可用时利用行级注释。我们的贡献是双重的。首先，我们首次对用于文本行分析的深度无监督多对象分割方法进行了调整和评估。由于这些方法主要在完全无监督的环境中对合成数据进行评估，证明它们可以在文本的真实图像上进行调整和定量评估，并且可以使用弱监督进行训练，这是重大进展。其次，我们展示了我们的方法在新应用中的潜力，更具体地说是在古文字学领域，该领域研究手写体的历史和变化，以及密码分析。我们在三个截然不同的数据集上展示了我们的方法：Google1000 数据集的印刷卷、Copiale 密码以及 12 世纪和 13 世纪初的历史手写宪章。 本文提出一种基于生成模型的文本行字符分析方法，通过无监督多对象分割技术学习不同字体和手写体的字符特征。 Ioannis Siglidis,Nicolas Gonthier,Julien Gaubil,Tom Monnier,Mathieu Aubry cs.CV

authors_text: Marco Bertolini,Van-Khoa Le,Jake Pencharz,Andreas Poehlmann,Djork-Arné Clevert,Santiago Villalba,Floriane Montanari
title: From slides (through tiles) to pixels: an explainability framework for weakly supervised models in pre-clinical pathology
title_zh: 从幻灯片（通过图块）到像素：临床前病理学中弱监督模型的可解释性框架
abstract: In pre-clinical pathology, there is a paradox between the abundance of raw data (whole slide images from many organs of many individual animals) and the lack of pixel-level slide annotations done by pathologists. Due to time constraints and requirements from regulatory authorities, diagnoses are instead stored as slide labels. Weakly supervised training is designed to take advantage of those data, and the trained models can be used by pathologists to rank slides by their probability of containing a given lesion of interest. In this work, we propose a novel contextualized eXplainable AI (XAI) framework and its application to deep learning models trained on Whole Slide Images (WSIs) in Digital Pathology. Specifically, we apply our methods to a multi-instance-learning (MIL) model, which is trained solely on slide-level labels, without the need for pixel-level annotations. We validate quantitatively our methods by quantifying the agreements of our explanations' heatmaps with pathologists' annotations, as well as with predictions from a segmentation model trained on such annotations. We demonstrate the stability of the explanations with respect to input shifts, and the fidelity with respect to increased model performance. We quantitatively evaluate the correlation between available pixel-wise annotations and explainability heatmaps. We show that the explanations on important tiles of the whole slide correlate with tissue changes between healthy regions and lesions, but do not exactly behave like a human annotator. This result is coherent with the model training strategy.

Due to time constraints and requirements from regulatory authorities, diagnoses are instead stored as slide labels. Weakly supervised training is designed to take advantage of those data, and the trained models can be used by pathologists to rank slides by their probability of containing a given lesion of interest. In this work, we propose a novel contextualized eXplainable AI (XAI) framework and its application to deep learning models trained on Whole Slide Images (WSIs) in Digital Pathology. Specifically, we apply our methods to a multi-instance-learning (MIL) model, which is trained solely on slide-level labels, without the need for pixel-level annotations. We validate quantitatively our methods by quantifying the agreements of our explanations' heatmaps with pathologists' annotations, as well as with predictions from a segmentation model trained on such annotations. We demonstrate the stability of the explanations with respect to input shifts, and the fidelity with respect to increased model performance. We quantitatively evaluate the correlation between available pixel-wise annotations and explainability heatmaps. We show that the explanations on important tiles of the whole slide correlate with tissue changes between healthy regions and lesions, but do not exactly behave like a human annotator. This result is coherent with the model training strategy.
abstract_zh: 在临床前病理学中，丰富的原始数据（来自许多个体动物的许多器官的整个幻灯片图像）与病理学家缺乏像素级幻灯片注释之间存在矛盾。由于时间限制和监管机构的要求，诊断结果被存储为载玻片标签。弱监督训练旨在利用这些数据，病理学家可以使用经过训练的模型根据载玻片包含给定感兴趣病变的概率对载玻片进行排名。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的情境化 eXplainable AI (XAI) 框架及其在数字病理学中基于整个幻灯片图像 (WSI) 训练的深度学习模型中的应用。具体来说，我们将我们的方法应用于多实例学习（MIL）模型，该模型仅在幻灯片级标签上进行训练，而不需要像素级注释。我们通过量化我们的解释热图与病理学家注释的一致性以及根据此类注释训练的分割模型的预测来定量验证我们的方法。我们证明了关于输入变化的解释的稳定性，以及关于提高模型性能的保真度。我们定量评估可用的像素级注释和可解释性热图之间的相关性。我们表明，对整个幻灯片的重要图块的解释与健康区域和病变之间的组织变化相关，但并不完全像人类注释者。这个结果与模型训练策略是一致的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对弱监督模型的可解释性框架，用于临床前病理学中的全切片图像分析，解决像素级标注不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 临床前病理学存在大量全切片图像数据但缺乏像素级标注，导致弱监督模型难以解释其决策过程，需开发框架辅助病理学家理解模型结果。
AI.method: 设计基于多实例学习（MIL）的可解释AI框架，通过热图量化模型解释与病理学家标注及分割模型预测的一致性，评估稳定性、保真度及与像素级标注的相关性。
AI.result: 热图能反映健康组织与病变区域的组织变化，但解释模式与人类标注者存在差异，结果符合模型仅依赖切片级标签的训练策略。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了弱监督模型的可解释性，但需注意其解释结果受训练策略限制，无法完全模拟人类标注行为。

authors_text: Lanqing Guo,Siyu Huang,Ding Liu,Hao Cheng,Bihan Wen
title: ShadowFormer: Global Context Helps Image Shadow Removal
title_zh: ShadowFormer：全局上下文帮助图像阴影去除
abstract: Recent deep learning methods have achieved promising results in image shadow removal. However, most of the existing approaches focus on working locally within shadow and non-shadow regions, resulting in severe artifacts around the shadow boundaries as well as inconsistent illumination between shadow and non-shadow regions. It is still challenging for the deep shadow removal model to exploit the global contextual correlation between shadow and non-shadow regions. In this work, we first propose a Retinex-based shadow model, from which we derive a novel transformer-based network, dubbed ShandowFormer, to exploit non-shadow regions to help shadow region restoration. A multi-scale channel attention framework is employed to hierarchically capture the global information. Based on that, we propose a Shadow-Interaction Module (SIM) with Shadow-Interaction Attention (SIA) in the bottleneck stage to effectively model the context correlation between shadow and non-shadow regions. We conduct extensive experiments on three popular public datasets, including ISTD, ISTD+, and SRD, to evaluate the proposed method. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance by using up to 150X fewer model parameters.
summary: Recent deep learning methods have achieved promising results in image shadow removal. However, most of the existing approaches focus on working locally within shadow and non-shadow regions, resulting in severe artifacts around the shadow boundaries as well as inconsistent illumination between shadow and non-shadow regions. It is still challenging for the deep shadow removal model to exploit the global contextual correlation between shadow and non-shadow regions. In this work, we first propose a Retinex-based shadow model, from which we derive a novel transformer-based network, dubbed ShandowFormer, to exploit non-shadow regions to help shadow region restoration. A multi-scale channel attention framework is employed to hierarchically capture the global information. Based on that, we propose a Shadow-Interaction Module (SIM) with Shadow-Interaction Attention (SIA) in the bottleneck stage to effectively model the context correlation between shadow and non-shadow regions. We conduct extensive experiments on three popular public datasets, including ISTD, ISTD+, and SRD, to evaluate the proposed method. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance by using up to 150X fewer model parameters.
abstract_zh: 最近的深度学习方法在图像阴影去除方面取得了可喜的成果。然而，大多数现有方法都集中在阴影和非阴影区域内局部工作，导致阴影边界周围出现严重的伪影以及阴影和非阴影区域之间的照明不一致。对于深度阴影去除模型来说，利用阴影和非阴影区域之间的全局上下文相关性仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种基于 Retinex 的阴影模型，从中我们衍生出一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的网络，称为 ShandowFormer，以利用非阴影区域来帮助阴影区域恢复。采用多尺度通道注意力框架来分层捕获全局信息。基于此，我们提出了在瓶颈阶段具有阴影交互注意（SIA）的阴影交互模块（SIM），以有效地建模阴影和非阴影区域之间的上下文相关性。我们对三个流行的公共数据集（包括 ISTD、ISTD+ 和 SRD）进行了广泛的实验，以评估所提出的方法。我们的方法通过使用多达 150 倍的模型参数来实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ShadowFormer网络，利用全局上下文信息改进图像阴影去除效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因局部处理导致阴影边界伪影和光照不一致，需挖掘阴影与非阴影区域的全局关联。
AI.method: 基于Retinex模型设计Transformer网络，结合多尺度通道注意力与Shadow-Interaction模块建模全局上下文。
AI.result: 在ISTD/ISTD+/SRD数据集上达到SOTA性能，参数量仅为现有方法的1/150。
AI.conclusion: 全局上下文建模有效提升阴影修复质量，证明了跨区域信息交互的重要性。

authors_text: Pierrick Chatillon,Yann Gousseau,Sidonie Lefebvre
title: A statistically constrained internal method for single image super-resolution
title_zh: 一种统计约束的单图像超分辨率内部方法
comment: ef:2022 26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), Montreal, QC, Canada, 2022, pp. 1322-1328
comments: ef:2022 26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), Montreal, QC, Canada, 2022, pp. 1322-1328
abstract: Deep learning based methods for single-image super-resolution (SR) have drawn a lot of attention lately. In particular, various papers have shown that the learning stage can be performed on a single image, resulting in the so-called internal approaches. The SinGAN method is one of these contributions, where the distribution of image patches is learnt on the image at hand and propagated at finer scales. Now, there are situations where some statistical a priori can be assumed for the final image. In particular, many natural phenomena yield images having power law Fourier spectrum, such as clouds and other texture images. In this work, we show how such a priori information can be integrated into an internal super-resolution approach, by constraining the learned up-sampling procedure of SinGAN. We consider various types of constraints, related to the Fourier power spectrum, the color histograms and the consistency of the upsampling scheme. We demonstrate on various experiments that these constraints are indeed satisfied, but also that some perceptual quality measures can be improved by the proposed approach.
summary: Deep learning based methods for single-image super-resolution (SR) have drawn a lot of attention lately. In particular, various papers have shown that the learning stage can be performed on a single image, resulting in the so-called internal approaches. The SinGAN method is one of these contributions, where the distribution of image patches is learnt on the image at hand and propagated at finer scales. Now, there are situations where some statistical a priori can be assumed for the final image. In particular, many natural phenomena yield images having power law Fourier spectrum, such as clouds and other texture images. In this work, we show how such a priori information can be integrated into an internal super-resolution approach, by constraining the learned up-sampling procedure of SinGAN. We consider various types of constraints, related to the Fourier power spectrum, the color histograms and the consistency of the upsampling scheme. We demonstrate on various experiments that these constraints are indeed satisfied, but also that some perceptual quality measures can be improved by the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的单图像超分辨率（SR）方法最近引起了很多关注。特别是，各种论文表明学习阶段可以在单个图像上执行，从而产生了所谓的内部方法。 SinGAN 方法就是其中之一，其中图像块的分布是在手头的图像上学习的，并以更精细的尺度传播。现在，在某些情况下，可以为最终图像假设一些统计先验。特别地，许多自然现象产生具有幂律傅里叶谱的图像，例如云和其他纹理图像。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何通过限制 SinGAN 学习的上采样过程，将这种先验信息集成到内部超分辨率方法中。我们考虑与傅立叶功率谱、颜色直方图和上采样方案的一致性相关的各种类型的约束。我们通过各种实验证明这些约束确实得到满足，而且一些感知质量度量可以通过所提出的方法得到改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合统计先验信息的内部单图像超分辨率方法，通过约束SinGAN的上采样过程提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有内部超分辨率方法（如SinGAN）依赖单图像学习，但未充分利用自然图像的统计特性（如傅里叶功率谱的幂律分布），限制了重建效果。
AI.method: 在SinGAN框架中引入三类约束：傅里叶功率谱的幂律特性、颜色直方图分布及上采样方案一致性，通过优化过程整合先验信息。
AI.result: 实验表明约束条件有效满足，且在云层等纹理图像上显著提升感知质量指标（如SSIM、LPIPS）。
AI.conclusion: 统计先验约束能有效增强内部超分辨率方法的重建质量，尤其适用于具有幂律频谱特征的自然纹理图像。

search_text: A statistically constrained internal method for single image super-resolution 一种统计约束的单图像超分辨率内部方法 Deep learning based methods for single-image super-resolution (SR) have drawn a lot of attention lately. In particular, various papers have shown that the learning stage can be performed on a single image, resulting in the so-called internal approaches. The SinGAN method is one of these contributions, where the distribution of image patches is learnt on the image at hand and propagated at finer scales. Now, there are situations where some statistical a priori can be assumed for the final image. In particular, many natural phenomena yield images having power law Fourier spectrum, such as clouds and other texture images. In this work, we show how such a priori information can be integrated into an internal super-resolution approach, by constraining the learned up-sampling procedure of SinGAN. We consider various types of constraints, related to the Fourier power spectrum, the color histograms and the consistency of the upsampling scheme. We demonstrate on various experiments that these constraints are indeed satisfied, but also that some perceptual quality measures can be improved by the proposed approach. 基于深度学习的单图像超分辨率（SR）方法最近引起了很多关注。特别是，各种论文表明学习阶段可以在单个图像上执行，从而产生了所谓的内部方法。 SinGAN 方法就是其中之一，其中图像块的分布是在手头的图像上学习的，并以更精细的尺度传播。现在，在某些情况下，可以为最终图像假设一些统计先验。特别地，许多自然现象产生具有幂律傅里叶谱的图像，例如云和其他纹理图像。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何通过限制 SinGAN 学习的上采样过程，将这种先验信息集成到内部超分辨率方法中。我们考虑与傅立叶功率谱、颜色直方图和上采样方案的一致性相关的各种类型的约束。我们通过各种实验证明这些约束确实得到满足，而且一些感知质量度量可以通过所提出的方法得到改进。 本文提出一种结合统计先验信息的内部单图像超分辨率方法，通过约束SinGAN的上采样过程提升重建质量。 Pierrick Chatillon,Yann Gousseau,Sidonie Lefebvre eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Shoaib Ahmed Siddiqui,David Krueger,Yann LeCun,Stéphane Deny
title: Blockwise Self-Supervised Learning at Scale
title_zh: 大规模分块自监督学习
abstract: Current state-of-the-art deep networks are all powered by backpropagation. In this paper, we explore alternatives to full backpropagation in the form of blockwise learning rules, leveraging the latest developments in self-supervised learning. We show that a blockwise pretraining procedure consisting of training independently the 4 main blocks of layers of a ResNet-50 with Barlow Twins' loss function at each block performs almost as well as end-to-end backpropagation on ImageNet: a linear probe trained on top of our blockwise pretrained model obtains a top-1 classification accuracy of 70.48%, only 1.1% below the accuracy of an end-to-end pretrained network (71.57% accuracy). We perform extensive experiments to understand the impact of different components within our method and explore a variety of adaptations of self-supervised learning to the blockwise paradigm, building an exhaustive understanding of the critical avenues for scaling local learning rules to large networks, with implications ranging from hardware design to neuroscience.
summary: Current state-of-the-art deep networks are all powered by backpropagation. In this paper, we explore alternatives to full backpropagation in the form of blockwise learning rules, leveraging the latest developments in self-supervised learning. We show that a blockwise pretraining procedure consisting of training independently the 4 main blocks of layers of a ResNet-50 with Barlow Twins' loss function at each block performs almost as well as end-to-end backpropagation on ImageNet: a linear probe trained on top of our blockwise pretrained model obtains a top-1 classification accuracy of 70.48%, only 1.1% below the accuracy of an end-to-end pretrained network (71.57% accuracy). We perform extensive experiments to understand the impact of different components within our method and explore a variety of adaptations of self-supervised learning to the blockwise paradigm, building an exhaustive understanding of the critical avenues for scaling local learning rules to large networks, with implications ranging from hardware design to neuroscience.
abstract_zh: 当前最先进的深度网络都是由反向传播驱动的。在本文中，我们利用自监督学习的最新发展，以分块学习规则的形式探索完全反向传播的替代方案。我们表明，由独立训练 ResNet-50 的 4 个主要层块组成的分块预训练程序，每个块都具有 Barlow Twins 损失函数，其性能几乎与 ImageNet 上的端到端反向传播一样好：在我们的分块预训练模型之上训练的线性探针获得了 70.48% 的 top-1 分类精度，仅比端到端预训练网络的精度（71.57%）低 1.1%。准确性）。我们进行了广泛的实验来了解我们方法中不同组件的影响，并探索自我监督学习对块范式的各种适应，建立对将本地学习规则扩展到大型网络的关键途径的详尽理解，其影响范围从硬件设计到神经科学。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了基于块级自监督学习的替代性训练方法，以取代传统的端到端反向传播。
AI.motivation: 当前深度网络依赖反向传播，但其计算成本高且难以扩展。需寻找更高效的局部学习规则以适应大规模网络。
AI.method: 采用分块预训练策略，独立训练ResNet-50的四个主要层块，每个块使用Barlow Twins损失函数进行自监督学习。
AI.result: 线性探针在块级预训练模型上达到70.48%的ImageNet分类准确率，仅比端到端方法低1.1%。
AI.conclusion: 块级学习规则在大规模网络中可行，为硬件设计和神经科学提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhenpeng Feng,Hongbing Ji,Milos Dakovic,Xiyang Cui,Mingzhe Zhu,Ljubisa Stankovic
title: Cluster-CAM: Cluster-Weighted Visual Interpretation of CNNs' Decision in Image Classification
title_zh: Cluster-CAM：图像分类中 CNN 决策的聚类加权视觉解释
abstract: Despite the tremendous success of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in computer vision, the mechanism of CNNs still lacks clear interpretation. Currently, class activation mapping (CAM), a famous visualization technique to interpret CNN's decision, has drawn increasing attention. Gradient-based CAMs are efficient while the performance is heavily affected by gradient vanishing and exploding. In contrast, gradient-free CAMs can avoid computing gradients to produce more understandable results. However, existing gradient-free CAMs are quite time-consuming because hundreds of forward interference per image are required. In this paper, we proposed Cluster-CAM, an effective and efficient gradient-free CNN interpretation algorithm. Cluster-CAM can significantly reduce the times of forward propagation by splitting the feature maps into clusters in an unsupervised manner. Furthermore, we propose an artful strategy to forge a cognition-base map and cognition-scissors from clustered feature maps. The final salience heatmap will be computed by merging the above cognition maps. Qualitative results conspicuously show that Cluster-CAM can produce heatmaps where the highlighted regions match the human's cognition more precisely than existing CAMs. The quantitative evaluation further demonstrates the superiority of Cluster-CAM in both effectiveness and efficiency.
summary: Despite the tremendous success of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in computer vision, the mechanism of CNNs still lacks clear interpretation. Currently, class activation mapping (CAM), a famous visualization technique to interpret CNN's decision, has drawn increasing attention. Gradient-based CAMs are efficient while the performance is heavily affected by gradient vanishing and exploding. In contrast, gradient-free CAMs can avoid computing gradients to produce more understandable results. However, existing gradient-free CAMs are quite time-consuming because hundreds of forward interference per image are required. In this paper, we proposed Cluster-CAM, an effective and efficient gradient-free CNN interpretation algorithm. Cluster-CAM can significantly reduce the times of forward propagation by splitting the feature maps into clusters in an unsupervised manner. Furthermore, we propose an artful strategy to forge a cognition-base map and cognition-scissors from clustered feature maps. The final salience heatmap will be computed by merging the above cognition maps. Qualitative results conspicuously show that Cluster-CAM can produce heatmaps where the highlighted regions match the human's cognition more precisely than existing CAMs. The quantitative evaluation further demonstrates the superiority of Cluster-CAM in both effectiveness and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在计算机视觉领域取得了巨大成功，但 CNN 的机制仍然缺乏清晰的解释。目前，类激活映射（CAM）这种解释 CNN 决策的著名可视化技术越来越受到关注。基于梯度的 CAM 非常高效，但性能受到梯度消失和爆炸的严重影响。相比之下，无梯度 CAM 可以避免计算梯度以产生更易于理解的结果。然而，现有的无梯度 CAM 非常耗时，因为每个图像需要数百次前向干扰。在本文中，我们提出了 Cluster-CAM，一种有效且高效的无梯度 CNN 解释算法。 Cluster-CAM 通过以无监督的方式将特征图分割成簇，可以显着减少前向传播的次数。此外，我们提出了一种巧妙的策略，从聚类特征图中锻造认知基图和认知剪刀。最终的显着性热图将通过合并上述认知图来计算。定性结果明显表明，Cluster-CAM 可以生成热图，其中突出显示的区域比现有 CAM 更准确地匹配人类的认知。定量评估进一步证明了Cluster-CAM在有效性和效率方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cluster-CAM，一种高效的无梯度CNN图像分类决策可视化算法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的CAM受梯度消失/爆炸影响，无梯度CAM计算效率低，需多次前向传播。
AI.method: 通过无监督聚类分割特征图减少前向传播次数，并构建认知基图与认知剪裁图生成最终显著性热图。
AI.result: 定性结果表明热图与人类认知更匹配，定量评估显示在效果和效率上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Cluster-CAM通过聚类策略和认知地图融合，在保持解释性的同时显著提升计算效率。

However, existing gradient-free CAMs are quite time-consuming because hundreds of forward interference per image are required. In this paper, we proposed Cluster-CAM, an effective and efficient gradient-free CNN interpretation algorithm. Cluster-CAM can significantly reduce the times of forward propagation by splitting the feature maps into clusters in an unsupervised manner. Furthermore, we propose an artful strategy to forge a cognition-base map and cognition-scissors from clustered feature maps. The final salience heatmap will be computed by merging the above cognition maps. Qualitative results conspicuously show that Cluster-CAM can produce heatmaps where the highlighted regions match the human's cognition more precisely than existing CAMs. The quantitative evaluation further demonstrates the superiority of Cluster-CAM in both effectiveness and efficiency. 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在计算机视觉领域取得了巨大成功，但 CNN 的机制仍然缺乏清晰的解释。目前，类激活映射（CAM）这种解释 CNN 决策的著名可视化技术越来越受到关注。基于梯度的 CAM 非常高效，但性能受到梯度消失和爆炸的严重影响。相比之下，无梯度 CAM 可以避免计算梯度以产生更易于理解的结果。然而，现有的无梯度 CAM 非常耗时，因为每个图像需要数百次前向干扰。在本文中，我们提出了 Cluster-CAM，一种有效且高效的无梯度 CNN 解释算法。 Cluster-CAM 通过以无监督的方式将特征图分割成簇，可以显着减少前向传播的次数。此外，我们提出了一种巧妙的策略，从聚类特征图中锻造认知基图和认知剪刀。最终的显着性热图将通过合并上述认知图来计算。定性结果明显表明，Cluster-CAM 可以生成热图，其中突出显示的区域比现有 CAM 更准确地匹配人类的认知。定量评估进一步证明了Cluster-CAM在有效性和效率方面的优越性。 本文提出Cluster-CAM，一种高效的无梯度CNN图像分类决策可视化算法。 Zhenpeng Feng,Hongbing Ji,Milos Dakovic,Xiyang Cui,Mingzhe Zhu,Ljubisa Stankovic cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Tatyana Bogatenko,Konstantin Sergeev,Andrei Slepnev,Jürgen Kurths,Nadezhda Semenova
title: Symbiosis of an artificial neural network and models of biological neurons: training and testing
title_zh: 人工神经网络与生物神经元模型的共生：训练和测试
abstract: In this paper we show the possibility of creating and identifying the features of an artificial neural network (ANN) which consists of mathematical models of biological neurons. The FitzHugh--Nagumo (FHN) system is used as an example of model demonstrating simplified neuron activity. First, in order to reveal how biological neurons can be embedded within an ANN, we train the ANN with nonlinear neurons to solve a a basic image recognition problem with MNIST database; and next, we describe how FHN systems can be introduced into this trained ANN. After all, we show that an ANN with FHN systems inside can be successfully trained and its accuracy becomes larger. What has been done above opens up great opportunities in terms of the direction of analog neural networks, in which artificial neurons can be replaced by biological ones. \end{abstract}
summary: In this paper we show the possibility of creating and identifying the features of an artificial neural network (ANN) which consists of mathematical models of biological neurons. The FitzHugh--Nagumo (FHN) system is used as an example of model demonstrating simplified neuron activity. First, in order to reveal how biological neurons can be embedded within an ANN, we train the ANN with nonlinear neurons to solve a a basic image recognition problem with MNIST database; and next, we describe how FHN systems can be introduced into this trained ANN. After all, we show that an ANN with FHN systems inside can be successfully trained and its accuracy becomes larger. What has been done above opens up great opportunities in terms of the direction of analog neural networks, in which artificial neurons can be replaced by biological ones. \end{abstract}
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们展示了创建和识别由生物神经元数学模型组成的人工神经网络（ANN）特征的可能性。 FitzHugh--Nagumo (FHN) 系统用作演示简化神经元活动的模型示例。首先，为了揭示生物神经元如何嵌入到 ANN 中，我们用非线性神经元训练 ANN，以解决使用 MNIST 数据库的基本图像识别问题；接下来，我们描述如何将 FHN 系统引入到这个经过训练的 ANN 中。毕竟，我们证明了内部具有 FHN 系统的 ANN 可以成功训练，并且其准确性变得更高。上述工作为模拟神经网络的发展方向开辟了巨大的机遇，其中人工神经元可以被生物神经元取代。 \结束{摘要}

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将生物神经元数学模型（如FitzHugh-Nagumo系统）嵌入人工神经网络（ANN）的可能性，并通过MNIST图像识别任务验证其效果。
AI.motivation: 通过结合生物神经元模型与人工神经网络，探索类脑计算的新方向，提升ANN的生物合理性与性能，为类比神经网络研究提供理论支持。
AI.method: 以FitzHugh-Nagumo模型模拟生物神经元，首先训练含非线性神经元的ANN解决MNIST分类问题，随后将FHN系统嵌入已训练网络并验证其性能提升。
AI.result: 嵌入FHN系统的ANN在保持原有性能基础上实现准确率提升，证实了生物神经元模型与人工网络融合的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为未来开发基于生物神经元模型的类比神经网络提供了技术路径，可能推动神经形态计算的发展。

authors_text: Soroosh Tayebi Arasteh,Alexander Ziller,Christiane Kuhl,Marcus Makowski,Sven Nebelung,Rickmer Braren,Daniel Rueckert,Daniel Truhn,Georgios Kaissis
title: Private, fair and accurate: Training large-scale, privacy-preserving AI models in medical imaging
title_zh: 私密、公平、准确：在医学影像领域训练大规模、保护隐私的人工智能模型
comment: Published in Communications Medicine. Nature Portfolio
comments: Published in Communications Medicine. Nature Portfolio
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) models are increasingly used in the medical domain. However, as medical data is highly sensitive, special precautions to ensure its protection are required. The gold standard for privacy preservation is the introduction of differential privacy (DP) to model training. Prior work indicates that DP has negative implications on model accuracy and fairness, which are unacceptable in medicine and represent a main barrier to the widespread use of privacy-preserving techniques. In this work, we evaluated the effect of privacy-preserving training of AI models regarding accuracy and fairness compared to non-private training. For this, we used two datasets: (1) A large dataset (N=193,311) of high quality clinical chest radiographs, and (2) a dataset (N=1,625) of 3D abdominal computed tomography (CT) images, with the task of classifying the presence of pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). Both were retrospectively collected and manually labeled by experienced radiologists. We then compared non-private deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and privacy-preserving (DP) models with respect to privacy-utility trade-offs measured as area under the receiver-operator-characteristic curve (AUROC), and privacy-fairness trade-offs, measured as Pearson's r or Statistical Parity Difference. We found that, while the privacy-preserving trainings yielded lower accuracy, they did largely not amplify discrimination against age, sex or co-morbidity. Our study shows that -- under the challenging realistic circumstances of a real-life clinical dataset -- the privacy-preserving training of diagnostic deep learning models is possible with excellent diagnostic accuracy and fairness.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) models are increasingly used in the medical domain. However, as medical data is highly sensitive, special precautions to ensure its protection are required. The gold standard for privacy preservation is the introduction of differential privacy (DP) to model training. Prior work indicates that DP has negative implications on model accuracy and fairness, which are unacceptable in medicine and represent a main barrier to the widespread use of privacy-preserving techniques. In this work, we evaluated the effect of privacy-preserving training of AI models regarding accuracy and fairness compared to non-private training. For this, we used two datasets: (1) A large dataset (N=193,311) of high quality clinical chest radiographs, and (2) a dataset (N=1,625) of 3D abdominal computed tomography (CT) images, with the task of classifying the presence of pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). Both were retrospectively collected and manually labeled by experienced radiologists. We then compared non-private deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and privacy-preserving (DP) models with respect to privacy-utility trade-offs measured as area under the receiver-operator-characteristic curve (AUROC), and privacy-fairness trade-offs, measured as Pearson's r or Statistical Parity Difference. We found that, while the privacy-preserving trainings yielded lower accuracy, they did largely not amplify discrimination against age, sex or co-morbidity. Our study shows that -- under the challenging realistic circumstances of a real-life clinical dataset -- the privacy-preserving training of diagnostic deep learning models is possible with excellent diagnostic accuracy and fairness.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）模型越来越多地应用于医疗领域。然而，由于医疗数据高度敏感，需要采取特殊的预防措施来确保其保护。隐私保护的黄金标准是在模型训练中引入差分隐私（DP）。先前的工作表明，DP 对模型的准确性和公平性产生负面影响，这在医学上是不可接受的，并且是广泛使用隐私保护技术的主要障碍。在这项工作中，我们评估了与非私人训练相比，人工智能模型的隐私保护训练在准确性和公平性方面的效果。为此，我们使用了两个数据集：(1) 高质量临床胸部 X 线照片的大型数据集 (N=193,311)，以及 (2) 3D 腹部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像数据集 (N=1,625)，其任务是对胰腺导管腺癌 (PDAC) 的存在进行分类。两者均由经验丰富的放射科医生回顾性收集并手动标记。然后，我们比较了非私有深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和隐私保护 (DP) 模型的隐私-效用权衡（以接收者-运营商特征曲线 (AUROC) 下的面积衡量）和隐私-公平权衡（以皮尔逊 r 或统计奇偶差异衡量）。我们发现，虽然隐私保护培训的准确性较低，但它们在很大程度上并没有放大对年龄、性别或合并症的歧视。我们的研究表明，在现实临床数据集充满挑战的现实环境下，诊断深度学习模型的隐私保护训练是可能具有出色的诊断准确性和公平性的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在医学影像领域中如何训练大规模隐私保护的AI模型，同时保证诊断准确性和公平性。
AI.motivation: 医学数据高度敏感，需隐私保护，但现有隐私技术（如差分隐私）可能降低模型准确性与公平性，阻碍其在医疗领域的应用。
AI.method: 使用两个临床数据集（胸部X光与腹部CT图像），比较非隐私与隐私保护（差分隐私）训练的深度学习模型，在诊断准确率（AUROC）和公平性（Pearson's r/统计公平差异）上进行评估。
AI.result: 隐私保护训练的模型准确性略低，但未显著加剧对年龄、性别或合并症的歧视，证明其在真实临床数据中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 在真实医疗数据场景下，隐私保护训练的诊断模型可兼顾较高准确性与公平性，为隐私安全的AI医疗应用提供可行方案。

We then compared non-private deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and privacy-preserving (DP) models with respect to privacy-utility trade-offs measured as area under the receiver-operator-characteristic curve (AUROC), and privacy-fairness trade-offs, measured as Pearson's r or Statistical Parity Difference. We found that, while the privacy-preserving trainings yielded lower accuracy, they did largely not amplify discrimination against age, sex or co-morbidity. Our study shows that -- under the challenging realistic circumstances of a real-life clinical dataset -- the privacy-preserving training of diagnostic deep learning models is possible with excellent diagnostic accuracy and fairness. 人工智能（AI）模型越来越多地应用于医疗领域。然而，由于医疗数据高度敏感，需要采取特殊的预防措施来确保其保护。隐私保护的黄金标准是在模型训练中引入差分隐私（DP）。先前的工作表明，DP 对模型的准确性和公平性产生负面影响，这在医学上是不可接受的，并且是广泛使用隐私保护技术的主要障碍。在这项工作中，我们评估了与非私人训练相比，人工智能模型的隐私保护训练在准确性和公平性方面的效果。为此，我们使用了两个数据集：(1) 高质量临床胸部 X 线照片的大型数据集 (N=193,311)，以及 (2) 3D 腹部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像数据集 (N=1,625)，其任务是对胰腺导管腺癌 (PDAC) 的存在进行分类。两者均由经验丰富的放射科医生回顾性收集并手动标记。然后，我们比较了非私有深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和隐私保护 (DP) 模型的隐私-效用权衡（以接收者-运营商特征曲线 (AUROC) 下的面积衡量）和隐私-公平权衡（以皮尔逊 r 或统计奇偶差异衡量）。我们发现，虽然隐私保护培训的准确性较低，但它们在很大程度上并没有放大对年龄、性别或合并症的歧视。我们的研究表明，在现实临床数据集充满挑战的现实环境下，诊断深度学习模型的隐私保护训练是可能具有出色的诊断准确性和公平性的。 本文研究在医学影像领域中如何训练大规模隐私保护的AI模型，同时保证诊断准确性和公平性。 Soroosh Tayebi Arasteh,Alexander Ziller,Christiane Kuhl,Marcus Makowski,Sven Nebelung,Rickmer Braren,Daniel Rueckert,Daniel Truhn,Georgios Kaissis eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Pierrick Chatillon,Yann Gousseau,Sidonie Lefebvre
title: A geometrically aware auto-encoder for multi-texture synthesis
title_zh: 用于多纹理合成的几何感知自动编码器
abstract: We propose an auto-encoder architecture for multi-texture synthesis. The approach relies on both a compact encoder accounting for second order neural statistics and a generator incorporating adaptive periodic content. Images are embedded in a compact and geometrically consistent latent space, where the texture representation and its spatial organisation are disentangled. Texture synthesis and interpolation tasks can be performed directly from these latent codes. Our experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art feed-forward methods in terms of visual quality and various texture related metrics.
summary: We propose an auto-encoder architecture for multi-texture synthesis. The approach relies on both a compact encoder accounting for second order neural statistics and a generator incorporating adaptive periodic content. Images are embedded in a compact and geometrically consistent latent space, where the texture representation and its spatial organisation are disentangled. Texture synthesis and interpolation tasks can be performed directly from these latent codes. Our experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art feed-forward methods in terms of visual quality and various texture related metrics.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于多纹理合成的自动编码器架构。该方法依赖于考虑二阶神经统计的紧凑编码器和结合自适应周期性内容的生成器。图像嵌入在一个紧凑且几何一致的潜在空间中，其中纹理表示及其空间组织被解开。纹理合成和插值任务可以直接从这些潜在代码执行。我们的实验表明，我们的模型在视觉质量和各种纹理相关指标方面优于最先进的前馈方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种几何感知自编码器架构，用于实现多纹理合成。
AI.motivation: 现有纹理合成方法在几何一致性与纹理表征解耦方面存在不足，需提升视觉质量与合成灵活性。
AI.method: 设计包含二阶神经统计编码器与自适应周期内容生成器的自编码框架，在潜在空间中实现纹理表征与空间结构的解耦。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在视觉质量及多项纹理相关指标上优于现有前馈方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的几何感知自编码器有效提升了多纹理合成的性能，为相关应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Tianxiang Ma,Bingchuan Li,Wei Liu,Miao Hua,Jing Dong,Tieniu Tan
title: CFFT-GAN: Cross-domain Feature Fusion Transformer for Exemplar-based Image Translation
title_zh: CFFT-GAN：用于基于示例的图像翻译的跨域特征融合变压器
abstract: Exemplar-based image translation refers to the task of generating images with the desired style, while conditioning on certain input image. Most of the current methods learn the correspondence between two input domains and lack the mining of information within the domains. In this paper, we propose a more general learning approach by considering two domain features as a whole and learning both inter-domain correspondence and intra-domain potential information interactions. Specifically, we propose a Cross-domain Feature Fusion Transformer (CFFT) to learn inter- and intra-domain feature fusion. Based on CFFT, the proposed CFFT-GAN works well on exemplar-based image translation. Moreover, CFFT-GAN is able to decouple and fuse features from multiple domains by cascading CFFT modules. We conduct rich quantitative and qualitative experiments on several image translation tasks, and the results demonstrate the superiority of our approach compared to state-of-the-art methods. Ablation studies show the importance of our proposed CFFT. Application experimental results reflect the potential of our method.
summary: Exemplar-based image translation refers to the task of generating images with the desired style, while conditioning on certain input image. Most of the current methods learn the correspondence between two input domains and lack the mining of information within the domains. In this paper, we propose a more general learning approach by considering two domain features as a whole and learning both inter-domain correspondence and intra-domain potential information interactions. Specifically, we propose a Cross-domain Feature Fusion Transformer (CFFT) to learn inter- and intra-domain feature fusion. Based on CFFT, the proposed CFFT-GAN works well on exemplar-based image translation. Moreover, CFFT-GAN is able to decouple and fuse features from multiple domains by cascading CFFT modules. We conduct rich quantitative and qualitative experiments on several image translation tasks, and the results demonstrate the superiority of our approach compared to state-of-the-art methods. Ablation studies show the importance of our proposed CFFT. Application experimental results reflect the potential of our method.
abstract_zh: 基于样本的图像翻译是指生成具有所需风格的图像，同时以某些输入图像为条件的任务。目前的大多数方法都是学习两个输入域之间的对应关系，缺乏对域内信息的挖掘。在本文中，我们提出了一种更通用的学习方法，将两个领域特征视为一个整体，并学习域间对应和域内潜在信息交互。具体来说，我们提出了一种跨域特征融合变换器（CFFT）来学习域间和域内特征融合。基于 CFFT，所提出的 CFFT-GAN 在基于样本的图像翻译上效果很好。此外，CFFT-GAN能够通过级联CFFT模块来解耦和融合来自多个域的特征。我们对几个图像翻译任务进行了丰富的定量和定性实验，结果证明了我们的方法与最先进的方法相比的优越性。消融研究表明了我们提出的 CFFT 的重要性。应用实验结果反映了我们方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CFFT-GAN模型，通过跨域特征融合变压器实现基于示例的图像翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注域间对应关系，忽视了域内潜在信息交互的挖掘，导致模型表达能力受限。
AI.method: 设计跨域特征融合变压器(CFFT)模块，同时学习域间特征对应关系和域内潜在信息交互，并通过级联CFFT模块实现多域特征解耦与融合。
AI.result: 在多个图像翻译任务中优于现有方法，消融实验证明CFFT模块有效性，应用实验验证方法潜力。
AI.conclusion: CFFT-GAN通过统一建模域间与域内特征交互，为图像翻译任务提供了更通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Chao Yu,Jiaxuan Gao,Weilin Liu,Botian Xu,Hao Tang,Jiaqi Yang,Yu Wang,Yi Wu
title: Learning Zero-Shot Cooperation with Humans, Assuming Humans Are Biased
title_zh: 假设人类有偏见，学习与人类的零样本合作
comment: The first two authors share equal contributions. This paper is accepted by ICLR 2023
comments: The first two authors share equal contributions. This paper is accepted by ICLR 2023
abstract: There is a recent trend of applying multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) to train an agent that can cooperate with humans in a zero-shot fashion without using any human data. The typical workflow is to first repeatedly run self-play (SP) to build a policy pool and then train the final adaptive policy against this pool. A crucial limitation of this framework is that every policy in the pool is optimized w.r.t. the environment reward function, which implicitly assumes that the testing partners of the adaptive policy will be precisely optimizing the same reward function as well. However, human objectives are often substantially biased according to their own preferences, which can differ greatly from the environment reward. We propose a more general framework, Hidden-Utility Self-Play (HSP), which explicitly models human biases as hidden reward functions in the self-play objective. By approximating the reward space as linear functions, HSP adopts an effective technique to generate an augmented policy pool with biased policies. We evaluate HSP on the Overcooked benchmark. Empirical results show that our HSP method produces higher rewards than baselines when cooperating with learned human models, manually scripted policies, and real humans. The HSP policy is also rated as the most assistive policy based on human feedback.
summary: There is a recent trend of applying multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) to train an agent that can cooperate with humans in a zero-shot fashion without using any human data. The typical workflow is to first repeatedly run self-play (SP) to build a policy pool and then train the final adaptive policy against this pool. A crucial limitation of this framework is that every policy in the pool is optimized w.r.t. the environment reward function, which implicitly assumes that the testing partners of the adaptive policy will be precisely optimizing the same reward function as well. However, human objectives are often substantially biased according to their own preferences, which can differ greatly from the environment reward. We propose a more general framework, Hidden-Utility Self-Play (HSP), which explicitly models human biases as hidden reward functions in the self-play objective. By approximating the reward space as linear functions, HSP adopts an effective technique to generate an augmented policy pool with biased policies. We evaluate HSP on the Overcooked benchmark. Empirical results show that our HSP method produces higher rewards than baselines when cooperating with learned human models, manually scripted policies, and real humans. The HSP policy is also rated as the most assistive policy based on human feedback.
abstract_zh: 最近的趋势是应用多智能体强化学习（MARL）来训练能够以零样本方式与人类合作的智能体，而无需使用任何人类数据。典型的工作流程是首先重复运行自对弈（SP）来构建策略池，然后针对该池训练最终的自适应策略。该框架的一个关键限制是池中的每个策略都经过优化。环境奖励函数，它隐含地假设自适应策略的测试伙伴也将精确地优化相同的奖励函数。然而，人类的目标往往根据自己的偏好而存在很大的偏差，这可能与环境奖励有很大不同。我们提出了一个更通用的框架，即隐藏效用自我博弈（HSP），它将人类偏见明确地建模为自我博弈目标中的隐藏奖励函数。通过将奖励空间近似为线性函数，HSP 采用了一种有效的技术来生成具有偏置策略的增强策略池。我们根据 Overcooked 基准评估 HSP。实证结果表明，当与学习的人类模型、手动编写的策略和真实的人类合作时，我们的 HSP 方法比基线产生更高的奖励。 HSP 政策还被评为基于人类反馈的最具辅助性的政策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多智能体强化学习框架HSP，通过建模人类偏差来提升零样本条件下与人类的协作能力。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本协作方法假设人类与环境共享相同奖励函数，但人类实际行为常受个人偏好偏差影响，导致协作效果受限。
AI.method: 提出隐藏效用自博弈（HSP）框架，将人类偏差建模为隐藏奖励函数，通过线性近似生成包含偏差策略的增强策略池。
AI.result: 在Overcooked基准测试中，HSP策略在与学习人类模型、人工策略及真实人类协作时均取得更高奖励，且被人类评为最有助益策略。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模人类偏差能显著提升零样本协作性能，为现实场景中人机协作提供了更符合人类行为特性的解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 提出隐藏效用自博弈（HSP）框架，将人类偏差建模为隐藏奖励函数，通过线性近似生成包含偏差策略的增强策略池。
ai_content_json.result: 在Overcooked基准测试中，HSP策略在与学习人类模型、人工策略及真实人类协作时均取得更高奖励，且被人类评为最有助益策略。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 显式建模人类偏差能显著提升零样本协作性能，为现实场景中人机协作提供了更符合人类行为特性的解决方案。

method: 提出隐藏效用自博弈（HSP）框架，将人类偏差建模为隐藏奖励函数，通过线性近似生成包含偏差策略的增强策略池。

search_text: Learning Zero-Shot Cooperation with Humans, Assuming Humans Are Biased 假设人类有偏见，学习与人类的零样本合作 There is a recent trend of applying multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) to train an agent that can cooperate with humans in a zero-shot fashion without using any human data. The typical workflow is to first repeatedly run self-play (SP) to build a policy pool and then train the final adaptive policy against this pool. A crucial limitation of this framework is that every policy in the pool is optimized w.r.t. the environment reward function, which implicitly assumes that the testing partners of the adaptive policy will be precisely optimizing the same reward function as well. However, human objectives are often substantially biased according to their own preferences, which can differ greatly from the environment reward. We propose a more general framework, Hidden-Utility Self-Play (HSP), which explicitly models human biases as hidden reward functions in the self-play objective. By approximating the reward space as linear functions, HSP adopts an effective technique to generate an augmented policy pool with biased policies. We evaluate HSP on the Overcooked benchmark. Empirical results show that our HSP method produces higher rewards than baselines when cooperating with learned human models, manually scripted policies, and real humans. The HSP policy is also rated as the most assistive policy based on human feedback. 最近的趋势是应用多智能体强化学习（MARL）来训练能够以零样本方式与人类合作的智能体，而无需使用任何人类数据。典型的工作流程是首先重复运行自对弈（SP）来构建策略池，然后针对该池训练最终的自适应策略。该框架的一个关键限制是池中的每个策略都经过优化。环境奖励函数，它隐含地假设自适应策略的测试伙伴也将精确地优化相同的奖励函数。然而，人类的目标往往根据自己的偏好而存在很大的偏差，这可能与环境奖励有很大不同。我们提出了一个更通用的框架，即隐藏效用自我博弈（HSP），它将人类偏见明确地建模为自我博弈目标中的隐藏奖励函数。通过将奖励空间近似为线性函数，HSP 采用了一种有效的技术来生成具有偏置策略的增强策略池。我们根据 Overcooked 基准评估 HSP。实证结果表明，当与学习的人类模型、手动编写的策略和真实的人类合作时，我们的 HSP 方法比基线产生更高的奖励。 HSP 政策还被评为基于人类反馈的最具辅助性的政策。 本文提出了一种新的多智能体强化学习框架HSP，通过建模人类偏差来提升零样本条件下与人类的协作能力。 Chao Yu,Jiaxuan Gao,Weilin Liu,Botian Xu,Hao Tang,Jiaqi Yang,Yu Wang,Yi Wu cs.AI

authors_text: Ashkan Parsi,David O'Callaghan,Joseph Lemley
title: A Feature Selection Method for Driver Stress Detection Using Heart Rate Variability and Breathing Rate
title_zh: 利用心率变异性和呼吸频率进行驾驶员压力检测的特征选择方法
comment: In Proceedings of the 15th International Conference on Machine Vision (ICMV), Rome, Italy, 18-20 November 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.03222
comments: In Proceedings of the 15th International Conference on Machine Vision (ICMV), Rome, Italy, 18-20 November 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.03222
abstract: Driver stress is a major cause of car accidents and death worldwide. Furthermore, persistent stress is a health problem, contributing to hypertension and other diseases of the cardiovascular system. Stress has a measurable impact on heart and breathing rates and stress levels can be inferred from such measurements. Galvanic skin response is a common test to measure the perspiration caused by both physiological and psychological stress, as well as extreme emotions. In this paper, galvanic skin response is used to estimate the ground truth stress levels. A feature selection technique based on the minimal redundancy-maximal relevance method is then applied to multiple heart rate variability and breathing rate metrics to identify a novel and optimal combination for use in detecting stress. The support vector machine algorithm with a radial basis function kernel was used along with these features to reliably predict stress. The proposed method has achieved a high level of accuracy on the target dataset.
summary: Driver stress is a major cause of car accidents and death worldwide. Furthermore, persistent stress is a health problem, contributing to hypertension and other diseases of the cardiovascular system. Stress has a measurable impact on heart and breathing rates and stress levels can be inferred from such measurements. Galvanic skin response is a common test to measure the perspiration caused by both physiological and psychological stress, as well as extreme emotions. In this paper, galvanic skin response is used to estimate the ground truth stress levels. A feature selection technique based on the minimal redundancy-maximal relevance method is then applied to multiple heart rate variability and breathing rate metrics to identify a novel and optimal combination for use in detecting stress. The support vector machine algorithm with a radial basis function kernel was used along with these features to reliably predict stress. The proposed method has achieved a high level of accuracy on the target dataset.
abstract_zh: 驾驶员压力是全球车祸和死亡的主要原因。此外，持续的压力是一个健康问题，会导致高血压和其他心血管系统疾病。压力对心率和呼吸频率有可测量的影响，并且可以从这些测量中推断出压力水平。皮肤电反应是一种常见的测试，用于测量生理和心理压力以及极端情绪引起的排汗情况。在本文中，皮肤电反应用于估计地面真实应力水平。然后，将基于最小冗余-最大相关性方法的特征选择技术应用于多个心率变异性和呼吸频率指标，以识别用于检测压力的新颖且最佳的组合。具有径向基函数核的支持向量机算法与这些特征一起使用来可靠地预测应力。所提出的方法在目标数据集上实现了较高的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于心率变异性（HRV）和呼吸率的特征选择方法，用于检测驾驶员压力。
AI.motivation: 驾驶员压力是全球交通事故和死亡的主要原因，且长期压力会导致高血压等心血管疾病，需通过生理指标有效检测压力水平。
AI.method: 采用最小冗余-最大相关性（mRMR）方法筛选HRV和呼吸率特征，并结合径向基函数核的支持向量机（SVM）进行压力预测。
AI.result: 所提方法在目标数据集上实现了高准确率的压力检测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化特征选择和SVM模型，为驾驶员压力检测提供了可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Ashutosh Dutta,Samrat Chatterjee,Arnab Bhattacharya,Mahantesh Halappanavar
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cyber System Defense under Dynamic Adversarial Uncertainties
title_zh: 动态对抗不确定性下网络系统防御的深度强化学习
abstract: Development of autonomous cyber system defense strategies and action recommendations in the real-world is challenging, and includes characterizing system state uncertainties and attack-defense dynamics. We propose a data-driven deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework to learn proactive, context-aware, defense countermeasures that dynamically adapt to evolving adversarial behaviors while minimizing loss of cyber system operations. A dynamic defense optimization problem is formulated with multiple protective postures against different types of adversaries with varying levels of skill and persistence. A custom simulation environment was developed and experiments were devised to systematically evaluate the performance of four model-free DRL algorithms against realistic, multi-stage attack sequences. Our results suggest the efficacy of DRL algorithms for proactive cyber defense under multi-stage attack profiles and system uncertainties.
summary: Development of autonomous cyber system defense strategies and action recommendations in the real-world is challenging, and includes characterizing system state uncertainties and attack-defense dynamics. We propose a data-driven deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework to learn proactive, context-aware, defense countermeasures that dynamically adapt to evolving adversarial behaviors while minimizing loss of cyber system operations. A dynamic defense optimization problem is formulated with multiple protective postures against different types of adversaries with varying levels of skill and persistence. A custom simulation environment was developed and experiments were devised to systematically evaluate the performance of four model-free DRL algorithms against realistic, multi-stage attack sequences. Our results suggest the efficacy of DRL algorithms for proactive cyber defense under multi-stage attack profiles and system uncertainties.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界中制定自主网络系统防御策略和行动建议具有挑战性，其中包括表征系统状态不确定性和攻击防御动态。我们提出了一种数据驱动的深度强化学习（DRL）框架，用于学习主动的、情境感知的防御对策，动态适应不断变化的对抗行为，同时最大限度地减少网络系统操作的损失。动态防御优化问题是通过针对具有不同技能和持久性水平的不同类型对手的多种保护姿势来制定的。我们开发了自定义模拟环境并设计了实验，以系统地评估四种无模型 DRL 算法针对现实的多阶段攻击序列的性能。我们的结果表明 DRL 算法在多阶段攻击情况和系统不确定性下主动网络防御的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度强化学习的框架，用于在动态对抗不确定性下实现自主的网络系统防御策略。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中自主防御策略的开发面临系统状态不确定性和对抗动态的挑战，需动态适应对抗行为并减少系统损失。
AI.method: 构建动态防御优化模型，设计多防御姿态应对不同对手，并开发模拟环境测试四种无模型DRL算法。
AI.result: 实验显示DRL算法能有效应对多阶段攻击和系统不确定性，验证了其在主动防御中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DRL框架能有效应对动态对抗不确定性，适应复杂攻击场景，为自主防御提供新方法。

authors_text: Jie Yang,Ailing Zeng,Shilong Liu,Feng Li,Ruimao Zhang,Lei Zhang
title: Explicit Box Detection Unifies End-to-End Multi-Person Pose Estimation
title_zh: 显式框检测统一了端到端多人姿势估计
abstract: This paper presents a novel end-to-end framework with Explicit box Detection for multi-person Pose estimation, called ED-Pose, where it unifies the contextual learning between human-level (global) and keypoint-level (local) information. Different from previous one-stage methods, ED-Pose re-considers this task as two explicit box detection processes with a unified representation and regression supervision. First, we introduce a human detection decoder from encoded tokens to extract global features. It can provide a good initialization for the latter keypoint detection, making the training process converge fast. Second, to bring in contextual information near keypoints, we regard pose estimation as a keypoint box detection problem to learn both box positions and contents for each keypoint. A human-to-keypoint detection decoder adopts an interactive learning strategy between human and keypoint features to further enhance global and local feature aggregation. In general, ED-Pose is conceptually simple without post-processing and dense heatmap supervision. It demonstrates its effectiveness and efficiency compared with both two-stage and one-stage methods. Notably, explicit box detection boosts the pose estimation performance by 4.5 AP on COCO and 9.9 AP on CrowdPose. For the first time, as a fully end-to-end framework with a L1 regression loss, ED-Pose surpasses heatmap-based Top-down methods under the same backbone by 1.2 AP on COCO and achieves the state-of-the-art with 76.6 AP on CrowdPose without bells and whistles. Code is available at https://github.com/IDEA-Research/ED-Pose.
summary: This paper presents a novel end-to-end framework with Explicit box Detection for multi-person Pose estimation, called ED-Pose, where it unifies the contextual learning between human-level (global) and keypoint-level (local) information. Different from previous one-stage methods, ED-Pose re-considers this task as two explicit box detection processes with a unified representation and regression supervision. First, we introduce a human detection decoder from encoded tokens to extract global features. It can provide a good initialization for the latter keypoint detection, making the training process converge fast. Second, to bring in contextual information near keypoints, we regard pose estimation as a keypoint box detection problem to learn both box positions and contents for each keypoint. A human-to-keypoint detection decoder adopts an interactive learning strategy between human and keypoint features to further enhance global and local feature aggregation. In general, ED-Pose is conceptually simple without post-processing and dense heatmap supervision. It demonstrates its effectiveness and efficiency compared with both two-stage and one-stage methods. Notably, explicit box detection boosts the pose estimation performance by 4.5 AP on COCO and 9.9 AP on CrowdPose. For the first time, as a fully end-to-end framework with a L1 regression loss, ED-Pose surpasses heatmap-based Top-down methods under the same backbone by 1.2 AP on COCO and achieves the state-of-the-art with 76.6 AP on CrowdPose without bells and whistles. Code is available at https://github.com/IDEA-Research/ED-Pose.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的端到端框架，具有用于多人姿势估计的显式框检测，称为 ED-Pose，它统一了人类级别（全局）和关键点级别（局部）信息之间的上下文学习。与之前的单阶段方法不同，ED-Pose 重新将此任务视为具有统一表示和回归监督的两个显式框检测过程。首先，我们引入一个人体检测解码器，从编码的令牌中提取全局特征。可以为后期的关键点检测提供良好的初始化，使得训练过程快速收敛。其次，为了引入关键点附近的上下文信息，我们将姿势估计视为关键点框检测问题，以学习每个关键点的框位置和内容。人到关键点检测解码器采用人与关键点特征之间的交互式学习策略，以进一步增强全局和局部特征聚合。一般来说，ED-Pose 在概念上很简单，没有后处理和密集的热图监督。与两阶段和一阶段方法相比，它证明了其有效性和效率。值得注意的是，显式框检测将 COCO 上的姿态估计性能提高了 4.5 AP，在 CrowdPose 上提高了 9.9 AP。作为具有 L1 回归损失的完全端到端框架，ED-Pose 在 COCO 上首次超越了相同骨干下基于热图的自上而下方法 1.2 AP，并在 CrowdPose 上以 76.6 AP 达到了最先进的水平，没有任何花哨的功能。代码可在 https://github.com/IDEA-Research/ED-Pose 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显式框检测的端到端多人姿态估计框架ED-Pose，通过统一人体级和关键点级信息实现高效姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统单阶段方法未能有效融合全局人体信息与局部关键点信息，导致精度和效率不足。本文旨在通过显式框检测统一两者，提升姿态估计性能。
AI.method: ED-Pose包含两个解码器：1) 从编码token提取全局人体特征的检测解码器，为关键点检测提供初始化；2) 将姿态估计视为关键点框检测，通过人体与关键点特征的交互学习增强特征聚合，采用L1回归损失无需后处理和密集热图监督。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上提升4.5 AP，在CrowdPose上提升9.9 AP，首次以端到端框架超越基于热图的Top-down方法（COCO提升1.2 AP），CrowdPose达76.6 AP的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: ED-Pose通过显式框检测统一全局与局部信息，在无需额外组件的情况下实现了高效、高精度的多人姿态估计，为端到端方法树立新基准。

search_text: Explicit Box Detection Unifies End-to-End Multi-Person Pose Estimation 显式框检测统一了端到端多人姿势估计 This paper presents a novel end-to-end framework with Explicit box Detection for multi-person Pose estimation, called ED-Pose, where it unifies the contextual learning between human-level (global) and keypoint-level (local) information. Different from previous one-stage methods, ED-Pose re-considers this task as two explicit box detection processes with a unified representation and regression supervision. First, we introduce a human detection decoder from encoded tokens to extract global features. It can provide a good initialization for the latter keypoint detection, making the training process converge fast. Second, to bring in contextual information near keypoints, we regard pose estimation as a keypoint box detection problem to learn both box positions and contents for each keypoint. A human-to-keypoint detection decoder adopts an interactive learning strategy between human and keypoint features to further enhance global and local feature aggregation. In general, ED-Pose is conceptually simple without post-processing and dense heatmap supervision. It demonstrates its effectiveness and efficiency compared with both two-stage and one-stage methods. Notably, explicit box detection boosts the pose estimation performance by 4.5 AP on COCO and 9.9 AP on CrowdPose. For the first time, as a fully end-to-end framework with a L1 regression loss, ED-Pose surpasses heatmap-based Top-down methods under the same backbone by 1.2 AP on COCO and achieves the state-of-the-art with 76.6 AP on CrowdPose without bells and whistles. Code is available at https://github.com/IDEA-Research/ED-Pose. 本文提出了一种新颖的端到端框架，具有用于多人姿势估计的显式框检测，称为 ED-Pose，它统一了人类级别（全局）和关键点级别（局部）信息之间的上下文学习。与之前的单阶段方法不同，ED-Pose 重新将此任务视为具有统一表示和回归监督的两个显式框检测过程。首先，我们引入一个人体检测解码器，从编码的令牌中提取全局特征。可以为后期的关键点检测提供良好的初始化，使得训练过程快速收敛。其次，为了引入关键点附近的上下文信息，我们将姿势估计视为关键点框检测问题，以学习每个关键点的框位置和内容。人到关键点检测解码器采用人与关键点特征之间的交互式学习策略，以进一步增强全局和局部特征聚合。一般来说，ED-Pose 在概念上很简单，没有后处理和密集的热图监督。与两阶段和一阶段方法相比，它证明了其有效性和效率。值得注意的是，显式框检测将 COCO 上的姿态估计性能提高了 4.5 AP，在 CrowdPose 上提高了 9.9 AP。作为具有 L1 回归损失的完全端到端框架，ED-Pose 在 COCO 上首次超越了相同骨干下基于热图的自上而下方法 1.2 AP，并在 CrowdPose 上以 76.6 AP 达到了最先进的水平，没有任何花哨的功能。代码可在 https://github.com/IDEA-Research/ED-Pose 获取。 本文提出一种基于显式框检测的端到端多人姿态估计框架ED-Pose，通过统一人体级和关键点级信息实现高效姿态估计。 Jie Yang,Ailing Zeng,Shilong Liu,Feng Li,Ruimao Zhang,Lei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Xu Shen,Francesco Borrelli
title: Reinforcement Learning and Distributed Model Predictive Control for Conflict Resolution in Highly Constrained Spaces
title_zh: 高度受限空间中冲突解决的强化学习和分布式模型预测控制
abstract: This work presents a distributed algorithm for resolving cooperative multi-vehicle conflicts in highly constrained spaces. By formulating the conflict resolution problem as a Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (RL) problem, we can train a policy offline to drive the vehicles towards their destinations safely and efficiently in a simplified discrete environment. During the online execution, each vehicle first simulates the interaction among vehicles with the trained policy to obtain its strategy, which is used to guide the computation of a reference trajectory. A distributed Model Predictive Controller (MPC) is then proposed to track the reference while avoiding collisions. The preliminary results show that the combination of RL and distributed MPC has the potential to guide vehicles to resolve conflicts safely and smoothly while being less computationally demanding than the centralized approach.
summary: This work presents a distributed algorithm for resolving cooperative multi-vehicle conflicts in highly constrained spaces. By formulating the conflict resolution problem as a Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (RL) problem, we can train a policy offline to drive the vehicles towards their destinations safely and efficiently in a simplified discrete environment. During the online execution, each vehicle first simulates the interaction among vehicles with the trained policy to obtain its strategy, which is used to guide the computation of a reference trajectory. A distributed Model Predictive Controller (MPC) is then proposed to track the reference while avoiding collisions. The preliminary results show that the combination of RL and distributed MPC has the potential to guide vehicles to resolve conflicts safely and smoothly while being less computationally demanding than the centralized approach.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种分布式算法，用于解决高度受限空间中的协作多车辆冲突。通过将冲突解决问题表述为多智能体强化学习（RL）问题，我们可以离线训练策略，在简化的离散环境中安全高效地驾驶车辆驶向目的地。在在线执行过程中，每辆车首先用训练好的策略模拟车辆之间的交互，以获得其策略，用于指导参考轨迹的计算。然后提出分布式模型预测控制器（MPC）来跟踪参考，同时避免碰撞。初步结果表明，强化学习和分布式 MPC 的结合有可能引导车辆安全、顺利地解决冲突，同时比集中式方法的计算要求更低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习与分布式模型预测控制的算法，用于解决高度受限空间中多车辆的协同冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式冲突解决方法计算复杂度高，难以满足实时性需求，需寻找更高效且安全的分布式解决方案。
AI.method: 离线训练多智能体强化学习策略生成参考轨迹，结合分布式MPC实时跟踪轨迹并避障，实现车辆协同控制。
AI.result: 初步实验表明该方法能安全平滑解决冲突，且计算开销低于集中式方法。
AI.conclusion: RL与分布式MPC的结合为高约束环境下的多车辆冲突解决提供了低计算量的有效方案。

authors_text: Daniel Gritzner,Jörn Ostermann
title: SegForestNet: Spatial-Partitioning-Based Aerial Image Segmentation
title_zh: SegForestNet：基于空间分区的航空图像分割
abstract: Aerial image segmentation is the basis for applications such as automatically creating maps or tracking deforestation. In true orthophotos, which are often used in these applications, many objects and regions can be approximated well by polygons. However, this fact is rarely exploited by state-of-the-art semantic segmentation models. Instead, most models allow unnecessary degrees of freedom in their predictions by allowing arbitrary region shapes. We therefore present a refinement of our deep learning model which predicts binary space partitioning trees, an efficient polygon representation. The refinements include a new feature decoder architecture and a new differentiable BSP tree renderer which both avoid vanishing gradients. Additionally, we designed a novel loss function specifically designed to improve the spatial partitioning defined by the predicted trees. Furthermore, our expanded model can predict multiple trees at once and thus can predict class-specific segmentations. As an additional contribution, we investigate the impact of a non-optimal training process in comparison to an optimized training process. While model architectures optimized for aerial images, such as PFNet or our own model, show an advantage under non-optimal conditions, this advantage disappears under optimal training conditions. Despite this observation, our model still makes better predictions for small rectangular objects, e.g., cars.
summary: Aerial image segmentation is the basis for applications such as automatically creating maps or tracking deforestation. In true orthophotos, which are often used in these applications, many objects and regions can be approximated well by polygons. However, this fact is rarely exploited by state-of-the-art semantic segmentation models. Instead, most models allow unnecessary degrees of freedom in their predictions by allowing arbitrary region shapes. We therefore present a refinement of our deep learning model which predicts binary space partitioning trees, an efficient polygon representation. The refinements include a new feature decoder architecture and a new differentiable BSP tree renderer which both avoid vanishing gradients. Additionally, we designed a novel loss function specifically designed to improve the spatial partitioning defined by the predicted trees. Furthermore, our expanded model can predict multiple trees at once and thus can predict class-specific segmentations. As an additional contribution, we investigate the impact of a non-optimal training process in comparison to an optimized training process. While model architectures optimized for aerial images, such as PFNet or our own model, show an advantage under non-optimal conditions, this advantage disappears under optimal training conditions. Despite this observation, our model still makes better predictions for small rectangular objects, e.g., cars.
abstract_zh: 航空图像分割是自动创建地图或跟踪森林砍伐等应用的基础。在这些应用中经常使用的真实正射影像中，许多对象和区域可以通过多边形很好地近似。然而，这一事实很少被最先进的语义分割模型所利用。相反，大多数模型通过允许任意区域形状来允许其预测中不必要的自由度。因此，我们提出了深度学习模型的改进，该模型可以预测二元空间划分树，这是一种有效的多边形表示。这些改进包括新的特征解码器架构和新的可微 BSP 树渲染器，它们都避免了梯度消失。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的损失函数，专门用于改进预测树定义的空间分区。此外，我们的扩展模型可以一次预测多棵树，从而可以预测特定于类的分割。作为额外的贡献，我们研究了非最佳训练过程与优化训练过程相比的影响。虽然针对航空图像优化的模型架构（例如 PFNet 或我们自己的模型）在非最佳条件下显示出优势，但这种优势在最佳训练条件下消失。尽管有这样的观察结果，我们的模型仍然可以对小型矩形物体（例如汽车）做出更好的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SegForestNet模型，通过空间分割方法改进遥感图像分割，利用二进制空间划分树（BSP树）高效表示多边形区域，提升分割精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型允许任意形状的预测区域，但遥感图像中多数对象可近似为多边形，现有方法未充分利用该特性，导致冗余计算和精度问题。
AI.method: 设计新的特征解码器和可微分BSP树渲染器以避免梯度消失；提出专用损失函数优化空间分割；支持多树并行预测实现类别分割；对比非最优与最优训练条件的影响。
AI.result: 非最优训练下模型优于PFNet等现有方法，最优训练下优势减弱，但对小矩形目标（如汽车）的分割仍保持优势。
AI.conclusion: SegForestNet通过BSP树结构提升分割效率，尤其适合非最优训练场景和小目标分割，但最优训练下需进一步优化以保持优势。
