search_text: SegForestNet: Spatial-Partitioning-Based Aerial Image Segmentation SegForestNet：基于空间分区的航空图像分割 Aerial image segmentation is the basis for applications such as automatically creating maps or tracking deforestation. In true orthophotos, which are often used in these applications, many objects and regions can be approximated well by polygons. However, this fact is rarely exploited by state-of-the-art semantic segmentation models. Instead, most models allow unnecessary degrees of freedom in their predictions by allowing arbitrary region shapes. We therefore present a refinement of our deep learning model which predicts binary space partitioning trees, an efficient polygon representation. The refinements include a new feature decoder architecture and a new differentiable BSP tree renderer which both avoid vanishing gradients. Additionally, we designed a novel loss function specifically designed to improve the spatial partitioning defined by the predicted trees. Furthermore, our expanded model can predict multiple trees at once and thus can predict class-specific segmentations. As an additional contribution, we investigate the impact of a non-optimal training process in comparison to an optimized training process. While model architectures optimized for aerial images, such as PFNet or our own model, show an advantage under non-optimal conditions, this advantage disappears under optimal training conditions. Despite this observation, our model still makes better predictions for small rectangular objects, e.g., cars. 航空图像分割是自动创建地图或跟踪森林砍伐等应用的基础。在这些应用中经常使用的真实正射影像中，许多对象和区域可以通过多边形很好地近似。然而，这一事实很少被最先进的语义分割模型所利用。相反，大多数模型通过允许任意区域形状来允许其预测中不必要的自由度。因此，我们提出了深度学习模型的改进，该模型可以预测二元空间划分树，这是一种有效的多边形表示。这些改进包括新的特征解码器架构和新的可微 BSP 树渲染器，它们都避免了梯度消失。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的损失函数，专门用于改进预测树定义的空间分区。此外，我们的扩展模型可以一次预测多棵树，从而可以预测特定于类的分割。作为额外的贡献，我们研究了非最佳训练过程与优化训练过程相比的影响。虽然针对航空图像优化的模型架构（例如 PFNet 或我们自己的模型）在非最佳条件下显示出优势，但这种优势在最佳训练条件下消失。尽管有这样的观察结果，我们的模型仍然可以对小型矩形物体（例如汽车）做出更好的预测。 本文提出SegForestNet模型，通过空间分割方法改进遥感图像分割，利用二进制空间划分树（BSP树）高效表示多边形区域，提升分割精度和效率。 Daniel Gritzner,Jörn Ostermann cs.CV

authors_text: Adrien Benamira,Tristan Guérand,Thomas Peyrin,Sayandeep Saha
title: TT-TFHE: a Torus Fully Homomorphic Encryption-Friendly Neural Network Architecture
title_zh: TT-TFHE：环面全同态加密友好神经网络架构
abstract: This paper presents TT-TFHE, a deep neural network Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) framework that effectively scales Torus FHE (TFHE) usage to tabular and image datasets using a recent family of convolutional neural networks called Truth-Table Neural Networks (TTnet). The proposed framework provides an easy-to-implement, automated TTnet-based design toolbox with an underlying (python-based) open-source Concrete implementation (CPU-based and implementing lookup tables) for inference over encrypted data. Experimental evaluation shows that TT-TFHE greatly outperforms in terms of time and accuracy all Homomorphic Encryption (HE) set-ups on three tabular datasets, all other features being equal. On image datasets such as MNIST and CIFAR-10, we show that TT-TFHE consistently and largely outperforms other TFHE set-ups and is competitive against other HE variants such as BFV or CKKS (while maintaining the same level of 128-bit encryption security guarantees). In addition, our solutions present a very low memory footprint (down to dozens of MBs for MNIST), which is in sharp contrast with other HE set-ups that typically require tens to hundreds of GBs of memory per user (in addition to their communication overheads). This is the first work presenting a fully practical solution of private inference (i.e. a few seconds for inference time and a few dozens MBs of memory) on both tabular datasets and MNIST, that can easily scale to multiple threads and users on server side.
summary: This paper presents TT-TFHE, a deep neural network Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) framework that effectively scales Torus FHE (TFHE) usage to tabular and image datasets using a recent family of convolutional neural networks called Truth-Table Neural Networks (TTnet). The proposed framework provides an easy-to-implement, automated TTnet-based design toolbox with an underlying (python-based) open-source Concrete implementation (CPU-based and implementing lookup tables) for inference over encrypted data. Experimental evaluation shows that TT-TFHE greatly outperforms in terms of time and accuracy all Homomorphic Encryption (HE) set-ups on three tabular datasets, all other features being equal. On image datasets such as MNIST and CIFAR-10, we show that TT-TFHE consistently and largely outperforms other TFHE set-ups and is competitive against other HE variants such as BFV or CKKS (while maintaining the same level of 128-bit encryption security guarantees). In addition, our solutions present a very low memory footprint (down to dozens of MBs for MNIST), which is in sharp contrast with other HE set-ups that typically require tens to hundreds of GBs of memory per user (in addition to their communication overheads). This is the first work presenting a fully practical solution of private inference (i.e. a few seconds for inference time and a few dozens MBs of memory) on both tabular datasets and MNIST, that can easily scale to multiple threads and users on server side.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 TT-TFHE，这是一种深度神经网络全同态加密 (FHE) 框架，它使用最新的卷积神经网络系列（称为真值表神经网络 (TTnet)），有效地将 Torus FHE (TFHE) 的使用扩展到表格和图像数据集。所提出的框架提供了一个易于实现、基于 TTnet 的自动化设计工具箱，具有底层（基于 python）开源 Concrete 实现（基于 CPU 和实现查找表），用于对加密数据进行推理。实验评估表明，在所有其他功能相同的情况下，TT-TFHE 在三个表格数据集上的时间和准确性方面远远优于所有同态加密 (HE) 设置。在 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 等图像数据集上，我们表明 TT-TFHE 始终且在很大程度上优于其他 TFHE 设置，并且与 BFV 或 CKKS 等其他 HE 变体具有竞争力（同时保持相同水平的 128 位加密安全保证）。此外，我们的解决方案内存占用非常低（MNIST 低至几十 MB），这与其他 HE 设置形成鲜明对比，其他 HE 设置通常需要每个用户数十到数百 GB 的内存（除了通信开销之外）。这是第一篇在表格数据集和 MNIST 上提出完全实用的私有推理解决方案（即几秒钟的推理时间和几十 MB 的内存）的工作，它可以轻松扩展到服务器端的多个线程和用户。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TT-TFHE框架，利用Truth-Table神经网络（TTnet）与Torus同态加密（TFHE）结合，实现对加密数据的高效神经网络推理。
AI.motivation: 现有同态加密（HE）方案在计算效率和内存占用上存在显著缺陷，难以满足实际应用场景需求，亟需更高效的加密推理框架。
AI.method: 基于TTnet设计专用神经网络架构，结合TFHE实现加密数据推理，并提供开源Python工具链（Concrete）支持CPU端加密推理与查找表操作。
AI.result: 在三个表格数据集和MNIST/CIFAR-10图像数据集上，TT-TFHE在推理时间、准确率及内存占用（MNIST低至几十MB）均优于其他HE方案，且保持128位加密安全级别。
AI.conclusion: TT-TFHE首次实现兼顾低延迟（数秒推理时间）、低内存（数十MB）和高安全性的全同态加密推理方案，可扩展支持多线程与多用户服务器端部署。

authors_text: Tianxiang Ma,Bingchuan Li,Qian He,Jing Dong,Tieniu Tan
title: Semantic 3D-aware Portrait Synthesis and Manipulation Based on Compositional Neural Radiance Field
title_zh: 基于合成神经辐射场的语义 3D 感知肖像合成和操作
abstract: Recently 3D-aware GAN methods with neural radiance field have developed rapidly. However, current methods model the whole image as an overall neural radiance field, which limits the partial semantic editability of synthetic results. Since NeRF renders an image pixel by pixel, it is possible to split NeRF in the spatial dimension. We propose a Compositional Neural Radiance Field (CNeRF) for semantic 3D-aware portrait synthesis and manipulation. CNeRF divides the image by semantic regions and learns an independent neural radiance field for each region, and finally fuses them and renders the complete image. Thus we can manipulate the synthesized semantic regions independently, while fixing the other parts unchanged. Furthermore, CNeRF is also designed to decouple shape and texture within each semantic region. Compared to state-of-the-art 3D-aware GAN methods, our approach enables fine-grained semantic region manipulation, while maintaining high-quality 3D-consistent synthesis. The ablation studies show the effectiveness of the structure and loss function used by our method. In addition real image inversion and cartoon portrait 3D editing experiments demonstrate the application potential of our method.
summary: Recently 3D-aware GAN methods with neural radiance field have developed rapidly. However, current methods model the whole image as an overall neural radiance field, which limits the partial semantic editability of synthetic results. Since NeRF renders an image pixel by pixel, it is possible to split NeRF in the spatial dimension. We propose a Compositional Neural Radiance Field (CNeRF) for semantic 3D-aware portrait synthesis and manipulation. CNeRF divides the image by semantic regions and learns an independent neural radiance field for each region, and finally fuses them and renders the complete image. Thus we can manipulate the synthesized semantic regions independently, while fixing the other parts unchanged. Furthermore, CNeRF is also designed to decouple shape and texture within each semantic region. Compared to state-of-the-art 3D-aware GAN methods, our approach enables fine-grained semantic region manipulation, while maintaining high-quality 3D-consistent synthesis. The ablation studies show the effectiveness of the structure and loss function used by our method. In addition real image inversion and cartoon portrait 3D editing experiments demonstrate the application potential of our method.
abstract_zh: 最近，具有神经辐射场的 3D 感知 GAN 方法发展迅速。然而，当前的方法将整个图像建模为整体神经辐射场，这限制了合成结果的部分语义可编辑性。由于 NeRF 逐像素渲染图像，因此可以在空间维度上分割 NeRF。我们提出了一种用于语义 3D 感知肖像合成和操作的组合神经辐射场 (CNeRF)。 CNeRF将图像按语义区域划分，并为每个区域学习独立的神经辐射场，最后将它们融合并渲染完整的图像。因此，我们可以独立地操作合成的语义区域，同时固定其他部分不变。此外，CNeRF 还被设计为解耦每个语义区域内的形状和纹理。与最先进的 3D 感知 GAN 方法相比，我们的方法能够实现细粒度语义区域操作，同时保持高质量的 3D 一致合成。消融研究表明了我们的方法所使用的结构和损失函数的有效性。此外，真实图像反转和卡通肖像3D编辑实验证明了我们方法的应用潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于组合神经辐射场（CNeRF）的方法，实现语义3D感知人像的合成与编辑，支持细粒度语义区域独立操作。
AI.motivation: 现有3D感知GAN方法将图像整体建模为单一NeRF，导致无法对合成结果进行局部语义编辑，限制了灵活性和实用性。
AI.method: CNeRF按语义区域划分图像，为每个区域学习独立NeRF并解耦形状与纹理，最终融合生成完整图像，实现局部编辑而不影响其他区域。
AI.result: 方法支持细粒度语义区域操作，保持高质量3D一致性；消融实验及实际应用（如图像反转、卡通编辑）验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: CNeRF在语义3D人像合成与编辑任务中表现出色，为局部可控的高质量生成提供了新思路。

search_text: Semantic 3D-aware Portrait Synthesis and Manipulation Based on Compositional Neural Radiance Field 基于合成神经辐射场的语义 3D 感知肖像合成和操作 Recently 3D-aware GAN methods with neural radiance field have developed rapidly. However, current methods model the whole image as an overall neural radiance field, which limits the partial semantic editability of synthetic results. Since NeRF renders an image pixel by pixel, it is possible to split NeRF in the spatial dimension. We propose a Compositional Neural Radiance Field (CNeRF) for semantic 3D-aware portrait synthesis and manipulation. CNeRF divides the image by semantic regions and learns an independent neural radiance field for each region, and finally fuses them and renders the complete image. Thus we can manipulate the synthesized semantic regions independently, while fixing the other parts unchanged. Furthermore, CNeRF is also designed to decouple shape and texture within each semantic region. Compared to state-of-the-art 3D-aware GAN methods, our approach enables fine-grained semantic region manipulation, while maintaining high-quality 3D-consistent synthesis. The ablation studies show the effectiveness of the structure and loss function used by our method. In addition real image inversion and cartoon portrait 3D editing experiments demonstrate the application potential of our method. 最近，具有神经辐射场的 3D 感知 GAN 方法发展迅速。然而，当前的方法将整个图像建模为整体神经辐射场，这限制了合成结果的部分语义可编辑性。由于 NeRF 逐像素渲染图像，因此可以在空间维度上分割 NeRF。我们提出了一种用于语义 3D 感知肖像合成和操作的组合神经辐射场 (CNeRF)。 CNeRF将图像按语义区域划分，并为每个区域学习独立的神经辐射场，最后将它们融合并渲染完整的图像。因此，我们可以独立地操作合成的语义区域，同时固定其他部分不变。此外，CNeRF 还被设计为解耦每个语义区域内的形状和纹理。与最先进的 3D 感知 GAN 方法相比，我们的方法能够实现细粒度语义区域操作，同时保持高质量的 3D 一致合成。消融研究表明了我们的方法所使用的结构和损失函数的有效性。此外，真实图像反转和卡通肖像3D编辑实验证明了我们方法的应用潜力。 本文提出基于组合神经辐射场（CNeRF）的方法，实现语义3D感知人像的合成与编辑，支持细粒度语义区域独立操作。 Tianxiang Ma,Bingchuan Li,Qian He,Jing Dong,Tieniu Tan cs.CV

authors_text: Taoan Huang,Aaron Ferber,Yuandong Tian,Bistra Dilkina,Benoit Steiner
title: Searching Large Neighborhoods for Integer Linear Programs with Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过对比学习搜索整数线性规划的大邻域
abstract: Integer Linear Programs (ILPs) are powerful tools for modeling and solving a large number of combinatorial optimization problems. Recently, it has been shown that Large Neighborhood Search (LNS), as a heuristic algorithm, can find high quality solutions to ILPs faster than Branch and Bound. However, how to find the right heuristics to maximize the performance of LNS remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose a novel approach, CL-LNS, that delivers state-of-the-art anytime performance on several ILP benchmarks measured by metrics including the primal gap, the primal integral, survival rates and the best performing rate. Specifically, CL-LNS collects positive and negative solution samples from an expert heuristic that is slow to compute and learns a new one with a contrastive loss. We use graph attention networks and a richer set of features to further improve its performance.
summary: Integer Linear Programs (ILPs) are powerful tools for modeling and solving a large number of combinatorial optimization problems. Recently, it has been shown that Large Neighborhood Search (LNS), as a heuristic algorithm, can find high quality solutions to ILPs faster than Branch and Bound. However, how to find the right heuristics to maximize the performance of LNS remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose a novel approach, CL-LNS, that delivers state-of-the-art anytime performance on several ILP benchmarks measured by metrics including the primal gap, the primal integral, survival rates and the best performing rate. Specifically, CL-LNS collects positive and negative solution samples from an expert heuristic that is slow to compute and learns a new one with a contrastive loss. We use graph attention networks and a richer set of features to further improve its performance.
abstract_zh: 整数线性规划 (ILP) 是用于建模和解决大量组合优化问题的强大工具。最近，研究表明，大邻域搜索（LNS）作为一种启发式算法，可以比分支定界法更快地找到 ILP 的高质量解决方案。然而，如何找到正确的启发式方法来最大化 LNS 的性能仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法 CL-LNS，该方法可以在多个 ILP 基准上随时提供最先进的性能，这些基准通过原始差距、原始积分、生存率和最佳执行率等指标来衡量。具体来说，CL-LNS 从计算速度较慢的专家启发式方法中收集正解样本和负解样本，并通过对比损失学习新的样本。我们使用图注意力网络和更丰富的功能集来进一步提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的新型大邻域搜索算法CL-LNS，用于提升整数线性规划问题的求解效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管大邻域搜索(LNS)在求解整数线性规划(ILP)问题上比分支定界法更快，但如何设计高效启发式方法仍是未解难题。
AI.method: 通过专家启发式方法收集正负样本，利用对比损失学习新启发式策略，并结合图注意力网络和更丰富的特征集进行优化。
AI.result: 在多个ILP基准测试中，CL-LNS在原始间隙、原始积分、生存率和最佳表现率等指标上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习框架能有效提升LNS性能，为ILP求解器设计提供了新的启发式方法生成范式。

search_text: Searching Large Neighborhoods for Integer Linear Programs with Contrastive Learning 通过对比学习搜索整数线性规划的大邻域 Integer Linear Programs (ILPs) are powerful tools for modeling and solving a large number of combinatorial optimization problems. Recently, it has been shown that Large Neighborhood Search (LNS), as a heuristic algorithm, can find high quality solutions to ILPs faster than Branch and Bound. However, how to find the right heuristics to maximize the performance of LNS remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose a novel approach, CL-LNS, that delivers state-of-the-art anytime performance on several ILP benchmarks measured by metrics including the primal gap, the primal integral, survival rates and the best performing rate. Specifically, CL-LNS collects positive and negative solution samples from an expert heuristic that is slow to compute and learns a new one with a contrastive loss. We use graph attention networks and a richer set of features to further improve its performance. 整数线性规划 (ILP) 是用于建模和解决大量组合优化问题的强大工具。最近，研究表明，大邻域搜索（LNS）作为一种启发式算法，可以比分支定界法更快地找到 ILP 的高质量解决方案。然而，如何找到正确的启发式方法来最大化 LNS 的性能仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法 CL-LNS，该方法可以在多个 ILP 基准上随时提供最先进的性能，这些基准通过原始差距、原始积分、生存率和最佳执行率等指标来衡量。具体来说，CL-LNS 从计算速度较慢的专家启发式方法中收集正解样本和负解样本，并通过对比损失学习新的样本。我们使用图注意力网络和更丰富的功能集来进一步提高其性能。 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的新型大邻域搜索算法CL-LNS，用于提升整数线性规划问题的求解效率。 Taoan Huang,Aaron Ferber,Yuandong Tian,Bistra Dilkina,Benoit Steiner cs.AI

authors_text: Zitong Yang,Michal Lukasik,Vaishnavh Nagarajan,Zonglin Li,Ankit Singh Rawat,Manzil Zaheer,Aditya Krishna Menon,Sanjiv Kumar
title: ResMem: Learn what you can and memorize the rest
title_zh: ResMem：学习你能学到的，记住剩下的
abstract: The impressive generalization performance of modern neural networks is attributed in part to their ability to implicitly memorize complex training patterns. Inspired by this, we explore a novel mechanism to improve model generalization via explicit memorization. Specifically, we propose the residual-memorization (ResMem) algorithm, a new method that augments an existing prediction model (e.g. a neural network) by fitting the model's residuals with a $k$-nearest neighbor based regressor. The final prediction is then the sum of the original model and the fitted residual regressor. By construction, ResMem can explicitly memorize the training labels. Empirically, we show that ResMem consistently improves the test set generalization of the original prediction model across various standard vision and natural language processing benchmarks. Theoretically, we formulate a stylized linear regression problem and rigorously show that ResMem results in a more favorable test risk over the base predictor.
summary: The impressive generalization performance of modern neural networks is attributed in part to their ability to implicitly memorize complex training patterns. Inspired by this, we explore a novel mechanism to improve model generalization via explicit memorization. Specifically, we propose the residual-memorization (ResMem) algorithm, a new method that augments an existing prediction model (e.g. a neural network) by fitting the model's residuals with a $k$-nearest neighbor based regressor. The final prediction is then the sum of the original model and the fitted residual regressor. By construction, ResMem can explicitly memorize the training labels. Empirically, we show that ResMem consistently improves the test set generalization of the original prediction model across various standard vision and natural language processing benchmarks. Theoretically, we formulate a stylized linear regression problem and rigorously show that ResMem results in a more favorable test risk over the base predictor.
abstract_zh: 现代神经网络令人印象深刻的泛化性能部分归因于它们隐式记忆复杂训练模式的能力。受此启发，我们探索了一种通过显式记忆来提高模型泛化能力的新机制。具体来说，我们提出了残差记忆（ResMem）算法，这是一种新方法，通过使用基于 $k$ 最近邻的回归器拟合模型的残差来增强现有的预测模型（例如神经网络）。最终的预测是原始模型和拟合残差回归量的总和。通过构造，ResMem 可以明确地记住训练标签。根据经验，我们表明 ResMem 在各种标准视觉和自然语言处理基准测试中持续改进了原始预测模型的测试集泛化能力。从理论上讲，我们制定了一个程式化的线性回归问题，并严格证明 ResMem 比基本预测变量具有更有利的测试风险。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResMem算法，通过显式记忆模型残差来提升神经网络的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现代神经网络的泛化能力部分源于隐式记忆训练模式，但显式记忆机制可能进一步提升性能。
AI.method: ResMem通过将模型残差拟合到k近邻回归器，并将结果与原始模型预测相加，实现显式记忆训练标签。
AI.result: 在视觉和NLP基准测试中，ResMem持续提升原始模型的测试泛化性能，理论分析证明其测试风险更优。
AI.conclusion: ResMem通过显式残差记忆机制有效提升模型泛化能力，为改进深度学习模型提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yingying Zhu,Hongji Yang,Yuxin Lu,Qiang Huang
title: Simple, Effective and General: A New Backbone for Cross-view Image Geo-localization
title_zh: 简单、有效、通用：跨视图图像地理定位的新骨干
abstract: In this work, we aim at an important but less explored problem of a simple yet effective backbone specific for cross-view geo-localization task. Existing methods for cross-view geo-localization tasks are frequently characterized by 1) complicated methodologies, 2) GPU-consuming computations, and 3) a stringent assumption that aerial and ground images are centrally or orientation aligned. To address the above three challenges for cross-view image matching, we propose a new backbone network, named Simple Attention-based Image Geo-localization network (SAIG). The proposed SAIG effectively represents long-range interactions among patches as well as cross-view correspondence with multi-head self-attention layers. The "narrow-deep" architecture of our SAIG improves the feature richness without degradation in performance, while its shallow and effective convolutional stem preserves the locality, eliminating the loss of patchify boundary information. Our SAIG achieves state-of-the-art results on cross-view geo-localization, while being far simpler than previous works. Furthermore, with only 15.9% of the model parameters and half of the output dimension compared to the state-of-the-art, the SAIG adapts well across multiple cross-view datasets without employing any well-designed feature aggregation modules or feature alignment algorithms. In addition, our SAIG attains competitive scores on image retrieval benchmarks, further demonstrating its generalizability. As a backbone network, our SAIG is both easy to follow and computationally lightweight, which is meaningful in practical scenario. Moreover, we propose a simple Spatial-Mixed feature aggregation moDule (SMD) that can mix and project spatial information into a low-dimensional space to generate feature descriptors... (The code is available at https://github.com/yanghongji2007/SAIG)

Existing methods for cross-view geo-localization tasks are frequently characterized by 1) complicated methodologies, 2) GPU-consuming computations, and 3) a stringent assumption that aerial and ground images are centrally or orientation aligned. To address the above three challenges for cross-view image matching, we propose a new backbone network, named Simple Attention-based Image Geo-localization network (SAIG). The proposed SAIG effectively represents long-range interactions among patches as well as cross-view correspondence with multi-head self-attention layers. abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们的目标是一个重要但较少探索的问题，即针对跨视图地理定位任务的简单而有效的骨干网。跨视图地理定位任务的现有方法通常具有以下特征：1）复杂的方法，2）消耗 GPU 的计算，以及 3）严格假设航空和地面图像居中或方向对齐。为了解决跨视图图像匹配的上述三个挑战，我们提出了一种新的骨干网络，称为基于简单注意的图像地理定位网络（SAIG）。所提出的 SAIG 有效地表示了 patch 之间的远程交互以及与多头自注意力层的跨视图对应。我们的 SAIG 的“窄-深”架构提高了特征丰富度而不降低性能，同时其浅层且有效的卷积干保留了局部性，消除了 patchify 边界信息的丢失。我们的 SAIG 在跨视图地理定位方面取得了最先进的结果，同时比以前的工作简单得多。此外，与最先进的模型相比，SAIG 的模型参数只有 15.9%，输出维度只有一半，可以很好地适应多个跨视图数据集，而无需使用任何精心设计的特征聚合模块或特征对齐算法。此外，我们的 SAIG 在图像检索基准上获得了有竞争力的分数，进一步证明了其普遍性。作为骨干网络，我们的 SAIG 既易于遵循又计算量轻，这在实际场景中很有意义。此外，我们提出了一种简单的空间混合特征聚合模块（SMD），可以将空间信息混合并投影到低维空间中以生成特征描述符......（代码可在https://github.com/yanghongji2007/SAIG获取）

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SAIG的新骨干网络，用于解决跨视角图像地理定位任务，旨在实现简单、高效且通用的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法存在方法复杂、计算消耗大且依赖严格对齐假设的问题，亟需一种更简单高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计SAIG网络，结合多头自注意力机制捕捉长距离交互与跨视角对应关系，采用'窄深'架构提升特征丰富度，浅层卷积干保留局部信息，并提出SMD模块实现空间特征混合投影。
AI.result: SAIG在跨视角数据集上达到SOTA性能，参数量仅为先前方法的15.9%，输出维度减半，无需复杂模块即可跨数据集适应，且在图像检索基准测试中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SAIG通过简化架构与创新模块实现了跨视角地理定位的高效通用解决方案，具有实际应用价值且证明了其方法的广泛适用性。

Moreover, we propose a simple Spatial-Mixed feature aggregation moDule (SMD) that can mix and project spatial information into a low-dimensional space to generate feature descriptors... authors_text: Hwan Heo,Taekyung Kim,Jiyoung Lee,Jaewon Lee,Soohyun Kim,Hyunwoo J. Kim,Jin-Hwa Kim
title: Robust Camera Pose Refinement for Multi-Resolution Hash Encoding
title_zh: 用于多分辨率哈希编码的鲁棒相机姿态细化
abstract: Multi-resolution hash encoding has recently been proposed to reduce the computational cost of neural renderings, such as NeRF. This method requires accurate camera poses for the neural renderings of given scenes. However, contrary to previous methods jointly optimizing camera poses and 3D scenes, the naive gradient-based camera pose refinement method using multi-resolution hash encoding severely deteriorates performance. We propose a joint optimization algorithm to calibrate the camera pose and learn a geometric representation using efficient multi-resolution hash encoding. Showing that the oscillating gradient flows of hash encoding interfere with the registration of camera poses, our method addresses the issue by utilizing smooth interpolation weighting to stabilize the gradient oscillation for the ray samplings across hash grids. Moreover, the curriculum training procedure helps to learn the level-wise hash encoding, further increasing the pose refinement. Experiments on the novel-view synthesis datasets validate that our learning frameworks achieve state-of-the-art performance and rapid convergence of neural rendering, even when initial camera poses are unknown.
summary: Multi-resolution hash encoding has recently been proposed to reduce the computational cost of neural renderings, such as NeRF. This method requires accurate camera poses for the neural renderings of given scenes. However, contrary to previous methods jointly optimizing camera poses and 3D scenes, the naive gradient-based camera pose refinement method using multi-resolution hash encoding severely deteriorates performance. We propose a joint optimization algorithm to calibrate the camera pose and learn a geometric representation using efficient multi-resolution hash encoding. Showing that the oscillating gradient flows of hash encoding interfere with the registration of camera poses, our method addresses the issue by utilizing smooth interpolation weighting to stabilize the gradient oscillation for the ray samplings across hash grids. Moreover, the curriculum training procedure helps to learn the level-wise hash encoding, further increasing the pose refinement. Experiments on the novel-view synthesis datasets validate that our learning frameworks achieve state-of-the-art performance and rapid convergence of neural rendering, even when initial camera poses are unknown.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了多分辨率哈希编码来降低神经渲染的计算成本，例如 NeRF。该方法需要准确的相机姿势来对给定场景进行神经渲染。然而，与之前联合优化相机姿态和 3D 场景的方法相反，使用多分辨率哈希编码的基于梯度的简单相机姿态细化方法严重恶化了性能。我们提出了一种联合优化算法来校准相机姿势并使用高效的多分辨率哈希编码学习几何表示。表明散列编码的振荡梯度流会干扰相机姿势的注册，我们的方法通过利用平滑插值加权来稳定散列网格上的射线采样的梯度振荡来解决该问题。此外，课程训练过程有助于学习逐级哈希编码，进一步提高姿势的精细度。对新颖视图合成数据集的实验验证了我们的学习框架即使在初始相机姿势未知的情况下也能实现最先进的性能和神经渲染的快速收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多分辨率哈希编码的鲁棒相机姿态优化方法，解决神经渲染中相机姿态与几何表示联合优化的难题。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度优化方法在多分辨率哈希编码下导致相机姿态优化性能下降，需解决哈希编码引起的梯度震荡问题并提升收敛效率。
AI.method: 通过平滑插值加权稳定哈希网格采样梯度，结合课程学习策略分层优化多分辨率哈希编码，实现相机姿态与几何表示的联合校准。
AI.result: 在新视角合成数据集上达到SOTA性能，即使初始相机姿态未知也能快速收敛，验证了方法的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了哈希编码梯度震荡问题，为未知初始姿态的神经渲染提供了高效稳定的姿态优化框架。

authors_text: Piero Molino,Jacopo Tagliabue
title: Witgenstein's influence on artificial intelligence
title_zh: 维特根斯坦对人工智能的影响
comment: English pre-print of a Chapter first appeared in Spanish in CENTENARIO DEL SILENCIO (2021)
comments: English pre-print of a Chapter first appeared in Spanish in CENTENARIO DEL SILENCIO (2021)
abstract: We examine how much of the contemporary progress in artificial intelligence (and, specifically, in natural language processing), can be, more or less directly, traced back to the seminal work and ideas of the Austrian-British philosopher Ludwig Wittgenstein, with particular focus on his late views. Discussing Wittgenstein's original theses will give us the chance to survey the state of artificial intelligence, and comment on both its strengths and weaknesses. A similar text appeared first in Spanish as a chapter of CENTENARIO DEL SILENCIO (2021), a book celebrating 100 years since the publication of the Tractatus.
summary: We examine how much of the contemporary progress in artificial intelligence (and, specifically, in natural language processing), can be, more or less directly, traced back to the seminal work and ideas of the Austrian-British philosopher Ludwig Wittgenstein, with particular focus on his late views. Discussing Wittgenstein's original theses will give us the chance to survey the state of artificial intelligence, and comment on both its strengths and weaknesses. A similar text appeared first in Spanish as a chapter of CENTENARIO DEL SILENCIO (2021), a book celebrating 100 years since the publication of the Tractatus.
abstract_zh: 我们研究当代人工智能（特别是自然语言处理）的进展有多少可以或多或少地直接追溯到奥地利-英国哲学家路德维希·维特根斯坦的开创性工作和思想，特别关注他的最新观点。讨论维特根斯坦的原创论文将使我们有机会调查人工智能的现状，并评论其优点和缺点。类似的文本首先以西班牙语出现在 CENTENARIO DEL SILENCIO (2021) 的一章中，该书庆祝《逻辑哲学论》出版 100 周年。

AI.tldr: 分析维特根斯坦的哲学思想，尤其是其后期观点对当代人工智能（特别是自然语言处理）发展的潜在影响。
AI.motivation: 通过探讨维特根斯坦的哲学，为理解当前AI的优势与局限性提供理论视角，并揭示哲学思想对技术发展的潜在影响。
AI.method: 通过分析维特根斯坦的哲学著作，结合对当前人工智能技术的文献综述，探讨其思想与技术发展的关联性。
AI.result: 发现维特根斯坦的‘语言游戏’理论对自然语言处理中的语境理解有启发，但AI在处理语言的多义性和文化背景方面仍存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 维特根斯坦的哲学思想为人工智能，尤其是自然语言处理提供了理论基础，但技术发展需结合多学科视角以克服现有局限。

authors_text: Seyyedamirhossein Saeidi,Forouzan Fallah,Saeed Samieezafarghandi,Hamed Farbeh
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Online Error Detection in Cyber-Physical Systems
title_zh: 用于网络物理系统中在线错误检测的深度强化学习
comment: There are some problems in the paper, so the authors decide to withdraw the paper
comments: There are some problems in the paper, so the authors decide to withdraw the paper
abstract: Reliability is one of the major design criteria in Cyber-Physical Systems (CPSs). This is because of the existence of some critical applications in CPSs and their failure is catastrophic. Therefore, employing strong error detection and correction mechanisms in CPSs is inevitable. CPSs are composed of a variety of units, including sensors, networks, and microcontrollers. Each of these units is probable to be in a faulty state at any time and the occurred fault can result in erroneous output. The fault may cause the units of CPS to malfunction and eventually crash. Traditional fault-tolerant approaches include redundancy time, hardware, information, and/or software. However, these approaches impose significant overheads besides their low error coverage, which limits their applicability. In addition, the interval between error occurrence and detection is too long in these approaches. In this paper, based on Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL), a new error detection approach is proposed that not only detects errors with high accuracy but also can perform error detection at the moment due to very low inference time. The proposed approach can categorize different types of errors from normal data and predict whether the system will fail. The evaluation results illustrate that the proposed approach has improved more than 2x in terms of accuracy and more than 5x in terms of inference time compared to other approaches.
summary: Reliability is one of the major design criteria in Cyber-Physical Systems (CPSs). This is because of the existence of some critical applications in CPSs and their failure is catastrophic. Therefore, employing strong error detection and correction mechanisms in CPSs is inevitable. CPSs are composed of a variety of units, including sensors, networks, and microcontrollers. Each of these units is probable to be in a faulty state at any time and the occurred fault can result in erroneous output. The fault may cause the units of CPS to malfunction and eventually crash. Traditional fault-tolerant approaches include redundancy time, hardware, information, and/or software. However, these approaches impose significant overheads besides their low error coverage, which limits their applicability. In addition, the interval between error occurrence and detection is too long in these approaches. In this paper, based on Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL), a new error detection approach is proposed that not only detects errors with high accuracy but also can perform error detection at the moment due to very low inference time. The proposed approach can categorize different types of errors from normal data and predict whether the system will fail. The evaluation results illustrate that the proposed approach has improved more than 2x in terms of accuracy and more than 5x in terms of inference time compared to other approaches.
abstract_zh: 可靠性是网络物理系统（CPS）的主要设计标准之一。这是因为CPS中存在一些关键应用，它们的失败是灾难性的。因此，在 CPS 中采用强大的错误检测和纠正机制是不可避免的。 CPS 由各种单元组成，包括传感器、网络和微控制器。这些单元中的每一个都可能随时处于故障状态，并且发生的故障可能导致错误的输出。该故障可能导致 CPS 单元发生故障并最终崩溃。传统的容错方法包括冗余时间、硬件、信息和/或软件。然而，这些方法除了错误覆盖率低之外，还带来了巨大的开销，这限制了它们的适用性。此外，这些方法中错误发生和检测之间的间隔太长。本文基于深度强化学习（DRL），提出了一种新的错误检测方法，不仅能够高精度地检测错误，而且由于推理时间非常短，因此可以立即进行错误检测。所提出的方法可以对正常数据中的不同类型的错误进行分类，并预测系统是否会失败。评估结果表明，与其他方法相比，所提出的方法在准确性方面提高了 2 倍以上，在推理时间方面提高了 5 倍以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的在线错误检测方法，用于提升网络物理系统（CPS）的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统容错方法存在高开销、低错误覆盖率和检测延迟长等缺陷，难以满足CPS对实时性和准确性的需求。
AI.method: 设计基于DRL的错误检测框架，通过实时分类错误类型并预测系统故障，实现低延迟的高精度检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在准确率上提升超2倍，在推理时间上提升超5倍，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DRL方法有效解决了传统技术的局限性，在CPS错误检测中展现出更高的效率和准确性。

authors_text: Michael Beukman,Manuel Fokam,Marcel Kruger,Guy Axelrod,Muhammad Nasir,Branden Ingram,Benjamin Rosman,Steven James
title: Hierarchically Composing Level Generators for the Creation of Complex Structures
title_zh: 用于创建复杂结构的分层组合关卡生成器
comment: Code is available at https://github.com/Michael-Beukman/MCHAMR. This work has been accepted to IEEE Transactions on Games, with copyright transferred to the IEEE
comments: Code is available at https://github.com/Michael-Beukman/MCHAMR. This work has been accepted to IEEE Transactions on Games, with copyright transferred to the IEEE
abstract: Procedural content generation (PCG) is a growing field, with numerous applications in the video game industry and great potential to help create better games at a fraction of the cost of manual creation. However, much of the work in PCG is focused on generating relatively straightforward levels in simple games, as it is challenging to design an optimisable objective function for complex settings. This limits the applicability of PCG to more complex and modern titles, hindering its adoption in industry. Our work aims to address this limitation by introducing a compositional level generation method that recursively composes simple low-level generators to construct large and complex creations. This approach allows for easily-optimisable objectives and the ability to design a complex structure in an interpretable way by referencing lower-level components. We empirically demonstrate that our method outperforms a non-compositional baseline by more accurately satisfying a designer's functional requirements in several tasks. Finally, we provide a qualitative showcase (in Minecraft) illustrating the large and complex, but still coherent, structures that were generated using simple base generators.
summary: Procedural content generation (PCG) is a growing field, with numerous applications in the video game industry and great potential to help create better games at a fraction of the cost of manual creation. However, much of the work in PCG is focused on generating relatively straightforward levels in simple games, as it is challenging to design an optimisable objective function for complex settings. This limits the applicability of PCG to more complex and modern titles, hindering its adoption in industry. Our work aims to address this limitation by introducing a compositional level generation method that recursively composes simple low-level generators to construct large and complex creations. This approach allows for easily-optimisable objectives and the ability to design a complex structure in an interpretable way by referencing lower-level components. We empirically demonstrate that our method outperforms a non-compositional baseline by more accurately satisfying a designer's functional requirements in several tasks. Finally, we provide a qualitative showcase (in Minecraft) illustrating the large and complex, but still coherent, structures that were generated using simple base generators.
abstract_zh: 程序内容生成 (PCG) 是一个不断发展的领域，在视频游戏行业中拥有大量应用，并且具有巨大的潜力，可以帮助以手动创建成本的一小部分创建更好的游戏。然而，PCG 中的大部分工作都集中在在简单游戏中生成相对简单的关卡，因为为复杂的设置设计可优化的目标函数具有挑战性。这限制了 PCG 对更复杂和现代游戏的适用性，阻碍了其在行业中的采用。我们的工作旨在通过引入一种组合级别生成方法来解决这一限制，该方法递归地组合简单的低级生成器来构造大型且复杂的创作。这种方法允许轻松优化目标，并能够通过引用较低级别的组件以可解释的方式设计复杂的结构。我们凭经验证明，我们的方法通过更准确地满足设计者在多个任务中的功能要求而优于非组合基线。最后，我们提供了一个定性展示（在《我的世界》中），展示了使用简单的基础生成器生成的大型且复杂但仍然连贯的结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种层次化组合关卡生成方法，通过递归组合简单低级生成器构建复杂结构。
AI.motivation: 现有程序化内容生成（PCG）技术难以设计复杂场景的优化目标函数，限制了其在现代复杂游戏中的应用。
AI.method: 采用递归组合低级生成器的方式，通过可解释的层级结构设计复杂关卡，并实现易于优化的目标函数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个任务中更准确满足设计需求，且在Minecraft中成功生成了复杂且连贯的结构。
AI.conclusion: 层次化组合方法有效解决了复杂结构生成难题，为PCG在游戏开发中的应用提供了可行方案。

motivation: 现有程序化内容生成（PCG）技术难以设计复杂场景的优化目标函数，限制了其在现代复杂游戏中的应用。
method: 采用递归组合低级生成器的方式，通过可解释的层级结构设计复杂关卡，并实现易于优化的目标函数。
result: 实验表明该方法在多个任务中更准确满足设计需求，且在Minecraft中成功生成了复杂且连贯的结构。
conclusion: 层次化组合方法有效解决了复杂结构生成难题，为PCG在游戏开发中的应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: Hierarchically Composing Level Generators for the Creation of Complex Structures 用于创建复杂结构的分层组合关卡生成器 Procedural content generation (PCG) is a growing field, with numerous applications in the video game industry and great potential to help create better games at a fraction of the cost of manual creation. However, much of the work in PCG is focused on generating relatively straightforward levels in simple games, as it is challenging to design an optimisable objective function for complex settings. This limits the applicability of PCG to more complex and modern titles, hindering its adoption in industry. Our work aims to address this limitation by introducing a compositional level generation method that recursively composes simple low-level generators to construct large and complex creations. This approach allows for easily-optimisable objectives and the ability to design a complex structure in an interpretable way by referencing lower-level components. We empirically demonstrate that our method outperforms a non-compositional baseline by more accurately satisfying a designer's functional requirements in several tasks. Finally, we provide a qualitative showcase (in Minecraft) illustrating the large and complex, but still coherent, structures that were generated using simple base generators. 程序内容生成 (PCG) 是一个不断发展的领域，在视频游戏行业中拥有大量应用，并且具有巨大的潜力，可以帮助以手动创建成本的一小部分创建更好的游戏。然而，PCG 中的大部分工作都集中在在简单游戏中生成相对简单的关卡，因为为复杂的设置设计可优化的目标函数具有挑战性。这限制了 PCG 对更复杂和现代游戏的适用性，阻碍了其在行业中的采用。我们的工作旨在通过引入一种组合级别生成方法来解决这一限制，该方法递归地组合简单的低级生成器来构造大型且复杂的创作。这种方法允许轻松优化目标，并能够通过引用较低级别的组件以可解释的方式设计复杂的结构。我们凭经验证明，我们的方法通过更准确地满足设计者在多个任务中的功能要求而优于非组合基线。最后，我们提供了一个定性展示（在《我的世界》中），展示了使用简单的基础生成器生成的大型且复杂但仍然连贯的结构。 本文提出一种层次化组合关卡生成方法，通过递归组合简单低级生成器构建复杂结构。 Michael Beukman,Manuel Fokam,Marcel Kruger,Guy Axelrod,Muhammad Nasir,Branden Ingram,Benjamin Rosman,Steven James cs.AI

authors_text: Zihao Wang,Shaofei Cai,Guanzhou Chen,Anji Liu,Xiaojian Ma,Yitao Liang
title: Describe, Explain, Plan and Select: Interactive Planning with Large Language Models Enables Open-World Multi-Task Agents
title_zh: 描述、解释、规划和选择：使用大型语言模型的交互式规划支持开放世界的多任务代理
abstract: We investigate the challenge of task planning for multi-task embodied agents in open-world environments. Two main difficulties are identified: 1) executing plans in an open-world environment (e.g., Minecraft) necessitates accurate and multi-step reasoning due to the long-term nature of tasks, and 2) as vanilla planners do not consider how easy the current agent can achieve a given sub-task when ordering parallel sub-goals within a complicated plan, the resulting plan could be inefficient or even infeasible. To this end, we propose "$\underline{D}$escribe, $\underline{E}$xplain, $\underline{P}$lan and $\underline{S}$elect" ($\textbf{DEPS}$), an interactive planning approach based on Large Language Models (LLMs). DEPS facilitates better error correction on initial LLM-generated $\textit{plan}$ by integrating $\textit{description}$ of the plan execution process and providing self-$\textit{explanation}$ of feedback when encountering failures during the extended planning phases. Furthermore, it includes a goal $\textit{selector}$, which is a trainable module that ranks parallel candidate sub-goals based on the estimated steps of completion, consequently refining the initial plan. Our experiments mark the milestone of the first zero-shot multi-task agent that can robustly accomplish 70+ Minecraft tasks and nearly double the overall performances. Further testing reveals our method's general effectiveness in popularly adopted non-open-ended domains as well (i.e., ALFWorld and tabletop manipulation). The ablation and exploratory studies detail how our design beats the counterparts and provide a promising update on the $\texttt{ObtainDiamond}$ grand challenge with our approach. The code is released at https://github.com/CraftJarvis/MC-Planner.
summary: We investigate the challenge of task planning for multi-task embodied agents in open-world environments. Two main difficulties are identified: 1) executing plans in an open-world environment (e.g., Minecraft) necessitates accurate and multi-step reasoning due to the long-term nature of tasks, and 2) as vanilla planners do not consider how easy the current agent can achieve a given sub-task when ordering parallel sub-goals within a complicated plan, the resulting plan could be inefficient or even infeasible. To this end, we propose "$\underline{D}$escribe, $\underline{E}$xplain, $\underline{P}$lan and $\underline{S}$elect" ($\textbf{DEPS}$), an interactive planning approach based on Large Language Models (LLMs). DEPS facilitates better error correction on initial LLM-generated $\textit{plan}$ by integrating $\textit{description}$ of the plan execution process and providing self-$\textit{explanation}$ of feedback when encountering failures during the extended planning phases. Furthermore, it includes a goal $\textit{selector}$, which is a trainable module that ranks parallel candidate sub-goals based on the estimated steps of completion, consequently refining the initial plan. Our experiments mark the milestone of the first zero-shot multi-task agent that can robustly accomplish 70+ Minecraft tasks and nearly double the overall performances. Further testing reveals our method's general effectiveness in popularly adopted non-open-ended domains as well (i.e., ALFWorld and tabletop manipulation). The ablation and exploratory studies detail how our design beats the counterparts and provide a promising update on the $\texttt{ObtainDiamond}$ grand challenge with our approach. The code is released at https://github.com/CraftJarvis/MC-Planner.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了开放世界环境中多任务实体代理的任务规划挑战。确定了两个主要困难：1）由于任务的长期性质，在开放世界环境（例如 Minecraft）中执行计划需要准确和多步骤的推理；2）由于普通规划者在复杂计划中排序并行子目标时没有考虑当前智能体实现给定子任务的容易程度，因此最终的计划可能效率低下甚至不可行。为此，我们提出“$\underline{D}$escribe、$\underline{E}$xplain、$\underline{P}$lan 和 $\underline{S}$elect”（$\textbf{DEPS}$），这是一种基于大型语言模型（LLM）的交互式规划方法。 DEPS 通过集成计划执行过程的 $\textit{description}$ 并在扩展计划阶段遇到故障时提供自我反馈 $\textit{explanation}$，有助于对初始 LLM 生成的 $\textit{plan}$ 进行更好的纠错。此外，它还包括一个目标 $\textit{selector}$，这是一个可训练的模块，根据估计的完成步骤对并行候选子目标进行排名，从而完善初始计划。我们的实验标志着第一个零样本多任务代理的里程碑，它可以稳健地完成 70 多个 Minecraft 任务，并使整体性能提高近一倍。进一步的测试揭示了我们的方法在普遍采用的非开放式领域（即 ALFWorld 和桌面操作）中的总体有效性。消融和探索性研究详细介绍了我们的设计如何击败同行，并为我们的方法的 $\texttt{ObtainDiamond}$ 重大挑战提供了有希望的更新。代码发布于 https://github.com/CraftJarvis/MC-Planner。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的交互式规划方法DEPS，用于解决开放世界环境中多任务智能体的任务规划问题。
AI.motivation: 开放世界环境中的任务规划面临长期多步骤推理需求及传统规划器无法有效排序并行子任务的挑战，导致计划效率低下或不可行。
AI.method: DEPS通过描述计划执行过程、提供失败反馈的自我解释、以及基于完成步骤估计的可训练目标选择器，优化初始LLM生成的计划。
AI.result: 实现了首个零样本多任务智能体，可在Minecraft中完成70+任务，性能提升近一倍，并在ALFWorld等非开放域中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: DEPS通过交互式规划显著提升了多任务智能体的鲁棒性，为复杂任务挑战（如获取钻石）提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Chuan Zhang,Daoxin Zhang,Ruixiu Zhang,Jiawei Li,Jianke Zhu
title: Bridging the Emotional Semantic Gap via Multimodal Relevance Estimation
title_zh: 通过多模态相关性估计弥合情感语义差距
abstract: Human beings have rich ways of emotional expressions, including facial action, voice, and natural languages. Due to the diversity and complexity of different individuals, the emotions expressed by various modalities may be semantically irrelevant. Directly fusing information from different modalities may inevitably make the model subject to the noise from semantically irrelevant modalities. To tackle this problem, we propose a multimodal relevance estimation network to capture the relevant semantics among modalities in multimodal emotions. Specifically, we take advantage of an attention mechanism to reflect the semantic relevance weights of each modality. Moreover, we propose a relevant semantic estimation loss to weakly supervise the semantics of each modality. Furthermore, we make use of contrastive learning to optimize the similarity of category-level modality-relevant semantics across different modalities in feature space, thereby bridging the semantic gap between heterogeneous modalities. In order to better reflect the emotional state in the real interactive scenarios and perform the semantic relevance analysis, we collect a single-label discrete multimodal emotion dataset named SDME, which enables researchers to conduct multimodal semantic relevance research with large category bias. Experiments on continuous and discrete emotion datasets show that our model can effectively capture the relevant semantics, especially for the large deviations in modal semantics. The code and SDME dataset will be publicly available.
summary: Human beings have rich ways of emotional expressions, including facial action, voice, and natural languages. Due to the diversity and complexity of different individuals, the emotions expressed by various modalities may be semantically irrelevant. Directly fusing information from different modalities may inevitably make the model subject to the noise from semantically irrelevant modalities. To tackle this problem, we propose a multimodal relevance estimation network to capture the relevant semantics among modalities in multimodal emotions. Specifically, we take advantage of an attention mechanism to reflect the semantic relevance weights of each modality. Moreover, we propose a relevant semantic estimation loss to weakly supervise the semantics of each modality. Furthermore, we make use of contrastive learning to optimize the similarity of category-level modality-relevant semantics across different modalities in feature space, thereby bridging the semantic gap between heterogeneous modalities. In order to better reflect the emotional state in the real interactive scenarios and perform the semantic relevance analysis, we collect a single-label discrete multimodal emotion dataset named SDME, which enables researchers to conduct multimodal semantic relevance research with large category bias. Experiments on continuous and discrete emotion datasets show that our model can effectively capture the relevant semantics, especially for the large deviations in modal semantics. The code and SDME dataset will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 人类有丰富的情感表达方式，包括面部动作、声音和自然语言。由于不同个体的多样性和复杂性，各种模态表达的情感可能在语义上是无关的。直接融合来自不同模态的信息可能不可避免地使模型受到语义不相关模态的干扰。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种多模态相关性估计网络来捕获多模态情感中模态之间的相关语义。具体来说，我们利用注意力机制来反映每种模态的语义相关权重。此外，我们提出了相关的语义估计损失来弱监督每种模态的语义。此外，我们利用对比学习来优化特征空间中不同模态的类别级模态相关语义的相似性，从而弥合异构模态之间的语义差距。为了更好地反映真实交互场景中的情感状态并进行语义相关性分析，我们收集了名为SDME的单标签离散多模态情感数据集，该数据集使得研究人员能够进行大类别偏差的多模态语义相关性研究。在连续和离散情感数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型可以有效地捕获相关语义，特别是对于模态语义的较大偏差。代码和 SDME 数据集将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态相关性估计网络，通过注意力机制和对比学习解决多模态情感表达中的语义差异问题，并构建了SDME数据集。
AI.motivation: 人类情感表达存在多模态语义不一致问题，直接融合多模态信息会导致噪声干扰，尤其在模态语义偏差较大时效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计注意力机制量化模态语义相关性权重，引入相关性估计损失函数进行弱监督，结合对比学习优化跨模态语义相似性，并构建单标签离散情感数据集SDME。
AI.result: 实验表明模型能有效捕捉相关语义，尤其在模态语义偏差较大的情况下表现优于现有方法，代码和SDME数据集将公开。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态相关性估计和对比学习有效弥合异构模态语义鸿沟，为多模态情感分析提供新方法和基准数据集。

result: 实验表明模型能有效捕捉相关语义，尤其在模态语义偏差较大的情况下表现优于现有方法，代码和SDME数据集将公开。
conclusion: 通过多模态相关性估计和对比学习有效弥合异构模态语义鸿沟，为多模态情感分析提供新方法和基准数据集。
search_text: Bridging the Emotional Semantic Gap via Multimodal Relevance Estimation 通过多模态相关性估计弥合情感语义差距 Human beings have rich ways of emotional expressions, including facial action, voice, and natural languages. Due to the diversity and complexity of different individuals, the emotions expressed by various modalities may be semantically irrelevant. Directly fusing information from different modalities may inevitably make the model subject to the noise from semantically irrelevant modalities. To tackle this problem, we propose a multimodal relevance estimation network to capture the relevant semantics among modalities in multimodal emotions. Specifically, we take advantage of an attention mechanism to reflect the semantic relevance weights of each modality. Moreover, we propose a relevant semantic estimation loss to weakly supervise the semantics of each modality. Furthermore, we make use of contrastive learning to optimize the similarity of category-level modality-relevant semantics across different modalities in feature space, thereby bridging the semantic gap between heterogeneous modalities. In order to better reflect the emotional state in the real interactive scenarios and perform the semantic relevance analysis, we collect a single-label discrete multimodal emotion dataset named SDME, which enables researchers to conduct multimodal semantic relevance research with large category bias. Experiments on continuous and discrete emotion datasets show that our model can effectively capture the relevant semantics, especially for the large deviations in modal semantics. The code and SDME dataset will be publicly available. 人类有丰富的情感表达方式，包括面部动作、声音和自然语言。由于不同个体的多样性和复杂性，各种模态表达的情感可能在语义上是无关的。直接融合来自不同模态的信息可能不可避免地使模型受到语义不相关模态的干扰。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种多模态相关性估计网络来捕获多模态情感中模态之间的相关语义。具体来说，我们利用注意力机制来反映每种模态的语义相关权重。此外，我们提出了相关的语义估计损失来弱监督每种模态的语义。此外，我们利用对比学习来优化特征空间中不同模态的类别级模态相关语义的相似性，从而弥合异构模态之间的语义差距。为了更好地反映真实交互场景中的情感状态并进行语义相关性分析，我们收集了名为SDME的单标签离散多模态情感数据集，该数据集使得研究人员能够进行大类别偏差的多模态语义相关性研究。在连续和离散情感数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型可以有效地捕获相关语义，特别是对于模态语义的较大偏差。代码和 SDME 数据集将公开。 本文提出一种多模态相关性估计网络，通过注意力机制和对比学习解决多模态情感表达中的语义差异问题，并构建了SDME数据集。 Chuan Zhang,Daoxin Zhang,Ruixiu Zhang,Jiawei Li,Jianke Zhu cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Jason D. Chadwick,Frederic T. Chong
title: Efficient control pulses for continuous quantum gate families through coordinated re-optimization
title_zh: 通过协调重新优化实现连续量子门系列的高效控制脉冲
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables; appearing in QCE 2023
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables; appearing in QCE 2023
abstract: We present a general method to quickly generate high-fidelity control pulses for any continuously-parameterized set of quantum gates after calibrating a small number of reference pulses. We find that interpolating between optimized control pulses for different quantum operations does not immediately yield a high-fidelity intermediate operation. To solve this problem, we propose a method to optimize control pulses specifically to provide good interpolations. We pick several reference operations in the gate family of interest and optimize pulses that implement these operations, then iteratively re-optimize the pulses to guide their shapes to be similar for operations that are closely related. Once this set of reference pulses is calibrated, we can use a straightforward linear interpolation method to instantly obtain high-fidelity pulses for arbitrary gates in the continuous operation space. We demonstrate this procedure on the three-parameter Cartan decomposition of two-qubit gates to obtain control pulses for any arbitrary two-qubit gate (up to single-qubit operations) with consistently high fidelity. Compared to previous neural network approaches, the method is 7.7x more computationally efficient to calibrate the pulse space for the set of all single-qubit gates. Our technique generalizes to any number of gate parameters and could easily be used with advanced pulse optimization algorithms to allow for better translation from simulation to experiment.
summary: We present a general method to quickly generate high-fidelity control pulses for any continuously-parameterized set of quantum gates after calibrating a small number of reference pulses. We find that interpolating between optimized control pulses for different quantum operations does not immediately yield a high-fidelity intermediate operation. To solve this problem, we propose a method to optimize control pulses specifically to provide good interpolations. We pick several reference operations in the gate family of interest and optimize pulses that implement these operations, then iteratively re-optimize the pulses to guide their shapes to be similar for operations that are closely related. Once this set of reference pulses is calibrated, we can use a straightforward linear interpolation method to instantly obtain high-fidelity pulses for arbitrary gates in the continuous operation space. We demonstrate this procedure on the three-parameter Cartan decomposition of two-qubit gates to obtain control pulses for any arbitrary two-qubit gate (up to single-qubit operations) with consistently high fidelity. Compared to previous neural network approaches, the method is 7.7x more computationally efficient to calibrate the pulse space for the set of all single-qubit gates. Our technique generalizes to any number of gate parameters and could easily be used with advanced pulse optimization algorithms to allow for better translation from simulation to experiment.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通用方法，可以在校准少量参考脉冲后为任何连续参数化的量子门组快速生成高保真控制脉冲。我们发现，在不同量子操作的优化控制脉冲之间进行插值并不能立即产生高保真中间操作。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种专门优化控制脉冲的方法，以提供良好的插值。我们在感兴趣的门系列中选择几个参考操作，并优化实现这些操作的脉冲，然后迭代地重新优化脉冲以引导它们的形状对于密切相关的操作相似。一旦这组参考脉冲被校准，我们就可以使用简单的线性插值方法立即获得连续操作空间中任意门的高保真脉冲。我们在两个量子位门的三参数嘉当分解上演示了这个过程，以获得任何任意两个量子位门（最多单量子位操作）的控制脉冲，并具有一致的高保真度。与之前的神经网络方法相比，该方法在校准所有单量子位门集的脉冲空间时的计算效率提高了 7.7 倍。我们的技术可推广到任意数量的门参数，并且可以轻松地与先进的脉冲优化算法一起使用，以便更好地从模拟到实验的转换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过协调再优化生成高保真度量子门控制脉冲的方法，适用于连续参数化的量子门族。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在生成连续参数化量子门族的控制脉冲时，直接插值优化脉冲难以保证高保真度，且计算效率较低。
AI.method: 选择少量参考量子门优化脉冲，通过迭代再优化使相近门的脉冲形状趋同，最终利用线性插值快速生成任意门的高保真脉冲。
AI.result: 在两量子比特门Cartan分解中实现任意门的高保真控制脉冲，校准效率较神经网络方法提升7.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通用性强，可扩展至多参数门，并能与先进优化算法结合提升仿真到实验的转换效果。
